Genesis1:1 Tshimolohong Modimo o ne a hlole lehodimo le lefatshe. 
Genesis1:2 Lefatshe le ne le se na sebopeho, le se na letho; lefifi le ne le aparetse bodiba. Moya wa Modimo o ne o okaokela metsi." 
Genesis1:3 Modimo a re: “Lesedi le be teng!” Yaba lesedi le ba teng. 
Genesis1:4 Modimo a bona hore lesedi le letle, mme Modimo a le arohanya le lefifi." 
Genesis1:5 Modimo a re lesedi ke “motsheare” mme a re lefifi ke “bosiu”. Ha phirima, ha esa, ya eba letsatsi la pele." 
Genesis1:6 Yaba Modimo o re: “Loapi le be teng pakeng tsa metsi, ho arohanya metsi ho metsi a mang.”" 
Genesis1:7 Modimo a etsa loapi ho arohanya metsi a kahodimo ho lona le metsi a katlase ho lona. Ha fela ha eba jwalo. 
Genesis1:8 Modimo a re loapi ke “lehodimo”. Ha phirima, ha esa, ya eba letsatsi la bobedi." 
Genesis1:9 Jwale Modimo a re: “Metsi a katlase ho lehodimo a bokellane sebakeng se le seng, ho hlahe mobu o ommeng!” Ha fela ha eba jwalo." 
Genesis1:10 Modimo a re mobu o ommeng ke “lefatshe”, metsi a bokellaneng wona a re ke “mawatle”. Modimo a bona hore hoo ho hotle." 
Genesis1:11 Modimo a re: “Lefatshe le medise jwang, le ditlama tse nang le peo, le difate tse behang ditholwana tse nang le peo ka mefuta ya yona, lefatsheng.” Ha fela ha eba jwalo." 
Genesis1:12 Lefatshe la medisa jwang, le ditlama tse nang le peo ka mefuta ya tsona, le difate tse behang ditholwana tse nang le peo ka mefuta ya yona. Modimo a bona hore hoo ho hotle." 
Genesis1:13 Ha phirima, ha esa, ya eba letsatsi la boraro." 
Genesis1:14 Yaba Modimo o re: “Loapi la lehodimo le be le mabone, a tle a arohanye motsheare le bosiu, a be a supe dinako tsa selemo, le matsatsi, le dilemo." 
Genesis1:15 Hape e be mabone a loaping la lehodimo, a bonesang lefatshe.” Ha fela ha eba jwalo." 
Genesis1:16 Modimo a etsa mabone a mabedi, a maholo; lebone le leholo ya eba le busang motsheare, le lenyenyane ya eba le busang bosiu; mme a etsa le dinaledi." 
Genesis1:17 Modimo a di bea loaping la lehodimo hore di bonese lefatshe," 
Genesis1:18 di buse motsheare le bosiu, di arohanye lesedi le lefifi. Modimo a bona hore hoo ho hotle." 
Genesis1:19 Ha phirima, ha esa, ya eba letsatsi la bone." 
Genesis1:20 Jwale Modimo a re: “Metsi a hlahise dibopuwa tse ngata, tse phelang, tse tsamayang ka dikgakgatha; le dinonyana di fofe kahodima lefatshe, loaping la lehodimo.”" 
Genesis1:21 Modimo a hlola dikganyapa tsa ditonanahadi, le dibopuwa tsohle tse phelang, tse hlahisitsweng ke metsi ka bongata, ka mefuta ya tsona; le dinonyana tse fofang, ka mefuta ya tsona. Modimo a bona hore hoo ho hotle." 
Genesis1:22 Modimo a di hlohonolofatsa, a re: “Atang, le ngatafale, le tlale mawatleng; le dinonyana di ngatafale lefatsheng.”" 
Genesis1:23 Ha phirima, ha esa, ya eba letsatsi la bohlano." 
Genesis1:24 Yaba Modimo o re: “Lefatshe le hlahise dibopuwa tse phelang, ka mefuta ya tsona: Makgomo, le dihahabi, le diphoofolo tse hlaha ka mefuta ya tsona.” Ha fela ha eba jwalo." 
Genesis1:25 Modimo a etsa diphoofolo tse hlaha ka mefuta ya tsona, le makgomo ka mefuta ya wona, le dihahabi tsohle ka mefuta ya tsona. Modimo a bona hore hoo ho hotle." 
Genesis1:26 Jwale Modimo a re: “A re etseng motho ka setshwano sa rona le ka sebopeho sa rona, mme a laole ditlhapi tsa lewatle, le dinonyana tse fofang, le makgomo, le lefatshe lohle, le tsohle tse hahabang hodima lefatshe.”" 
Genesis1:27 Yaba Modimo o bopa motho ka setshwano sa hae, o mmopa ka setshwano sa Modimo; a bopa e motona le e motshehadi." 
Genesis1:28 Modimo a ba hlohonolofatsa, a re ho bona: “Atang, le ngatafale, le tlale lefatshe, le rene hodima lona; le laole ditlhapi tsa lewatle, le dinonyana tse fofang, le tsohle tse tsamayang hodima lefatshe.”" 
Genesis1:29 Modimo a nto re: “Bonang, ke le file meroho yohle e nang le peo, e teng lefatsheng lohle; le difate tsohle tse behang ditholwana tse nang le peo, hore e be dijo tsa lona." 
Genesis1:30 Le diphoofolo tsohle tse hlaha, le dinonyana tsohle tse fofang, le tsohle tse hahabang hodima lefatshe, le tsohle tse phelang, ke di file ditlama tsohle tse tala, hore e be dijo tsa tsona.” Ha fela ha eba jwalo." 
Genesis1:31 Jwale Modimo a tadima tsohle tseo a di entseng, mme a bona hore di ntle haholo. Ha phirima, ha esa, ya eba letsatsi la botshelela." 
Genesis2:1 Ka mokgwa o jwalo Modimo a qeta ho etsa lehodimo, le lefatshe, le tsohle tse lehodimong, le lefatsheng, le lewatleng." 
Genesis2:2 Ka letsatsi la bosupa Modimo a phetha mosebetsi wa hae, oo a o entseng, mme ka letsatsi la bosupa a phomola mosebetsing wa hae wohle, oo a o entseng." 
Genesis2:3 Modimo a hlohonolofatsa letsatsi leo la bosupa, a le halaletsa, hobane ka lona o ile a phomola mosebetsing wa hae wohle, oo a o entseng ka ho o hlola." 
Genesis2:4 Ena ke yona tshimoloho ya lehodimo le lefatshe, ha di ne di hlolwa. Mohla Morena Modimo a etsang lefatshe le lehodimo," 
Genesis2:5 ho ne ho eso be le dimela dife kapa dife lefatsheng; ho eso mele ditlama dife kapa dife tsa naha, hobane Morena Modimo o ne a eso nese pula lefatsheng, mme ho bile ho se na le motho ya ka lemang mobu." 
Genesis2:6 Empa ha nyoloha mohodi lefatsheng, wa kolobisa mobu wohle lefatsheng." 
Genesis2:7 Morena Modimo a bopa motho ka lerole le tswang mobung; ka dinkong tsa hae a budulela moya wa bophelo, mme motho ya eba sebopuwa se phelang." 
Genesis2:8 Yaba Modimo o lema serapa, Edene, ka nqa botjhabela, mme ho sona a bea motho eo a mmopileng." 
Genesis2:9 Serapeng seo Morena Modimo a medisa mefuta yohle ya difate tse kgahlang mahlo, tse monate ha di jewa; bohareng ba serapa a medisa sefate sa bophelo, le sefate sa ho tseba botle le bobe." 
Genesis2:10 Noka e ne e phalla hara Edene, e nwesetsa serapa. Ho tloha moo e ne e arohana, e etsa dinoka tse nne." 
Genesis2:11 Noka ya pele e bitswa Pishone; ke yone e phallang, e tswedipana hara naha yohle ya Hafila, moo ho nang le kgauta." 
Genesis2:12 Kgauta ya naha eo ke e ntlentle. Ho na le mamina a difate a monko o monake, le majwe a bohlokwa." 
Genesis2:13 Noka ya bobedi e bitswa Gihone; ke yona e phallang, e tswedipana hara naha ya Kushe." 
Genesis2:14 Noka ya boraro e bitswa Tigerese; ke yona e fetang ka botjhabela ho Asure. Noka ya bone ke Euferatese. 
Genesis2:15 Morena Modimo a nka motho, a mmea serapeng sa Edene hore a se leme, a se hlokomele." 
Genesis2:16 Yaba Morena Modimo o laela motho, o re: “O ka ja difate tsohle tsa serapa ka bolokolohi," 
Genesis2:17 empa ha e le sefate sa ho tseba botle le bobe, sona o se ke wa se ja, hobane mohla o ka se jang, ruri o tla shwa.”" 
Genesis2:18 Jwale Morena Modimo a re: “Hase hantle hore motho a be inotshi; ke tla mo etsetsa molekane ya mo thusang.” 
Genesis2:19 Yaba Morena Modimo o bopa diphoofolo tsohle tsa naha ka mobu, le dinonyana tsohle tse fofang, a di tlisa ho motho ho bona hore na a ka di rea mabitso afe. Kamoo motho a ileng a bitsa sebopuoa se seng le se seng se phelang kateng, yabo hoo e se e le lebitso la sona." 
Genesis2:20 Jwale motho a di rea mabitso; makgomo wohle, le dinonyana tse fofang, le diphoofolo tsohle tsa naha. Empa ha e le motho yena ha a a ka a fumanelwa molekane ya mo thusang." 
Genesis2:21 Yaba Morena Modimo o tshwarisa motho boroko bo boholo, mme a kgaleha. Jwale Morena Modimo a ntsha le leng la mahopo a hae, a nto busetsa nama madulong a yona." 
Genesis2:22 Ka lehopo leo Morena Modimo a le ntshitseng ho motho, a bopa mosadi, a mo tlisa ho motho." 
Genesis2:23 Yaba motho o re: “Enwa ke lesapo la masapo a ka, le nama ya nama ya ka. o tla bitswa Mosadi, hobane a ntshitswe ho Monna.”" 
Genesis2:24 Ka baka lena, monna o tla tlohela ntatae le mmae, a matahane le mosadi wa hae, mme ba tla fetoha ntho e le nngwe." 
Genesis2:25 Ka bobedi ba bona monna le mosadi wa hae, ba ne ba sa tena letho, empa ba sa hlajwe ke dihlong." 
Genesis3:1 Noha e ne e le masene ho feta diphoofolo tsohle tsa naha, tseo Morena Modimo a di entseng. Yaba e re ho mosadi: “Na efela Modimo o itse: Le se ke la ja difate tsohle tse serapeng?”" 
Genesis3:2 Mosadi a araba noha, a re: “Re ka ja ditholwana tsa difate tse serapeng," 
Genesis3:3 empa ha e le ditholwana tsa sefate se bohareng ba serapa, Modimo o itse: Le se ke la di ja, le ho di thetsa le se ke la di thetsa, esere la shwa. ”" 
Genesis3:4 Jwale noha ya re ho mosadi: “Ruri ha le ka ke la shwa! 
Genesis3:5 Modimo o tseba hore mohla le ka se jang, mahlo a lona a tla tutuboloha, le tshwane le Modimo, le tsebe botle le bobe.”" 
Genesis3:6 Mosadi a elellwa hore sefate seo se ka jewa, se bile se kgahla mahlo; le hore se a lakatseha, hobane se hlalefisa motho. Yaba o kgola tse ding tsa ditholwana tsa sona, o a di ja; a ba a fa le monna wa hae, le yena a ja." 
Genesis3:7 Mahlo a bona bobedi a tutuboloha, mme ba elellwa hore ha ba a tena letho. Ba rokahanya mahaba a sefate sa feiye, ba iketsetsa meitlamo." 
Genesis3:8 Jwale ba utlwa ha Morena Modimo a bua, ha a ntse a tsamaya hara serapa, moyeng o maphodi wa mantsiboya. Monna le mosadi wa hae ba ipatela Morena Modimo hara difate tsa serapa." 
Genesis3:9 Morena Modimo a bitsa monna, a re ho yena: “O hokae na?”" 
Genesis3:10 Monna a arabela, a re: “Ke ile ka utlwa ha o ntse o tsamaya mona serapeng, ka tshaba, hobane ha ke a tena letho, mme ka ipata.”" 
Genesis3:11 Jwale Modimo a re: “Ke mang ya o boleletseng hore ha o a tena letho? Na o jele sefate seo ke o laetseng hore o se ke wa se ja?” 
Genesis3:12 Monna a re: “Mosadi eo o nneileng yena, hore a be le nna, o mphile tse tswang sefateng, mme ka fela ka ja.”" 
Genesis3:13 Jwale Morena Modimo a re ho mosadi: “Ke eng ee, eo o e entseng?” Mosadi a re: “Noha e ile ya nqhekella, mme ka fela ka ja.”" 
Genesis3:14 Morena Modimo a re ho noha: “Hara makgomo wohle, le diphoofolo tsohle tsa naha, o rohakehile, kahobane o entse sena! O tla holoba ka mpa ya hao, o je lerole ka matsatsi wohle a ho phela ha hao." 
Genesis3:15 Ke tla hlahisa bora pakeng tsa hao le mosadi, le pakeng tsa madinyane a hao le bana ba hae. Bana ba hae ba tla kgoba hlooho ya hao; wena o tla ba loma serethe.”" 
Genesis3:16 A re ho mosadi: “Ha o ithwetse, ke tla o atisetsa bohloko. O tla beleha bana ka bohloko, o lakatse monna wa hao, mme yena a o buse.”" 
Genesis3:17 Jwale ho Adama a re: “Kahobane o mametse polelo ya mosadi wa hao, wa ja sefate seo ke ileng ka o laela, ka re: O se ke wa se ja, mobu o rohakehile ka baka la hao. O tla ja tse tswang ho wona ka ho sebetsa ka thata, ka matsatsi wohle a ho phela ha hao." 
Genesis3:18 Mobu oo o tla o medisetsa meutlwa, o o medisetse le tshehlo, o je meroho ya naha." 
Genesis3:19 O tla ja bohobe ka mofufutso wa phatla ya hao, ho fihlela o boela mobung, hobane o ntshitswe mobung, o lerole, mme o tla boela leroleng!”" 
Genesis3:20 Monna a rea mosadi lebitso la Eva, hobane ke yena mma batho bohle ba phelang." 
Genesis3:21 Yaba Morena Modimo o etsetsa Adama le mosadi wa hae diaparo tsa matlalo, a ba apesa." 
Genesis3:22 Morena Modimo a re: “Bonang, motho o se a tshwana le e mong wa rona, ka ho tseba botle le bobe! Jwale a se tshohe a otlolla letsoho la hae, a kgola le sona sefate sa bophelo, a eja, mme a phela kamehla yohle!”" 
Genesis3:23 Yaba Morena Modimo o mo ntsha serapeng sa Edene, hore a yo lema mobu oo a ntshitsweng ho wona." 
Genesis3:24 A leleka motho. Ka botjhabela ho serapa sa Edene a bea dikerubime, le sabole e tukang malakabe, e tsokotsehelang ka nqa tsohle, ho lebela tsela e yang sefateng sa bophelo." 
Genesis4:1 Adama a kena dikobong tsa mosadi wa hae, Eva; mosadi a ithwala, a tswala Kaine. Yaba Eva o re: “Ke fumane monna ka thuso ya Morena.”" 
Genesis4:2 A boela a tswala Abele, moena Kaine. Abele e ne e le modisa wa dinku, athe Kaine yena e ne e le molemi." 
Genesis4:3 Ha nako e ntse e eya, Kaine a tlisetsa Morena nyehelo ya dilopotsiya." 
Genesis4:4 Abele le yena a mo tlisetsa matsibolo a nonneng a mohlape wa hae. Morena a kgahlwa ke Abele le nyehelo ya hae," 
Genesis4:5 empa a se ke a kgahlwa ke Kaine le nyehelo ya hae. Kaine a halefa haholo, sefahleho sa hae sa tsunkana." 
Genesis4:6 Morena a re ho Kaine: “O halefetseng? Ke ka baka lang ha sefahleho sa hao se tsunkane? 
Genesis4:7 Haeba o etsa hantle, na sefahleho sa hao ha se na ho bontsha kgotso? Empa ha o sa etse hantle, sebe se laletse monyakong wa hao, se a o lakatsa; feela wena eka kgona o se hlole.”" 
Genesis4:8 Kaine a re ho Abele, moena hae: “A re ye naheng.” Jwale yare ha ba le naheng, Kaine a tsohela Abele moena hae matla, a mmolaya." 
Genesis4:9 Morena a re ho Kaine: “Ngwaneno, Abele, o kae?” Kaine a araba, a re: “Ha ke tsebe! Na ke nna modisana wa ngwaneso?”" 
Genesis4:10 Morena a re: “O entseng? Lentswe la madi a ngwaneno le ipiletsa ho nna le etswa mobung. 
Genesis4:11 Kahoo o rohakehile, mme o lelekilwe mobung oo madi a ngwaneno, a tsholotsweng ke letsoho la hao, a monyetseng ho wona." 
Genesis4:12 Ha o lema, mobu o ke ke wa hlola o o atlehisa ka tse tswang ho wona. O tla ba mmalehi le moleleri lefatsheng.”" 
Genesis4:13 Kaine a re ho Morena: “Kotlo ya ka e kgolo hoo ke sitwang ho e mamella. 
Genesis4:14 Bona, kajeno o ntelekile naheng ena, mme nke ke ka hlola ke bona sefahleho sa hao. Ke tla ba mmalehi le moleleri lefatsheng, mme ho tla etsahala hore ya mponang a mpolaye.”" 
Genesis4:15 Morena a re ho yena: “Ka baka leo, mang le mang ya tla bolaya Kaine, polao eo e tla pheteletswa hasupa.” Yaba Morena o tshwaya Kaine, esere ya mmonang a mmolaya." 
Genesis4:16 Kaine a tloha pela Morena, a ya aha lefatsheng la Nodo, ka botjhabela ho Edene." 
Genesis4:17 Kaine a kena dikobong tsa mosadi wa hae; mosadi a ithwala, a tswala Henoke. Kaine a haha motse, a o reella ka mora wa hae, Henoke." 
Genesis4:18 Henoke a tswala Irade; Irade a tswala Mehuyaele; Mehuyaele a tswala Methushaele; Methushaele a tswala Lameke. 
Genesis4:19 Lameke a nyala basadi ba babedi: lebitso la e mong e ne e le Ada, la e mong e le Silla." 
Genesis4:20 Ada a tswala Jabale, eo e leng ntata ba neng ba phela ditenteng, ba ruileng mehlape." 
Genesis4:21 Lebitso la moena hae e ne e le Jubale, eo e leng ntata bohle ba neng ba letsa makodilo le diphala." 
Genesis4:22 Silla yena a tswala Tubale-Kaine, eo e neng e le lelala la dintho tse entsweng ka lethose le tshepe. Kgaitsedi ya Tubale-Kaine e ne e le Naama." 
Genesis4:23 Yaba Lameke o re ho basadi ba hae: “Ada le Silla, utlwang lentswe la ka; lona basadi ba Lameke, mamelang polelo ya ka: ke bolaile motho ya mpatileng leoma, le mohlankana ya nteteditseng." 
Genesis4:24 Haeba Kaine a pheteletswa hasupa, Lameke yena e tla ba hamashome a supileng hasupa.”" 
Genesis4:25 Adama a boela a kena dikobong tsa mosadi wa hae, mosadi a mo tswalla mora eo a ileng a mo rea lebitso la Seta. Eva a re: “Modimo o mphile ngwana e mong bakeng sa Abele, hobane Kaine o ne a mmolaye.”" 
Genesis4:26 Seta le yena a ba le mora, mme a mo rea lebitso la Enoshe. Jwale batho ba qala ho rapela Morena." 
Genesis5:1 Ena ke buka ya leloko la Adama. Mohla Modimo a hlolang motho o ile a mo bopa ka setshwano sa Modimo; 
Genesis5:2 a bopa e motona le e motshehadi, a ba hlohonolofatsa, mme a ba bitsa “motho”, mohla a ba hlolang." 
Genesis5:3 Adama o ne a ena le dilemo tse lekgolo le mashome a mararo ha a tswala mora ka setshwano sa hae, ka sebopeho sa hae, mme a mo rea lebitso la Seta." 
Genesis5:4 Hoba Seta a tswalwe, Adama o ile a phela dilemo tse makgolo a robedi, mme a tswala bara ba bang le baradi." 
Genesis5:5 Ditshiu tsohle tseo Adama a di phetseng e bile dilemo tse makgolo a robong le mashome a mararo; a nto shwa. 
Genesis5:6 Seta o ne a ena le dilemo tse lekgolo le metso e mehlano ha a tswala Enoshe. 
Genesis5:7 Hoba Enoshe a tswalwe, Seta o ile a phela dilemo tse makgolo a robedi le metso e supileng, mme a tswala bara ba bang le baradi." 
Genesis5:8 Ditshiu tsohle tseo Seta a di phetseng e bile dilemo tse makgolo a robong le leshome le metso e mmedi; a nto shwa. 
Genesis5:9 Enoshe o ne a ena le dilemo tse mashome a robong ha a tswala Kenane. 
Genesis5:10 Hoba Kenane a tswalwe, Enoshe o ile a phela dilemo tse makgolo a robedi le leshome le metso e mehlano, mme a tswala bara ba bang le baradi." 
Genesis5:11 Ditshiu tsohle tseo Enoshe a di phetseng e bile dilemo tse makgolo a robong le metso e mehlano; a nto shwa. 
Genesis5:12 Kenane o ne a ena le dilemo tse mashome a supileng ha a tswala Mahalalele. 
Genesis5:13 Hoba Mahalalele a tswalwe, Kenane o ile a phela dilemo tse makgolo a robedi le mashome a mane, mme a tswala bara ba bang le baradi." 
Genesis5:14 Ditshiu tsohle tseo Kenane a di phetseng e bile dilemo tse makgolo a robong le leshome; a nto shwa. 
Genesis5:15 Mahalalele o ne a ena le dilemo tse mashome a tsheletseng le metso e mehlano ha a tswala Jareta. 
Genesis5:16 Hoba Jareta a tswalwe, Mahalalele o ile a phela dilemo tse makgolo a robedi le mashome a mararo, mme a tswala bara ba bang le baradi." 
Genesis5:17 Ditshiu tsohle tseo Mahalalele a di phetseng e bile dilemo tse makgolo a robedi le mashome a robong a metso e mehlano; a nto shwa. 
Genesis5:18 Jareta o ne a ena le dilemo tse lekgolo le mashome a tsheletseng a metso e mmedi ha a tswala Henoke. 
Genesis5:19 Hoba Henoke a tswalwe, Jareta o ile a phela dilemo tse makgolo a robedi, mme a tswala bara ba bang le baradi." 
Genesis5:20 Ditshiu tsohle tseo Jareta a di phetseng e bile dilemo tse makgolo a robong le mashome a tsheletseng a metso e mmedi; a nto shwa. 
Genesis5:21 Henoke o ne a ena le dilemo tse mashome a tsheletseng a metso e mehlano ha a tswala Metushela. 
Genesis5:22 Hoba Metushela a tswalwe, metsamao ya Henoke ya kgahla Modimo ka dilemo tse makgolo a mararo, mme a tswala bara ba bang le baradi." 
Genesis5:23 Ditshiu tsohle tseo Henoke a di phetseng e bile dilemo tse makgolo a mararo le mashome a tsheletseng a metso e mehlano. 
Genesis5:24 Metsamao ya Henoke ya kgahla Modimo; yaba o a nyamela, hobane Modimo o ile a mo nka." 
Genesis5:25 Metushela o ne a ena le dilemo tse lekgolo le mashome a robedi a metso e supileng ha a tswala Lameke. 
Genesis5:26 Hoba Lameke a tswalwe, Metushela a phela dilemo tse makgolo a supileng le mashome a robedi a metso e mmedi, mme a tswala bara ba bang le baradi." 
Genesis5:27 Ditshiu tsohle tseo Metushela a di phetseng e bile dilemo tse makgolo a robong le mashome a tsheletseng a metso e robong; a nto shwa. 
Genesis5:28 Lameke o ne a ena le dilemo tse lekgolo le mashome a robedi a metso e mmedi ha a tswala mora. 
Genesis5:29 A mo rea lebitso la Nowe, a re: “Enwa o tla re phomotsa mosebetsing wa rona, le boimeng ba wona bo bakilweng ke thohako eo Morena a rohakileng mobu ka yona.”" 
Genesis5:30 Hoba Nowe a tswalwe, Lameke a phela dilemo tse makgolo a mahlano le mashome a robong a metso e mehlano, mme a tswala bara ba bang le baradi." 
Genesis5:31 Ditshiu tsohle tseo Lameke a di phetseng e bile dilemo tse makgolo a supileng le mashome a supileng a metso e supileng; a nto shwa. 
Genesis5:32 Nowe o ne a ena le dilemo tse makgolo a mahlano ha a tswala Sema, le Kama, le Jafeta." 
Genesis6:1 Ha batho ba qala ho ata lefatsheng, mme ba tswala baradi," 
Genesis6:2 bara ba Modimo ba bona hore baradi ba batho ba batle, mme ba inkela basadi kamoo ba ka kgahlwang kateng." 
Genesis6:3 Yaba Morena o re: “Moya wa ka o ke ke wa hlola ka ho motho kamehla eohle, hobane motho ke nama feela. Ditshiu tsa hae e tla ba dilemo tse lekgolo le mashome a mabedi.”" 
Genesis6:4 Ka yona nako eo, le kamora moo, diqhobane tsa eba teng lefatsheng, ha bara ba Modimo ba bokana le baradi ba batho, ba tswala bana le bona. Bana bao ke tsona dinatla tsa boholoholo tse tumileng haholo." 
Genesis6:5 Jwale Morena a bona hore bokgopo ba batho lefatsheng bo boholo haholo, le hore mehopolo ya dipelo tsa bona e tletse bobe kamehla." 
Genesis6:6 Morena a swaba ha a ile a etsa motho lefatsheng, pelo ya hae ya utlwa bohloko." 
Genesis6:7 Yaba Morena o re: “Batho bao ke ba bopileng ke tla ba fedisa lefatsheng; batho, mmoho le diphoofolo, le dihahabi, le dinonyana tse fofang, hobane ke a itshwabela ha ke ile ka ba etsa.”" 
Genesis6:8 Empa Nowe yena a hauhelwa ke Morena. 
Genesis6:9 Tsena ke ditaba tsa Nowe. Nowe e ne e le motho ya lokileng, ya neng a hloka kodi hara ba mehla eo, mme metsamao ya hae ya kgahla Modimo." 
Genesis6:10 A tswala bara ba bararo: Sema, le Kama, le Jafeta." 
Genesis6:11 Mahlong a Modimo lefatshe le ne le bodile, le tletse dipolayano." 
Genesis6:12 Modimo a bona hore lefatshe le bodile, batho bohle ba itshilafaditse." 
Genesis6:13 Jwale Modimo a re ho Nowe: “Ke rerile ho fedisa tsohle tse phelang lefatsheng, hobane lefatshe le tletse dipolayano ka baka la batho; ke tla ba timetsa mmoho le lefatshe." 
Genesis6:14 “Iketsetse areka ka difate tsa phaena, o e etse dikamore, mme o e bitiele ka boka kantle le kahare." 
Genesis6:15 O tla e haha tjena: bolelele ba areka e be dimethara tse lekgolo le mashome a mararo a metso e meraro, bophara ba yona e be dimethara tse mashome a mabedi a metso e mmedi, mme bophahamo ba yona e be dimethara tse leshome le metso e meraro." 
Genesis6:16 Areka eo o e etsetse fesetere e tla kenya lesedi, mme pakeng tsa yona le marulelo e be bolelele ba disenthimethara tse mashome a mane a metso e mene; monyako wa areka o etswe lehlakoreng la yona. Ho be le dikamore tse katlase, tse hare, le tse kahodimo." 
Genesis6:17 “Ke tla tlisa morallo wa metsi ho kwahela lefatshe, ho timetsa tsohle tse phelang, tse tlasa lehodimo. Tsohle tse lefatsheng di tla timela." 
Genesis6:18 Empa wena ke tla etsa selekane le wena. O tla kena ka arekeng, wena le bara ba hao, le mosadi wa hao, le dingwetsi tsa hao." 
Genesis6:19 O tla kena ka arekeng le diphoofolo tsohle tse phelang, tse pedi mofuteng o mong le o mong, e be e tona le e tshehadi, di tle di phele mmoho le wena." 
Genesis6:20 Dinonyana ka mefuta ya tsona, le diphoofolo ka mefuta ya tsona, le dihahabi ka mefuta ya tsona, di kene le wena ka arekeng ka bobedi, di tle di phele." 
Genesis6:21 O bokelle dijo tsohle tse tla jewa, o di kenye ka arekeng, e tle e be dijo tsa hao le tsa diphoofolo.”" 
Genesis6:22 Nowe a etsa jwalo; a etsa jwalokaha Modimo a ne a mo laetse. 
Genesis7:1 Morena a re ho Nowe: “Wena, le ba ntlo ya hao, kena ka arekeng, hobane ke bone hore molokong ona ke wena feela ya lokileng mahlong a ka." 
Genesis7:2 “Diphoofolong tsohle tse sa ileheng, o nke tse supileng tse tona, le tse supileng tse tshehadi; ho tsohle tse ilehang o nke tse pedi, e be e tona le e tshehadi." 
Genesis7:3 Dinonyananeng tsohle tse fofang o nke tse supileng ka bobedi, e be e tona le e tshehadi, hore mofuta wa tsona o tle o bolokehe lefatsheng." 
Genesis7:4 Kamora matsatsi a supileng, ho tloha jwale, ke tla nesetsa lefatshe pula ka matsatsi a mashome a mane, le masiu a mashome a mane, mme ke tla fedisa tsohle tse phelang lefatsheng, tseo ke di entseng.”" 
Genesis7:5 Nowe a etsa jwalokaha Morena a ne a mo laetse. 
Genesis7:6 Nowe o ne a ena le dilemo tse makgolo a tsheletseng ha morallo wa metsi o eba teng lefatsheng. 
Genesis7:7 Yare metsi a morallo a eso fihle, Nowe a kena ka arekeng a ena le bara ba hae, le mosadi wa hae, le dingwetsi tsa hae." 
Genesis7:8 Diphoofolo tse sa ileheng le tse ilehang, le dinonyana, le dihahabi tsohle," 
Genesis7:9 tsa tla ka bobedi, e le e tona le e tshehadi, tsa kena ka arekeng le Nowe, jwalokaha Morena a ne a mo laetse." 
Genesis7:10 Yare hoba matsatsi a supileng a fete, morallo wa metsi wa eba teng lefatsheng." 
Genesis7:11 Ka selemo sa makgolo a tsheletseng sa ho phela ha Nowe, ka kgwedi ya bobedi, ka letsatsi la leshome le metso e supileng, ka lona letsatsi leo mehlodi yohle ya bodiba bo boholo ya phunyeha, le maru a tsholella metsi lefatsheng." 
Genesis7:12 Ka matsatsi a mashome a mane, le masiu a mashome a mane, lefatshe la nelwa ke pula ya ditlwebelele." 
Genesis7:13 Ka lona letsatsi leo Nowe le bara ba hae, Sema le Kama le Jafeta, le mosadi wa Nowe, le dingwetsi tse tharo tsa Nowe, ba kena ka arekeng," 
Genesis7:14 mmoho le mefuta yohle ya diphoofolo, le mefuta yohle ya dihahabi, le mefuta yohle ya dinonyana." 
Genesis7:15 Dibopuwa tse phelang tsa kena ka bobedi ka arekeng ho Nowe. 
Genesis7:16 Tse ileng tsa kena e ne e le e tona, le e tshehadi, jwalokaha Modimo a ne a mo laetse. Jwale Morena a mo kwalla kahare." 
Genesis7:17 Morallo wa nna wa tswela pele lefatsheng ka matsatsi a mashome a mane. Ha metsi a ntse a eketseha a phaphamatsa areka, ya phahamela lefatshe." 
Genesis7:18 Metsi a nna a kokomoha, a eketseha haholo, mme areka ya nna ya lweba hodima metsi." 
Genesis7:19 Metsi a kokomoha haholo lefatsheng, a kwahela dithaba tsohle tse telele, tse tlasa lehodimo." 
Genesis7:20 Metsi a nna a kokomoha ho fihlela a etsa dimethara tse supileng kahodimo ho dithaba. 
Genesis7:21 Dibopuwa tsohle tse phelang lefatsheng tsa shwa: dinonyana, makgomo, diphoofolo tse hlaha, le tsohle tse tsamayang ka dikgakgatha lefatsheng, le batho bohle." 
Genesis7:22 Tsohle tse neng di phela lefatsheng moo ho ommeng, tsa shwa." 
Genesis7:23 Morena a timetsa tsohle tse phelang lefatsheng: batho le makgomo, dihahabi le dinonyana tse fofang; tsohle tsa timetswa lefatsheng. Ha sala Nowe feela le bao a neng a ena le bona ka arekeng." 
Genesis7:24 Metsi a qeta matsatsi a lekgolo le mashome a mahlano a ntse a kwahetse lefatshe. 
Genesis8:1 Modimo a hopola Nowe, le diphoofolo tsohle tse hlaha, le makgomo wohle a neng a ena le yena ka arekeng. Jwale Modimo a fokisa moya hodima lefatshe, mme metsi a bohlela." 
Genesis8:2 Mehlodi ya bodiba bo boholo, le maru a kgaotsa ho tsholla metsi, pula e tswang lehodimong ya emisa." 
Genesis8:3 Butlebutle metsi a nna a monyela fatshe, mme qetellong ya matsatsi a lekgolo le mashome a mahlano, metsi a ne a se a fokotsehile." 
Genesis8:4 Ka kgwedi ya bosupa, ka letsatsi la leshome le metso e supileng la kgwedi, areka ya dula hodima dithaba tsa Ararate." 
Genesis8:5 Metsi a nna a tswela pele ho fokotseha ho fihlela ka kgwedi ya leshome; mme ka letsatsi la pele la kgwedi ya leshome ditlhoro tsa dithaba tsa hlaha. 
Genesis8:6 Hoba ho fete matsatsi a mashome a mane, Nowe a bula fesetere eo a neng a e entse arekeng." 
Genesis8:7 A ntsha lekgwaba; lona la tswa, la nna la solla, ho fihlela metsi a epsha lefatsheng." 
Genesis8:8 Jwale a ntsha leeba, ho bona hore na metsi a fokotsehile lefatsheng." 
Genesis8:9 Empa leeba la se ke la fumana moo le ka beang leoto teng, mme la kgutlela ho yena ka arekeng, hobane metsi a ne a sa tletse hohle lefatsheng. A nanabetsa letsoho la hae, a tshwara leeba, a le kgutlisetsa ho yena ka arekeng." 
Genesis8:10 A ema matsatsi a mang a supileng, a nto ntsha leeba hape ka arekeng." 
Genesis8:11 Mantsiboya la kgutlela ho yena, molomong wa lona le nkile lehlaku la mohlwaare, le neng le qeta ho rojwa. Jwale Nowe a tseba hore metsi a fokotsehile lefatsheng." 
Genesis8:12 A boela a ema matsatsi a supileng hape, a nto boela a ntsha leeba, empa la se ke la hlola le kgutlela ho yena hape." 
Genesis8:13 Ka selemo sa makgolo a tsheletseng a motso o mong, ka kgwedi ya pele, ka letsatsi la pele la kgwedi, metsi a ne a se a monyetse fatshe. Nowe a bula areka kahodimo, mme a bona hore jwale ho qomme." 
Genesis8:14 Ka kgwedi ya bobedi, ka letsatsi la mashome a mabedi a metso e supileng, lefatshe le ne le se le omme ngo!" 
Genesis8:15 Yaba Modimo o re ho Nowe: 
Genesis8:16 “Wena le mosadi wa hao, le bara ba hao, le dingwetsi tsa hao, tswa ka arekeng." 
Genesis8:17 Tswa le dibopuwa tsohle tse phelang: dinonyana, le diphoofolo, le tsohle tse hahabang hodima lefatshe, di tle di tswale haholo, di ate, di ngatafale lefatsheng.”" 
Genesis8:18 Jwale Nowe a tswa a ena le mosadi wa hae, le bara ba hae, le dingwetsi tsa hae." 
Genesis8:19 Diphoofolo tsohle, le makgomo wohle, le dinonyana tsohle, le tsohle tse hahabang hodima lefatshe, tsa tswa ka arekeng ka mefuta ya tsona." 
Genesis8:20 Jwale Nowe a hahela Morena aletare, mme a kgetha diphoofolong tsohle tse sa ileheng, le dinonyaneng tsohle tse sa ileheng, mme ka tsona a etsa sehlabelo sa setjheso aletareng." 
Genesis8:21 Ha Morena a utlwa monko o monate, a re ka pelong ya hae: “Ha ke sa tla hlola ke rohaka lefatshe ka baka la motho, hobane mehopolo ya pelo ya motho haesale e le mebe ho tloha botjheng ba hae. Ha ke sa tla boela ke otla dintho tsohle tse phelang, jwalokaha ke entse." 
Genesis8:22 “Ha feela lefatshe le sa ntse le le teng, nako ya ho jala le ya ho kotula, mohatsela le mofuthu, hlabula le mariha, motsheare le bosiu, di ke ke tsa phetsa ho ba teng.”" 
Genesis9:1 Modimo a hlohonolofatsa Nowe le bara ba hae, a re ho bona: “Atang, le ngatafale, le tlale lefatshe." 
Genesis9:2 Diphoofolo tsohle tsa lefatshe, le dinonyana tsohle tse fofang, di tla le tshaba. Dihahabi tsohle tsa lefatshe, le ditlhapi tsohle tsa lewatle, di bewa matsohong a lona." 
Genesis9:3 Tsohle tse tsamayang, tse phelang, e tla ba dijo tsa lona, jwalokaha ke le neile meroho e metala. Tsena tsohle ke le nea tsona." 
Genesis9:4 “Feela le se ke la ja nama e ntseng e ena le bophelo, e leng madi." 
Genesis9:5 Madi a lona, e leng bophelo ba lona, ke tla a batla. Ke tla a batla dibataneng tsohle, le matsohong a motho. Ke tla batla bophelo ba motho matsohong a ngwanabo." 
Genesis9:6 “Mang le mang ya tshollang madi a motho, le yena madi a hae a tla tshollwa ke motho, hobane Modimo o entse motho ka setshwano sa Modimo." 
Genesis9:7 “Jwale lona atang, le ngatafale; anafalang le tlale lefatshe.”" 
Genesis9:8 Yaba Modimo o bua ho Nowe, a ena le bara ba hae, o re:" 
Genesis9:9 “Bonang, nna, ke etsa selekane sa ka le lona, le ditloholo tsa lona." 
Genesis9:10 Ke se etsa le dibopuwa tsohle tse phelang, tse nang le lona: Dinonyana, makgomo, le diphoofolo tse hlaha, le tsohle tse tswileng ka arekeng." 
Genesis9:11 Ke etsa selekane sa ka le lona: Ha ho ka ke ha hlola ho timetswa batho ka morallo wa metsi. Hape ha ho ka ke ha hlola ho eba le morallo wa metsi o tla timetsa lefatshe.” 
Genesis9:12 Modimo a re: “Ke sena sesupo sa selekane seo ke se etsang le lona le tsohle tse phelang le lona, le meloko e tlang:" 
Genesis9:13 Ke tla hloma mookodi wa ka marung, mme e tla ba sesupo sa selekane sa ka le lefatshe." 
Genesis9:14 Ha ke tlisa maru hodima lefatshe, mme mookodi o bonahala marung," 
Genesis9:15 ke tla hopola selekane seo ke se entseng le lona, le dibopuwa tsohle tse phelang, mme metsi a ke ke a hlola a etsa morallo o tla timetsa batho bohle." 
Genesis9:16 Mookodi o tla ba marung, mme ha ke o tadima, ke tla hopola selekane se sa feleng, se pakeng tsa Modimo le dibopuwa tsohle tse phelang, tse teng lefatsheng.”" 
Genesis9:17 Modimo a re ho Nowe: “Sena ke sesupo sa selekane seo ke se entseng pakeng tsa ka le batho bohle ba teng lefatsheng.” 
Genesis9:18 Bara ba Nowe, ba ileng ba tswa ka arekeng, e ne e le Sema le Kama le Jafeta. Kama ke ntata Kanana." 
Genesis9:19 Ba bararo bana e ne e le bara ba Nowe, mme batho bohle ba lefatsheng ba tswetswe ke bona." 
Genesis9:20 Nowe e ne e le molemi; ya eba yena wa ho qala ho lema morara. 
Genesis9:21 A nwa veine, a tahwa, a robala ka tenteng a sa tena." 
Genesis9:22 Kama, ntata Kanana, ha a bona bofeela ba ntatae, a ya bolella bana babo ba babedi ba le kantle." 
Genesis9:23 Sema le Jafeta ba nka kobo, ba e akgela mahetleng a bona, ba tsamaya kasanthao, ba fihla ba kwahela bofeela ba ntata bona. Kaha ba ne ba furaletse, ha ba a ka ba bona bofeela ba ntata bona." 
Genesis9:24 Nowe, ha a se a hlaphohetswe, a tseba seo mora wa hae e monyenyane a ileng a se etsa ho yena." 
Genesis9:25 Yaba o re: “Kanana a ke a rohakehe, e be lekgoba la makgoba ho bana babo.”" 
Genesis9:26 Hape a re: “Ho bokwe Morena, Modimo wa Sema, Kanana e ke e be lekgoba la bona." 
Genesis9:27 Modimo a ke a hodise Jafeta, a phele ditenteng tsa Sema, Kanana e be lekgoba la hae.”" 
Genesis9:28 Kamora morallo wa metsi, Nowe a phela dilemo tse makgolo a mararo le mashome a mahlano." 
Genesis9:29 Dilemo tsa Nowe kaofela e ne e le makgolo a robong le mashome a mahlano; a nto shwa. 
Genesis10:1 Ena ke meloko ya bara ba Nowe, e leng Sema le Kama le Jafeta. Kamora morallo wa metsi ba ne ba tswale bara." 
Genesis10:2 Bana ke bara ba Jafeta: Gomere, le Magogo, le Madai, le Jafane, le Tubale, le Mesheke, le Tirase." 
Genesis10:3 Bana ke bara ba Gomere: Ashekenase, le Rifate, le Togarema." 
Genesis10:4 Bana ke bara ba Jafane: Elisha, le Tarashishe, le Kitime, le Dodanime." 
Genesis10:5 Ke bona ba ileng ba abelwa dinaha tsa dihlekehleke, ka ho ya ka maleme a bona, le ka ho ya ka malapa abo bona, le ka ho ya ka merabe ya bona." 
Genesis10:6 Bana ke bara ba Kama: Kushe, le Miseraime, le Pute, le Kanana." 
Genesis10:7 Bana ke bara ba Kushe: Seba, le Hafila, le Sabeta, le Rama, le Sabeteka, mme bara ba Rama ke Sheba le Dedane." 
Genesis10:8 Kushe a tswala Nimerode; Nimerode ya eba senatla se seholo lefatsheng. 
Genesis10:9 Mahlong a Modimo e ne e le setsomi se matla, mme ke ka baka lena ho yeng ho thwe: “Jwaloka Nimerode, setsomi se matla mahlong a Modimo.”" 
Genesis10:10 Puso ya hae e qalehile Babele, le Ereke, le Akade, le Kalene, naheng ya Shinare." 
Genesis10:11 A tloha naheng eo, a ya Asure; a haha Ninife le Rehobote-Ire, le Kalaha," 
Genesis10:12 le Resene, pakeng tsa Ninife le Kalaha, e leng wona motse o moholo." 
Genesis10:13 Miseraime a tswala Balode, le Baaname, le Balebahe, le Banafetuhe," 
Genesis10:14 le Bapatarusi, le Bakasalohe, ba tswetseng Bafilesita, le Bakafatore." 
Genesis10:15 Kanana a itsibola ka Sidone, ya tla ba Hete," 
Genesis10:16 le Bajebuse, le Baamore, le Bagirigashe," 
Genesis10:17 le Bahife, le Baareki, le Basine," 
Genesis10:18 le Baarefade, le Basemare, le Bahamate. Kamora mona malapa a Bakanana a namela hohle." 
Genesis10:19 Moedi wa Bakanana o ne o tloha Sidone, ho ya fihla Gerare, le ho ya fihla Gasa, le ho ya Sodoma, le Gomora, le Adema, le Seboime, ho ya fihla Lasha." 
Genesis10:20 Bana ke bara ba Kama, ka ho ya ka malapa abo bona, le ka ho ya ka maleme a bona, le ka ho ya ka dinaha tsa bona, le ka ho ya ka merabe ya bona." 
Genesis10:21 Sema, ntata bana bohle ba Ebere, moholwane wa Jafeta, le yena a tswallwa bana." 
Genesis10:22 Bara ba Sema ke Elame, le Asure, e Arepakeshade, le Lode, le Arame." 
Genesis10:23 Bara ba Arame ke Use, le Hule, le Getere, le Masha." 
Genesis10:24 Arepakeshade a tswala Shela, mme Shela a tswala Ebere." 
Genesis10:25 Ebere a tswala bara ba babedi. Lebitso la e mong e ne e le Pelege, hobane baahi ba lefatshe ba ne ba arohane mehleng ya hae; moena hae e ne e le Jokotane." 
Genesis10:26 Jokotane a tswala Alamodade, le Shelefe, le Hasere-Mafete, le Jerahe," 
Genesis10:27 le Hadorame, le Usale, le Dikela," 
Genesis10:28 le Obale, le Abimaele, le Sheba," 
Genesis10:29 le Ofire, le Hafila, le Jobabe. Bana bohle ke bara ba Jokotane." 
Genesis10:29 le Ofire, le Hafila, le Jobabe. Bana bohle ke bara ba Jokotane." 
Genesis10:30 Ba ne ba ahile Mesha, ho ya fihla Sefare, dithabeng tse ka botjhabela." 
Genesis10:31 Bana ke bara ba Sema, ka ho ya ka malapa abo bona, le ka ho ya ka maleme a bona, le ka ho ya ka dinaha tsa bona, le ka ho ya ka merabe ya bona." 
Genesis10:32 Ana ke wona malapa a bara ba Nowe, ho ya ka meloko ya bona, le ka merabe ya bona. Ditjhaba tse tswang ho bona di ile tsa arohana lefatsheng kamora morallo wa metsi." 
Genesis11:1 Lefatshe lohle le ne le bua puo e le nngwe, le sebedisa mantswe a le mang." 
Genesis11:2 Jwale yare ha batho ba ntse ba hloma ba hlomola, ba leba botjhabela, ba fumana thota naheng ya Shinare, mme ba aha teng." 
Genesis11:3 Yaba ba buisana, ba re: “Tloong, re etseng setene, re se bese, se butswe hantle.” Bakeng sa majwe ba sebedisa setene, bakeng sa seretse ba sebedisa boka." 
Genesis11:4 Ba re: “Tloong, re ikgaheleng motse, le tora eo tlhoro ya yona e tla fihla lehodimong; mabitso a rona a tle a tume, esere ra tshoha re qhalaqhalana le lefatshe lohle.”" 
Genesis11:5 Jwale Morena a theohela fatshe ho tla bona motse le tora eo batho ba e hahang. 
Genesis11:6 Yaba Morena o re: “Bonang, kaofela ha bona ke setjhaba se le seng, ba bua puo e le nngwe. Hona ke qaleho feela ya mosebetsi wa bona, mme ha ho letho le tla ba thibela morerong oo ba hopotseng ho o etsa." 
Genesis11:7 A re theoheleng fatshe he, re ferekanye puo ya bona, ba se ke ba utlwana ha ba bua.”" 
Genesis11:8 Jwale Morena a ba qhalanyetsa hohle lefatsheng, ho tloha moo ba neng ba le teng, mme ba tlohela ho haha motse oo." 
Genesis11:9 Ke ka baka leo lebitso la wona ho ileng ha thwe ke Babele, hobane ke moo Morena a ileng a ferekanyetsa puo ya lefatshe lohle teng, mme ho tloha moo Morena a ba qhalanyetsa lefatsheng lohle." 
Genesis11:10 Lena ke leloko la Sema. Sema ha a ena le dilemo tse lekgolo, a tswala Arepakeshade hoba ho fete dilemo tse pedi morallo wa metsi o bile teng." 
Genesis11:11 Hoba Arepakeshade a tswalwe, Sema o ile a phela dilemo tse makgolo a mahlano, mme a tswala bara ba bang le baradi." 
Genesis11:12 Arepakeshade a phela dilemo tse mashome a mararo a metso e mehlano, yaba o tswala Shela." 
Genesis11:13 Hoba Shela a tswalwe, Arepakeshade o ile a phela dilemo tse makgolo a mane a metso e meraro, mme a tswala bara ba bang le baradi." 
Genesis11:14 Shela a phela dilemo tse mashome a mararo, yaba o tswala Ebere." 
Genesis11:15 Hoba Ebere a tswalwe, Shela o ile a phela dilemo tse makgolo a mane le metso e meraro, mme a tswala bara ba bang le baradi." 
Genesis11:16 Ebere a phela dilemo tse mashome a mararo a metso e mene, yaba o tswala Pelege." 
Genesis11:17 Hoba Pelege a tswalwe, Ebere o ile a phela dilemo tse makgolo a mane le mashome a mararo, mme a tswala bara ba bang le baradi." 
Genesis11:18 Pelege a phela dilemo tse mashome a mararo, yaba o tswala Reu." 
Genesis11:19 Hoba Reu a tswalwe, Pelege o ile a phela dilemo tse makgolo a mabedi le metso e robong, mme a tswala bara ba bang le baradi." 
Genesis11:20 Reu a phela dilemo tse mashome a mararo a metso e mmedi, yaba o tswala Seruge." 
Genesis11:21 Hoba Seruge a tswalwe, Reu o ile a phela dilemo tse makgolo a mabedi le metso e supileng, mme a tswala bara ba bang le baradi." 
Genesis11:22 Seruge a phela dilemo tse mashome a mararo, yaba o tswala Nakore." 
Genesis11:23 Hoba Nakore a tswalwe, Seruge o ile a phela dilemo tse makgolo a mabedi, mme a tswala bara ba bang le baradi." 
Genesis11:24 Nakore a phela dilemo tse mashome a mabedi a metso e robong, yaba o tswala Tera." 
Genesis11:25 Hoba Tera a tswalwe, Nakore o ile a phela dilemo tse lekgolo le leshome le metso e robong, mme a tswala bara ba bang le baradi." 
Genesis11:26 Tera a phela dilemo tse mashome a supileng, yaba o tswala Aborame le Nakore le Harane." 
Genesis11:27 Lena ke leloko la Tera. Tera o ile a tswala Aborame, le Nakore, le Harane; Harane a tswala Lota." 
Genesis11:28 Harane a shwa ntatae Tera a sa phela, a shwela naheng eo a tswaletsweng ho yona, e leng Ure ya Bakalatiya." 
Genesis11:29 Bo-Aborame le Nakore ba nyala basadi. Lebitso la mosadi wa Aborame e ne e le Sarai, mme lebitso la mosadi wa Nakore e le Mileka, moradi wa Harane, eo e leng ntata Mileka le ntata Iseka." 
Genesis11:30 Sarai e ne e le nyopa, a se na ngwana." 
Genesis11:31 Yaba Tera o nka mora wa hae Aborame, le Lota, setloholo sa hae, mora wa Harane, le ngwetsi ya hae Sarai, mosadi wa mora hae Aborame; a tloha le bona naheng ya Ure ya Bakalatiya, a fallela naheng ya Kanana. Ha ba fihla Harane, ba aha teng." 
Genesis11:32 Ditshiu tseo Tera a di phetseng e bile dilemo tse makgolo a mabedi le metso e mehlano. Tera o ile a shwela Harane. 
Genesis12:1 Morena a re ho Aborame: “Tloha naheng ya heno, le ho bang ka wena, le tlung ya ntatao, o fallele naheng eo ke tla o supisa yona." 
Genesis12:2 “Ke tla o etsa setjhaba se seholo, ke o hlohonolofatse, ke tumise lebitso la hao, mme ba bang ba tla hlohonolofala ka wena." 
Genesis12:3 Ke tla hlohonolofatsa ba o hlohonolofatsang, ke rohake ba o rohakang. Ka wena ditjhaba tsohle tsa lefatshe di tla hlohonolofatswa.”" 
Genesis12:4 Aborame a tsamaya jwalokaha Morena a mmoleletse, mme Lota a ya le yena. Ha Aborame a falla Harane, o ne a ena le dilemo tse mashome a supileng a metso e mehlano." 
Genesis12:5 Aborame a nka mosadi wa hae Sarai, le Lota mora wa moenae, le thepa yohle eo ba neng ba e sebeditse, le makgoba, le bohle bao ba bileng le bona ha ba le Harane. Ba tloha, ba leba naheng ya Kanana, mme ba fela ba fihla naheng eo ya Kanana." 
Genesis12:6 Aborame a feta naheng eo, a ya fihla sebakeng se bitswang Shekeme, sefateng sa eike sa More. Bakanana ba ne ba ahile naheng eo." 
Genesis12:7 Morena a iponahatsa ho Aborame, a re: “Naha ena ke tla e nea ditloholo tsa hao.” Yaba Aborame o hahela Morena ya iponahaditseng ho yena aletare." 
Genesis12:8 Jwale a tloha moo, a ya thabeng e ka botjhabela ho Bethele. A hloma tente ya hae hona teng, Bethele ya eba ka bophirimela, Ai ya eba ka botjhabela. A hahela Morena aletare hona moo, a rapela Morena." 
Genesis12:9 Aborame a tsamaya a hloma a hlomola, a leba borwa." 
Genesis12:10 Tlala ya eba teng naheng eo; yaba Aborame o theohela Egepeta ho ya jakajaka teng, hobane tlala e ne e le kgolo naheng ya Kanana." 
Genesis12:11 Ha a se a le haufi le ho kena Egepeta, a re ho mosadi wa hae Sarai: “Bona mona; ke a tseba hore o mosadi e motle haholo;" 
Genesis12:12 etlare ha Baegepeta ba o bona, ba re: Ke mosadi wa hae enwa, ebe ba a mpolaya, empa wena ba tla o tlohela o nne o phele." 
Genesis12:13 Jwale o tle o re o kgaitsedi ya ka, ke tle ke amohelehe, mme ke pholohe ka baka la hao.”" 
Genesis12:14 Ha Aborame a fihla Egepeta, Baegepeta ba bona hore mosadi eo o motle haholo." 
Genesis12:15 Mahosana a Faro a mmona, mme a mo babatsa ho Faro; yaba mosadi eo o iswa tlung ya Faro." 
Genesis12:16 Ka baka la mosadi eo, Aborame a baballeha. A newa mehlape ya dinku le ya dikgomo, makgoba a banna le a basadi, ditonki tse tona le tse tshehadi, le dikamele." 
Genesis12:17 Empa Morena a otla Faro, le ba lelapa la hae, ka dikotlo tse kgolo, ka baka la Sarai, mosadi wa Aborame." 
Genesis12:18 Yaba Faro o bitsa Aborame, o re ho yena: “Ke eng ye, eo o e entseng ho nna? Ke ka baka lang o sa kang wa mpolella hore ke mosadi wa hao?" 
Genesis12:19 Ke ka baka lang o ileng wa re: Ke kgaitsedi ya ka, mme yaba ke mo nka hore e be mosadi wa ka? Ka baka leo, mosadi wa hao ke eo he! Mo nke, o tsamaye!”" 
Genesis12:20 Yaba Faro o laela banna hore ba mo felehetse le mosadi wa hae, le tsohle tseo a neng a ena le tsona." 
Genesis13:1 Aborame a nyoloha Egepeta, yena le mosadi wa hae, mmoho le Lota, le tsohle tseo a neng a ena le tsona, ba ya naheng e ka borwa." 
Genesis13:2 Aborame o ne a ruile mehlape e mengata, le silefera, le kgauta." 
Genesis13:3 A nna a tswela pele maetong a hae ho tloha borwa ho ya Bethele, le ho ya fihla sebakeng seo a neng a hlomile ditente tsa hae mehleng ya pele, pakeng tsa Bethele le Ai," 
Genesis13:4 e leng sebakeng seo a neng a hahe aletare ya hae ya pele ho sona; ke moo Aborame a neng a rapele Morena teng. 
Genesis13:5 Lota, ya neng a tsamaya le Aborame, o ne a ena le mehlape ya dinku le ya dikgomo, le ditente," 
Genesis13:6 e leng hore naha eo e ne e ke ke ya ba lekana haeba ba ne ba ka aha mmoho; maruo a bona a ne a le mangata hoo ba neng ba ke ke ba aha mmoho. 
Genesis13:7 Diqabang tsa hlaha pakeng tsa badisana ba Aborame le ba Lota. Nakong eo Bakanana le Baperise ba ne ba ahile naheng eo. 
Genesis13:8 Yaba Aborame o re ho Lota: “Ke a o rapela, qabang a e ke e be siyo pakeng tsa rona le wena, le pakeng tsa badisana ba ka le badisana ba hao, hobane re bana ba motho." 
Genesis13:9 Ha ke re o ka ikgethela moo o ratang teng naheng ye yohle? A re arohane. Haeba o eya ka letsohong le letshehadi, nna ke tla ya ka ho le letona; ha o eya ka ho le letona, ke tla ya ka ho le letshehadi.”" 
Genesis13:10 Lota a phahamisa mahlo, mme a bona phula yohle ya Jorodane e ena le metsi a mangata, jwaloka serapa sa Morena, le jwaloka Egepeta, ho ya fihla Soware. E ne e le pele Morena a timetsa Sodoma le Gomora." 
Genesis13:11 Yaba, Lota o ikgethela phula yohle ya Jorodane, a leba botjhabela, mme ba arohana." 
Genesis13:12 Aborame a aha naheng ya Kanana, ha Lota yena a ile a ikgahela metseng e phuleng, a hloma ditente tsa hae pela Sodoma." 
Genesis13:13 Batho ba Sodoma e ne e le baetsadibe ba kgopo haholo, ba sitelwa Morena." 
Genesis13:14 Kamora hoba Lota le Aborame ba arohane, Morena a re ho Aborame: “Ako phahamise mahlo, mme o tadime ho tloha sebakeng seo o leng ho sona, ho ya leboya le borwa, le botjhabela le bophirimela." 
Genesis13:15 Naha yohle eo o e bonang ke tla o nea yona le ditloholo tsa hao kamehla yohle. 
Genesis13:16 Ditloholo tsa hao di tla ba kaalo ka lerole la lefatshe, mme haeba ho na le motho ya ka balang lerole la lefatshe, le ditloholo tsa hao a ka di bala." 
Genesis13:17 Ema, o tsamaye le naha eo ka bonamo ba yona, hobane ke tla o nea yona.”" 
Genesis13:18 Aborame a kgokgotholla ditente tsa hae, a ya aha difateng tsa eike tsa Mamore, tse Heborone, mme a hahela Morena aletare teng." 
Genesis14:1 Mehleng ya Amorafele kgosi ya Shinare, le Arioke kgosi ya Elasara, le Kedore-Laomere kgosi ya Elame, le Tidale kgosi ya Goime," 
Genesis14:2 dikgosi tsena tsa futuhela Bera kgosi ya Sodoma, le Biresha kgosi ya Gomora, le Shinabe kgosi ya Adema, le Shemebere kgosi ya Seboime, le kgosi ya Bela, e leng Soware." 
Genesis14:3 Dikgosi tsena kaofela tsa kopanya mabotho, phuleng ya Sidime, e leng Lewatleng la Letswai." 
Genesis14:4 Ka dilemo tse leshome le metso e mmedi di ne di buswa ke Kedore-Laomere, empa ka selemo sa leshome le metso e meraro tsa mo fetohela." 
Genesis14:5 Ka selemo sa leshome le metso e mene Kedore-Laomere le dikgosi tse neng di ikopantse le yena, a tla, mme a hlola Barefaime ba le Ashetarote-Karanaime, le Basusime ba le Hame, le Baemime ba le thoteng ya Kiriataime;" 
Genesis14:6 le Bahore ba le thabeng ya bona ya Seire, ho ya fihla Ele-Parane, haufi le lehwatata." 
Genesis14:7 Jwale ba kgutla, mme ba fihla Ene-Mishepate, e leng Kadeshe, ba hapa naha yohle ya Baamaleke, le ya Baamore ba neng ba ahile naheng ya bona Hasesone-Tamare." 
Genesis14:8 Ke ha ho futuha kgosi ya Sodoma, le kgosi ya Gomora, le kgosi ya Adema, le kgosi ya Seboime, le kgosi ya Bela, e leng Soware, mme tsa itokisetsa ntwa ka phuleng ya Sidime;" 
Genesis14:9 tsa lwantsha Kedore-Laomere kgosi ya Elame, le Tidale kgosi ya Goime, le Amorafele kgosi ya Shinare, le Arioke kgosi ya Elasara: dikgosi tse nne tsa lwantsha dikgosi tse hlano." 
Genesis14:10 Phula ena ya Sidime e ne e ena le dikoti tse nang le boka, mme eitse ha dikgosi tsa Sodoma le Gomora di baleha, tsa wela dikoting tsena, mme bahlabani ba setseng ba balehela thabeng." 
Genesis14:11 Ba hlotseng ba hapa maruo wohle a Sodoma le Gomora, le dijo tsa bona tsohle, mme ba ikela." 
Genesis14:12 Ba hapa le Lota, mora wa moena Aborame, ya neng a ahile Sodoma, mmoho le thepa yohle ya hae." 
Genesis14:13 Yaba ho fihla selahlamarungwana, mme sa tsebisa Aborame wa Moheberu ditaba. Aborame o ne a ahile difateng tsa eike tsa Mamore wa Moamore, ngwanabo Eshekole le Anere, ba neng ba entse selekane le Aborame." 
Genesis14:14 Ha Aborame a utlwa hore mora wa moena hae o hapilwe, a phalla le banna ba hae ba hlometseng ba makgolo a mararo le leshome le metso e robedi, ba tswaletsweng tlung ya hae, mme ba ba lelekisa ho ya fihla Dane." 
Genesis14:15 Aborame a arola mabotho a hae dihlopha, a ena le bahlanka ba hae, ba ba hlasela bosiu, ba ba lelekisa ho ya fihla Hoba e ka leboya ho Damaseka." 
Genesis14:16 A kgutla le thepa yohle, esita le yena Lota mora wa moena hae, le thepa ya hae, mmoho le basadi le batho kaofela." 
Genesis14:17 Ha Aborame a kgutla ho tswa hlola Kedore-Laomere, le dikgosi tse neng di mo tlatsitse, kgosi ya Sodoma ya ya mo kgahlanyetsa kgohlong ya Shafe, e leng Kgohlo ya Kgosi." 
Genesis14:18 Meleki-Sedeke, kgosi ya Salema, a mo tlisetsa bohobe le veine. Meleki-Sedeke e ne e le moprista wa Modimo ya hodimodimo. Yaba o hlohonolofatsa Aborame, o re:" 
Genesis14:19 “Ho hlohonolofatswe Aborame ke Modimo ya hodimodimo, Mmopi wa lehodimo le wa lefatshe." 
Genesis14:20 Ho bokwe Modimo ya hodimodimo, ya o thusitseng ho hlola dira tsa hao.” Jwale Aborame a mo nea karolo e le nngwe ho tse leshome tse hapilweng." 
Genesis14:21 Kgosi ya Sodoma ya re ho Aborame: “Nkgutlisetse batho, o ipolokele thepa.”" 
Genesis14:22 Empa Aborame a arabela kgosi ya Sodoma, a re: “Ke phahamisa letsoho, ke hlapanyetsa Morena, Modimo ya hodimodimo, Mmopi wa lehodimo le wa lefatshe;" 
Genesis14:23 hore nke ke ka nka kgwele, leha e le leqhwele la seeta; le hore nke ke ka nka letho leo e leng la hao, esere wa re: Ke ruisitse Aborame." 
Genesis14:24 Nna ha ke nke letho, haese feela seo bahlankana ba se jeleng, le seabo sa banna ba neng ba ile le nna, e leng bo-Anere, le Eshekole, le Mamore. Bona ba ka nka seabo sa bona.”" 
Genesis15:1 Hoba tsena di fete, lentswe la Morena la bua ho Aborame ponong, la re: “Se tshabe, Aborame! Ke thebe ya hao; moputso wa hao o tla ba moholo haholo.”" 
Genesis15:2 Empa Aborame a re: “Oho, Morena Modimo, o tla nneang, ha e le moo ke tla shwa ke se na ngwana, mme mojalefa wa ntlo ya ka e le Eleesere wa Modamaseka?”" 
Genesis15:3 Aborame a boela a re: “Bona, ha o a mpha ngwana, mme mohlanka ya tswaletsweng lapeng la ka e tla ba mojalefa wa ka.”" 
Genesis15:4 Yaba Morena o bua ho yena, o re: “Tjhe, eo e ke ke ya eba mojalefa wa hao; mojalefa wa hao e tla ba mora ya tswang lethekeng la hao.”" 
Genesis15:5 A mo nkela kantle mme a re ho yena: “Tadima lehodimong, mme o bale dinaledi, haeba o ka tseba ho di bala;” mme a re: “Ditloholo tsa hao di tla ba kaalo.”" 
Genesis15:6 Aborame a dumela ho Morena, mme Morena a mmalla hoo e le ho loka." 
Genesis15:7 Yaba o re ho yena: “Ke nna Morena ya o ntshitseng Ure e naheng ya Bakalatiya, ho tla o nea naha ena hore e be ya hao.”" 
Genesis15:8 Aborame a re: “Oho, Morena Modimo, ke tla tseba jwang hore ke tla e rua?”" 
Genesis15:9 Yaba Morena o re ho yena: “Ntlisetse kgomo ya sethole e lemo di tharo, le podi e tshehadi e lemo di tharo, le pheleu e lemo di tharo, le leebana-kgorwana, le ledinyane la leeba.”" 
Genesis15:10 A mo tlisetsa tsena kaofela, a di kgekgetha, a bea mokgekgetho ka mong o bapile le wa habo wona, empa dinonyana tsona a se ke a di kgekgetha." 
Genesis15:11 Manong a ubella dififi tsena, empa Aborame a a leleka." 
Genesis15:12 Ha letsatsi le eya madikelong, Aborame a fihlelwa ke sephume sa boroko, mme lefifi le tshabehang la mo aparela." 
Genesis15:13 Yaba Morena o re ho Aborame: “Tseba hore ditloholo tsa hao e tla ba bajaki naheng ya baditjhaba; di tla etswa makgoba teng, mme di tla hatellwa ka dilemo tse makgolo a mane." 
Genesis15:14 Empa ke tla ahlola setjhaba se tla di etsa makgoba, mme hamorao di tla tloha teng di ena le maruo a mangata." 
Genesis15:15 Ha e le wena o tla ikela ho bo-ntatao ka kgotso, mme o tla shwa hoba o phele halelele ka boiketlo." 
Genesis15:16 Moloko wa bone o tla kgutlela mona, hobane bokgopo ba Baamore ha bo eso phethehe.”" 
Genesis15:17 Ha letsatsi le se le diketse, mme ho se ho fifetse haholo, ha hlaha sebopi se kubellang mosi, le kganare ya mollo; tsena tsa feta pakeng tsa mekgekgetho eo." 
Genesis15:18 Ka lona tsatsi leo Modimo a etsa selekane le Aborame, a re: “Ditloholo tsa hao ke tla di nea naha ena, ho tloha nokaneng ya Egepeta ho isa Nokeng e Kgolo, e leng ya Euferatese;" 
Genesis15:19 le naha ya Bakene, le ya Bakenase, le ya Bakadamone," 
Genesis15:20 le ya Bahete, le ya Baperise, le ya Barefaime," 
Genesis15:21 le ya Baamore, le ya Bakanana, le ya Bagirigashe, le ya Bajebuse.”" 
Genesis16:1 Sarai, mosadi wa Aborame, o ne a sa ka a mo tswalla bana, empa o ne a ena le lekgoba la mosadi eo e leng Moegepeta, le bitswang Hagare." 
Genesis16:2 Sarai a re ho Aborame: “Morena o ntlhokisitse thari; ka baka lena eya, o kene dikobong tsa lekgoba lena la mosadi, mohlomong ke tla ba le bana ka lona.” Aborame a dumela kopo ya Sarai." 
Genesis16:3 Kamora hoba Aborame a phele dilemo tse leshome naheng ya Kanana, Sarai, mohatsa hae, a nka Hagare, lekgoba la hae la mosadi eo e leng Moegepeta, a le nea Aborame ho ba mosadi wa hae." 
Genesis16:4 Aborame a kena dikobong tsa Hagare, mme Hagare ya eba moimana; jwale a qala ho nyedisa monga hae." 
Genesis16:5 Sarai a re ho Aborame: “Nyediso ena ke e etsetswa ka baka la hao! Ke nna ya o neileng lekgoba lena ho ba mosadi wa hao, empa haesale le hlokomela hore le ithwetse le a nnyedisa. A e ke e be Morena ya ahlolang pakeng tsa rona le wena!”" 
Genesis16:6 Aborame a re ho Sarai: “Lekgoba leo la mosadi le matsohong a hao; etsa kamoo o ratang kateng ka lona.” Sarai a le hlorisa haholo, hoo le bileng la baleha." 
Genesis16:7 Lengeloi la Morena la fumana Hagare pela sediba se hara lehwatata, se tseleng e yang Shure," 
Genesis16:8 mme la re: “Hagare, lekgoba la Sarai, o tswa kae, o ya kae?” Hagare a arabela, a re: “Ke baleha monga ka, Sarai.”" 
Genesis16:9 Empa lengeloi la Morena la re: “Kgutlela ho monga hao, mme o ikokobetse tlasa hae.”" 
Genesis16:10 Lengeloi la Morena la boela la re ho yena: “Ke tla ngatafatsa ditloholo tsa hao haholo, hoo di ke keng tsa balwa ka baka la bongata.”" 
Genesis16:11 Hape lengeloi la Morena la re ho yena: “Bona, o moimana, mme o tla tswala mora. O tla mo rea lebitso la Ishemaele, hobane Morena o utlwile matshwenyeho a hao." 
Genesis16:12 E tla ba monna ya kang tonki ya naha ka bohlaha, o tla lwantsha bohle, mme bohle ba tla mo lwantsha; o tla aha ka botjhabela ho bana babo bohle, a ba lwantshe.”" 
Genesis16:13 Hagare a re lebitso la Morena ya neng a bua le yena ke “Modimo ya Bonang”, hobane o ne a re: “Na ke nnete ke hlile ke bone Modimo, mme ke ntse ke phela kamora pono eo ya ka?”" 
Genesis16:14 Ka lebaka lena sediba sena sa bitswa Sediba sa Lakai-Roi. Se pakeng tsa Kadeshe le Berede. 
Genesis16:15 Hagare a tswalla Aborame mora, mme Aborame a rea mora eo a mo tswaletsweng ke Hagare lebitso la Ishemaele." 
Genesis16:16 Aborame o ne a ena le dilemo tse mashome a robedi a metso e tsheletseng ha Hagare a mo tswalla mora, Ishemaele." 
Genesis17:1 Ha Aborame a ena le dilemo tse mashome a robong a metso e robong, Morena a iponahatsa ho yena, a re: “Ke nna Modimo ya matla wohle; nkgahlise ka metsamao ya hao, mme o hloke kodi." 
Genesis17:2 Ke tla etsa selekane pakeng tsa rona le wena, mme ditloholo tsa hao di tla ngatafala haholo.”" 
Genesis17:3 Yaba Aborame o itihela fatshe ka sefahleho, mme Modimo a bua le yena, a re:" 
Genesis17:4 “Selekane sa rona le wena ke sena: o tla ba ntata letshwele la ditjhaba. 
Genesis17:5 Ha o sa tla hlola o bitswa Aborame; lebitso la hao e tla ba Aborahama, hobane ke tla o etsa ntata ditjhaba tse ngata." 
Genesis17:6 “Ke tla o fa bana ba bangata haholo; ho wena ho tla tswa ditjhaba, mme o tla tswala dikgosi." 
Genesis17:7 Ke tla tiisa selekane sa ka le wena, le ditloholo tsa hao, ka ho hlahlamana ha meloko ya tsona, e be selekane se sa feleng; ke be Modimo wa hao le wa ditloholo tsa hao." 
Genesis17:8 Naha eo o jakileng ho yona, naha yohle ya Kanana, ke tla o nea yona le ditloholo tsa hao, e be leruo la mehla yohle, mme ke tla ba Modimo wa tsona.”" 
Genesis17:9 Modimo a boela a re ho Aborahama: “Wena o tla boloka selekane sa ka; wena le ditloholo tsa hao ka meloko ya tsona. 
Genesis17:10 Ke sena selekane se pakeng tsa rona le wena le ditloholo tsa hao, seo le tla se boloka; bohle ba batona ba lona ba tla bolotswa." 
Genesis17:11 Le tla bolotswa ka ho poma leeko, mme hona e tla ba letshwao la selekane se pakeng tsa rona le wena." 
Genesis17:12 Ngwana e mong le e mong wa hao e motona o tla bolotswa ha a ena le matsatsi a robedi; e mong le e mong e motona melokong yohle ya hao, le ya tswaletsweng tlung ya hao, le ya rekilweng ka tjhelete ho moditjhaba ya sa tswalaneng le wena." 
Genesis17:13 E, ho tla bolotswa ngwana ya tswaletsweng tlung ya hao, le ya rekilweng ka tjhelete ya hao. Selekane sa ka se tla ba nameng ya hao, e be selekane sa mehla yohle." 
Genesis17:14 Motho wa leqai, ya sa bolotswang ka ho pongwa leeko, o tla kgaolwa setjhabeng sa habo, hobane o sentse selekane sa ka.”" 
Genesis17:15 Modimo a boela a re ho Aborahama: “Mosadi wa hao Sarai, o se hlole o mmitsa Sarai; lebitso la hae e tla ba Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Ke tla mo hlohonolofatsa, ke be ke o fe mora ka yena. Ke tla mo hlohonolofatsa; e tla ba mma ditjhaba, mme dikgosi tsa ditjhaba di tla tswa ho yena.”" 
Genesis17:17 Aborahama a itihela fatshe ka sefahleho, a tsheha, mme a re ka pelong: “Na monna ya dilemo di lekgolo a ka tswala ngwana? Kapa na Sara a ka hlola a eba le ngwana a le dilemo di mashome a robong?”" 
Genesis17:18 Yaba Aborahama o re ho Modimo: “Ishemaele a ke a o phelele!” 
Genesis17:19 Modimo a re: “Ruri, Sara mosadi wa hao, o tla o tswalla mora, mme o tla mo rea lebitso la Isaka. Ke tla etsa selekane sa rona le yena e le selekane sa mehla yohle, sa hae le sa ditloholo tsa hae." 
Genesis17:20 Ha e le tabeng ya Ishemaele, ke o mametse: bona, ke tla mo hlohonolofatsa, ke mo fe bana ba bangata, ke ba atise haholo. O tla tswala mahosana a leshome le metso e mmedi, mme ke tla mo etsa setjhaba se seholo." 
Genesis17:21 Empa ke tla tiisa selekane sa ka le Isaka, eo Sara a tla o tswalla yena isao, ka yona nako ena.”" 
Genesis17:22 Hoba Modimo a qete ho bua le Aborahama, a nyoloha, a tloha ho yena." 
Genesis17:23 Jwale Aborahama a nka mora wa hae Ishemaele, le bana bohle ba lelapa la hae, le bohle ba rekilweng ka tjhelete ya hae, bohle ba batona ba ntlo ya Aborahama, a ba bolotsa ka lona letsatsi leo ka ho ba poma leeko, jwalokaha Modimo a ne a mo laetse." 
Genesis17:24 Aborahama o ne a ena le dilemo tse mashome a robong a metso e robong ha a bolla," 
Genesis17:25 mme mora wa hae Ishemaele yena a bolla ha a ena le dilemo tse leshome le metso e meraro. 
Genesis17:26 Ka lona letsatsi leo Aborahama le mora wa hae Ishemaele ba bolotswa; 
Genesis17:27 le banna bohle ba lelapa la hae, le ba tswaletsweng tlung ya hae, le ba rekilweng ka tjhelete ho baditjhaba, le bona ba bolotswa le yena." 
Genesis18:1 Morena a iponahatsa ho Aborahama a le difateng tsa eike, tsa Mamore, moo a neng a dutse monyako wa tente, ka nako eo letsatsi le neng le tjhesa haholo." 
Genesis18:2 A phahamisa mahlo, a tadima, mme a bona banna ba bararo ba eme pela hae. Yare ha a ba bona, a tloha monyakong wa tente, a mathela ho bona ho ba kgahlanyetsa. A fihla a itihela fatshe," 
Genesis18:3 a re: “Morena wa ka, haeba kajeno o nkgauhetse, ke a o rapela, o se ke wa feta ha mohlanka wa hao." 
Genesis18:4 A ho ke ho tliswe metsinyana, le hlatswe maoto a lona, le phomole tlasa sefate." 
Genesis18:5 Ke sa ilo le batlela sengwathwana sa bohobe, le tle le thobe pelo tsa lona, ebe jwale le a feta, hobane le fapohetse ha mohlanka wa lona.” Yaba ba re: “Etsa jwalokaha o boletse.”" 
Genesis18:6 Aborahama a potlakela ho Sara, ka tenteng, a re: “Phakisa o nke dirotwana tse tharo tsa phofo e thumisehileng, o e dube, o etse maqebekwane.”" 
Genesis18:7 Jwale Aborahama a mathela mohlapeng wa dikgomo, a kgetha namane e nonneng, e nama e bonojwana, mme a e nea mohlanka; yena a e hlaba ka potlako." 
Genesis18:8 A nka sereledi le lebese la motsididi, le nama ya namane e phehilweng hantle, tsena a di bea kapele ho bona; yena a ema pela bona, tlasa sefate, ha ba ntse ba eja." 
Genesis18:9 Yaba ba re ho Aborahama: “Mosadi wa hao Sara o kae?” A araba, a re: “O ka tenteng.”" 
Genesis18:10 Morena a re ho yena: “Ke tla boela ke o etela hape isao, ka yona nako ena, mme bona, mosadi wa hao Sara o tla be a se a ena le mora.” Sara o ne a ntse a utlwa, a eme monyakong wa tente, kamorao ho bona." 
Genesis18:11 Aborahama le Sara ba ne ba se ba hodile, ditshiu di ile, mme Sara o ne a se a sa kgelohe." 
Genesis18:12 Sara a tshehela ka pelong, a re: “Ha ke se ke tsofetse tjee, le monna wa ka a tsofetse, na nka ba le thabo e jwalo?”" 
Genesis18:13 Morena a re ho Aborahama: “Sara o tshehelang, ha a re: Nna ruri nka tswala ngwana, ke se ke tsofetse tjee?" 
Genesis18:14 Na ho na le se ka sitang Morena? Isao, ka yona nako ena, ke tla boela ke o etela, mme Sara o tla be a se a ena le mora.”" 
Genesis18:15 Empa Sara a latola, a re: “Ha ke a ka ka tsheha;” a rialo hobane o ne a tshaba. Morena a re: “Tjhe, o ile wa tsheha.”" 
Genesis18:16 Jwale banna bao ba ema, ba tloha moo, ba leba nqa Sodoma. Aborahama a ba felehetsa, ho ba fihlisa tseleng." 
Genesis18:17 Morena a re: “Na ebe nka patela Aborahama seo ke leng lekgatheng la ho se etsa," 
Genesis18:18 ha e le moo Aborahama e tla ba setjhaba se seholo, se matla, mme le ditjhaba tsohle tsa lefatshe di tla hlohonolofatswa ka yena?" 
Genesis18:19 Nke ke! Hobane ke mo kgethile hore a tle a laele bana ba hae le lelapa la hae ho tsamaya ka tsela ya Morena ka ho etsa tse lokileng, le ho sebetsa ka toka; e le hore Morena a tle a phethe tseo a di tshepisitseng Aborahama.”" 
Genesis18:20 Yaba Morena o re: “Sello se qosang Sodoma le Gomora se seholo, mme le sona sebe sa metse eo se seholo haholo!" 
Genesis18:21 Ke tla theohela teng ho ya bona hore na ba entse kamoo sello se fihlang ho nna se leng kateng, mme haeba ho se jwalo, ke tla tseba.”" 
Genesis18:22 Banna bao ba tloha moo ba leba nqa Sodoma, empa Aborahama a sala a eme kapela Morena." 
Genesis18:23 Jwale Aborahama a atamela, a re: “Na o tla hlo timetse ba lokileng mmoho le ba kgopo?" 
Genesis18:24 Ere mohlomong ho na le ba mashome a mahlano ba lokileng motseng oo, na o tla o timetsa, ho ena le ho o hauhela ka baka la bao ba mashome a mahlano ba phelang ho wona?" 
Genesis18:25 Kgopolo e jwalo, ya ho bolaya ba lokileng le ba kgopo, e ke e be hole le maikutlo a hao! Ho be siyo maikutlong a hao ho tshwantsha ba lokileng le ba kgopo! Na Moahlodi wa lefatshe lohle a ke ke a ahlola ka toka?”" 
Genesis18:26 Morena a re: “Haeba nka fumana motseng wa Sodoma ho ena le ba mashome a mahlano ba lokileng, ke tla o tshwarela kaofela ka baka la bona.”" 
Genesis18:27 Aborahama a boela a re: “Ako bone! Ke bile sebete ho bua le Morena, le hoja ke le lerole le molora feela." 
Genesis18:28 Ere ho haella ba bahlano, ho phetha palo ya mashome a mahlano a ba lokileng, na o tla timetsa motse oo ka baka la ba bahlano bao ba haellang?” Morena a araba, a re: “Haeba nka fumana ba mashome a mane a metso e mehlano, ha nka ke ka o timetsa.”" 
Genesis18:29 Aborahama a boela a bua le yena hape, a re: “Mohlomong ho fumanwa ba mashome a mane!” Morena a re: “Ka baka la bao ba mashome a mane ha nka ke ka etsa jwalo.”" 
Genesis18:30 Yaba Aborahama o re: “Morena a se ke a mpa a halefa, ke tle ke tsebe ho bua. Mohlomong ho fumanwa ba mashome a mararo!” Morena a re: “Haeba nka fumana ba mashome a mararo teng, nke ke ka etsa jwalo.”" 
Genesis18:31 Aborahama a re: “Ako bone! Ke bile sebete ho bua le Morena. Ere mohlomong ho ka fumanwa ba mashome a mabedi teng?” Morena a araba, a re: “Ka baka la bao ba mashome a mabedi ha ke na ho o timetsa.”" 
Genesis18:32 Yaba Aborahama o re: “Oho, Morena a se ke a mpa a halefa hle, ke mpe ke bue la ho qetela. Teng haeba ho ka fumanwa ba leshome?” Morena a araba, a re: “Ka baka la bao ba leshome nke ke ka o timetsa.”" 
Genesis18:33 Hoba Morena a qete ho bua le Aborahama, yaba o a itsamaela, mme Aborahama a kgutlela ha hae." 
Genesis19:1 Mangeloi ao a mabedi a fihla Sodoma ka phirimana, mme Lota o ne a dutse kgorong ya motse wa Sodoma. Yare ha Lota a a bona, a ema, a ya a kgahlanyetsa, a fihla a itihela fatshe ka sefahleho." 
Genesis19:2 Yaba o re: “Benghadi ba ka, ke a le rapela, fapohelang tlung ya mohlanka wa lona, le robaletse, le itlhatswe maoto, le tle le tsohe ka madungwadungwana, le tswele pele leetong la lona.” Mangeloi a re: “Tjhe, re tla ithoballa mabaleng a motse.”" 
Genesis19:3 Empa a a pheella ka matla, mme a fapohela ho yena, a kena tlung ya hae. A a lokisetsa dijo, a a phehela bohobe bo sa lomoswang, mme a eja." 
Genesis19:4 Empa yare ho eso robalwe, banna ba motse, banna ba Sodoma, bahlankana le maqheku, banna bohlebohle, ba etsetsa ntlo sakanalankope." 
Genesis19:5 Ba howeletsa Lota, ba re: “Banna bale ba fihlileng ha hao phirimaneng ye ba kae? Ba tlise kwano ho rona, re tlo ba ja maotwana!”" 
Genesis19:6 Lota a tswa monyako, a kwala lemati, a ya ho banna ba kantle," 
Genesis19:7 mme a re: “Ke a le rapela, bana beso; se keng la etsa bokgopo bo tjena." 
Genesis19:8 Bonang, ke na le baradi ba babedi, ba eso robale le monna; ha ke mpe ke le tlisetse bona, le etse seo le se ratang ka bona. Feela banna bana bona le se ke la ba etsa letho, hobane ba tshireletsong ya ka.”" 
Genesis19:9 Empa banna ba Sodoma ba re: “Suthela kwana!” Yaba ba re: “Mothwana enwa ke mojaki feela, empa o rata ho re laela! O rata ho ba moahlodi! Jwale re tla o etsa hampe le ho feta bona!” Ba etsa senkgome hodima Lota, mme ba atamela hore ba robe lemati." 
Genesis19:10 Empa banna ba ka tlung ba nanabetsa matsoho a bona, ba hulela Lota ka tlung ho bona, ba kwala lemati." 
Genesis19:11 Yaba ba foufatsa banna ba neng ba le monyako wa ntlo, ba banyenyane le ba baholo, hoo ba bileng ba kgathala ke ho nna ba phopholetsa hore na lemati le hokae." 
Genesis19:12 Jwale banna bao ba re ho Lota: “Na o na le ba bang moo: bakgwenyana, bara, baradi, kapa mang le mang wa heno ya motseng oo? Ba ntshe sebakeng sena," 
Genesis19:13 hobane re lekgatheng la ho se timetsa! Sello se qosang motse ona se seholo kapele ho Morena, mme Morena o re rometse ho tla o timetsa!”" 
Genesis19:14 Lota a tswa, a ya bua le bakgwenyana ba hae, ba nkileng baradi ba hae, a re: “Tsohang, le tswe motseng ona, hobane Morena o lekgatheng la ho o timetsa!” Empa bakgwenyana ba bona eka o a swaswa." 
Genesis19:15 Yare ha mafube a hlaha, mangeloi a pheella Lota, a re: “Tsoha, o nke mosadi wa hao, le baradi ba hao ba babedi, ba leng teng mona, o balehe; esere wa timela ha motse ona o otlwa.”" 
Genesis19:16 Empa a dikadika; kahoo banna bao ba mo hula ka letsoho, mmoho le mosadi wa hae le baradi ba hae ba babedi, hobane Morena o ne a mo hauhetse. Ba mo ntshetsa kantle ho motse." 
Genesis19:17 Ha ba se ba ba ntsheditse kantle, ba re ho bona: “Balehang le ipholose! Le se ke la hetla, kapa la ema kae kapa kae hara phula. Le balehele thabeng, ho seng jwalo le tla timela!”" 
Genesis19:18 Lota a re: “Ho se be jwalo, hle, Morena wa ka." 
Genesis19:19 Mohlanka wa hao o fumane mohau ho wena, mme o nkgauhetse haholo ka ho mpholosa. Empa ke sitwa ho balehela thabeng, esere koduwa ya mphumana, mme ka shwa." 
Genesis19:20 Bona, motse ono o haufi hoo nka balehelang ho wona, o bile o monyenyane. A nke ke balehele ho wona hle! Na ha o monyenyane, hore ke tle ke pholohe?”" 
Genesis19:21 Morena a re ho yena: “Bona, le tabeng ena ke o mametse; ha ke na ho timetsa motse oo o buileng ka wona." 
Genesis19:22 Potlaka, o balehele ho wona, hobane nke ke ka etsa letho, ho fihlela o fihla moo.” Ke ka baka lena motse oo o ileng wa bitswa Soware." 
Genesis19:23 Letsatsi le ne le se le tjhabile ha Lota a fihla Soware. 
Genesis19:24 Morena a nesetsa sebabole le mollo hodima Sodoma le Gomora, di etswa ho Morena, mahodimong." 
Genesis19:25 A ripitla metse eo, le phula yohle, le baahi bohle ba metse eo, le dimela tsohle tse metseng teng." 
Genesis19:26 Empa mosadi wa hae, ya neng a mo setse morao, a hetla, mme a fetoha tshiya ya letswai." 
Genesis19:27 Aborahama a tsoha ka madungwadungwana, a ya sebakeng seo a neng a eme ho sona ha a le kapela Morena." 
Genesis19:28 A tadima nqa Sodoma le Gomora, le nqeng tsohle tsa phula, mme a bona mosi o foqoha fatshe jwaloka mosi wa sebopi." 
Genesis19:29 Ha Modimo a ripitla metse eo e phuleng, Modimo a hopola Aborahama; a ntsha Lota koduweng eo, ha a ne a ripitla metse eo Lota a neng a ahile ho yona." 
Genesis19:30 Lota a nyoloha Soware, a ya aha dithabeng le baradi ba hae ba babedi, hobane o ne a tshaba ho aha Soware; yaba o phela lehaheng le baradi ba hae ba babedi." 
Genesis19:31 Moradi e moholo a re ho e monyenyane: “Ntata rona o se a tsofetse, mme ha ho na monna lefatsheng ya ka kenang dikobong tsa rona ka mokgwa wa batho ba lefatshe lohle." 
Genesis19:32 Tloo, re nwese ntata rona veine, re tle re robale le yena, re tsose leloko ka ntata rona.”" 
Genesis19:33 Bosiung boo ba nwesa ntata bona veine; moradi e moholo a kena, mme a robala le ntatae. Yena ha a a ka a tseba ha moradi wa hae a kena dikobong, leha a tsoha." 
Genesis19:34 Ka letsatsi le hlahlamang e moholo a re ho e monyenyane: “Bona, bosiung ba maobane ke ile ka robala le ntate. Bosiung bona a re mo nwese veine hape, o tle o kene, o yo robala le yena, re tle re tsose leloko ka ntata rona.”" 
Genesis19:35 Le bosiung bona boo ba nwesa ntata bona veine; moradi e monyenyane a kena, mme a robala le ntatae. Yena ha a a ka a tseba ha moradi wa hae a kena dikobong, leha a tsoha." 
Genesis19:36 Yaba baradi ba Lota, ka bobedi ba bona, e ba baimana ka ntata bona." 
Genesis19:37 E moholo a tswala ngwana wa moshanyana, a mo rea lebitso la Moabe. Ke yena ntata ba bitswang Bamoabe le kajeno." 
Genesis19:38 E monyenyane le yena a tswala ngwana wa moshanyana, a mo rea lebitso la Bene-Ami. Ke yena ntata ba bitswang Baamone le kajeno." 
Genesis20:1 Ho tloha moo Aborahama a fallela naheng e ka nqa borwa, a aha dipakeng tsa Kadeshe le Shure, a jaka Gerare." 
Genesis20:2 Kaha Aborahama a ne a ye a re mosadi wa hae, Sara, ke kgaitsedi ya hae, kahoo Abimeleke, kgosi ya Gerare, a romela maqosa ho nka Sara." 
Genesis20:3 Empa Modimo a etela Abimeleke ka toro, bosiu, a re ho yena: “Bona, o lekgatheng la ho shwa ka baka la mosadi eo o mo nkileng, hobane ke mosadi wa motho.”" 
Genesis20:4 Abimeleke o ne a eso kene dikobong tsa hae; jwale a re: “Morena, na o tla bolaya batho ba se nang molato?" 
Genesis20:5 Na hase yena ya ileng a re ho nna: Ke kgaitsedi ya ka? Le yena mosadi a re: Ke ngwaneso? Nna ke entse hona ka letswalo le kgutsitseng, le ka matsoho a se nang molato.”" 
Genesis20:6 Modimo a re ho yena torong eo: “E, ke a tseba hore hona o ho entse ka tswalo le kgutsitseng, mme ke nna ya ileng a o thibela hore o se ke wa ntshitelwa. Ka baka leo, ha ke a ka ka o dumella hore o mo ame." 
Genesis20:7 Jwale he, kgutlisa mosadi enwa wa motho, hobane monna wa hae ke moporofeta, o tla o rapella, mme o tla phela. Empa haeba o sa mo kgutlise, tseba hore ruri o tla shwa, wena le bohle ba heno.”" 
Genesis20:8 Yaba Abimeleke o tsoha ka madungwadungwana, o bitsa bahlanka ba hae bohle, o ba bolella tsena tsohle. Banna bao ba tshoha haholo." 
Genesis20:9 Jwale Abimeleke a bitsa Aborahama, a re ho yena: “Ke eng ee, eo o e entseng ho rona? Ke o sitetswe ka eng, hore ebe o tliseditse nna, le mmuso wa ka, sebe se seholo hakaale? O nketseditse dintho tse sa tshwanelang ho etswa.”" 
Genesis20:10 A boela a re ho Aborahama: “O ne o hopotse eng, ha o tla etsa ntho ee?”" 
Genesis20:11 Aborahama a re: “Ke e entse hobane ke ne ke nahana hore sebakeng sena Modimo ha a tshajwe, mme ba tla mpolaya ka baka la mosadi wa ka." 
Genesis20:12 Le hona e hlile e ntse e le kgaitsedi ya ka; ke moradi wa ntate, feela hase moradi wa mme, mme e ile ya eba mosadi wa ka." 
Genesis20:13 Jwale eitse ha Modimo a etsa hore ke falle tlung ya ntate, ka re ho mosadi: Molemo oo o tla nketsetsa wona ke ona: hohle moo re fihlang teng, ha o bua ka nna, o no re: Enwa ke kgaitsedi ya ka! ”" 
Genesis20:14 Yaba Abimeleke o nka mehlape ya dinku le ya dikgomo, le makgoba a banna le a basadi, a di nea Aborahama, a mo kgutlisetsa mosadi wa hae, Sara." 
Genesis20:15 Abimeleke a re: “Bona, naha ya ka ke eo; ikgahele moo o ratang teng.”" 
Genesis20:16 Ho Sara a re: “Bona, ke neile ngwaneno silefera e etsang boima ba dikilo tse leshome le motso o mong le halofo; hona ke ho o hlomphisa bohle ba nang le wena, mme mahlong a bohle o lokafaditswe.”" 
Genesis20:17 Yaba Aborahama o rapela Modimo, mme Modimo a fodisa Abimeleke le mosadi wa hae, le makgoba a basadi, mme ba tswala bana." 
Genesis20:18 Modimo o ne a kwetse dipopelo tsa ba lelapa la Abimeleke ka baka la Sara, mosadi wa Aborahama." 
Genesis21:1 Morena a etela Sara jwalokaha a ne a boletse, mme Morena a mo etsetsa jwalokaha a ne a mo tshepisitse." 
Genesis21:2 Sara a ithwala, a tswalla Aborahama mora boqhekung ba hae, ka nako eo Modimo a neng a buile ho yena ka yona." 
Genesis21:3 Aborahama a rea mora eo a mo tswaletsweng ke Sara lebitso la Isaka. 
Genesis21:4 Aborahama a bolotsa mora wa hae Isaka ha a ena le matsatsi a robedi, jwalokaha Modimo a ne a mo laetse." 
Genesis21:5 Ha mora wa hae Isaka a tswalwa, Aborahama o ne a ena le dilemo tse lekgolo." 
Genesis21:6 Sara a re: “Morena o nketseditse letsheho; e mong le e mong ya utlwang o tla ntsheha.” 
Genesis21:7 A boela a re: “Ke mang ya neng a ka re ho Aborahama: Sara o tla ke a nyantshe bana? 
Genesis21:8 Empa ke mo tswaletse mora boqhekung ba hae.” Ngwana a hola, a ba a kgweswa, mme Aborahama a etsa pitiki e kgolo mohla ngwana a kgweswang." 
Genesis21:9 Sara a bona mora eo Aborahama a mo tswaletsweng ke Hagare wa Moegepeta a ntse a tsheha Isaka ka mokgwa o somang. 
Genesis21:10 Kahoo a re ho Aborahama: “Leleka mosadi enwa wa lekgoba le mora wa hae, hobane mora wa mosadi enwa wa lekgoba e ke ke ya eba mojalefa le mora wa ka Isaka.”" 
Genesis21:11 Ntho ena ya utlwisa Aborahama bohloko haholo, ka baka la mora wa hae." 
Genesis21:12 Empa Modimo a re ho Aborahama: “O se ke wa utlwa bohloko ka baka la moshanyana, le ka baka la mosadi wa hao wa lekgoba. Mamela tsohle tseo Sara a o bolellang tsona, hobane ke ditloholo tsa Isaka tse tla bitswa bana ba hao." 
Genesis21:13 Le ka yena mora wa mosadi wa lekgoba ke tla etsa setjhaba, hobane ke ngwana wa hao.”" 
Genesis21:14 Yaba Aborahama o tsoha ka madungwadungwana, o nka bohobe, le lekuka la metsi; o di nea Hagare ka ho di bea hodima lehetla la hae, a mo leleka mmoho le moshanyana. Yena a tsamaya, a nna a lelera lehwatateng la Beeresheba." 
Genesis21:15 Ha metsi a ka lekukeng a se a fedile, yaba Hagare o bea moshanyana katlasa sehlahla se seng." 
Genesis21:16 Jwale a tloha, a ya dula a lebane le yena, a le bohole bo lekanang le ba ho beba ha motsu wa seqha ha o betswa, hobane o ne a re: “Ha ke rate ho bona ha moshanyana a eshwa.” Ha a ntse a dutse malebana le yena jwalo, moshanyana a bokolla habohloko." 
Genesis21:17 Yaba Modimo o utlwa lentswe la moshanyana, mme lengeloi la Modimo la howeletsa Hagare le le lehodimong, la re ho yena: “O tshwenngwa keng, Hagare? Se tshohe, hobane Modimo o utlwile lentswe la moshanyana moo a leng teng." 
Genesis21:18 Phahama, o emise moshanyana, o mo tshware ka letsoho, hobane ke tla mo etsa setjhaba se seholo.”" 
Genesis21:19 Jwale Modimo a tutubolla mahlo a Hagare, yaba o bona sediba; a ya ho sona, a tlatsa lekuka ka metsi, a le nea moshanyana, a nwa." 
Genesis21:20 Modimo a ba le moshanyana, mme a hola; a phela lehwatateng, ya eba setsebi sa ho fula ka seqha." 
Genesis21:21 A aha lehwatateng la Parane, mme mmae a mo nyadisa mosadi ya tswang naheng ya Egepeta." 
Genesis21:22 Ka yona nako eo, Abimeleke le Pikole, molaodi wa mabotho a hae, ba bua ho Aborahama, ba re: “Modimo o na le wena dinthong tsohle tseo o di etsang." 
Genesis21:23 Ka baka leo he, ntlhapanyetse mona ka lebitso la Modimo, hore nna, le bana ba ka, le ditloholo tsa ka, wena o ke ke wa re etsetsa bolotsana; le hore ho ya kamoo ke o hauhetseng kateng, le wena o tla nkgauhela, esita le yona naha eo o jakileng ho yona.”" 
Genesis21:24 Aborahama a re: “Ke a hlapanya.” 
Genesis21:25 Yare ha Aborahama a ipelaetsa ho Abimeleke ka baka la sediba seo bahlanka ba Abimeleke ba mo amohileng sona ka dikgoka," 
Genesis21:26 Abimeleke a re: “Ha ke tsebe hore na ke mang ya entseng ntho ena. Ha o eso ka o mpolella yona, le ho e utlwa ke qala ho e utlwa kajeno.”" 
Genesis21:27 Yaba Aborahama o nka mehlape ya dinku le ya dikgomo, o e nea Abimeleke, mme banna bao ba babedi ba etsa selekane." 
Genesis21:28 Aborahama a kgetha le dikonyana tse supileng, tse tshehadi, mohlapeng wa hae, a di beela kathoko." 
Genesis21:29 Abimeleke a re ho Aborahama: “Dikonyana tsee tse supileng, tse tshehadi, tseo o di kgethetseng kathoko, di bolela eng?”" 
Genesis21:30 Aborahama a re: “Dikonyana tsena tse supileng tse tshehadi, o tla di amohela di etswa matsohong a ka, e be bopaki ba hore sediba sena se tjhekilwe ke nna.”" 
Genesis21:31 Ka baka leo, sebaka seo sa bitswa Beeresheba, hobane ke moo bobedi ba bona ba ileng ba hlapanyetsana teng." 
Genesis21:32 Ba etsa selekane Beeresheba jwalo. Yaba Abimeleke le Pikole, molaodi wa mabotho a hae, ba a tsamaya, ba kgutlela naheng ya Bafilesita." 
Genesis21:33 Aborahama a lema sefate sa tamarisika moo Beeresheba, mme hona teng a rapela Morena, Modimo wa mehla yohle." 
Genesis21:34 Aborahama a jaka naheng eo ya Bafilesita ka ditshiu tse ngata. 
Genesis22:1 Hoba tsena di fete, Modimo a leka Aborahama, a re ho yena: “Aborahama!” Yena a re: “Ke nna enwa.”" 
Genesis22:2 Modimo a re: “Jwale nka mora wa hao ya mong feela, eo o mo ratang, Isaka, o ye naheng ya Moria, mme ka yena o etse sehlabelo sa setjheso, hodima e nngwe ya dithaba, eo ke tla o supisa yona.”" 
Genesis22:3 Aborahama a tsoha ka madungwadungwana, a qhaneha tonki ya hae, a nka ba babedi ba bahlanka ba hae, le mora wa hae, Isaka. A ratha patsi ya setjheso, a nto tsamaya ho ya sebakeng seo Modimo a mmoleletseng sona." 
Genesis22:4 Ka letsatsi la boraro, ha Aborahama a phahamisa mahlo, a bonela sebaka seo hole." 
Genesis22:5 Aborahama a re ho bahlanka ba hae: “Lona salang mona le tonki. Nna le moshanyana re tla ya mose mane, re yo kgumamela Modimo, ebe re kgutlela ho lona hape.”" 
Genesis22:6 Yaba Aborahama o nka patsi ya setjheso, o e jarisa mora wa hae Isaka; yena a nka mollo le thipa, ba tsamaya mmoho ba babedi." 
Genesis22:7 Isaka a bua le ntatae Aborahama, a re: “Ntate!” Aborahama a re: “Ke nna enwa, ngwana ka.” Yaba o re: “Mollo le patsi ke tsena; jwale konyana ya sehlabelo sa setjheso e kae?”" 
Genesis22:8 Aborahama a araba, a re: “Ngwana ka, Modimo o tla bona, a ipatlele konyana ya sehlabelo sa setjheso.” Yaba ba ntse ba tsamaya mmoho ba babedi." 
Genesis22:9 Ba fihla sebakeng seo Modimo a ileng a mmolella sona. Aborahama a haha aletare hona teng, a bea patsi hantle; yaba o tlama mora hae Isaka, o mmea hodima aletare, kahodima patsi." 
Genesis22:10 Jwale Aborahama a otlolla letsoho la hae, a nka thipa ho hlaba mora wa hae." 
Genesis22:11 Empa lengeloi la Morena la howeletsa le le lehodimong, la re: “Aborahama! Aborahama!” Yaba o re: “Ke nna enwa.”" 
Genesis22:12 La re: “O se ke wa isa letsoho la hao ho moshanyana; o se ke wa mo etsa letho, hobane jwale ke a tseba hore o tshaba Modimo, ha o sa ka wa nkganela ka mora wa hao ya mong feela.”" 
Genesis22:13 Aborahama a phahamisa mahlo, mme a tadima, a bona pheleu kamora hae, dinaka tsa yona di tshwasitswe sehlahleng. Aborahama a ya, a nka pheleu, mme a etsa sehlabelo sa setjheso ka yona, bakeng sa mora wa hae." 
Genesis22:14 Aborahama a rea sebaka seo lebitso la Morena o tla Bona, mme le kajeno ho sa ntse ho thwe: “Thabeng, Morena o tla bona.”" 
Genesis22:15 Lengeloi la Morena la howeletsa Aborahama kgetlo la bobedi, le ntse le le lehodimong," 
Genesis22:16 mme la re: “Morena o re: Ke ikanne ka bonna, hore kaha o entse ntho ena, o sa ka wa nkganela ka mora wa hao ya mong feela," 
Genesis22:17 ruri ke tla o hlohonolofatsa haholo, ditloholo tsa hao ke di ngatafatse jwaloka dinaledi tsa lehodimo, le jwaloka lehlabathe le lebopong le lewatle. Ditloholo tsa hao di tla hapa metse ya dira tsa tsona." 
Genesis22:18 Ditjhaba tsohle tsa lefatshe di tla hlohonolofala ka ditloholo tsa hao, hobane o mametse lentswe la ka. ”" 
Genesis22:19 Jwale Aborahama a kgutlela ho bahlanka ba hae; ba tsamaya hammoho ho kgutlela Beeresheba, mme a aha teng." 
Genesis22:20 Aborahama a tsebiswa, ha thwe: “Bona, Mileka le yena o tswaletse moena hao, Nakore, bana." 
Genesis22:21 Wa matsibolo ke Use, le Buse moena hae, le Kemuele, ntata Arame;" 
Genesis22:22 le Kesede, le Haso, le Piladashe, le Jidalafa, le Bethuele." 
Genesis22:23 Bethuele a tswala Rebeka, mme ba robedi bana ke bao Mileka a ba tswaletseng Nakore moena wa Aborahama." 
Genesis22:24 Mosadi wa hae wa lefielo, ya bitswang Reuma, le yena a tswala Teba, le Gahame, le Tahashe, le Maaka.”" 
Genesis23:1 Sara o ile a phela dilemo tse lekgolo le mashome a mabedi a metso e supileng; tsena ke dilemo tsa bophelo ba Sara. 
Genesis23:2 Sara a shwela Kiriate-Areba e leng Heborone, naheng ya Kanana. Aborahama a ya mo aparela bofifi, a mo llela." 
Genesis23:3 Aborahama a siya mofu wa hae, a ya bua le Bahete, a re:" 
Genesis23:4 “Ke molata le mojaki hara lona; mpheng setsha sa mabitla, ke tle ke yo epela mofu wa ka ho sona.”" 
Genesis23:5 Bahete ba araba Aborahama, ba re:" 
Genesis23:6 “Ako re mamele, monghadi. O kgosana e matla hara rona; epela mofu wa hao lebitleng le letleletle hara mabitla a rona. Ha ho le ya mong wa rona ya tla o hanela ka lebitla, ho epela mofu wa hao.”"
