Genesis23:7 Aborahama a ema, a isa hlompho ho Bahete, beng ba naha." 
Genesis23:8 A bua le bona, a re: “Haeba le utlwisisa hore ke yo epela mofu wa ka, mmameleng he. Nkopeleng Eferone, mora wa Sohara," 
Genesis23:9 hore a nnee lehaha la Makapela, leo e leng la hae, le sebakeng seo tshimo ya hae e fellang ho sona. A ke a nnee lona moo lona le leng teng, ka theko e lokelang, e be setsha sa ka sa mabitla.”" 
Genesis23:10 Eferone o ne a dutse hara Bahete, mme Eferone wa Mohete a araba Aborahama moo Bahete bohle ba neng ba le kgotla, kgorong ya motse, ba ntseng ba utlwa, a re:" 
Genesis23:11 “Tjhe, monghadi, ako mmamele. Ke o nea tshimo eo, ke o nea le lehaha le ho yona; ke a nea lona mo setjhaba sa heso se leng teng. Epela bafu ba hao.”" 
Genesis23:12 Aborahama a isa hlompho ho beng ba naha," 
Genesis23:13 mme a bua ho Eferone, moo beng ba naha ba ntseng ba utlwa, a re: “Haeba o rata ha ke e reka, ako mmamele hle. Ke tla reka tshimo eo ka tjhelete; e amohele, mme ke tla epela bafu ba ka ho yona.”" 
Genesis23:14 Eferone a araba Aborahama, a re:" 
Genesis23:15 “Monghadi, ako mmamele. Tshimo eo theko ya yona e leng silefera e etsang boima ba dikilo tse nne le halofo, hoo ke eng ho rona le wena? Epela bafu ba hao.”" 
Genesis23:16 Aborahama a dumellana le Eferone, mme a mo lekanyetsa silefera eo a ileng a e bolela moo Bahete ba ntseng ba utlwa, e leng silefera e etsang boima ba dikilo tse nne le halofo, ho ya ka boima bo neng bo sebediswa ke bahwebi." 
Genesis23:17 Tshimo ya Eferone e Makapela e pela Mamore, ke hore tshimo le lehaha le neng le le ho yona, le difate tsohle tse neng di le tshimong ka bonamo ba yona, tsena tsa neelwa" 
Genesis23:18 Aborahama hore e be leruo la hae. Hona ha etswa moo Behete bohle, ba neng ba le kgotla, kgorong ya motse wa Hete, ba ntseng ba bona." 
Genesis23:19 Kamora tsena Aborahama a epela mosadi wa hae Sara ka lehaheng la tshimo ya Makapela, e pela Mamore, e leng Heborone e naheng ya Kanana." 
Genesis23:20 Tshimo le lehaha le ho yona, tsa newa Aborahama ke Bahete, hore e be setsha sa hae sa mabitla." 
Genesis24:1 Aborahama o ne a se a tsofetse, a atetswe ke ditshiu, mme Morena o ne a mo hlohonolofaditse dinthong tsohle." 
Genesis24:2 Jwale Aborahama a re ho mohlanka wa hae, ya sebeditseng tlung ya hae halelele ho feta bohle, ya neng a okamela tsohle tseo a nang le tsona: “Ako bee seatla sa hao katlasa serope sa ka," 
Genesis24:3 ke tle ke o hlapantshe ka Morena, Modimo wa lehodimo le Modimo wa lefatshe, hore o ke ke wa nkela mora wa ka mosadi ho baradi ba Bakanana bao ke ahileng hara bona," 
Genesis24:4 empa o tla ya naheng ya heso, le ho bang ka nna, mme o nkele mora wa ka Isaka, mosadi teng.”" 
Genesis24:5 Yaba mohlanka o re ho yena: “Mohlomong mosadi eo a ke ke a dumela ho tla le nna naheng ena; na jwale ke tla tshwanela ho kgutlisetsa mora wa hao naheng eo o tswang ho yona na?” 
Genesis24:6 Aborahama a re ho yena: “Hlokomela hore o se ke wa kgutlisetsa mora wa ka moo. 
Genesis24:7 Morena, Modimo wa lehodimo, ya ileng a ntlosa tlung ya ntate le naheng eo ke ileng ka tswallwa ho yona, o ne a bue le nna, mme a ntlhapanyetsa, a re: Ditloholo tsa hao ke tla di nea naha ena. Ke yena ya tla romela lengeloi la hae ho o etella pele, mme o tla nkela mora wa ka mosadi hona teng." 
Genesis24:8 Empa haeba mosadi eo a sa rate ho tla le wena, e tla ba wena o lokolohile kanong ena eo o nketseditseng yona; feela ha e le mora wa ka, o se ka wa mo kgutlisetsa moo.”" 
Genesis24:9 Yaba mohlanka o bea seatla sa hae katlasa serope sa Aborahama, monga hae, mme a mo hlapanyetsa tabeng ena." 
Genesis24:10 Jwale mohlanka a nka dikamele tse leshome dikameleng tsa monga hae, mme a tsamaya a nkile mefuta yohle ya dintho tsa bohlokwa tsa monga hae. A ya Mesopotamia, motseng wa Nakore." 
Genesis24:11 A kgumamisa dikamele kantle ho motse, pela sediba, mantsiboya, e leng nako eo basadi ba kgang metsi ka yona." 
Genesis24:12 Yaba o re: “Morena Modimo wa monga ka Aborahama, ako nkatlehise kajeno, ke a o rapela, o hauhele monga ka Aborahama." 
Genesis24:13 Bona, ke eme pela sediba, mme baradi ba batho ba motse ona ba tla tla ho kga metsi." 
Genesis24:14 Ho ke ho etsahale hore morwetsana eo ke tla re ho yena: Ako role nkgo ya hao ke nwe, ebe o re ho nna: Nwa, mme ke tla nwesa le dikamele tsa hao, e be yena eo o mo kgethetseng mohlanka wa hao Isaka. Ka hona ke tla tseba hore o hauhetse monga ka.”" 
Genesis24:15 Yare a eso qete ho bua, Rebeka, moradi wa Bethuele ya tswetsweng ke Mileka, mosadi wa Nakore, moena wa Aborahama, a hlaha a beile nkgo lehetleng." 
Genesis24:16 Morwetsana enwa o ne a le motle haholo, a eso dihuwe letswele. A theohela sedibeng, a tlatsa nkgo ya hae, a nyoloha." 
Genesis24:17 Yaba mohlanka o mathela ho yena ho mo kgahlanyetsa, o re: “Ke a o rapela, ako mphe metsinyana nkgong ya hao ke nwe.”" 
Genesis24:18 Morwetsana a re: “Nwa, monghadi,” mme a phakisa a theola nkgo ya hae lehetleng, a mo nwesa." 
Genesis24:19 Ha morwetsana a qetile ho mo fa metsi hore a nwe, a re: “Ke tla kgella le dikamele tsa hao, ho fihlela le tsona di kgotswe.”" 
Genesis24:20 A phakisa a tshollela metsi a ka nkgong ya hae senwellong sa diphoofolo, a boela a mathela sedibeng ho kga metsi, mme a kgella dikamele tsa hae kaofela." 
Genesis24:21 Monna eo a mo shebisisa a kgutsitse, ho ithuta hore na Morena o atlehisitse leeto la hae kapa tjhe." 
Genesis24:22 Yare hoba dikamele di qete ho nwa, monna eo a nka lesale la kgauta le etsang boima ba dikeramo tse hlano le halofo, le dipetja tsa kgauta tse pedi tsa matsohong, tse etsang boima ba dikeramo tse lekgolo le leshome." 
Genesis24:23 Yaba o re: “O moradi wa mang? Ako mpolelle hle. Na tlung ya ntatao re ka fumana sebaka sa ho robala?” 
Genesis24:24 Morwetsana a mo araba, a re: “Ke moradi wa Bethuele, ya tswetsweng ke Mileka, le Nakore.”" 
Genesis24:25 A boela a re ho yena: “Re na le seteroi le furu e lekaneng, le moo le ka robalang teng.”" 
Genesis24:26 Yaba monna eo o a inama, o kgumamela Morena," 
Genesis24:27 o re: “Ho bokwe Morena, Modimo wa monga ka Aborahama, ya sa kang a lebala mohau wa hae le botshepehi ba hae ho monga ka. Ha e le nna, Morena o ntsamaisitse tseleng e nkisang tlung ya bana babo monga ka.”" 
Genesis24:28 Jwale morwetsana, a matha, a ya bolella ba ntlo ya mmae tsena." 
Genesis24:29 Rebeka o ne a ena le kgaitsedi ya hae, e bitswang Labane; yaba Labane o mathela ho monna eo ya sedibeng." 
Genesis24:30 Ha Labane a bona lesale le dipetja tse matsohong a kgaitsedi ya hae, mme a utlwa mantswe a kgaitsedi ya hae, Rebeka, ha a re: “Monna eo o buile tjena le tjena ho nna,” a ya ho monna eo; a mo fumana a eme pela dikamele, sedibeng." 
Genesis24:31 Labane a re: “Kena, wena ya hlohonolofaditsweng ke Morena; o emetseng kantle? Ke se ke o lokiseditse ntlo le sebaka sa dikamele.”" 
Genesis24:32 Monna eo a kena ka tlung. Labane a qhanolla dikamele, a di fa seteroi le furu; a fa monna eo metsi ho hlatswa maoto a hae le ho hlatswa maoto a banna ba neng ba ena le yena." 
Genesis24:33 Yaba ho bewa dijo kapele ho yena, hore a je, empa yena a re: “Ha nka ke ka ja ke eso bolele ditaba tsa ka.” Labane a re: “Bua.”" 
Genesis24:34 Yaba o re: “Ke mohlanka wa Aborahama. 
Genesis24:35 Morena o hlohonolofaditse monga ka haholo, o mo entse hore e be morui. O mo file mehlape ya dinku le ya dikgomo, le silefera le kgauta, le bahlanka le makgabunyane, le dikamele le ditonki." 
Genesis24:36 Sara, mohatsa monga ka, o ile a tswalla monga ka mora boqhekung ba hae, mme monga ka o neile mora enwa tsohle tseo a nang le tsona." 
Genesis24:37 Jwale o ile a ntlhapantsha, a re: O se ke wa nkela mora wa ka mosadi ho baradi ba Bakanana, bao ke ahileng naheng ya bona." 
Genesis24:38 O tla ya tlung ya ntate le ho bang ka nna, mme o nkele mora wa ka mosadi." 
Genesis24:39 “Yaba ke re ho monga ka: Mohlomong mosadi eo a ke ke a dumela ho tla le nna. 
Genesis24:40 “Empa yena a re ho nna: Morena eo ke mo kgahlisang ka metsamao ya ka, o tla roma lengeloi la hae le tsamaye le wena, mme a atlehise leeto la hao. O tla nkela mora wa ka mosadi ho bang ka nna, tlung ya ntate." 
Genesis24:41 Jwale e tla ba o lokolohile kanong ya hao, ha o ka fela wa fihla ho bang ka nna. Le teng haeba ba sa o nee mosadi eo, e tla ba o lokolohile kanong ya hao." 
Genesis24:42 “Kajeno ha ke fihla sedibeng ke ile ka re: Morena, Modimo wa monga ka Aborahama, haeba jwale o ka atlehisa leeto la ka," 
Genesis24:43 ho ke ho etsahale tjena. Ke eme sedibeng mona. Ha morwetsana a ka tla ho kga metsi, ke tla re ho yena: Ako mphe metsinyana nkgong ya hao, ke nwe." 
Genesis24:44 Ha a ka re: Nwa, mme ke tla kgella le dikamele tsa hao, e tla ba ke yena mosadi eo Morena a mo kgethetseng mora wa monga ka." 
Genesis24:45 “Yare ke eso qete ho bua ka pelong ya ka, ka bona Rebeka a etla, a beile nkgo lehetleng la hae, mme a theohela ka sedibeng, a kga metsi. Yaba ke re ho yena: Ke a o rapela, ako mphe metsi ke nwe." 
Genesis24:46 “A phakisa a theola nkgo ya hae lehetleng, mme a re: Nwa, mme ke tla nwesa le dikamele tsa hao. Ka nwa, mme a nwesa le dikamele." 
Genesis24:47 “Ka nto mmotsa, ka re: O moradi wa mang? “A araba, a re: Ke moradi wa Bethuele, ya tswetsweng ke Nakore le Mileka. “Yaba ke mo rwesa lesale nkong, le dipetja matsohong." 
Genesis24:48 Jwale ka inama, ka kgumamela Morena, mme ka boka Morena, Modimo wa monga ka Aborahama, ya ileng a ntsamaisa ka tsela e nepahetseng, hore ke tlo nkela mora wa monga ka moradi wa moena wa hae." 
Genesis24:49 “Jwale, ha le rata ho bontsha mohau le botshepehi ho monga ka, mpolelleng. Le teng haeba ho se jwalo, mpolelleng, e le hore ke tle ke tsebe ho thinyetsa ka letsohong le letona kapa ka ho le letshehadi.”" 
Genesis24:50 Yaba bo-Labane le Bethuele ba a araba, ba re: “Taba ena e tswa ho Morena; re ke ke ra bua le wena hampe kapa hantle." 
Genesis24:51 Rebeka ke enwa kapele ho wena; mo nke, mme o tsamaye le yena, e yo ba ngwetsi ya monga hao, ho ya kamoo Morena a boletseng kateng.”" 
Genesis24:52 Ha mohlanka wa Aborahama a utlwa mantswe ana, a inama kapele ho Morena." 
Genesis24:53 Yaba mohlanka o ntsha mekgabiso ya silefera le mekgabiso ya kgauta, le diaparo, o di nea Rebeka. A nea le kgaitsedi ya hae le mmae dimpho tsa bohlokwa." 
Genesis24:54 Jwale yena le banna ba nang le yena ba eja, ba enwa, mme ba hlola bosui moo. Ha ba tsoha hoseng, mohlanka a re: “Ntokolleng, ke kgutlele ho monga ka.”" 
Genesis24:55 Labane, kgaitsedi ya Rebeka, le mmae ba re: “Morwetsana ha a ke a dule le rona matsatsi a se makae, bonyane matsatsi a leshome; kamorao ho moo a ka tsamaya.”" 
Genesis24:56 Empa a re ho bona: “Le se ke la ntiehisa, kaha Morena o atlehisitse leeto la ka; ntokolleng, ke kgutlele ho monga ka.”" 
Genesis24:57 Ba re: “Re tla bitsa morwetsana, re utlwe maikutlo a hae.”" 
Genesis24:58 Jwale ba bitsa Rebeka, mme ba re ho yena: “Na o tla tsamaya le monna eo?” Yena a araba, a re: “Ke tla tsamaya le yena.”" 
Genesis24:59 Yaba ba lokolla kgaitsedi ya bona Rebeka, le mohodisi wa hae, le mohlanka wa Aborahama le banna ba hae." 
Genesis24:60 Ba hlohonolofatsa Rebeka, ba re ho yena: “Kgaitsedi ya rona, o ke o be mma dikete tsa dikete; Ditloholo tsa hao di ke di hape metse, di hape metse ya dira tsa tsona.”" 
Genesis24:61 Yaba Rebeka le makgabunyane a hae ba a ema, ba palama dikamele, ba tsamaya le monna eo. Mohlanka a nka Rebeka, a tsamaya." 
Genesis24:62 Isaka o ne a etswa Sedibeng sa Lakai-Roi kaha o ne a ahile naheng e ka borwa. 
Genesis24:63 Mantsiboya Isaka a ya naheng ho ya imamela, mme eitse ha a phahamisa mahlo, a tadima, a bona dikamele di etla." 
Genesis24:64 Rebeka a phahamisa mahlo, mme yare ha a bona Isaka a tholoha kamele." 
Genesis24:65 Yaba o re ho mohlanka: “Ke mang monna elwa ya tsamayang mola, ya tlilo re kgahlanyetsa?” Mohlanka a araba, a re: “Ke monga ka.” Jwale Rebeka a nka lesira la hae, a ikgurumetsa." 
Genesis24:66 Mohlanka a bolella Isaka dintho tsohle tseo a ileng a di etsa. 
Genesis24:67 Isaka a isa Rebeka ka tenteng ya mmae Sara; yaba o a mo nka, e ba mosadi wa hae, mme a mo rata. Isaka a tshediseha kamora lefu la mmae." 
Genesis25:1 Aborahama a boela a nyala mosadi e mong, eo lebitso la hae e neng e le Ketura." 
Genesis25:2 Mosadi enwa a mo tswalla Simerane, le Jokoshane, le Medane, le Midiane, le Jishebaka, le Shua." 
Genesis25:3 Jokoshane a tswala Sheba le Dedane. Ditloholo tsa Dedane e ne e le Baasure, le Baletushe, le Baleumime." 
Genesis25:4 Bara ba Midiane e ne e le Efa, le Efere, le Hanoke, le Abida, le Eledaa. Bana bohle e ne e le bara ba Ketura." 
Genesis25:5 Aborahama a nea Isaka tsohle tseo a nang le tsona. 
Genesis25:6 Empa ha e le bara ba basadi ba hae ba mafielo, Aborahama a ba nea dimpho, mme eitse a sa phela a ba tlosa ho mora wa hae Isaka, a ba isa ka nqa botjhabela, naheng ya botjhabela." 
Genesis25:7 Ditshiu tsa bophelo ba Aborahama e bile dilemo tse lekgolo le mashome a supileng a metso e mehlano. 
Genesis25:8 Aborahama a neela moya, a shwa, mme a orohela ho bang ka yena, hoba a phele halalele ka boiketlo, a hodile, a atetswe ke ditshiu." 
Genesis25:9 Bara ba hae, Isaka le Ishemaele, ba mo epela lehaheng la Makapela, tshimong ya Eferone, mora wa Sohara wa Mohete, pela Mamore." 
Genesis25:10 Tshimo ena Aborahama o ne a e rekile ho bara ba Hete. Ke moo Aborahama a ileng a epelwa teng, le mosadi wa hae Sara." 
Genesis25:11 Kamora lefu la Aborahama, Modimo a hlohonolofatsa Isaka, mora wa hae. Isaka a aha Sedibeng sa Lakai-Roi." 
Genesis25:12 Lena ke leloko la Ishemaele, mora wa Aborahama, eo Hagare wa Moegepeta, lekgabunyane la Sara, a ileng a mo tswalla Aborahama." 
Genesis25:13 Ana ke mabitso a bara ba Ishemaele ka ho hlahlamana ha tswalo ya bona: Nebajote, letsibolo la Ishemaele, le Kedare, le Adabeele, le Mibesame" 
Genesis25:14 le Mishema, le Duma, le Masa," 
Genesis25:15 le Hadare, le Tema, le Jeture, le Nafisha, le Kedema." 
Genesis25:16 Bana ke bona bara ba Ishemaele, mme ana ke mabitso a bona, ho ya ka metse ya bona, le ho ya ka diahelo tsa bona; ke mahosana a leshome le metso e mmedi, ho ya ka merabe ya bona." 
Genesis25:17 Dilemo tsa bophelo ba Ishemaele e bile lekgolo le mashome a mararo a metso e supileng. A neela moya, a shwa, mme a orohela ho bang ka yena." 
Genesis25:18 Ditloholo tsa hae tsa aha ho tloha Hafila ho ya fihla Shure, ka botjhabela ho Egepeta, tseleng e yang Asiria. A aha ka botjhabela ho bana babo." 
Genesis25:19 Tsena ke ditaba tsa Isaka, mora wa Aborahama. Aborahama o ile a tswala Isaka." 
Genesis25:20 Isaka o ne a ena le dilemo tse mashome a mane, ha a nyala Rebeka, moradi wa Bethuele, Moarame wa Padane-Arame, kgaitsedi ya Labane wa Moarame." 
Genesis25:21 Isaka a rapella mosadi wa hae ho Morena, hobane e ne e le nyopa, mme Morena a utlwa thapelo ya hae, Rebeka mosadi wa hae ya eba moimana." 
Genesis25:22 Masea a ne a rahana ka popelong ya hae; yaba o re: “Haeba ho tjee, ekaba ke phelela eng?” A ya botsa Morena," 
Genesis25:23 mme Morena a re ho yena: “Ditjhaba tse pedi di ka popelong ya hao, merabe e mmedi e tla arohana, merabe eo e tswe maleng a hao, morabe o mong o tla ba matla ho feta o mong, e moholo o tla sebeletsa e monyenyane.”" 
Genesis25:24 Ha matsatsi a hae a ho beleha a se a phethahetse, bonang, mafahla a ne a le teng ka popelong ya hae." 
Genesis25:25 La pele la hlaha le le lefubedu, mmele wohle wa lona o ne o ka kobo e phophomang boya, mme ba le rea lebitso la Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Kamora moo ha hlaha moena wa hae, mme letsoho la hae le ne le tshwere serethe sa Esau, yaba ba mo rea lebitso la Jakobo. Isaka o ne a ena le dilemo tse mashome a tsheletseng ha a ba tswala." 
Genesis25:27 Ha bashanyana bana ba ntse ba hola, Esau ya eba setsomi, a phela hara naha; athe Jakobo e ne e le motho wa kgotso, wa sesalahae." 
Genesis25:28 Isaka o ne a rata Esau, hobane o ne a eja nama ya diphoofolo tseo a di bolayang, empa Rebeka yena o ne a rata Jakobo." 
Genesis25:29 Ka mohlomong Jakobo o ne a phehile sopho, Esau a kena a etswa naheng, a lapile haholo." 
Genesis25:30 Yaba Esau o re ho Jakobo: “Ako mphe ntho e kgubedu eno, ntho e kgubedu eno hle, ke je, hobane ke lapile haholo!” Ke ka baka leo a reilweng lebitso la Edomo." 
Genesis25:31 Jakobo a re: “Nthekisetse ditokelo tsa boholo ba hao pele.” 
Genesis25:32 Esau a re: “Bona, ke se ke le lekgatheng la ho shwa; ho nna molemo wa ditokelo tsa boholo ba ka ke ofe?”" 
Genesis25:33 Jakobo a re: “Ntlhapanyetse pele!” Yaba o a mo hlapanyetsa, o rekisetsa Jakobo ditokelo tsa boholo ba hae." 
Genesis25:34 Jwale Jakobo a fa Esau bohobe le sopho ya dierekisi; yaba o a ja, o a nwa, a nto phahama, a ikela. Esau a nyedisa ditokelo tsa boholo ba hae jwalo." 
Genesis26:1 Tlala ya eba teng naheng eo, ntle ho tlala e kileng ya eba teng pele, mehleng ya Aborahama. Yaba Isaka o ya Gerare, ho Abimeleke kgosi ya Bafilesita." 
Genesis26:2 Morena a iponahatsa ho yena, a re: “O se ke wa theohela Egepeta; o mpe o yo aha naheng eo ke tla o laela yona." 
Genesis26:3 Jaka naheng eo, mme ke tla ba le wena, ke o hlohonolofatse, hobane wena le ditloholo tsa hao ke tla le nea dinaha tsena tsohle. Ke tla tiisa kano eo ke neng ke e hlapanyetse ntatao Aborahama." 
Genesis26:4 Ke tla ngatafatsa ditloholo tsa hao jwaloka dinaledi tsa lehodimo, mme dinaha tsena tsohle ke tla di nea ditloholo tsa hao. Ditjhaba tsohle tsa lefatshe di tla hlohonolofala ka ditloholo tsa hao;" 
Genesis26:5 kaha Aborahama o ile a mmamela, a boloka ditsela tsa ka, le ditaelo tsa ka, le ditemoso tsa ka, le melao ya ka.”" 
Genesis26:6 Yaba Isaka o aha Gerare. 
Genesis26:7 Ha batho ba sebaka seo ba mmotsa ka mosadi wa hae, a re: “Ke kgaitsedi ya ka,” hobane o ne a tshaba ho re: “Ke mosadi wa ka,” esere banna ba sebaka seo ba mmolaya ka baka la Rebeka, hobane Rebeka o ne a le motle haholo." 
Genesis26:8 Ha Isaka a se a ahile moo ditshiu tse teletsana, Abimeleke, kgosi ya Bafilesita, a tadima ka fesetere, mme a bona Isaka a ntse a phathapathatsana le Rebeka, mosadi wa hae." 
Genesis26:9 Yaba Abimeleke o bitsa Isaka, o re: “Ha ke re eo ke mosadi wa hao? Ke hobaneng ha o ile wa re ke kgaitsedi ya hao?” Isaka a mo araba, a re: “Ke hobane ke ile ka nahana hore mohlomong ka baka la hae ke tla tshoha ke bolawa.”" 
Genesis26:10 Abimeleke a re ho yena: “Ke eng ee, eo o e entseng ho rona? E mong wa batho bana a ka be a ile a kena dikobong tsa mosadi wa hao, mme o ka be o entse hore re be molato.”" 
Genesis26:11 Jwale Abimeleke a bolella batho ba hae, a re: “Mang kapa mang ya ka amang monna enwa, kapa mosadi wa hae, o tla bolawa.”" 
Genesis26:12 Isaka a lema naheng eo, mme ka sona selemo seo a kotula halekgolo. Morena a mo hlohonolofatsa," 
Genesis26:13 mme ya eba morui, a nna a tswela pele ho atleha, ho fihlela e eba morui e moholo ka ho fetisisa." 
Genesis26:14 A ba le mehlape ya dinku le ya dikgomo, le bahlanka ba bangata, hoo Bafilesita ba ileng ba mo honohela." 
Genesis26:15 Didiba tsohle tseo bahlanka ba ntatae ba neng ba ile ba di tjheka mehleng ya ntatae Aborahama, Bafilesita ba ne ba ile ba di kata ka mobu." 
Genesis26:16 Jwale Abimeleke a re ho Isaka: “Tloha hara rona, hobane o matla ho re feta.”" 
Genesis26:17 Yaba Isaka o tloha moo, o ya hloma kgohlong ya Gerare, mme a aha teng." 
Genesis26:18 Isaka a boela a tjheka didiba tse ileng tsa tjhekwa mehleng ya ntatae Aborahama. Bafilesita ba ne ba ile ba di kata kamora lefu la Aborahama, mme a di rea mabitso ao ntatae a neng a di reile wona." 
Genesis26:19 Bahlanka ba Isaka ba tjheka ka kgohlong, mme ba fumana sediba sa metsi a tsapolang." 
Genesis26:20 Badisa ba Gerare ba tsekisana le ba Isaka, ba re: “Metsi ana ke a rona.” Yaba sediba seo o se rea lebitso la Eseke, hobane ba ne ba se tsekisane le yena." 
Genesis26:21 Ba boela ba tjheka sediba se seng, mme le seo ba se tsekisana; sona a se rea lebitso la Sitena." 
Genesis26:22 A falla moo, a tjheka sediba se seng hape, empa sena ba se ke ba hlola ba se tsekisana, mme sona a se rea lebitso la Rehobote, a re: “Jwale Morena o re file sebaka, mme re tla ngatafala naheng ena.”" 
Genesis26:23 Ho tloha moo a nyoloha, a ya Beeresheba." 
Genesis26:24 Ka bona bosiu boo, Morena a iponahatsa ho yena, a re: “Ke nna Modimo wa ntatao Aborahama. Se tshabe letho hobane ke na le wena. Ke tla o hlohonolofatsa, ke ngatafatse ditloholo tsa hao, ka baka la Aborahama, mohlanka wa ka.”" 
Genesis26:25 Yaba o haha aletare moo, mme a rapela Morena, a hloma tente ya hae moo. Hona moo bahlanka ba Isaka ba tjheka sediba." 
Genesis26:26 Abimeleke, a etswa Gerare, a ena le motswalle wa hae Ahusate le Pikole molaodi wa mabotho a hae, a ya ho Isaka." 
Genesis26:27 Isaka a re ho bona: “Ke ka baka lang le tlileng ho nna, ha le ntlhoile tjee, le bile le ntelekile ha lona?”" 
Genesis26:28 Ba mo araba, ba re: “Re bone hantle hore Morena o na le wena; yaba re re: Ha ho ke ho be le kano pakeng tsa rona le wena, re etse selekane le wena." 
Genesis26:29 O ke ke wa re etsa hampe, jwalokaha le rona re sa ka ra o etsa hampe. Ha ho letho leo re le entseng ho wena, haese botle feela, mme re bile re o ntshitse ka kgotso. Jwale o ya hlohonolofaditsweng ke Morena.”" 
Genesis26:30 A ba etsetsa mokete, mme ba eja, ba enwa." 
Genesis26:31 Ba tsoha ka madungwadungwana, ba hlapanyetsana, mme Isaka a ba lokolla, ba tloha ho yena ka kgotso." 
Genesis26:32 Ka lona letsatsi leo bahlanka ba Isaka ba tla ho yena, ba mmolella ka sediba seo ba se tjhekileng, mme ba re ho yena: “Re fumane metsi.”" 
Genesis26:33 Sediba seo a se bitsa Sheba; ka baka leo, motse oo o bitswa Beeresheba le kajeno." 
Genesis26:34 Ha Esau a ena le dilemo tse mashome a mane a nyala Jehudite, moradi wa Beeri wa Mohete, le Basemate, moradi wa Elone wa Mohete." 
Genesis26:35 Basadi bana ba sulafaletsa Rebeka le Isaka bophelo. 
Genesis27:1 Yare ha Isaka a se a tsofetse, mahlo a hae a se a fokola, hoo a neng a se a sa bone, a bitsa Esau, mora wa hae wa matsibolo, mme a re ho yena. “Ngwana ka!” Yena a arabela, a re: “Ke nna enwa.”" 
Genesis27:2 Isaka a re: “Bona ke tsofetse; ha ke tsebe letsatsi leo ke tla shwa ka lona. 
Genesis27:3 Ako nke dibetsa tsa hao hle, le sehlajwa sa hao, le seqha sa hao, o ye naheng, o eo ntsomela phoofolo." 
Genesis27:4 Jwale o mphehele nama a hlabosang, ka mokgwa oo ke o ratang, o ntlisetse yona ke tlo ja, e le hore ke tle ke o hlohonolofatse ke eso shwe.”" 
Genesis27:5 Rebeka o ne a ntse a utlwa ha Isaka a bua le Esau, mora wa hae. Esau a ya naheng ho ya tsoma phoofolo, hore a tle a e tlise." 
Genesis27:6 Rebeka a bua le mora wa hae Jakobo, a re: “Ke utlwile ntatao a bua le moholwane wa ha Esau, a re:" 
Genesis27:7 Ntlisetse phoofolo, mme o mphehele nama e hlabosang, e le hore ke tle ke je, mme ke o hlohonolofatse mahlong a Morena ke eso shwe." 
Genesis27:8 Jwale, ngwana ka, mamela kamoo ke o laelang kateng." 
Genesis27:9 Eya mohlapeng hona jwale, o yo ntlisetsa dipotsanyane tse pedi, tse ntle, mme ka tsona ke tla phehela ntatao nama e hlabosang, ka mokgwa oo a o ratang." 
Genesis27:10 O tla e isetsa ntatao hore a je, a tle a o hlohonolofatse a eso shwe.”" 
Genesis27:11 Empa Jakobo a re ho Rebeka, mmae: “Bona, moholwane wa ka Esau ke motho ya mohwete, athe nna ke motho ya lehwete." 
Genesis27:12 Mohlomong ntate o tla mphopholetsa, mme mahlong a hae ke tla bonahala ke le mothetsi, ebe ke itlisetsa thohako e seng tlhohonolofatso.”" 
Genesis27:13 Mmae a re ho yena: “Thohako ya hao e tla ba hodima ka, ngwana ka. Wena, o mamele feela, mme o tsamaye, o yo ntatela tsona.”" 
Genesis27:14 Yaba o a tsamaya, wa di nka, o di tlisetsa mmae; mmae a pheha nama e hlabosang, ka mokgwa oo ntatae a o ratang." 
Genesis27:15 Jwale Rebeka a nka diaparo tse ntle tsa Esau, mora wa hae wa matsibolo, tse neng di le ho yena ka tlung, a di apesa Jakobo mora wa hae e monyenyane." 
Genesis27:16 Yaba o thata matsoho a hae, le molala wa hae o lehwete, ka matlalo a dipotsanyane." 
Genesis27:17 Nama e hlabosang le bohobe, tseo a ileng a di lokisa, a di neela mora wa hae Jakobo, matsohong." 
Genesis27:18 Yaba Jakobo o ya ho ntatae, o fihla, a re: “Ntate!” Yena a arabela, a re: “Ke nna enwa! O mang, ngwana ka?”" 
Genesis27:19 Jakobo a re ho ntatae: “Ke nna Esau, matsibolo a hao, mme ke entse kamoo o ntaetseng kateng. Ako tsohe hle, o dule, o je nama ya tseo ke tswa di tsoma, o tle o ntlhohonolofatse.”" 
Genesis27:20 Empa Isaka a re ho mora wa hae: “O e fumane kapele hakaakang, ngwana ka?” Jakobo a araba, a re: “Ke hobane Morena, Modimo wa hao, o ile a nkatlehisa.”" 
Genesis27:21 Yaba Isaka o re ho Jakobo: “Ako atamele hle, ke o phopholetse ngwana ka ke utlwe hore na efela e le wena mora wa ka Esau, kapa tjhe.”" 
Genesis27:22 Jwale Jakobo a atamela ho ntatae Isaka; yena a mo phopholetsa, mme a re: “Lentswe ke lentswe la Jakobo, empa matsoho ke matsoho a Esau.”" 
Genesis27:23 A se ke a ba a mo tseba, hobane matsoho a hae a ne a ena le mohwete jwaloka matsoho a moholwane wa hae Esau. Yaba o a mo hlohonolofatsa." 
Genesis27:24 A re: “Na o fela o le mora wa ka Esau?” Jakobo a arabela, a re: “Ke yena!”" 
Genesis27:25 Jwale a re: “Ntlisetse yona, ke je nama ya tse tsomilweng ke mora wa ka mme ke o hlohonolatse.” Yaba o e tlisa ho yena, mme a ja; a mo tlisetsa le veine mme a nwa." 
Genesis27:26 Jwale ntatae Isaka a re ho yena: “Atamela jwale, ngwana ka o nkake.”" 
Genesis27:27 Yaba o a atamela, o a mo aka; Isaka a utlwa monko wa diaparo tsa hae, mme a mo hlohonolofatsa, a re: “Bona, monko wa mora wa ka o jwaloka monko wa tshimo, tshimo eo Morena a e hlohonolofaditseng!" 
Genesis27:28 Modimo a ke a o nee phoka ya lehodimo, le monono wa lefatshe, le tjhai ya koro le ya veine." 
Genesis27:29 Ditjhaba di ke di o sebeletse, mme merabe e ke e o kgumamele. Eba morena wa bana beno, bana beno ba o kgumamele. Bohle ba o rohakang ba ke ba rohakehe, mme bohle ba o hlohonolofatsang ba hlohonolofale.”" 
Genesis27:30 Eitse hoba Isaka a qete ho hlohonolofatsa Jakobo, mme a eso be le motsotswana Jakobo a tswile ka ho ntatae Isaka, moholwane wa hae Esau a fihla ho tswa tsoma." 
Genesis27:31 Le yena a pheha nama e hlabosang, mme a e tlisetsa ntatae. Yaba o re ho ntatae: “Ntate, ako tsohe, mme o je nama ya tse tsomilweng ke mora wa hao, o tle ntlhohonolofatse.”" 
Genesis27:32 Ntatae Isaka a re ho yena: “O mang?” A arabela, a re: “Ke nna mora wa hao, matsibolo a hao, Esau.”" 
Genesis27:33 Isaka a thothomela haholo, a re: “E ne e le mang he, ya ileng a ya tsoma phoofolo, mme a e tlisa ho nna, ka e ja yohle, o eso fihle, mme ka ba ka mo hlohonolofatsa? E, o tla hlohonolofala!”" 
Genesis27:34 Ha Esau a utlwa mantswe a ntatae a lla sello se seholo, se bohloko, mme a re ho ntatae: “Le nna ako ntlhohonolofatse hle ntate!”" 
Genesis27:35 Empa ntatae a re: “Moena wa hao a tlile ka bolotsana, mme o nkile mahlohonolo a hao!”" 
Genesis27:36 Yaba Esau o re: “Na ha a ya bitswa Jakobo ka nepo? Hobane o nqhekanyeditse habedi. O ile a nka ditokelo tsa boholo ba ka, mme jwale bona, o nkile le mahlohonolo a ka!” A tswela pele, a re: “Na nna ha o a ntshiela lehlohonolo?”" 
Genesis27:37 Isaka a arabela Esau, a re: “Bona, ke mo entse morena wa hao, le bana babo bohle ke mo neile bona ho ba bahlanka ba hae, mme ka mmaballa ka koro le ka veine. Ebe jwale, ngwana ka, nka o etsetsa eng?”" 
Genesis27:38 Yaba Esau o re ho ntatae: “Na ha o sa na le lehlohonolo le leng ntate? Le nna ntlhohonolofatse hle, ntate!” Esau a bokolla habohloko." 
Genesis27:39 Yaba ntatae Isaka o a arabela, o re ho yena: “Bona, leaho la hao le tla ba hole le monono wa lefatshe, le be hole le phoka ya lehodimo e tswang hodimo." 
Genesis27:40 O tla phela ka sabole ya hao, mme o tla sebeletsa moena hao, empa ha nako ya ho itokolla e fihla, o tla monyola molala wa hao jokong ya hae.”" 
Genesis27:41 Jwale Esau a hloya Jakobo ka baka la tlhohonolofatso eo ntatae a mo hlohonolofaditseng ka yona. Esau a re ka pelong ya hae: “Matsatsi a bofifi ba ntate a atametse, mme ke tla bolaya Jakobo, moena wa ka.”" 
Genesis27:42 Empa Rebeka a bolellwa mantswe ana a Esau, mora wa hae wa matsibolo; yaba Rebeka o laela hore ho bitswe Jakobo, mora wa hae e monyenyane, mme a re ho yena: “Bona, moholwane wa hao Esau o tla iphetetsa ka ho o bolaya." 
Genesis27:43 Ka baka leo, ngwana ka, mamela: tsamaya, o balehele ha malomao Labane, ya Harane." 
Genesis27:44 O hlole le yena ditshiu di se kae, ho fihlela kgalefo ya moholwane wa hao e kokobela." 
Genesis27:45 Ha kgalefo ya moholwane wa hao e se e kokobetse, mme a lebetse seo o mo entseng sona, nna ke tla romela motho ho o lata teng. Hobaneng nka shwellwa ke lona ba babedi ka tsatsi le le leng?”" 
Genesis27:46 Jwale Rebeka a re ho Isaka: “Ke tennwe ke bophelo ka baka la basadi bana ba Bahete. Haeba Jakobo a ka nyala e mong wa banana ba Bahete ba jwaloka bana, bophelo ba ka bo tla ba le molemo ofe ho nna?”" 
Genesis28:1 Isaka a bitsa Jakobo, a mo hlohonolofatsa, a mo laela, a re: “O se ke wa nyala e mong wa banana ba Bakanana." 
Genesis28:2 Tsamaya, o ye Padane-Arame, tlung ya Bethuele, ntatao moholo ya tswalang mmao; o nyale mosadi teng ho baradi ba malomao Labane." 
Genesis28:3 Modimo ya matla wohle a ke a o hlohonolofatse, a o fe bana ba bangata, a be a o atise haholoholo, o tle o be raditjhabatjhaba." 
Genesis28:4 A ke a o nee lehlohonolo la Aborahama, wena le ditloholo tsa hao, o tle o rue naha eo o leng mojaki ho yona, eo Modimo a neng a e nee Aborahama!”" 
Genesis28:5 Ka mokgwa ona, Isaka a re Jakobo a tsamaye, mme yena a ya Padane-Arame ha Labane, mora wa Bethuele wa Moarame, kgaitsedi ya Rebeka, mma bo-Jakobo le Esau." 
Genesis28:6 Esau a bona hore Isaka o hlohonolofaditse Jakobo, mme o mo rometse Padane-Arame ho ya nyala mosadi teng; le hore, ha a mo hlohonolofatsa, o ile a mo laela, a re: “O se ke wa nyala e mong wa banana ba Bakanana;”" 
Genesis28:7 le hore Jakobo o mametse ntatae le mmae, ka ho ya Padane-Arame." 
Genesis28:8 Esau a bona hore mahlong a ntatae, Isaka, banana ba Bakanana ba kgopo;" 
Genesis28:9 yaba o ya ha Ishemaele, o eketsa sethepu sa hae ka ho nyala Mahalate, moradi wa Ishemaele, mora wa Aborahama, kgaitsedi ya Nebajote." 
Genesis28:10 Jakobo a tloha Beeresheba, a leba Harane." 
Genesis28:11 A fihla sebakeng se seng, a robala teng, hobane letsatsi le ne le se le diketse. Jwale a nka le leng la majwe a hona moo, a le sama, yaba o a robala." 
Genesis28:12 A lora toro, mme ho yona a bona lere e hlonngweng fatshe, e ilo fihla lehodimong. A bona mangeloi a Modimo a ntse a ehlwa, a theoha ka yona." 
Genesis28:13 A bona Morena a eme kahodimo ho yona, a ntse a re: “Ke nna Morena, Modimo wa ntatao Aborahama, le Modimo wa Isaka. Naha eo o robetseng ho yona ke tla o nea yona le ditloholo tsa hao." 
Genesis28:14 Ditloholo tsa hao di tla ba kaalo ka lerole la lefatshe, mme o tla namela bophirimela, le botjhabela, le leboya, le borwa. Merabe yohle ya lefatshe e tla hlohonolofatswa ka wena le ka ditloholo tsa hao." 
Genesis28:15 Bona, ke na le wena, mme ke tla o sireletsa hohle moo o yang teng, ke be ke o kgutlisetse naheng ena. Ha nka ke ka o furalla, ho fihlela ke etsa seo ke se buileng ho wena.”" 
Genesis28:16 Yaba Jakobo o phaphama borokong, o re: “Ruri Modimo o teng sebakeng sena; feela ke ne ke sa tsebe.”" 
Genesis28:17 A tshaba, mme a re: “Sebaka see se tshabeha hakaakang! Sebaka sena ke sona ntlo ya Modimo, ebile ke kgoro ya lehodimo.”" 
Genesis28:18 Jakobo a tsoha ka madungwadungwana, a nka lejwe leo a neng a le samile, a le hloma hore e be mokolokotwane, a le tshela ka ole." 
Genesis28:19 Sebaka seo a se rea lebitso la Bethele; athe pele motse oo o ne o bitswa Lose. 
Genesis28:20 Yaba Jakobo o a ikana, o re: “Haeba Modimo a ka ba le nna, a mpaballa leetong lena leo ke le nkileng, a mpha bohobe ka ja, le diaparo ka apara," 
Genesis28:21 ka ba ka kgutlela tlung ya ntate ka kgotso, Morena e tla ba Modimo wa ka." 
Genesis28:22 Le lejwe leo ke le hlommeng hore e be mokolokotwane, e tla ba ntlo ya Modimo. Ke tla mo nea karolo e le nngwe leshomeng ka leng la tsohle tseo a mphang tsona.”" 
Genesis29:1 Jakobo a tswela pele leetong la hae, a ya fihla naheng ya baahi ba ka botjhabela." 
Genesis29:2 Ha a tadima, a bona sediba hara thota, a bona mehlape e meraro ya dinku e bothile pela sona, hobane mehlape eo e ne e nweswa sedibeng seo. Lejwe le kwahelang molomo wa sediba le ne le le leholo." 
Genesis29:3 Ha mehlape e bokane moo, badisana ba ne ba ye ba le phikolose, le tlohe molomong wa sediba, ba nwese dinku, ba boele ba le busetse ditulong tsa lona, molomong wa sediba." 
Genesis29:4 Jakobo a re ho bona: “Bana beso, le tswa kae?” Bona ba araba, ba re: “Re tswa Harane.”" 
Genesis29:5 A re ho bona: “Na le tseba Labane, mora wa Nakore?” Badisana ba re: “Re a mo tseba.”" 
Genesis29:6 A re ho bona: “Na o ntse a phela hantle?” Ba re: “O ntse a phela hantle. Bona, moradi wa hae Ragele ke eo a etla le dinku.”" 
Genesis29:7 Jakobo a re: “Bonang mona, e sa le motsheare o moholo, ha e eso be nako ya ho orosa mehlape; nwesang dinku, le tsamaye le yo di fudisa.”" 
Genesis29:8 Empa bona ba re: “Re sitwa ho etsa jwalo, ho fihlela mehlape yohle e bokellana mona, ho phikoloswa lejwe, le tloswa molomong wa sediba, ebe jwale re tseba ho nwesa dinku.”" 
Genesis29:9 Yare a sa ntsane a bua le bona, Ragele a fihla le dinku tsa ntatae, hobane e ne e le modisana wa tsona." 
Genesis29:10 Ha Jakobo a bona Ragele, moradi wa malomae Labane, le dinku tsa malomae Labane, Jakobo a atamela, a phikolosa lejwe, a le tlosa molomong wa sediba, mme a nwesa dinku tsa malomae Labane." 
Genesis29:11 Jwale Jakobo a aka Ragele, a ba a lla." 
Genesis29:12 Jakobo a bolella Ragele hore ke seng le ntatae, le hore yena ke mora wa Rebeka. Ragele a matha, a ya tsebisa ntatae." 
Genesis29:13 Yare ha Labane a utlwa ditaba tsa Jakobo motjhana hae, a matha ho ya mo kgahlanyetsa, a mo kopa molaleng, a mo aka, a mo isa ka tlung ya hae. Jakobo a bolella Labane tsena tsohle," 
Genesis29:14 mme Labane a re ho yena: “Ruri o lesapo la ka le nama ya ka!” Jakobo a hlola le yena kgwedi kaofela. 
Genesis29:15 Yaba Labane o re ho Jakobo: “Kaha o motjhana wa ka, na o ka ntshebeletsa feela? Mpolelle: ke o lefe bokae?”" 
Genesis29:16 Jwale Labane o ne a ena le baradi ba babedi; lebitso la e moholo e ne e le Lea, mme lebitso la e monyenyane e le Ragele." 
Genesis29:17 Mahlo a Lea a ne a le bolea, empa Ragele o ne a bopehile hantle, a le motle haholo." 
Genesis29:18 Jakobo o ne a rata Ragele, mme a re: “Ke tla o sebeletsa ka dilemo tse supileng, ke sebeletsa ho fumana Ragele, moradi wa hao e monyenyane.”" 
Genesis29:19 Yaba Labane o re: “Ho molemo hore ke mo nee wena, ho ena le ho mo nea monna osele. Dula le nna he.”" 
Genesis29:20 Jakobo a sebeletsa bohadi ba Ragele ka dilemo tse supileng, empa ka baka la lerato leo a neng a rata Ragele ka lona, dilemo tseo tsa ka ditshiu tse seng kae." 
Genesis29:21 Jwale Jakobo a re ho Labane: “Nnee mosadi wa ka, ke kene dikobong tsa hae, hobane nako ya ka e phethehile.”" 
Genesis29:22 Yaba Labane o mema banna bohle ba sebaka seo, o etsa mokete wa lenyalo." 
Genesis29:23 Ka phirimana Labane a nka moradi wa hae Lea, a mo isa ho Jakobo, mme yena a kena dikobong tsa hae." 
Genesis29:24 Labane a nka lekgabunyane la hae Silepa, a le nea moradi wa hae Lea, hore e be lekgabunyane la hae." 
Genesis29:25 Yare ha bo esa, bo bonahala hore ke Lea, Jakobo a re ho Labane: “Ke eng ee, eo o nketseditseng yona? Na ha ke o sebeletsa, ke ne ke sa sebeletse hore o nnee Ragele? Jwale o nthetseditseng?”" 
Genesis29:26 Labane a re: “Mona haeso hase moetlo hore e monyenyane a nyalwe pele ho e moholo. 
Genesis29:27 Qeta beke le enwa, mme o tla newa le eno e mong, feela o ntshebeletse hae ka dilemo tse ding tse supileng, tseo o tla ntshebeletsa ka tsona.”" 
Genesis29:28 Jakobo a dumela, a qeta beke ya enwa, Labane a nto mo nea moradi wa hae Ragele, hore e be mosadi wa hae." 
Genesis29:29 Labane a nka lekgabunyane la hae Bileha, a le nea moradi wa hae Ragele, hore e be lekgabunyane la hae." 
Genesis29:30 Jakobo a kena dikobong tsa Ragele, mme a rata Ragele ho feta Lea. A boela a sebeletsa Labane ka dilemo tse ding tse supileng." 
Genesis29:31 Ha Morena a bona hore Lea ha a ratwe, a mo fa thari, empa Ragele ya eba nyopa." 
Genesis29:32 Lea ya eba moimana, a tswala mora, mme a mo rea lebitso la Rubene, hobane o ne a re: “Ruri Morena o bone matshwenyeho a ka, mme jwale monna wa ka o tla nthata.”" 
Genesis29:33 Ya eba moimane hape, a tswala mora, mme a re: “Ruri Morena o utlwile hore ha ke ratwe, mme o mphile mora enwa hape.” Yaba o mo rea lebitso la Simeone." 
Genesis29:34 Ya boela ya eba moimana, a tswala mora, mme a re: “Jwale monna wa ka o tla nkgomarela, hobane ke mo tswaletse bara ba bararo.” Ka baka lena, enwa a mo rea lebitso la Levi." 
Genesis29:35 Ya boela ya eba moimana hape, a tswala mora, mme a re: “Jwale ke tla boka Morena.” Ka baka lena, a mo rea lebitso la Juda; yaba o kgaotsa ho beleha." 
Genesis30:1 Yare ha Ragele a bona hore ha a tswalle Jakobo bana, a honohela ngwanabo, mme a re ho Jakobo: “Mphe bana, ho seng jwalo ke tla shwa!”" 
Genesis30:2 Jakobo a halefela Ragele haholo, mme a re: “Na nna ke Modimo, yena ya o entseng nyopa?”" 
Genesis30:3 Ragele a re: “Bileha, lekgabunyane la ka, ke enwa. Kena dikobong tsa hae, e le hore a tle a ntswalle bana ba lengwele, hore ke be le bana ka yena.”" 
Genesis30:4 Yaba o nea Jakobo lekgabunyane la hae Bileha hore e be mosadi wa hae. 
Genesis30:5 Bileha ya eba moimana, a tswalla Jakobo mora." 
Genesis30:6 Jwale Ragele a re: “Modimo o nkahloletse, ebile o utlwile thapelo ya ka, mme o mphile mora.” Ka baka leo, a mo rea lebitso la Dane." 
Genesis30:7 Bileha, lekgabunyane la Ragele, ya boela ya eba moimana, mme a tswalla Jakobo mora wa bobedi." 
Genesis30:8 Jwale Ragele a re: “Ke lwanne dintwa tse matla le ngwaneso, mme ke hlotse.” Yaba o mo rea lebitso la Nafthali." 
Genesis30:9 Ha Lea a bona hore a ke ke a hlola a beleha, a nka lekgabunyane la hae Silepa, mme a le nea Jakobo hore e be mosadi wa hae." 
Genesis30:10 Jwale Silepa, lekgabunyane la Lea, a tswalla Jakobo mora." 
Genesis30:11 Lea a re: “Hona ke lehlohonolo!” Yaba o mo rea lebitso la Gade. 
Genesis30:12 Silepa, lekgabunyane la Lea, a tswalla Jakobo mora wa bobedi." 
Genesis30:13 Lea a re: “Nna ke lehlohonolo. Basadi ba tla mpitsa ya lehlohonolo!” Yaba o mo rea lebitso la Ashere. 
Genesis30:14 Ka nako eo ho kotulwang koro ka yona, Rubene a fumana ditholwana tsa moratiso masimong, mme a di tlisetsa mmae Lea. Jwale Ragele a re ho Lea: “Ako mphe hle, tse ding tsa ditholwana tsa moratiso tsa mora wa hao.”" 
Genesis30:15 Empa Lea a re ho yena: “Na ke ntho e nyenyane ha o nkile monna wa ka, mme jwale o rata ho nka le ditholwana tsa moratiso tsa mora wa ka?” Ragele a araba, a re: “E, a ka nna a robala le wena bosiung bona, ha o ka mpha ditholwana tsa moratiso tsa mora wa hao.”" 
Genesis30:16 Mantsiboya, ha Jakobo a kgutla masimong, Lea a tswa ho ya mo kgahlanyetsa, mme a re ho yena: “O tshwanetse ho tla robala le nna bosiung bona, hobane ke o rekile ka ditholwana tsa moratiso, tsa mora wa ka.” Yaba o robala le yena bosiung boo." 
Genesis30:17 Modimo a mamela Lea, ya eba moimana, mme a tswalla Jakobo mora wa bohlano." 
Genesis30:18 Lea a re: “Modimo o mphile moputso wa ka, hobane ke ile ka nea monna wa ka lekgabunyane la ka.” A mo rea lebitso la Isakare." 
Genesis30:19 Lea ya eba moimana hape, mme a tswalla Jakobo mora wa botshelela." 
Genesis30:20 Jwale Lea a re: “Modimo o mphile mpho e ntle, mme kajeno monna wa ka o tla dula ha ka, hobane ke mo tswaletse bara ba tsheletseng.” Yaba o rea mora eo lebitso la Sebulone." 
Genesis30:21 Kamora mona a tswala moradi, a mo rea lebitso la Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Modimo a hopola Ragele, a mo mamela, a mo fa thari." 
Genesis30:23 Ragele ya eba moimana, a tswala mora, mme a re: “Modimo o tlositse sekgobo sa ka.”" 
Genesis30:24 A rea mora enwa lebitso la Josefa, a re: “Morena a ke a nkekeletse mora e mong!”" 
Genesis30:25 Ragele ha a se a tswetse Josefa, Jakobo a re ho Labane: “Ntokolle, ke ye haeso, naheng ya heso." 
Genesis30:26 Nnee basadi ba ka le bana ba ka, bao ke o sebeleditseng ho ba fumana, mme o ntokolle ke tsamaye, hobane o tseba kamoo ke ileng ka o sebeletsa kateng.”" 
Genesis30:27 Empa Labane a re ho yena: “Ako nkgauhele, hobane ke lemohile hore Morena o ntlhohonolofaditse ka baka la hao.”" 
Genesis30:28 A ba a re: “Bolela moputso oo o o batlang, mme ke tla o nea wona.”" 
Genesis30:29 Jakobo a re ho Labane: “Wena o tseba kamoo ke ileng ka o sebeletsa kateng, le kamoo ke atlehisitseng mehlape ya hao kateng." 
Genesis30:30 Pele ke fihla o ne o ena le dintho tse seng kae, empa jwale di eketsehile, ke mehlapehadi, mme Morena o o hlohonolofaditse ka tsohle, hohle moo ke neng ke eya teng. Jwale nna ke tla sebeletsa lelapa la ka neng?”" 
Genesis30:31 Labane a re: “Ke o nee eng?” Jakobo a re: “O se ke wa nnea letho; haeba o ka nketsetsa ntho ena, ke tla boela ke dise mohlape wa hao hape, ke o baballe." 
Genesis30:32 Ke tla hlahloba mohlape wohle wa hao kajeno, ke kgethe dinku tsohle tse tshasana, le tse thoboshana, le dikonyana tsohle tse ntsho, le dipodi tse rolo le tse pudutswana. Tseo he, e tla ba tsona moputso wa ka." 
Genesis30:33 Ho tshepahala ha ka ho tla bonahala kamoso, ha o etla hore re hlahlobisane tsa moputso wa ka. Dipodi tsohle tse seng rolo, le dikonyana tse seng ntsho, ha di ka fumanwa mohlapeng wa ka, e tla ba ke di utswitse.”" 
Genesis30:34 Yaba Labane o re: “Ke hantle! Ha ho be jwalokaha o bolela.” 
Genesis30:35 Ka lona letsatsi leo Labane a kgetha diphooko tsohle tse rolo le tse putswa, le dipodi tsohle tse rolwana le tse pudutswana le tsohle tse phatshwana, le dikonyana tsohle tse ntsho, a di siya matsohong a bara ba Jakobo." 
Genesis30:36 Tsa kgannwa ho iswa sebakeng se lekanang le leeto la matsatsi a mararo, ho tloha moo yena le Jakobo ba neng ba le hona teng, mme Jakobo a disa mehlape ya Labane e setseng." 
Genesis30:37 Jakobo a nka dithutswana tse tala tsa difate tsa popoliri, le tsa perekisi, le tsa sefate sa hoki, a di ebola, a di etsa metaka e mesweu, mme a hlahisa bosweu bo ho tsona." 
Genesis30:38 A bea dithutswana tseo a di ebotseng kapele ho mehlape ka dinwellong tsa metsi, moo mehlape e palesitseng e nwelang teng." 
Genesis30:39 Mehlape ya emara ha e le pela dithutswana, ya tswala tse mebalabala: tse rolo, le tse pudutswana, le tse tshasana, le tse thoboshana." 
Genesis30:40 Jakobo a kgetha dikonyana, empa a etsa hore diphatla tsa mohlape wa Labane, wa tse ntsho, di tadimane le mohlape wa tse tshasana. Yaba o kgethela mohlape wa hae kathoko, a se ke a o kopanya le mohlape wa Labane." 
Genesis30:41 Jakobo o ne a ye nehele ha mohlape o kgotshe, a bee dithutswana kapele ho mohlape, ka dinwellong, hore di tle di emare di le kapele ho dithutswana." 
Genesis30:42 Empa ha mehlape e fokotse, o ne a sa bee dithutswana, mme tse tswalwang di fokotse e ne e eba tsa Labane, athe tse matlafetseng e ne e eba tsa Jakobo." 
Genesis30:43 Ka mokgwa o jwalo Jakobo a rua ka ho fetisisa, mme a ba le mehlape e mengata, le makgabunyane, le bahlanka, le dikamele, le ditonki." 
Genesis31:1 Jakobo a utlwa dipuo tsa bara ba Labane, tse reng: “Jakobo o nkile tsohle tseo e neng e le tsa ntata rona, mme leruo lena lohle o le fumane ka tse tswang ho ntata rona.”" 
Genesis31:2 Jakobo a tadima sefahleho sa Labane, mme a bona hore ha se sa le jwaloka maoba le maobane." 
Genesis31:3 Yaba Morena o re ho Jakobo: “Kgutlela naheng ya bo-ntatao le ho bang ka wena, mme ke tla ba le wena.”" 
Genesis31:4 Jwale Jakobo a romela hore a bitsetswe Ragele le Lea, ba tle naheng, mohlapeng wa hae," 
Genesis31:5 mme a re ho bona: “Ke bona hore sefahleho sa ntata lona ha se sa le jwaloka maoba le maobane. Empa Modimo wa ntate o nnile a ba le nna. 
Genesis31:6 Le a tseba hore ke sebeleditse ntata lona ka matla a ka wohle; 
Genesis31:7 feela ntata lona o nqhekanyeditse, mme ka makgetlo a leshome a fetola moputso wa ka. Empa Modimo ha a a ka a mo dumella ho nketsetsa bokgopo." 
Genesis31:8 Ha a ne a re: Moputso wa hao e tla ba tse rolo, le tse tshasana; mohlape wohle o ne o ye o tswale tse rolo, le tse tshasana, mme ha a ne a re: Moputso wa hao e tla ba tse phatshwana, le tse thoboshana; mohlape wohle o ne o ye o tswale tse phatshwana, le tse thoboshana." 
Genesis31:9 Modimo o amohile ntata lona diphoofolo tsa hae, mme a nnea tsona." 
Genesis31:10 “Ka nako eo mohlape o nehelwang ka yona, eitse ha ke phahamisa mahlo, ka bona torong hore diphooko tse neng di tlolela mohlape e ne e le tse rolo le tse phatshwa, le tse putswa." 
Genesis31:11 “Lengeloi la Morena la re ho nna torong: Jakobo! “Ka re: Ke nna enwa! 
Genesis31:12 “Yaba le re: Phahamisa mahlo, o bone; diphooko tsohle tse tlolelang mohlape ke tse rolo, le tse phatshwa, le tse putswa, hobane ke bone tsohle tseo Labane a di etsang ho wena." 
Genesis31:13 Ke nna Modimo wa Bethele, mane moo o neng o tshele mokolokotwane ka ole, mme wa nketsetsa kano teng. Jwale tsamaya, o tlohe naheng ena, mme o kgutlele naheng eo o tswaletsweng ho yona. ”" 
Genesis31:14 Yaba bo-Ragele le Lea ba arabela, ba re: “Na re sa na le seabo le lefa tlung ya ntata rona?" 
Genesis31:15 Na ha a ya re nka re se re le baditjhaba? O re rekisitse, mme o jele dikgomo tsa bohadi ba rona!" 
Genesis31:16 Maruo wohle ao Modimo a a amohileng ntata rona, ke a rona le a bana ba rona. Jwale etsa tsohle tseo Modimo a o boleletseng tsona.”" 
Genesis31:17 Yaba Jakobo o a ema, o palamisa bana ba hae, le basadi ba hae dikameleng." 
Genesis31:18 A kganna diphoofolo tsa hae kaofela, a nka le thepa ya hae yohle, eo a e sebeleditseng, le leruo la diphoofolo leo a le fumaneng Padane-Arame, a kgutlela ho ntatae Isaka, naheng ya Kanana." 
Genesis31:19 Ha Labane a ilo kuta dinku tsa hae, Ragele a utswa medimo ya lelapa la ntatae." 
Genesis31:20 Jakobo a thobela Labane wa Moarame, hobane o ne a sa ka a mmolella hore o lekgatheng la ho tsamaya." 
Genesis31:21 A baleha le tsohle tsa hae, mme ha a tloha a tshela noka ya Euferatese, a leba thabeng ya Gileade." 
Genesis31:22 Ka letsatsi la boraro Labane a tsebiswa hore Jakobo o balehile. 
Genesis31:23 Yaba o nka bana babo, o lelekisa Jakobo ka matsatsi a supileng, mme a fihla ho yena thabeng ya Gileade." 
Genesis31:24 Empa Modimo a fihla ho Labane wa Moarame ka toro, bosiu, a re ho yena: “Hlokomela, o se ke wa buisa Jakobo hantle kapa hampe.”" 
Genesis31:25 Labane a fihla ho Jakobo, moo Jakobo o hlomileng tente ya hae thabeng, mme Labane le bana babo le bona ba hloma ditente tsa bona thabeng ya Gileade." 
Genesis31:26 Yaba Labane o re ho Jakobo: “O entseng, ha o nthobetse tjee, mme o nkile baradi ba ka jwalokaha eka ba hapilwe ntweng?" 
Genesis31:27 Ke hobaneng ha o balehile ka lenyele, o nthobetse, mme o sa ka wa ntsebisa, athe nka be ke o feleheditse ka thabo le ka dipina, le ka meropa le ka harepa?" 
Genesis31:28 Ke hobaneng o sa mphang sebaka sa hore nke ke ake bara ba ka le baradi ba ka? Ruri o sebeditse ka bothoto. 
Genesis31:29 Ke na le matla a ho o etsa hampe, empa ka bosiu bo fetileng Modimo wa ntatao o ile a bua le nna, a re: Hlokomela, o se ke wa buisa Jakobo hantle kapa hampe." 
Genesis31:30 Jwale ha o tsamaile, hobane o ne o se o hlolohetswe lelapa leno, medimo ya ka yona o e utsweditseng?”" 
Genesis31:31 Jakobo a araba, a re ho Labane: “Ke hobane ke ne ke tshaba, ke hopola hore o tla nkamoha baradi ba hao ka dikgoka." 
Genesis31:32 Mang kapa mang eo medimo ya hao e tla fumanwa ho yena, a ke ke a phela. Batla seng seo sa hao, moo bana babo rona ba ntseng ba bona, o se nke!” Jakobo o ne a sa tsebe hore Ragele o utswitse medimo eo." 
Genesis31:33 Labane a kena ka tenteng ya Jakobo, le ka tenteng ya Lea, le ka tenteng ya makgabunyane a mabedi, empa a se ke a fumana medimo eo. A tswa ka tenteng ya Lea, a kena ka tenteng ya Ragele." 
Genesis31:34 Ragele o ne a nkile medimo ya ntatae, a e beile katlasa qhana ya kamele mme a dutse hodima yona. Labane a phenya hohle ka tenteng, empa a se ke a e fumana." 
Genesis31:35 Yaba Ragele o re ho ntatae: “Morena ka, o se ke wa nkgalefela, ha e le mona ke sitwa ho ema kapele ho wena, hobane ke ile dinakong tsa ka.” Labane a batla, empa a se ke a fumana medimo ya lelapa la hae." 
Genesis31:36 Jwale Jakobo a halefa, a omanya Labane. Jakobo a re ho Labane: “Molato wa ka ke ofe? Sebe sa ka ke sefe, ha e le moo o ntelekisa ka matla tjee?" 
Genesis31:37 Ha e le moo o phentse diphahlong tsa ka tsohle, o fumane eng ya diphahlo tsa hao? E bee mona, kapele ho bana beso le bana beno, e le hore ba tle ba re ahlolele." 
Genesis31:38 “Ka dilemo tsena tse mashome a mabedi tseo ke bileng le wena ka tsona, dinku tsa hao le dipodi tsa hao ha di a ka tsa folotsa, mme ha ke eso ka ke itjella dipheleu tsa mohlape wa hao." 
Genesis31:39 Ha ke a ka ka o tlitsetsa tse harotsweng ke dibatana; tseo e ile ya eba tse senyehetseng nna, hobane o ile wa di batla matsohong a ka, ebang di ne di utswitswe motsheare kapa bosiu." 
Genesis31:40 Motsheare letsatsi le ne le ntjhesa, bosiu ke hatsela, mme ke hlobaela. Ke seo ke neng ke le sona." 
Genesis31:41 Ka lemo tsena tse mashome a mabedi ke bile ka tlung ya hao; ka tse leshome le metso e mene tsa tsona ka sebeletsa ho fumana baradi ba hao ba babedi, mme ka lemo tse tsheletseng ka sebeletsa mehlape ya hao. Ka makgetlo a leshome o ile wa fetola moputso wa ka." 
Genesis31:42 Hoja Modimo wa ntate, Modimo wa Aborahama, ya tshajwang ke Isaka, ha a a ka a ba lehlakoreng la ka, ruri jwale o ka be o ntokolotse ke itlhophere! Modimo o ile a bona matshwenyeho a ka, le mosebetsi wa diatla tsa ka, mme a o kgalemela bosiung bo fetileng.”" 
Genesis31:43 Yaba Labane o a araba, o re ho Jakobo: “Baradi bana ke baradi ba ka, bana bana ke bana ba ka, le mohlape ona ke mohlape wa ka, mme le tsohle tseo o di bonang ke tsa ka. Empa kajeno nka etsang ho baradi ba ka, le ho bana bao ba ba tswetseng?" 
Genesis31:44 Tloo jwale, re etse selekane le wena, mme e be bopaki pakeng tsa rona le wena.”" 
Genesis31:45 Jakobo a nka lejwe, a hloma mokolokotwane." 
Genesis31:46 Yaba Jakobo o re ho bana babo: “Bokellang majwe!” Ba nka majwe ba etsa qubu, mme ba jella qubung eo." 
Genesis31:47 Labane a re qubu eo ke Jegare-Sahaduta, empa Jakobo yena a e bitsa Galede." 
Genesis31:48 Labane a re: “Qubu ena ke paki pakeng tsa rona le wena kajeno.” Ka lebaka leo a e bitsa Galede," 
Genesis31:49 mme mokolokotwane a o bitsa Misepa, hobane o ile a re: “Morena a lebele pakeng tsa rona le wena, ha re se re arohane." 
Genesis31:50 Haeba o ka hlorisa baradi ba ka, kapa haeba o ka inkela basadi ba bang kantle ho baradi ba ka, le hoja ho se na motho ya nang le rona, bona, Modimo ke paki pakeng tsa rona le wena.”" 
Genesis31:51 Yaba Labane o re ho Jakobo: “Bona qubu ena le mokolokotwane ona, oo ke o beileng pakeng tsa rona le wena." 
Genesis31:52 Qubu ena ke paki, le mokolokotwane ona ke paki ya hore nke ke ka feta mokolokotwane ona, le wena o ke ke wa feta mokolokotwane ona ho tla ntwantsha." 
Genesis31:53 Modimo wa Aborahama, le Modimo wa Nakore, le Modimo wa bo-ntata bona, a re ahlolele.” Jwale, Jakobo a hlapanya ka Ya Tshajwang ke ntatae Isaka." 
Genesis31:54 Jakobo a etsa sehlabelo thabeng, a bitsa bana babo ho tla ja; yaba ba ja, ba robala thabeng." 
Genesis31:55 Labane a tsoha ka madungwadungwana, a aka ditloholo tsa hae, le baradi ba hae, a ba hlohonolofatsa, yaba o a tsamaya, o kgutlela ha hae." 
Genesis32:1 Ha Jakobo a ntse a tswela pele leetong la hae, mangeloi a Modimo a kopana le yena," 
Genesis32:2 mme yare ha Jakobo a a bona, a re: “Lena ke lebotho la Modimo!” Yaba o rea sebaka seo lebitso la Mahanaime." 
Genesis32:3 Jakobo a eteletsa maqosa pele ho ya ho moholwane wa hae Esau, naheng ya Seire, lefatsheng la Edomo." 
Genesis32:4 A laela maqosa ao, a re: “Le tle le bue tjena ho morena ka, Esau: Mohlanka wa hao, Jakobo, o bua tjena: Ke ne ke jakile ha Labane, ka dula teng ho fihlela jwale." 
Genesis32:5 Ke na le dikgomo, le ditonki, le mehlape ya dinku, le bahlanka, le makgabunyane, mme ke behela wena morena wa ka hore o tle o nkgauhele. ”" 
Genesis32:6 Maqosa a kgutlela ho Jakobo, a re: “Re ile ra fihla ho moholwane wa hao Esau, mme le yena o ntse a etla ho tla o kgahlanyetsa, a ena le banna ba makgolo a mane.”" 
Genesis32:7 Jakobo a tshoha haholo, a tshwenyeha. A arola batho bao a neng a ena le bona, le mehlape ya dinku le ya dikgomo, le dikamele, a etsa dihlopha tse pedi." 
Genesis32:8 Yaba o re: “Haeba Esau a ka fihla sehlopheng sa pele, a se ripitla, sehlopha se setseng se tla phonyoha.”" 
Genesis32:9 Jakobo a rapela, a re: “Modimo wa ntate Aborahama, le Modimo wa ntate Isaka, wena Morena ya itseng ho nna: Kgutlela naheng ya heno le ho bang ka wena, mme ke tla o tswela molemo," 
Genesis32:10 ha ke tshwanelwe ke mohau wohle le botshepehi bohle, e leng tseo o sebeleditseng mohlanka wa hao ka tsona. Ke ne ke tshele Jorodane ke nkile molamu wa ka feela, empa jwale ke na le dihlopha tse pedi." 
Genesis32:11 Ke a o rapela, ako nnamolele matsohong a moholwane wa ka, matsohong a Esau, hobane ke a mo tshaba, esere a tla, a mpolaya le basadi le bana." 
Genesis32:12 Hape wa na wa re: Ke tla o tswela molemo, ke atise ditloholo tsa hao, di be kaalo ka lehlabathe la lewatle, le ke keng la balwa ka baka la bongata. ”" 
Genesis32:13 A robala moo bosiung boo, mme ho tseo a di ruileng a ntshetsa moholwane wa hae Esau mpho." 
Genesis32:14 E ne e le dipodi tse makgolo a mabedi, le diphooko tse mashome a mabedi; dinku tse makgolo a mabedi, le dipheleu tse mashome a mabedi;" 
Genesis32:15 dikamele tse nyantshang tse mashome a mararo mmoho le dipetsana tsa tsona; dikgomo tse mashome a mane, le dipoho tse leshome; le ditonki tse mashome a mabedi tse tshehadi, le dipetsana tse leshome." 
Genesis32:16 Tsena a di nea bahlanka ba hae, mohlape ka mong o tsamaya ka bowona, mme a re ho bahlanka ba hae: “Nketelleng pele, mehlape ya lona e sielane sebaka dipakeng.”" 
Genesis32:17 A laela ya kgannang mohlape wa pele, a re: “Ha o teana le Esau, moholwane wa ka, mme a o botsa, a re: O mohlanka wa mang? O ya kae? Dintho tsee, tseo o di kgannang, ke tsa mang?" 
Genesis32:18 Wena o tle o re: Ke tsa mohlanka wa hao Jakobo; ke mpho eo a e romelang ho morena wa ka Esau. Le yena o ntse a etla kamorao ho rona. ” 
Genesis32:19 A laela le ya kgannang mohlape wa bobedi, le wa boraro, le bohle ba kgannang mehlape, a re: “Le lona le tle le bue jwalo ho Esau, ha le teana le yena," 
Genesis32:20 mme le be le re: Le yena mohlanka wa hao Jakobo o ntse a etla kamorao ho rona. ” Jakobo o ne a re: “Ke tla mo thoba pelo ka dimpho tse nketeletseng pele, mme hamorao ha ke tadimana le yena, mohlomong a ka nkamohela.”" 
Genesis32:21 Dimpho tseo tsa mo etella pele, yena a robala moo a neng a hlomile teng." 
Genesis32:22 Bosiung bona boo Jakobo a tsoha, a nka basadi ba hae ba babedi le makgabunyane a hae a mabedi, le bara ba hae ba leshome le motso o mong, a tshela ledibohong la Jaboko." 
Genesis32:23 A ba nka, a ba tshedisa noka, a tshedisa le tseo a nang le tsona." 
Genesis32:24 Yaba Jakobo o sala a inotshi mme a kolokotjhana le monna e mong ho fihlela mafube a hlaha. 
Genesis32:25 Monna eo ha a bona hore a ke ke a hlola Jakobo, a mo nonyetsa nokeng, mme ka hona noka ya Jakobo ya nonyetseha ha ba ntse ba kolokotjhana." 
Genesis32:26 Yaba monna eo o re: “Ntlohele ke tsamaye, hobane mafube a hlahile!” Empa Jakobo a re: “Ha nka ke ka o tlohela wa tsamaya, haese haeba o ka ntlhohonolofatsa!”" 
Genesis32:27 Eo a re ho Jakobo: “Lebitso la hao a mang?” Yena a re: “Ke Jakobo.” 
Genesis32:28 Yaba monna eo o re: “Ha o sa tla hlola o bitswa Jakobo, empa o tla bitswa Iseraele, hobane o lwanne le Modimo le batho, mme o hlotse.”" 
Genesis32:29 Jakobo a mmotsa, a re: “Ako mpolelle lebitso la hao hle!” Empa eo a re: “O mpotsetsang lebitso la ka?” Yaba o mo hlohonolofaletsa hona moo." 
Genesis32:30 Jakobo a rea sebaka seo lebitso la Peniele, hobane o ne a re: “Ke bone Modimo ka mahlo, empa ke ntse ke phela.”" 
Genesis32:31 Letsatsi la mo tjhabela ha a feta Peniele, a ntse a hlotsa, ka baka la noka ya hae." 
Genesis32:32 Ka baka lena, le kajenoya-bokajeno Baiseraele ha ba je mosifa wa noka, o lenonyeletsong la noka, kaha Jakobo a ne a nonyetswe mosifeng oo wa noka." 
Genesis33:1 Jakobo a phahamisa mahlo, a tadima, mme a bona Esau a etla a ena le banna ba makgolo a mane. Yaba o arola bana: Ba Lea, le ba Ragele, le ba makgabunyane a mabedi." 
Genesis33:2 A eteletsa makgabunyane le bana ba wona pele, a latelwa ke Lea le bana ba hae, mme bo-Ragele le Josefa ba eba kamorao ho bohle." 
Genesis33:3 Jakobo yena a fetela kapele ho bona, a itihela fatshe hasupa, ho fihlela a atamela ho ngwanabo." 
Genesis33:4 Empa Esau a matha ho mo kgahlanyetsa, a mo kopa molaleng, a mo aka, mme ba lla." 
Genesis33:5 Yare ha Esau a phahamisa mahlo, mme a bona basadi le bana, a re: “Ke bo-mang baa ba nang le wena?” Jakobo a re: “Ke bana bao Modimo a ba fileng mohlanka wa hao ka mohau.”" 
Genesis33:6 Makgabunyane a atamela, wona le bana ba wona, mme a itihela fatshe." 
Genesis33:7 Lea le yena a atamela le bana ba hae, mme ba itihela fatshe. Qetellong ha atamela Josefa le Ragele, le bona ba itihela fatshe." 
Genesis33:8 Yaba Esau o re: “O bolela eng ka dihlopha tsee tsohle, tseo ke kopaneng le tsona?” Jakobo a re: “Ke hore morena ka a nkgauhele.”" 
Genesis33:9 Empa Esau a re: “Ha ke hloke letho ngwaneso, ipolokele seo a nang le sona.”" 
Genesis33:10 Jakobo a re: “Tjhe bo, ke a o rapela; haeba o nkgauhetse, amohela mpho eo ke o neang yona, hobane ke bone sefahleho sa hao, jwalokaha eka ke bona sefahleho sa Modimo, mme wa nkamohela ka thabo." 
Genesis33:11 Ako amohele mpho ya ka hle, eo ke o tliseditseng yona, hobane Modimo o ile a nkgauhela, le hobane ke na le tse ntekaneng.” A mo pheella, mme Esau a amohela mpho eo." 
Genesis33:12 Jwale Esau a re: “A re tsamayeng, mme ke tla le etella pele.”" 
Genesis33:13 Jakobo a re ho yena: “Morena ka o a tseba hore bana ba a fokola, ke na le mehlape ya dikgomo le ya dinku e nyantshang, mme ha di ka potlakiswa letsatsi le le leng feela, mehlape yohle e tla shwa." 
Genesis33:14 Ke kopa hore morena ka a etelle mohlanka wa hae pele, mme nna ke tla tsamaya butle, ke iketlile, ho latela mokgwa oo dikgomo tseo ke di qhobang di tsamayang ka wona, le ho latela mokgwa oo bana ba tsamayang ka wona, ho fihlela ke fihla Seire, ho morena wa ka.”" 
Genesis33:15 Yaba Esau o re: “A nke ke o siele banna ba bang ba ka.” Empa Jakobo a re: “Hobaneng? Ha ke mpe ke hauhelwe ke morena ka.” 
Genesis33:16 Ka lona letsatsi leo Esau a kgutlela Seire; 
Genesis33:17 Jakobo yena a ya Sukote, a ikgahela ntlo teng, a hahela le mehlape ya hae masaka. Ka baka leo, a rea sebaka seo lebitso la Sukote." 
Genesis33:18 Jakobo a fihla ka kgotso motseng wa Shekeme, naheng ya Kanana, a etswa Padane-Arame; a hloma ditente tsa hae pela motse oo." 
Genesis33:19 Setsha seo a hlomileng tente ya hae ho sona a se reka ho bara ba Hamore, ntata Shekeme, ka ditjhelete tse lekgolo." 
Genesis33:20 A haha aletare teng, a e bitsa Modimo, Modimo wa Iseraele." 
Genesis34:1 Jwale Dina, moradi wa Lea, eo a mo tswaletseng Jakobo, a tjhakela barwetsana ba naha eo." 
Genesis34:2 Ha Shekeme, mora wa Hamore wa Mohife, kgosana ya naha eo, a mmona, a mo tshwara, a mmeta, a mo hlompholla." 
Genesis34:3 Pelo ya Shekeme ya kgomarela Dina, moradi wa Jakobo; a rata mosetsana eo, mme a bua le yena hamonate, a leka ho hapa pelo ya hae." 
Genesis34:4 Yaba Shekeme o bua le ntatae Hamore, o re: “Nkopele morwetsana enwa e tle e be mosadi wa ka.”" 
Genesis34:5 Jakobo a utlwa hore Shekeme o tlontlolotse moradi wa hae, Dina. Kaha bara ba hae ba ne ba le mehlapeng, naheng, Jakobo a kgutsa ho fihlela ba fihla." 
Genesis34:6 Hamore, ntata Shekeme, a ya ho buisana le Jakobo." 
Genesis34:7 Ha bara ba Jakobo ba kgutla naheng, ba utlwa taba ena. Banna bana ba tlalwa ke dipelo, ba halefa haholo, hobane Shekeme o ne a tlisitse manyala Iseraeleng, ka ho beta moradi wa Jakobo, e leng ntho e sa tshwaneleng ho etswa." 
Genesis34:8 Yaba Hamore o bua le bona, o re: “Moya wa mora wa ka Shekeme o labalabela moradi wa hao; ke a le rapela, mo neeng yena e be mosadi wa hae." 
Genesis34:9 A re nyallaneng; re neeng baradi ba lona, mme le lona le inkele baradi ba rona." 
Genesis34:10 Le tla ahisana le rona, le phele moo le ratang teng naheng ena; le ahe ho yona, le hwebe ho yona, mme le rue ka yona.”" 
Genesis34:11 Shekeme a re ho ntata morwetsana le ho dikgaitsedi tsa hae: “Nkgauheleng, mme eng kapa eng eo le e batlang ho nna le tla e fumana." 
Genesis34:12 Ereng ke ntshe bohadi bo bongata le dimpho tse ngata, mme ke tla le nea kamoo le batlang kateng, ha feela le ka mpha mosetsana hore e be mosadi wa ka.”" 
Genesis34:13 Bara ba Jakobo ba arabela Shekeme le ntatae Hamore ka mano, hobane o ne a ile a silafatsa kgaitsedi ya bona, Dina." 
Genesis34:14 Ba re ho yena: “Re ke ke ra etsa ntho e kang ena, ra nea kgaitsedi ya rona leqai, hobane hoo ho ka re tlontlolla." 
Genesis34:15 Re ka dumela feela haeba le dumela ho ba jwaloka rona: e mong le e mong wa lona e motona a bolotswe. 
Genesis34:16 Jwale ke hona re ka le neang baradi ba rona, le rona ra inkela baradi ba lona, ra aha le lona, ra ba setjhaba se le seng." 
Genesis34:17 Empa haeba le sa re mamele, mme le sa bolle, re tla nka kgaitsedi ya rona, re tsamaye.”" 
Genesis34:18 Dipolelo tsa bona tsa thabisa Hamore le mora wa hae Shekeme. 
Genesis34:19 Mohlankana a se ke a ba a dieha ho phetha taba eo, hobane o ne a kgahlilwe ke moradi wa Jakobo. Shekeme o ne a hlomphuwa ho feta bohle lapeng labo." 
Genesis34:20 Yaba Hamore le mora wa hae Shekeme ba fihla kgorong ya motse wa habo bona, ba bua le batho ba motse oo, ba re:" 
Genesis34:21 “Batho bana ke batho ba kgotso; a re ba dumelleng ho aha le ho hweba naheng ena. Naha ena e kgolo, e ka ba lekana; a re nyallaneng le bona." 
Genesis34:22 Banna bana ba ka dumela ho aha le rona, hore e be setjhaba se le seng le rona, ha feela e mong le e mong e motona wa rona a ka bolotswa, jwalokaha le bona ba bolotse." 
Genesis34:23 Na dikgomo tsa bona, le maruo a bona, le diphoofolo tsohle tsa bona, ha e na ho ba tsa rona? Rona a re dumellaneng feela le bona, mme ba tla aha le rona.”" 
Genesis34:24 Banna bohle ba motse ba mamela Hamore le mora wa hae Shekeme, mme banna bohle ba motse ba bolotswa." 
Genesis34:25 Ka letsatsi la boraro, ha batho bana ba ntse ba petla, bara ba babedi ba Jakobo, Simeone le Levi, dikgaitsedi tsa Dina, ba nka disabole tsa bona, ba futuhela motse lesumatha, ba bolaya bohle ba batona." 
Genesis34:26 Ba bolaya Hamore le mora wa hae Shekeme ka sabole, mme ba ntsha Dina ka tlung ya Shekeme, ba itsamaela." 
Genesis34:27 Bara ba Jakobo ba fihla ho ba bolailweng, ba hapa matlotlo a motse wohle, kaha kgaitsedi ya bona e ne e tlontlollotswe." 
Genesis34:28 Ba nka mehlape ya bona ya dinku, le ya dikgomo, le ditonki tsa bona, le tsohle tse neng di le motseng le naheng." 
Genesis34:29 Ba hahara le maruo a bona wohle, le bana ba bona le basadi ba bona bohle; le tsohle tse neng di le ka matlung a bona ba di hapa, ya eba thepa ya bona." 
Genesis34:30 Yaba Jakobo o re ho Simeone le Levi: “Le ntliseditse tsietsi ka ho ntlhobohanya le baahi ba naha ena, e leng Bakanana le Baperise. Palo ya batho ba ka e a fokola, mme haeba ba ka ikopanya, ba ntwantsha, nna le ba ntlo ya ka re tla timetswa.”" 
Genesis34:31 Empa bona ba re: “A etse kgaitsedi ya rona jwalokaha eka ke seotswa?” 
Genesis35:1 Modimo a re ho Jakobo: “Tsamaya, o nyolohele Bethele, o yo aha teng; teng o hahele Modimo aletare, Modimo ya iponahaditseng ho wena, ha o ne o baleha moholwane wa hao Esau.”" 
Genesis35:2 Jakobo a re ho ba lelapa la hae le ho bohle ba neng ba ena le yena: “Tlosang medimo esele e teng hara lona, le itlhwekise, le apare diaparo disele, tse hlwekileng." 
Genesis35:3 Jwale re yeng, re nyoloheleng Bethele, mme teng ke tla hahela Modimo aletare, yena ya ileng a nkarabela matsatsing a mahlomola a ka, ya bileng le nna maetong wohle a ka.”" 
Genesis35:4 Ba nea Jakobo medimo esele kaofela ha yona, le masale a neng a le ditsebeng tsa bona; tsena tsohle Jakobo a di tjhekela tlasa sefate sa eike, pela Shekeme." 
Genesis35:5 Yaba ba tswela pele leetong la bona, Modimo a kenya tshabo e kgolo metseng eo ba neng ba feta ho yona, hoo baahi ba yona ba sa kang ba futuhela bara ba Jakobo." 
Genesis35:6 Jakobo le batho bohle ba neng ba ena le yena ba fihla Lose, e leng Bethele e naheng ya Kanana." 
Genesis35:7 A haha aletare hona teng, mme sebaka seo a se rea lebitso la Modimo wa Bethele, hobane ke moo Modimo a ileng a iponahatsa ho yena teng, ha a ne a baleha ngwanabo Esau." 
Genesis35:8 Yaba Debora, mohodisi wa Rebeka, o a hlokahala; a epelwa tlasa sefate sa eike, tlase ho Bethele, mme sebaka seo sa rewa lebitso la Eike ya Dillo." 
Genesis35:9 Modimo a boela a iponahatsa ho Jakobo, hoba a kgutle Padane-Arame, mme a mo hlohonolofatsa." 
Genesis35:10 A re ho yena: “Lebitso la hao o Jakobo; feela ha o sa tla hlola o bitswa Jakobo, empa o tla bitswa Iseraele,” mme a mo rea lebitso la Iseraele." 
Genesis35:11 Modimo a re ho yena: “Ke nna Modimo ya matla wohle: Ata, o ngatafale; ho wena ho tla tswa setjhaba, sehlopha sa ditjhabatjhaba, mme o tla tswala dikgosi." 
Genesis35:12 Naha eo ke e neileng Aborahama le Isaka, ke tla o nea yona, wena le ditloholo tsa hao.”" 
Genesis35:13 Jwale Modimo a nyoloha, a mo siya sebakeng seo a neng a bue le yena a le ho sona." 
Genesis35:14 Jakobo a hloma mokolokotwane wa lejwe moo Modimo a neng a bue le yena teng; a tshela seno sa nyehelo hodima wona, a ba a o tshela ka ole." 
Genesis35:15 Sebaka sena seo Modimo a neng a bua le yena a le ho sona, Jakobo a se rea lebitso la Bethele." 
Genesis35:16 Yaba ba tloha Bethele, mme yare ba se ba le haufinyana le ho fihla Eferata, Ragele a tshwarwa ke mahlaba a pelehi, mme a thatafallwa." 
Genesis35:17 Ha a ntse a thatafaletswe ke pelehi, mmelehisi a re ho yena: “O se ke wa tshaba, hobane o tla tswala mora e mong hape.”" 
Genesis35:18 Empa yare ha a le lekgatheng la ho neela moya, hobane o ile a shwa, a rea mora eo lebitso la Bene-Oni, empa ntatae a mo rea lebitso la Benjamine." 
Genesis35:19 Ragele a shwa, mme a epelwa tseleng e lebang Eferata, e leng Betlelehema." 
Genesis35:20 Lebitleng la hae Jakobo a haha sefika; ke sefika sa lebitla la Ragele se ntseng se le teng le kajenoya-bokajeno. 
Genesis35:21 Iseraele a tswela pele leetong la hae, a hloma tente ya hae ka nqane ho Tora ya Dinku." 
Genesis35:22 Ha Iseraele a ntse a ahile naheng eo, Rubene a ya robala le Bileha, mosadi wa ntatae wa lefielo, mme Iseraele a tseba taba eo. Jakobo o ne a ena le bara ba leshome le metso e mmedi kaofela." 
Genesis35:23 Bara ba Lea ke: Rubene, letsibolo la Jakobo, le Simeone, le Levi, le Juda, le Isakare, le Sabulone." 
Genesis35:24 Bara ba Ragele ke Josefa le Benjamine. 
Genesis35:25 Bara ba Bileha, lekgabunyane la Ragele, ke Dane le Nafthali." 
Genesis35:26 Bara ba Silepa, lekgabunyane la Lea, ke Gade le Ashere. Bana ke bara ba Jakobo bao a ba tswetseng ha a le Padane-Arame." 
Genesis35:27 Jakobo a fihla ho ntatae Isaka, ha a le Mamore, motseng wa Kiriate-Areba, e leng Heborone, moo Aborahama le Isaka ba neng ba jakile teng." 
Genesis35:28 Ditshiu tsa ho phela ha Isaka e bile dilemo tse lekgolo le mashome a robedi. 
Genesis35:29 Yaba Isaka o neela moya, a shwa, a orohela ho ba habo, a hodile, a atetswe ke ditshiu, mme bara ba hae, Esau le Jakobo, ba mo epela." 
Genesis36:1 Lena ke leloko la Esau, e leng Edomo." 
Genesis36:2 Esau o ile a nyala basadi ba Bakanana: Ke Ada, moradi wa Elona wa Mohete; Oholebama, moradi wa Ana, mora wa Sibone wa Mohife;" 
Genesis36:3 le Basemate, moradi wa Ishemaele, kgaitsedi ya Nebajote." 
Genesis36:4 Ada a tswalla Esau Elefase; Basemate a tswala Reuele," 
Genesis36:5 mme Oholebama a tswala Jeushe, le Jalame, le Kora. Bana ke bara ba Esau ba tswaletsweng naheng ya Kanana." 
Genesis36:6 Jwale Esau a nka basadi ba hae, le bara ba hae, le baradi ba hae, le bohle ba lelapa la hae; le dikgomo tsa hae, le diphoofolo tsa hae kaofela, le maruo wohle ao a a fumaneng naheng ya Kanana; a ya naheng ya Seire, hole le ngwanabo Jakobo." 
Genesis36:7 Maruo a bona a ne a le mangata hoo ba neng ba ke ba aha mmoho; naha eo ba neng ba jakile ho yona e ne e ke ke ya hlola e ba phedisa, ka baka la mehlape ya bona." 
Genesis36:8 Yaba Esau o aha dithabeng tsa Seire. Esau ke Edomo. 
Genesis36:9 Lena ke leloko la Esau, eo e leng ntata Baedomo ba phelang dithabeng tsa Seire." 
Genesis36:10 Ana ke mabitso a bara ba Esau: Elefase, mora wa Ada, mosadi wa Esau; Reuele, mora wa Basemate, mosadi wa Esau." 
Genesis36:11 Bara ba Elefase e ne e le Temana, le Omare, le Sefo, le Gatame, le Kenase." 
Genesis36:12 Timina e ne e le mosadi wa lefielo wa Elefase, mora wa Esau, mme eo a tswalla Elefase Amaleke. Bana ke bara ba Ada, mosadi wa Esau." 
Genesis36:13 Bara ba Reuele ke bana: Nahate, le Sera, le Shamma, le Misa. Bana ke bara ba Basemate, mosadi wa Esau." 
Genesis36:14 Bana ke bara ba Oholebama, moradi wa Ana, mora wa Sibone, mosadi wa Esau. O ile a tswalla Esau Jeushe, le Jalame, le Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Ana ke mahosana a bara ba Esau. Bara ba Elefase, letsibolo la Esau, ke bo-kgosana Temana, le Omare, le Sefo, le Kenase," 
Genesis36:16 le Kora, le Gatame, le Amaleke. Ana ke mahosana a tswetsweng ke Elefase, naheng ya Edomo; ke bara ba Ada." 
Genesis36:17 Bana ke bara ba Reuele, mora wa Esau: bo-kgosana Nahate, le Sera, le Shamma, le Misa. Ana ke mahosana a tswetsweng ke Reuele, naheng ya Edomo. Ke bara ba Basemate, mosadi wa Esau." 
Genesis36:18 Bana ke bara ba Oholebama, mosadi wa Esau: Bo-kgosana Jeushe, le Jalame, le Kora. Anna ke mahosana a tswetsweng ke Oholebama, moradi wa Ana, mosadi wa Esau." 
Genesis36:19 Bana ke bara ba Esau, eo e leng Edomo, mme ana ke mahosana a bona." 
Genesis36:20 Bana ke bara be Seire wa Mahore, bao e leng baahi ba naha: Lotane, le Shobale, le Sibone, le Ana;" 
Genesis36:21 le Dishone, le Esere, le Dishane; ana ke mahosana a Bahore, bara ba Seire wa naha ya Edomo." 
Genesis36:22 Bara ba Lotane e ne e le Hori le Hemame, mme kgaitsedi ya Lotane e ne e le Timina." 
Genesis36:23 Bana ke bara ba Shobale: Alefane, le Manahate, le Ebale, le Shefi, le Oname." 
Genesis36:24 Bana ke bara ba Sibone: Aya le Ana. Enwa ke Ana yane wa ho fumana sediba sa metsi a tjhesang, lehwatateng, ha a ntse a alositse ditonki tsa ntatae Sibone." 
Genesis36:25 Bana ke bara ba Ana: Dishone le Oholebama, moradi wa Ana." 
Genesis36:26 Bana ke bara ba Dishone: Hemedane, le Eshebane, le Jiterane, le Kerane." 
Genesis36:27 Bana ke bara ba Esere: Bilehane, le Saafane, le Akane." 
Genesis36:28 Bara ba Dishane ke Use le Arane. 
Genesis36:29 Ana ke mahosana a Bahore: bokgosana Lotane, le Shobale, le Sibone, le Ana," 
Genesis36:30 le Dishone, le Esere, le Dishane. Ana ke mahosana a Bahore, ho ya ka merabe ya wona, naheng ya Seire." 
Genesis36:31 Tsena ke dikgosi tse busitseng naheng ya Edomo, ho eso be le kgosi e busang Baiseraele." 
Genesis36:32 Bela, mora wa Beora, a na a busa Edomo, mme lebitso la motse wa hae e ne e le Dinehaba." 
Genesis36:33 Bela a shwa, mme Jobaba, mora wa Sera wa Bosera, a busa bakeng sa hae." 
Genesis36:33 Bela a shwa, mme Jobaba, mora wa Sera wa Bosera, a busa bakeng sa hae." 
Genesis36:34 Jobaba a shwa, me Hushame wa naheng ya Batemana, a busa bakeng sa hae." 
Genesis36:34 Jobaba a shwa, me Hushame wa naheng ya Batemana, a busa bakeng sa hae." 
Genesis36:35 Hushame a shwa, mme Hadade, mora wa Bedade, ya neng a hlole Bamidiane naheng ya Moabe, a busa bakeng sa hae. Lebitso la motse wa hae e ne e le Afite." 
Genesis36:36 Hadade a shwa, mme Samela wa Masereka a busa bakeng sa hae." 
Genesis36:37 Samela a shwa, mme Shaule wa Rehobote e lebopong la Euferatese, a busa bakeng sa hae." 
Genesis36:38 Shaule a shwa, mme Baale-Hanane, mora wa Akabore, a busa bakeng sa hae." 
Genesis36:39 Baale-Hanane, mora wa Akabore, a shwa, Hadare a busa bakeng sa hae, mme lebitso la motse wa hae e le Pau. Lebitso la mosadi wa hae e ne e le Mehetabela, moradi wa Materede, moradi wa Me-Sahabe." 
Genesis36:40 Ana ke mabitso a mahosana a tswetsweng ke Esau, ho ya ka malapa a wona, le ka dibaka tseo a ahileng ho tsona, le ka mabitso a wona: bokgosana Timina, le Alefa, le Jetete," 
Genesis36:41 le Oholebama, le Ela, le Pinone," 
Genesis36:42 le Kenase, le Temana, le Mebisare," 
Genesis36:43 le Magedeele, le Irame. Ana ke mahosana a Edomo, ke ho re Esau, ntata Baedomo, ho ya ka dibaka tseo a ahileng ho tsona, naheng eo e leng ya wona." 
Genesis37:1 Jakobo a aha naheng eo ntatae a neng a jakile ho yona, naheng ya Kanana." 
Genesis37:2 Tsena ke ditaba tsa lelapa la Jakobo. Josefa ha a ena le dilemo tse leshome le metso e supileng o ne a disa mehlape le bana babo. Moshanyana enwa o ne a ena le bara ba Bileha le Silepa, basadi ba ntatae, mme Josefa a bolella ntatae ditaba tsa bona tse mpe." 
Genesis37:3 Iseraele o ne a rata Josefa ho feta bana ba hae bohle, hobane e ne e le ngwana eo a mo fumanetseng boqhekung ba hae, mme a mo etsetsa seaparo se selelele, se fihlang matsohong le maotong." 
Genesis37:4 Ha bana babo ba bona hore ntata bona o mo rata ho feta bana babo kaofela, ba mo hloya, ba se ke ba mmuisa ka kgotso." 
Genesis37:5 Yaba Josefa o lora toro, mme ha a e phetela bana babo, ba mo hloya ka ho fetisa." 
Genesis37:6 A re ho bona: “Utlwang toro eo ke e lorileng: 
Genesis37:7 Re ne re tlama dihlopha tshimong, mme ka bona sehlopha sa ka se tsoha, se ema tswee! Ka bona dihlopha tsa lona di ema, di se potapota, mme di se kgumamela.”" 
Genesis37:8 Bana babo ba re ho yena: “Na ruri o tla re busa? Kapa na ruri o tla rena hodima rona?” Ba tswela pele ho mo hloya haholo, ka baka la ditoro tseo tsa hae, le ka baka la dipolelo tseo tsa hae." 
Genesis37:9 A boela a lora toro e nngwe, mme a e phetela bana babo, a re: “Mamelang, ke lorile toro e nngwe hape: letsatsi, le kgwedi, le dinaledi tse leshome le motso o mong di ne di nkgumamela.”" 
Genesis37:10 Empa yare ha a phetela ntatae le bana babo toro eo, ntatae a mo omanya, a re ho yena: “Ke toro nngwe ee, eo o e lorileng? Na ruri nna, le mmao, le bana beno, re tla o kgumamela?”" 
Genesis37:11 Bana babo ba mo honohela, empa ntatae yena a nna a nahana polelo eo." 
Genesis37:12 Yaba bana babo ba ya Shekeme ho ya alosa mohlape wa ntata bona. 
Genesis37:13 Iseraele a re ho Josefa: “Ha ke re bana beno ba aloseditse Shekeme? Tloo, ke o rome ho bona.” Josefa a re ho yena: “E, ho lokile.”" 
Genesis37:14 Yaba Iseraele o re ho yena: “Ako ye, o yo bona hore na bana beno ba ntse ba phela hantle, le mohlape na, mme o kgutle o tlo mpolella.” Ha a mo roma ba ne ba le kgohlong ya Heborone. Josefa a tsamaya, a ya fihla Shekeme." 
Genesis37:15 Monna e mong a mo fumana a ntse a lelera hara naha, mme monna eo a mmotsa, a re: “O batlang?”" 
Genesis37:16 Josefa a re: “Ke batla bana beso; ako mpolelle hle, moo ba aloseditseng teng.”" 
Genesis37:17 Monna eo a re: “Ba se ba tlohile; ke ile ka ba utlwa ba re: A re yeng Dotane. ” Yaba Josefa o latela bana babo, mme a ba fumana Dotane." 
Genesis37:18 Ba mmona a sa le hole, mme yare a eso atamele ho bona ba rera ho mmolaya." 
Genesis37:19 Ba buisana, ba re: “Raditoro ke eo a etla." 
Genesis37:20 Tloong jwale, re mmolayeng, re mo akgeleng ka ho le leng la madumela. Re tla re sebatana se mo jele, mme re tla bona hore na ditoro tsa hae di tla fella kae.”" 
Genesis37:21 Empa ha Rubene a utlwa hona, a mo namolela matsohong a bona, a re: “A re se keng ra mmolaya.”" 
Genesis37:22 A boela a re: “Se tsholleng madi; mo akgeleng ka ledumeleng lena le lehwatateng, empa le se ke la mo isa matsoho.” E ne e le hore a tle a mo namolele matsohong a bona, a mo kgutlisetse ho ntatae." 
Genesis37:23 Yare ha Josefa a fihla ho bana babo, ba mo hlobodisa seaparo sa hae se fihlang matsohong le maotong, seo a neng a se apere;" 
Genesis37:24 ba mo nka, ba mo akgela ka ledumeleng. Ledumela lena le ne le se na letho, le se na metsi." 
Genesis37:25 Jwale ba dula fatshe, ba eja. Yare ha ba phahamisa mahlo ba bona mokoloko wa Baishemaele ba tswang Gileade, ba le leetong, ba ya Egepeta, dikamele tsa bona di belesitswe boroku, le ditlolo, le mmira." 
Genesis37:26 Yaba Juda o re ho bana babo: “Re tla boellwa ke eng, ha re bolaya ngwanabo rona, mme re pata madi a hae?" 
Genesis37:27 Tloong, re mo rekiseng ho Baishemaele, mme re se ke ra mo isa matsoho, hobane ke ngwanabo rona, ke nama ya rona.” Bana babo ba dumela." 
Genesis37:28 Yare ha bahwebi ba Midiane ba feta, ba hula Josefa, mme ba mo ntsha ka ledumeleng, ba mo rekisa ho Baishemaele ka silefera e kang boima ba dikeramo tse makgolo a mabedi le mashome a mararo, mme bao ba ya le yena Egepeta." 
Genesis37:29 Ha Rubene a kgutlela ledumeleng, mme a bona hore Josefa ha a yo ka ledumeleng, a hahola diaparo tsa hae," 
Genesis37:30 a kgutlela ho bana babo, a re: “Moshanyana ha a yo; ekaba ke tla leba kae?”" 
Genesis37:31 Jwale ba nka seaparo sa Josefa, ba bolaya potsanyane, ba ina seaparo seo mading." 
Genesis37:32 Ba romela seaparo seo se fihlang matsohong le maotong, sa iswa ho ntata bona, mme ba re: “Re fumane ntho ena; ako bone hore na ke seaparo sa mora wa hao, kapa tjhe.”" 
Genesis37:33 Iseraele a se tseba, mme a re: “Ke seaparo sa mora wa ka! Sebatana se mo jele; ruri Josefa o tsekolotswe ke sebatana.”" 
Genesis37:34 Jakobo a hahola diaparo tsa hae, a itlama letheka ka lesela le mahwashe, a llela mora wa hae ka matsatsi a mangata." 
Genesis37:35 Bara ba hae bohle, le baradi ba hae bohle, ba ema ka maoto ho mo tshedisa, empa a se ke a tshediseha, a mpa a re: “Ke tla theohela Nqalong ya Bafu, ho mora wa ka, ke ntse ke lla.” Kahoo ntatae a mo llela." 
Genesis37:36 Bamidiane ba rekisa Josefa Egepeta, ho Potifaro, tona ya Faro le mookamedi wa balebedi." 
Genesis38:1 Ka yona nako eo Juda a tloha ho bana babo, a fapohela ha monna wa Adulame, eo lebitso la hae e neng e le Hira." 
Genesis38:2 Teng Juda a bona moradi wa Mokanana, ya bitswang Shua; a mo nyala, mme a kena dikobong tsa hae." 
Genesis38:3 Mosadi eo a emola, a tswala mora, mme a mo rea lebitso la Ere." 
Genesis38:4 A emola hape, a tswala mora, mme a mo rea lebitso la Onane." 
Genesis38:5 A boela a tswala mora, a mo rea lebitso la Shela. Juda o ne a le Kesibe ha Hira a tswala mora eo." 
Genesis38:6 Yaba Juda o nyadisa Ere, letsibolo la hae; lebitso la mosadi wa hae e ne e le Tamare." 
Genesis38:7 Empa Ere, letsibolo la Juda, e ne e le motho ya kgopo mahlong a Morena, mme Morena a mmolaya." 
Genesis38:8 Yaba Juda o re ho Onane: “Kenela mohatsa moholwane wa hao, o mo tswalle bana, kaha o ngwanabo monna wa hae.”" 
Genesis38:9 Empa Onane o ne a tseba hore bana bao ha e na ho ba bana ba hae; kahoo ha a ne a kena dikobong tsa mosadi wa ngwanabo, o ne a ye a e tjhomolele, esere a tswalla ngwanabo bana." 
Genesis38:10 Seo a ileng a se etsa sa eba sebe mahlong a Morena, mme le yena Morena a mmolaya. Yaba Juda o re ho Tamare, ngwetsi ya hae:" 
Genesis38:11 “Kgutlela heno, mme o itulele o le mohlolohadi, ho fihlela mora wa ka Shela a hola.” O ne a tshaba hore Shela le yena o tla shwa jwaloka bana babo. Yaba Tamare o a tsamaya, o ya dula habo." 
Genesis38:12 Ha nako e ntse e tswela pele, mosadi wa Juda, moradi wa Shua, a shwa. Ha Juda a se a tshedisehile, a nyolohela Timina ho bakuti ba dinku tsa hae, a ena le motswalle wa hae Hira, wa Adulame." 
Genesis38:13 Ha Tamare a bolellwa, ho thwe: “Matsala hao o nyolohela Timina ho ya kuta dinku tsa hae,”" 
Genesis38:14 a hlobola diaparo tsa hae tsa bohlolohadi, a ikgurumetsa ka lesira, a ithatela ka lona, mme a dula kgorong ya Enaime, e tseleng e yang Timina. Tamare o ne a se a bone hore Shela o hodile, empa o ne a eso mo newe hore e be mosadi wa hae." 
Genesis38:15 Ha Juda a mmona, a hopola hore ke seotswa, hobane o ne a ikgurumeditse sefahleho." 
Genesis38:16 A fapohela ho yena kathoko ho tsela, mme a re: “Tloo, re robale le wena.” O ne a sa tsebe hore ke ngwetsi ya hae. Tamare a re: “O tla nneang, e le hore o tle o kene dikobong tsa ka?”" 
Genesis38:17 A re: “Ke tla o romella potsanyane e tswang mohlapeng wa ka.” Yaba Tamare o re: “Na o tla bea dintho paneng ho fihlela o e romela?” 
Genesis38:18 Juda a re: “Ke tla bea eng paneng?” Tamare a re: “Setempe sa hao sa bopaki, le leqhwele la sona, le molamu o letsohong la hao.” A mo nea tsona, mme Juda a kena dikobong tsa hae, a mo emarisa." 
Genesis38:19 Jwale Tamare a ema, a itsamaela, a tlosa lesira la hae, mme a boela a apara diaparo tsa hae tsa bohlolohadi." 
Genesis38:20 Ha Juda a romella potsanyane ka motswalle wa hae Adulame, hore mosadi a kgutlise seo a neng a se beile paneng, a se ke a hlola a fumana mosadi eo." 
Genesis38:21 A botsa banna ba sebaka seo, a re: “Seotswa sela se neng se le Enaime, pela tsela, se kae?” Ba araba, ba re: “Ha ho seotswa se kileng sa eba mona.”"
