Joshua12:1 Tsena ke dikgosi tsa dinaha tseo bana ba Iseraele ba ileng ba di hlola. Ba hapa naha ya tsona e kamose wane ho Jorodane, ka botjhabela, ho tloha Kgohlong ya Arenone, ho ya fihla thabeng ya Heremone, le Araba yohle ka botjhabela." 
Joshua12:2 Ba hapa ya Sithone, kgosi ya Baamore, e neng a ahile Heshebone, e busa ho tloha Arowere e pela lebopo la noka ya Arenone, bohareng ba kgohlo; e busa le karolo e nngwe ya Gileade, ho ya fihla Jaboko, e leng moedi wa Baamone." 
Joshua12:3 E busa le Araba, ho ya fihla lewatleng la Kinerete ka botjhabela, le ho ya fihla lewatleng la Araba, e leng Lewatle la Letswai; e busa le ka botjhabela, tseleng e yang Bete-Jeshimote, ka borwa, tlasa matswapo a Pisega." 
Joshua12:4 Ba hapa le naha ya Oge, kgosi ya Bashabane, e nngwe ya masalla a Refaine, e neng a ahile Ashetarote le Ederei." 
Joshua12:5 E ne e busa thabeng ya Heremone, le Saleka, le naheng yohle ya Bashane, ho ya fihla moeding wa Bageshure, le Bamaaka, le karolo e nngwe ya Gileade, le ho ya fihla moeding wa Sihone, kgosi ya Heshebone." 
Joshua12:6 Moshe, mohlanka wa Morena, a ena le bana ba Iseraele, ba bolaya dikgosi tseo, mme Moshe, mohlanka wa Morena, a nea ba morabe wa Rubene, le ba morabe wa Gade, le ba karolo e nngwe ya morabe wa Manase, naha eo, hore e be lefa la bona." 
Joshua12:7 Tsena ke dikgosi tsa naha eo, tseo Joshua, a ena le bana ba Iseraele, a neng a di bolaye kamose wane ho Jorodane, ka bophirimela, ho tloha Baale-Gade, kgohlong ya Lebanone, ho ya fihla thabeng ya Halaka, e nyolosetsang Seire. Joshua a abela merabe ya Iseraele naha ena, hore e be ya yona, ho ya ka dikarolo tsa yona." 
Joshua12:8 A e abela le naha e maralleng, le e diphuleng, le ya Araba, le e matswapong, le e lehwatateng, le e ka borwa, le naha ya Bahete, le ya Baamore, le ya Bakanana, le ya Baperise, le ya Bahife, le ya Bajebuse." 
Joshua12:9 Ha bolawa kgosi ya Jeriko, le kgosi ya Ai e pela Bethele," 
Joshua12:10 le kgosi ya Jerusalema, le kgosi ya Heborone," 
Joshua12:11 le kgosi ya Jaremute, le kgosi ya Lakishe," 
Joshua12:12 le kgosi ya Egelone, le kgosi ya Gesere," 
Joshua12:13 le kgosi ya Debiri, le kgosi ya Gedere," 
Joshua12:14 le kgosi ya Horema, le kgosi ya Arada," 
Joshua12:15 le kgosi ya Lebena, le kgosi ya Adulame," 
Joshua12:16 le kgosi ya Makeda, le kgosi ya Bethele;" 
Joshua12:17 le kgosi ya Tapua, le kgosi ya Hefere," 
Joshua12:18 le kgosi ya Afeke, le kgosi ya Lasharone," 
Joshua12:19 le kgosi ya Madone, le kgosi ya Hasore," 
Joshua12:20 le kgosi ya Shimerone-Merone, le kgosi ya Akashate," 
Joshua12:21 le kgosi ya Taanake, le kgosi ya Megido," 
Joshua12:22 le kgosi ya Kedeshe, le kgosi ya Jokoneame e Karamele," 
Joshua12:23 le kgosi ya Dore e maralleng a Dore, le kgosi ya Koime e Gilegale," 
Joshua12:24 le kgosi ya Tiresa. Dikgosi tsena tsohle di ne di le mashome a mararo a motso o mong. 
Joshua13:1 Joshua o ne a tsofetse, mme dilemo tsa hae di se di ile. Morena a re ho yena: “O tsofetse, mme dilemo tsa hao di ile, empa ho sa setse naha e kgolo, e lokelang ho hapuwa." 
Joshua13:2 “Ena ke naha e sa setseng: Ditereke tsohle tsa Bafilesita, le tsohle tsa Bageshure." 
Joshua13:3 E tloha Shihore e ka botjhabela ho Egepeta, ho ya fihla moeding wa Ekerone, ka leboya, eo e leng ya Bakanana. Ke ya mahosana a mahlano a Bafilesita, e leng a Gasa, le a Ashedode, le a Ashekelone, le a Gade, le a Ekerone, le a Baafa ka borwa." 
Joshua13:4 Ho tloha ka borwa, naha yohle ya Bakanana, le ya Meara, eo e neng e le ya Basidone, ho ya fihla Afeke, le ho ya fihla moeding wa Baamore." 
Joshua13:5 Le naha ya Bagebale le Lebanone yohle, ho ya fihla botjhabela, ho tloha Baale-Gade e mosikong wa thaba ya Heremone, ho ya fihla lekgalong la Hamate." 
Joshua13:6 “Baahi bohle ba naha e maralla, ho tloha Lebanone, ho ya fihla Miserefote-Maime, le Basidone bohle, ke tla ba leleka kapele ho bana ba Iseraele. Dinaha tsena o di abele bana ba Iseraele e le lefa la bona, jwalokaha ke o laetse." 
Joshua13:7 Ka baka lena, abela merabe ena e robong, le karolo e nngwe ya morabe wa Manase, naha ena, hore e be lefa la yona.”" 
Joshua13:8 Karolo e nngwe ya morabe wa Manase, le morabe wa Rubene, le morabe wa Gade, e ne e se e amohetse lefa la naha, leo Moshe a e abetseng lona ka botjhabela, mose wane ho Jorodane, jwalokaha Moshe, mohlanka wa Morena, a ile a ba abela lona." 
Joshua13:9 Ho tloha Arowere e lebopong la noka ya Arenone, le motse o kahara kgohlo, le phula yohle e tlohang Medeba ho ya fihla Dibone;" 
Joshua13:10 le metse yohle ya Sihone, kgosi ya Baamore, ya neng a busa Heshebone, ho ya fihla moeding wa bana ba Amone." 
Joshua13:11 Le Gileade yohle le meedi ya Bageshure, le ya Bamaaka, le thaba yohle ya Heremone, le Bashane yohle ho ya fihla Saleka," 
Joshua13:12 le naha yohle e Bashane, ya Oge, ya neng a busa Ashetarote le Ederei, e leng e mong wa masalla a Barefaime. Bana Moshe o ile a ba hlola, a hapa naha ya bona." 
Joshua13:13 Leha ho le jwalo, bana ba Iseraele ha ba a ka ba leleka Bageshure le Bamaaka; kahoo Bageshure le Bamaaka ba aha hara Baiseraele, ho fihlela kajeno-ya-bokajeno." 
Joshua13:14 Ke Balevi feela bao a sa kang a ba abela lefa. Dinyehelo tsa setjheso, tsa Morena Modimo wa Iseraele, ke lona lefa la bona, jwalokaha Morena a ne a ba tshepise." 
Joshua13:15 Moshe a abela bana ba morabe wa Rubene naha, ho ya ka malapa abo bona." 
Joshua13:16 Moedi wa bona o ne o tloha Arowere e lebopong la noka ya Arenone, le motseng o kahara kgohlo, le phula yohle e pela Medeba," 
Joshua13:17 le Heshebone, le metse yohle ya yona e phuleng: Dibone, le Bamote-Baale, le Bete-Baale-Meone," 
Joshua13:18 le Jahase, le Kedemote, le Mefaata," 
Joshua13:19 le Kiriataime, le Sibema, le Serete-Shahara e hodima leralla la kgohlo," 
Joshua13:20 le Bete-Peore, le matswapo a Pisega, le Bete-Jeshimote," 
Joshua13:21 le metse yohle e phuleng, le naha yohle ya Sihone, kgosi ya Baamore, ya neng a busa Heshebone, eo Moshe a neng a mmolaye hammoho le mahosana a Midiane: Efi, le Rekeme, le Sure, le Hure, le Reba, e leng mahosana a Sihone, a neng a ahile naheng ena." 
Joshua13:22 E mong wa ba bolailweng ke bana ba Iseraele ka sabole e ne e le Bileame wa senohe, mora wa Beore." 
Joshua13:23 Moedi wa bana ba Rubene o ne o fella Jorodane. Lena e ne e le lefa la bana ba Rubene, ho ya ka malapa abo bona, e leng metse le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua13:24 Moshe a abela bana ba morabe wa Gade naha, ho ya ka malapa abo bona." 
Joshua13:25 Moedi wa bona e ne e le Jasere le metse yohle ya Gileade, le karolo e nngwe ya naha ya bana ba Amone, ho ya fihla Arowere, kapele ho Raba;" 
Joshua13:26 le ho tloha Heshebone, ho ya fihla Rama-Misepa, le Betonime, le ho tloha Mahanaime ho ya fihla moeding wa Debiri;" 
Joshua13:27 le ka kgohlong ya Bete-Harame, le Bete-Nimera, le Sukote, le Safone, le karolo e setseng ya naha ya Sihone, kgosi ya Heshebone; le lebopo la Jorodane e le moedi o ilo fihla lebopong la lewatle la Kinerete, ka botjhabela ho Jorodane." 
Joshua13:28 Lena ke lefa la bana ba Gade, ho ya ka malapa abo bona, e leng metse le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua13:29 Moshe a abela karolo e nngwe ya morabe wa Manase naha. E ne e le karolo e nngwe ya bana ba morabe wa Manase, ho ya ka malapa abo bona." 
Joshua13:30 Moedi wa bona o ne o tloha Mahanaime, le Bashane yohle, le naha eohle ya Oge, kgosi ya Bashane, le metsaneng yohle ya Jaire e mashome a tsheletseng, e neng e le Bashane." 
Joshua13:31 Le karolo e nngwe ya Gileade, le Ashetarote, le Ederei, e leng metse ya naha ya Oge e Bashane. Ena e ne e le ya bana ba Makiri, mora wa Manase, le ya karolo e nngwe ya bana ba Makiri, ho ya ka malapa abo bona." 
Joshua13:32 Tsena ke dinaha tseo Moshe a ileng a di aba e le lefa diphuleng tsa Moabe, kamose wane ho Jorodane, ka botjhabela ho Jeriko." 
Joshua13:33 Empa Moshe ha a a ka a nea Balevi lefa, hobane Morena Modimo wa Iseraele, ke yena lefa la bona, jwalokaha a ne a ba tshepise." 
Joshua14:1 Tsena ke dinaha tseo bana ba Iseraele ba ileng ba di ja lefa naheng ya Kanana. Ba ne ba di abelwe ke moprista Eleasare, le Joshua mora wa Nune, le dihlooho tsa malapa a merabe ya bana ba Iseraele." 
Joshua14:2 Lefa leo la ajwa ka lotho, la abelwa merabe e robong le karolo e nngwe ya morabe wa Manase, jwalokaha Morena a ne a laetse Moshe." 
Joshua14:3 Moshe o ne a se a abetse merabe e mmedi, le karolo e nngwe ya morabe naha e kamose wane ho Jorodane; feela Balevi bona a se ke a ba abela lefa hara Baiseraele," 
Joshua14:4 hobane bana ba Josefa e ne e le merabe e mmedi: wa Manase le wa Efraime. Balevi bona ha ba a ka ba abelwa naha, haese metse ya bodulo, le dibakana tse e potapotileng, hore e be tsa makgulo a dikgomo tsa bona, le a mehlape ya bona." 
Joshua14:5 Jwalokaha Morena a ne a laetse Moshe, bana ba Iseraele ba etsa jwalo, ba aba naha." 
Joshua14:6 Bana ba Juda ba ya ho Joshua ha a le Gilegale, mme Kalebe, mora wa Jefune wa Mokenase, a re ho yena: “O tseba seo Morena a neng a se bue ho Moshe, mohlanka wa Modimo, malebana le nna, le malebana le wena, ha re le Kadeshe-Barenea." 
Joshua14:7 Ke ne ke ena le dilemo tse mashome a mane ha Moshe, mohlanka wa Morena, a nthoma re le Kadeshe-Barenea, hore ke yo hlwela naha, mme yare ha ke kgutla ka fihla ka mmulela sefuba sa ka." 
Joshua14:8 Bana beso, ba neng ba ile le nna, ba fihla ba nyahamisa setjhaba dipelo, empa nna ke ile ka latela Morena Modimo wa ka, ka ho tlala." 
Joshua14:9 Ka lona letsatsi leo, Moshe a hlapanya, a re: Ruri, naha eo leoto la hao le kileng la hata hodima yona, e tla ba ya hao, le ya bana ba hao kamehla, hobane o ile wa latela Morena Modimo wa ka, ka ho tlala." 
Joshua14:10 “Jwale bona, ka dilemo tsena tse mashome a mane a metso e mehlano, ho tloha mohla Morena a buang lentswe lena ho Moshe, ha Baiseraele ba ntse ba lelera lehwatateng, Morena o babaletse bophelo ba ka, jwalokaha a ne a bue, mme ke mona kajeno ke na le dilemo tse mashome a robedi a metso e mehlano." 
Joshua14:11 Empa le kajeno ke ntse ke le matla jwaloka mohla Moshe a neng a nthoma. Matla a ka a kajeno a ntse a ka a nako yona yane; e ka ba matla a ho lwana, kapa a ho itsamaela feela." 
Joshua14:12 Ka baka leo he, nnee naha ena e maralla eo Morena a neng a bue ka yona mohla letsatsi leo. Etswe wena o ne o ikutlwele ka lona letsatsi leo, hore Baanake ba phela moo, mme metse ya bona ke ya metonana, ya diqhobosheane. Mohlomong Morena o tla ba le nna ha ke le moo, mme ke ba leleke teng, jwalokaha Morena a buile.”" 
Joshua14:13 Joshua a hlohonolofatsa Kalebe, mora wa Jefune, mme a mo nea Heborone, hore e be lefa la hae." 
Joshua14:14 Ka baka lena, Heborone ya eba lefa la Kalebe, mora wa Jefune wa Mokenase, ho fihlela kajeno-ya-bokajeno, hobane a ne a ile a latela Morena Modimo wa Iseraele, ka ho tlala." 
Joshua14:15 Pele ho moo, lebitso la Heborone e ne e le Motse wa Areba, mme Areba e ne e le senatlahadi hara Baanake. Jwale naha ya phomola, ya hloka ntwa." 
Joshua15:1 Naha eo bana ba morabe wa Juda, ho ya ka malapa abo bona, ba ileng ba e abelwa ka lotho, e ne e fihla moeding wa Edomo, le ho ya fihla ka borwa ho lehwatata la Sine, qetheng ya karolo e ka borwa." 
Joshua15:2 Ka borwa moedi wa bona o ne o tloha qetheng ya karolo ya Lewatle la Letswai, koung e shebileng borwa." 
Joshua15:3 Ho tloha moo o lebe ka borwa ho moepa wa Akarabime, o fetele Sine, o yo nyoloha ka borwa ho Kadeshe-Barenea, o fete pela Heserone, o nyolohele Adare, o nto thinyetsa Karaka." 
Joshua15:4 Jwale moedi ona o fete pela Asamone, o nyolose ka molatswana wa Egepeta, ebe o ilo fella lewatleng. Ona e tla ba wona moedi wa bona ka borwa." 
Joshua15:5 Ka botjhabela moedi o ne o tloha Lewatleng la Letswai, o be o yo fihla molomong wa Jorodane. Ka leboya moedi o ne o tloha koung ya lewatle, moo Jorodane e kenang lewatleng teng." 
Joshua15:6 Moedi o ne o nyolosetsa Bete-Hogela, o yo pota ka leboya ho Bete-Araba, o nyolose hape ho ya fihla Lefikeng la Bohane, mora wa Rubene." 
Joshua15:7 Moedi o nyolohe Debiri, ho tloha kgohlong ya Akore, ho ya leboya, o nto thinyetsa Gilegale e lebaneng le moepa wa Adumime e ka lehlakoreng le ka borwa la molatswana. Jwale o fetele metsing a Ene-Shemeshe, o yo fella Sedibeng sa Rogele." 
Joshua15:8 Moedi o nyolose ka kgohlo ya mora wa Hinome, ka lehlakoreng le ka borwa ho Bajebuse , ke yona Jerusalema , o nyolohele tlhorong ya thaba e kapele ho kgohlo ya Hinome, ka bophirimela, e leng ka leboya qetheng ya kgohlwana ya Refaime." 
Joshua15:9 Jwale moedi wa sehwa ho tloha tlhorong ya thaba, ho ya fihla sedibeng sa metsi a Nefetwa; wa fetela metseng ya thaba ya Eferone. Wa boela wa sehwa ho ya Baala , ke yona Kiriate-Jearime." 
Joshua15:10 Jwale moedi o thinyetse ka bophirimela ho Baala, ho ya fihla thabeng ya Seire, ebe o fetela leropong le ka leboya la thaba ya Jearime , ke yona Kesalone , wa theosa ho ya fihla Bete-Shemeshe, wa ya feta Timina." 
Joshua15:11 Moedi ona wa leba leropong la Ekerone le ka leboya, wa sehwa ho ya fihla Shikarone, wa fetela thabeng ya Baala, wa fetela le Jabeneele, wa ya fella lewatleng." 
Joshua15:12 Ka bophirimela moedi e ne e le Lewatle le Leholo le lebopo la lona. Ona ke wona moedi wa bana ba Juda, ho ya ka malapa abo bona." 
Joshua15:13 Ho ya ka taelo ya Morena ho Joshua, Kalebe, mora wa Jefune, o ile a abelwa karolo ya naha hara bana ba Juda; a mo abela le motse wa Areba, mme Areba e ne e le ntata Anake. Ke yona Heborone." 
Joshua15:14 Naheng eo, Kalebe a leleka bara ba bararo ba Anake, e leng Sheshai, le Ahimane, le Talamai, ditloholo tsa Anake." 
Joshua15:15 Kalebe a nyoloha teng, a futuhela baahi ba motse wa Debiri. Lebitso la pele la motse wa Debiri e ne e le Kiriate-Sefere." 
Joshua15:16 Yaba Kalebe o re: “Mang kapa mang ya ka futuhelang motse wa Kiriate-Sefere, mme a o hapa, ke tla mo nea moradi wa ka Akasa, hore e be mosadi wa hae.”" 
Joshua15:17 Yaba Oteniele, mora wa Kenase, ngwanabo Kalebe, o hapa Kiriate-Sefere, mme Kalebe a mo nea moradi wa hae hore e be mosadi wa hae." 
Joshua15:18 Ha Akasa a fihla ho Oteniele, Oteniele a mo pheella hore a kope ntatae, Kalebe, a ke a mo qothele naha. Ha Akasa a tholoha tonki ya hae, Kalebe a re ho yena: “O batlang?”" 
Joshua15:19 Akasa a re: “Ako mphe mpho e nngwe hape. Erekaha o nneile naha ya Negebe, ako mphe le didiba.” Kalebe a mo nea didiba tse hodimo le tse tlase." 
Joshua15:20 Lena ke lona lefa la morabe wa bana ba Juda, ho ya ka malapa abo bona." 
Joshua15:21 Karolong ya naha ya morabe wa bana ba Juda, metse e holehole ho ya moeding wa Edomo, ka borwa, e ne e le Kabeseele, le Edere, le Jagure," 
Joshua15:22 le Kina, le Dimona, le Adada," 
Joshua15:23 le Kedeshe, le Hasore, le Jitenane," 
Joshua15:24 le Sife, le Teleme, le Bealote," 
Joshua15:25 le Hasore-Hadata, le Keriote-Heserone, e leng Hasore," 
Joshua15:26 le Amame, le Shema, le Molada," 
Joshua15:27 le Hasere-Gada, le Heshemone, le Bete-Pelete," 
Joshua15:28 le Hasere-Shuale, le Beeresheba, le Bisiotia," 
Joshua15:29 le Baala, le Ijime, le Eseme," 
Joshua15:30 le Eletolade, le Kesile, le Horema," 
Joshua15:31 le Sikelage le Mademana, le Sanesanna," 
Joshua15:32 le Lebaote, le Shilehime, le Aine, le Rimone. Metse ena e ne e le mashome a mabedi a metso e robong, le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:33 Diphuleng metse e ne e le Eshetaole, le Sora, le Ashena," 
Joshua15:34 le Sanowa, le Ene-Gannime, le Tapua, le Ename," 
Joshua15:35 le Jaremute, le Adulame, le Soko, le Aseka," 
Joshua15:36 le Shaaraime, le Aditaime, le Gedera, le Gederotaime. Metse ena e ne e le leshome le metso e mene, le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:37 E nto ba Senane, le Hadasha, le Migedale-Gade," 
Joshua15:38 le Dilane, le Misepa, le Jokothele," 
Joshua15:39 le Lakishe, le Bosekate, le Egelone," 
Joshua15:40 le Kabone, le Lahamase, le Kiteleshe," 
Joshua15:41 le Gederote, le Bete-Dagone, le Naama, le Makeda. Metse ena e ne e le leshome le metso e tsheletseng, le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:42 E be Lebena, le Etere, le Ashane," 
Joshua15:43 le Jifeta, le Ashena, le Nesibe," 
Joshua15:44 le Keila, le Akasibe, le Maresha. Metse ena e ne e le robong, le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:45 E be Ekerone, le metse ya yona, le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:46 Ho tloha Ekerone, ho ya fihla lewatleng, e be metse yohle, le metsana ya yona, e pela Ashedode." 
Joshua15:47 E ntano ba Ashedode, le metse le metsana ya yona, le Gasa, le metse le metsana ya yona, ho ya fihla molatswaneng wa Egepeta, le Lewatleng le Leholo, le mabopong a lona." 
Joshua15:48 Naheng e maralla metse e ne e le ena: Shamire, le Jatire, le Soko," 
Joshua15:49 le Dana, le Kiriate-Sanna, e leng Debiri," 
Joshua15:50 le Anabe, le Eshetemoa, le Anime," 
Joshua15:51 le Goshene, le Holone, le Gilo. Metse ena e ne e le leshome le motso o mong, le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:52 E be Arabe, le Duma, le Eshane," 
Joshua15:53 le Janume, le Bete-Tapua, le Afeka," 
Joshua15:54 le Humeta, le Motse wa Areba, e leng Heborone, le Siore. Metse ena e ne e le robong, le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:55 E be Maone, le Karamele, le Sife, le Juta," 
Joshua15:56 le Jesereele, le Jokodeame, le Sanowa," 
Joshua15:57 le Kaine, le Gibea, le Timina. Metse ena e ne e le leshome, le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:58 E be Halehule, le Bete-Sure, le Gedore," 
Joshua15:59 le Maarate, le Bete-Anote, le Eletekone. Metse ena e ne e tsheletse, le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:60 E be Kiriate-Baale, e leng Kiriate-Jearime, le Raba. Metse ena e ne e le mmedi, le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:61 Lehwatateng e ne e le Bete-Araba, le Midine, le Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 le Nibeshane, le Motse wa Letswai, le Ene-Gedi. Metse ena, e ne e tsheletse, le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua15:63 Ha e le Bajebuse bona, e leng baahi ba Jerusalema, bana ba Juda ba ile ba sitwa ho ba leleka. Ke ka baka leo le kajeno-ya-bokajeno, Bajebuse ba ntseng ba ahile Jerusalema, mmoho le bana ba Juda." 
Joshua16:1 Lotho la abela bana ba Josefa naha e tlohang Jorodane, pela Jeriko, ka botjhabela ho didiba tsa Jeriko, ho ya fihla lehwatateng; le ho tloha Jeriko, ho nyolosa hara naha e maralla, ho ya fihla Bethele." 
Joshua16:2 Moedi wa tloha Bethele ho ya fihla Lose, wa fetela pele ho ya fihla moeding wa Baareki le ho ya fihla Atarote." 
Joshua16:3 Moedi wa theohela bophirimela, ho ya fihla naheng ya Bajafelete, le moeding wa Bete-Horone e tlase, le ho ya fihla Gesere, wa ya fella lewatleng." 
Joshua16:4 Bana ba Josefa, le ba Manase, le ba Efraime, ba ile ba fumana lefa la bona hona moo." 
Joshua16:5 Moedi wa naha ya bana ba Efraime, ho ya ka malapa abo bona, ya eba ona: Ka botjhabela moedi wa naha ya bona o ne o tloha Atarote-Adare, o ya fihla Bete-Horone e hodimo." 
Joshua16:6 Moedi o lebe bophirimela, Mikemetate e be ka leboya ho wona; o thinyetse ka botjhabela ho ya fihla Taanate-Shilo, o fihle o fete pela yona ka botjhabela ho Janoha." 
Joshua16:7 Ho tloha Janoha o theosetse Atarote le Naarate, o yo fihla Jeriko, o felle Jorodane." 
Joshua16:8 Ho tloha Tapua moedi o ne o leba bophirimela, ho ya fihla molatswaneng wa Kana, o yo fella lewatleng. Ena ke yona naha ya morabe wa bana ba Efraime, ho ya ka malapa abo bona;" 
Joshua16:9 hammoho le metse, le metsana yohle, e neng e abetswe bana ba Efraime, e fumanwa hara naha eo e neng e le lefa la bana ba Manase." 
Joshua16:10 Leha ha le jwalo ha ba a ka ba ba ba leleka Bakanana ba neng ba ahile Gesere. Bakanana ba nnile ba aha hara bana ba Efraime ho fihlela kajeno-ya-bokajeno, mme ba fetoha makgoba a sebetsang ka thata." 
Joshua17:1 Lotho la abela morabe wa Manase naha, hobane e ne e le letsibolo la Josefa. Ha e le Makiri, letsibolo la Manase, ntata Gileade, o ile a abelwa naha ya Gileade, le ya Bashane, hobane e ne e le mohlabani." 
Joshua17:2 Naha e abilweng ka lotho ya eba karolo e nngwe ya bana ba morabe wa Manase, ho ya ka malapa abo bona; le ya bana ba Abiesere, le ya bana ba Heleke, le ya bana ba Aserele, le ya bana ba Shekeme, le ya bana ba Hefere, le ya bana ba Shemida. Bana e ne e le bana ba batona ba Manase, mora wa Josefa, ho ya ka malapa abo bona." 
Joshua17:3 Empa Selofehade, mora wa Hefere, mora wa Gileade, mora wa Makiri, mora wa Manase, yena o ne a se na bara, haese baradi feela. Mabitso a baradi bao e ne e le Mahla, le Nowa, le Hogela, le Mileka, le Tiresa." 
Joshua17:4 Baradi bana ba tla kapele ho moprista Eleasare, le kapele ho Joshua, mora wa Nune, le kapele ho mahosana, ba re: “Morena o laetse Moshe hore a re nee lefa lefeng la dikgaitsedi tsa rona.” Ka baka leo, ka taelo ya Morena, Joshua a ba abela lefa lefeng la bana babo ntata bona." 
Joshua17:5 Manase o ile a fumana dikarolo tse leshome, ntle ho naha ya Gileade le ya Bashane, e kamose wane ho Jorodane," 
Joshua17:6 hobane baradi ba Manase ba ile ba fumana lefa lefeng la bana ba hae. Naha ya Gileade yona e ile ya eba ya bara ba bang ba Manase. 
Joshua17:7 Moedi wa naha ya Manase o ne o tloha Ashere ho ya fihla Mikemetate, ka botjhabela ho Shekeme, ebe o thinyetsa ka letsohong le letona ho leba naheng ya baahi ba Ene-Tapua." 
Joshua17:8 Naha ya Tapua e ne e le ya Manase, athe motse wa Tapua o neng o le moeding wa Manase, wona e ne e le wa bana ba Efraime." 
Joshua17:9 Moedi wa theosa ho ya fihla molatswaneng wa Kana. Metse e ka borwa ho molatswana oo, e hara metse ya Manase, yona e ne e le ya Efraime. Moedi wa naha ya Manase o ne o le ka leboya ho molatswana oo, o ilo fella lewatleng." 
Joshua17:10 Ka borwa e ne e le ha Efraime, ka leboya e le ha Manase, lewatle e le moedi wa bona. Ka leboya moedi o ne o fihla Ashere, ka botjhabela o fihla ha Isakare." 
Joshua17:11 Naheng ya Isakare le ya Ashere, Manase o ile a abelwa Bete-Sheane le metsana ya yona, le Jibeleame le metsana ya yona, le baahi ba Dore le metsana ya yona, le baahi ba Ene-Dore le metsana ya yona, le baahi ba Taanake le metsana ya yona, le baahi ba Megido le metsana ya yona, le ditereke tse tharo tse maralla." 
Joshua17:12 Leha ho le jwalo, bana ba Manase ba ile ba sitwa ho leleka baahi ba metse eo, mme Bakanana le bona ba ikemisetsa ho dula naheng eo." 
Joshua17:13 Yare ha bana ba Iseraele ba se ba matlafetse, ba fetola Bakanana makgoba. Empa ha ba a ka ba ba leleka ho hang." 
Joshua17:14 Bana ba Josefa ba bua ho Joshua, ba re: “Ke ka baka lang ha o re file seabo se le seng le karolo e le nngwe feela e le lefa la rona, empa o bona hore re setjhaba se seholo, mme ho fihlela jwale Morena a nnile a re hlohonolofatsa?”" 
Joshua17:15 Yaba Joshua o re ho bona: “Haeba le le setjhaba se seholo, nyolohelang morung mane, mme le hleke difate naheng ya Baperise, le ya Barefaime, hobane sebaka sena sa naha e maralla se senyenyane bakeng sa lona.”" 
Joshua17:16 Bana ba Josefa ba re: “Naha e maralla ha e a re lekana. Bakanana bohle ba ahileng naheng e kgohlong, le ba ahileng Bete-Sheane le metsaneng ya yona, le ba ahileng kgohlong ya Jiserele ba na le dikariki tsa ntwa, tse entsweng ka tshepe.”" 
Joshua17:17 Yaba Joshua o bua le ba ntlo ya Josefa, e leng ba ntlo ya Efraime, le ba ntlo ya Manase, o re: “Le setjhaba se seholo, se matla haholo; le ke ke la fumana seabo se le seng feela." 
Joshua17:18 Naha e maralla e tla ba ya lona, hobane leha e tletse meru le tla e hleka, e be ya lona ho ya fihla meeding ya yona. Leha Bakanana ba ena le dikariki tsa ntwa, tse entsweng ka tshepe, mme ba le matla, le tla ba leleka.”" 
Joshua18:1 Setjhaba sohle sa bana ba Iseraele sa phuthehela Shilo, mme sa hloma Tente ya Morena hona moo, hobane se ne se se se hapile naha eo." 
Joshua18:2 Hara bana ba Iseraele ho ne ho setse merabe e supileng, e neng e eso ka e abelwa lefa la yona." 
Joshua18:3 Yaba Joshua o re ho bana ba Iseraele: “Le tla dikadika ho le hokae ho ya, le ya hapa naha eo Morena Modimo wa bo-ntata lona, a le neileng yona?" 
Joshua18:4 Nkgetheleng banna ba bararo morabeng o mong le o mong. Ke tla ba roma, mme ba tla ya, ba lekole naha eo, ba bone hore na e ka arolwa jwang hore e be lefa la merabe eo, ebe jwale ba kgutlela ho nna." 
Joshua18:5 Naha eo le e arole dikarolo tse supileng. Moedi wa morabe wa Juda o tla nne o be ka borwa, mme moedi wa morabe wa Josefa o nne o be ka leboya." 
Joshua18:6 Naha ena le e arole ka dikarolo tse supileng, ebe le ntlisetsa seo le se ngotseng, mme ke tla le etsetsa lotho mona, kapele ho Morena Modimo wa lona." 
Joshua18:7 Balevi bona ha ba na lefa mona hara lona, hobane ho ba baprista ba Morena ke lona lefa la bona. Gade, le Rubene, le karolo e nngwe ya morabe wa Manase, bona ba se ba fumane lefa la bona ka botjhabela, mose wane ho Jorodane, e leng lefa leo Moshe, mohlanka wa Morena, a neng a ba nee lona.”" 
Joshua18:8 Banna bao ba ema, ba tsamaya. Joshua a laela bao ba yang ho lekola naha, a re: “Eyang, le lekole naha eo, le ngole dikarolo tsa yona, le nto kgutlela ho nna. Nna ke tla le laolela yona ka lotho mona Shilo, kapele ho Morena.”" 
Joshua18:9 Banna bao ba tloha, ba lekola naha, ba e ngodisa bukeng ho ya ka metse ya yona, ba e arola dikarolo tse supileng, jwale ba kgutlela ho Joshua diahelong tsa Shilo." 
Joshua18:10 Joshua a ba abela yona ka lotho, a le Shilo, kapele ho Morena. Joshua a arolela bana ba Iseraele naha eo, ho ya ka merabe ya bona." 
Joshua18:11 Ba morabe wa Benjamine, ho ya ka malapa abo bona, lotho la ba abela naha e pakeng tsa bana ba Juda le bana ba Josefa." 
Joshua18:12 Ka lehlakoreng le ka leboya moedi wa bona o ne o tloha nokeng ya Jorodane, o nyolosetsa lehlakoreng la Jeriko le ka leboya, o nyolose hara naha e maralla, ka bophirimela, o yo fella lehwatateng la Bete-Afene." 
Joshua18:13 Ho tloha moo moedi o ne o feta lehlakoreng le ka borwa ho Lose, e leng Bethele, ebe o theohela Atarote-Adare, pela thaba e ka borwa ho Bete-Horone e tlase." 
Joshua18:14 Moedi wa sehwa, wa pota lehlakoreng le ka bophirimela, wa leba borwa, ho tloha thabeng e tadimaneng le Bete-Horone ka borwa, wa ya fella Kiriate-Baale, e leng Kiriate-Jearime, motse wa bana ba Juda. Ena e ne e le karolo e ka bophirimela." 
Joshua18:15 Ka borwa moedi o ne o tloha qetheng ya Kiriate-Jearime, ebe o leba bophirimela, o yo fihla sedibeng sa Nefetwa." 
Joshua18:16 Jwale moedi o theohele qetheng ya thaba e malebana le kgohlo ya Mora wa Hinome, e ka leboya ho kgohlo ya Refaime. Ho tloha moo o theohele kgohlong ya Hinome, lehlakoreng le ka borwa ho Bajebuse, o be o theohele Sedibeng sa Rogele." 
Joshua18:17 Moedi wa sehwa ka leboya, wa ya fella Ene-Shemeshe le Gelelote e malebana le moepa wa Adumime. Ho tloha moo moedi wa theohela Lefikeng la Bohane, mora wa Rubene." 
Joshua18:18 Wa ikgohla ka phula, wa leba leboya ho Araba, wa nto theohela ka phuleng." 
Joshua18:19 Moedi wa boela wa fetela lehlakoreng le ka leboya ho Bete-Hogola, wa ya fella koung e ka leboya ho Lewatle la Letswai, ka lehlakoreng le ka borwa ho Jorodane. Ona ke moedi o ka borwa." 
Joshua18:20 Ka botjhabela moedi e ne e le Jorodane. Ena ke yona naha ya morabe wa bana ba Benjamine, le meedi ya yona, ho ya ka malapa abo bona." 
Joshua18:21 Metse ya morabe wa bana ba Benjamine, ho ya ka malapa abo bona, e ne e le ena: Jeriko, le Bete-Hogola, le Emeke-Kesise," 
Joshua18:22 le Bete-Araba, le Semaraime, le Bethele," 
Joshua18:23 le Afime, le Para, le Ofera," 
Joshua18:24 le Kefare-Amoni, le Ofeni, le Geba. Ke metse e leshome le metso e mmedi." 
Joshua18:25 Metsana ya yona ke ena: Gibeone, le Rama, le Beerote," 
Joshua18:26 le Misepa, le Kefira, le Mosa," 
Joshua18:27 le Rekeme, le Jirepeele, le Tarala," 
Joshua18:28 le Sela, le Elefe, le Jebuse, e leng Jerusalema, le Gibeata, le Kiriate. Kaofela ha yona ke metse e leshome le metso e mene le metsana ya yona. Ena ke yona naha ya morabe wa bana ba Benjamine, ho ya ka malapa abo bona." 
Joshua19:1 Jwale ha tswa lotho la bobedi, la bana ba morabe wa Simeone, ho ya ka malapa abo bona. Naha ya bona e ne e le kahara naha ya bana ba Juda." 
Joshua19:2 Naha eo ya bona e ne e le Beeresheba, le Sheba, le Molada," 
Joshua19:3 le Hasere-Shuale, le Bala, le Eseme," 
Joshua19:4 le Eletolade, le Bethule, le Horema," 
Joshua19:5 le Sikelage, le Bete-Marakabote, le Hasere-Susa," 
Joshua19:6 le Bete-Labaote, le Sharuhene. E ne e le metse e leshome le metso e meraro, le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua19:7 Hape e le Aine, le Rimone, le Etere, le Ashane; metse e mene le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua19:8 Le metse yohle e neng e potapotile metse eo, ho ya fihla Baalate-Beere, le Rama e ka borwa. Ena ke yona naha ya morabe wa bana ba Simeone, ho ya ka malapa abo bona." 
Joshua19:9 Kaha karolo ya bana ba Juda e ne e le kgolo ho feta palo ya bona, karolo e nngwe ya naha eo ya bana ba Juda e ile ya abelwa bana ba Simeone. Ka baka leo, naha ya bana ba Simeone e ne e le kahara naha ya bana ba Juda." 
Joshua19:10 Jwale ha tswa lotho la boraro la bana ba Sebulone, ho ya ka malapa abo bona. Moedi wa naha ya bona o ne o fihla Saride." 
Joshua19:11 Moedi wa bona o ne o nyoloha ka bophirimela ho ya fihla Marala, le ho ya fihla Dabeshete, le ho ya fihla molatswaneng o ka botjhabela ho Jokoneame." 
Joshua19:12 Ho tloha Saride o thinyetse ka botjhabela, o yo fihla moeding wa Kiselote-Tabore, ebe o fetela Daberate, o nyolohele Jafia." 
Joshua19:13 Ho tloha moo o fetele nqa botjhabela, ho ya Gate-Hefere, le Itakasine; ebe o fetela Rimone-Metware, o yo fihla Nea." 
Joshua19:14 Ka leboya moedi o thinyetsa Hanatone, o yo fella Kgohlong ya Jifetahele." 
Joshua19:15 Metse e ne e le Katate, le Nahalole, le Shimerone, le Jidala, le Betlelehema; e le metse e leshome le metso e mmedi, le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua19:16 Ena ke naha ya bana ba Sebulone, le metse ena le metsana ya yona, ho ya ka malapa abo bona." 
Joshua19:17 Lotho la bone la tswa e le la bana ba Isakare; ke ho re bana ba Isakare ho ya ka malapa abo bona. 
Joshua19:18 Moedi wa bona o ne o fihla Jesereele, le Kesulote, le Shuneme," 
Joshua19:19 le Hafaraime, le Shione, le Anahara," 
Joshua19:20 le Rabite, le Kishione, le Ebese," 
Joshua19:21 le Remete, le Ene-Gannime, le Ene-Hada, le Bete-Pasese." 
Joshua19:22 Moedi o ne o fihla Tabore, le Shahasaime, le Bete-Shemeshe; o yo fella Jorodane. E ne e le metse e leshome le metso e tsheletseng, le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua19:23 Ena ke naha ya morabe wa bana ba Isakare, le metse le metsana ya yona, ho ya ka malapa abo bona." 
Joshua19:24 Jwale ha tswa lotho la bohlano, la bana ba morabe wa Ashere, ho ya ka malapa abo bona." 
Joshua19:25 Moedi wa bona o ne o akareleditse Helekate, le Hale, le Betene, le Akashafe," 
Joshua19:26 le Alameleke, le Amade, le Mishale. Ka bophirimela o ne o fihla Karamele le Shihore-Lebenate." 
Joshua19:27 O thinyetse ka nqa botjhabela, o lebe Bete-Dagone, o yo fihla Sebulone le Kgohlong ya Jifetahele, ka leboya ho Bete-Emeke le Neiele. O lopalle ho ya Kabule, ka ho le letshehadi." 
Joshua19:28 O ye Eberone, le Rehobe, le Hamone, le Kana, ho ya fihla Sidone e Kgolo." 
Joshua19:29 Jwale moedi o thinyetse Rama, o yo fihla motseng o haheleditsweng wa Tire; ebe o thinyetsa Hosa, o ya fella lewatleng, ho tloha Mehebele ho ya Akasibe," 
Joshua19:30 le Uma, le Afeke, le Rehobe. Metse e ne e le mashome a mabedi a metso e mmedi, le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua19:31 Ena ke yona naha ya bana ba morabe wa Ashere, le metse le metsana ya yona, ho ya ka malapa abo bona." 
Joshua19:32 Lotho la botshelela la tswa e le la bana ba morabe wa Nafthali; ke ho re ba Nafthali ho ya ka malapa abo bona. 
Joshua19:33 Moedi wa bona o ne o tloha Helefe, le sefateng se seholo sa Saananime, le Adami-Nekebe, le Jabeneele, ho ya fihla Lakume, mme o fella Jorodane." 
Joshua19:34 Ebe moedi oo o thinyetsa ka bophirimela, o yo fihla Asenote-Tabore. Ho tloha moo o ye Hukoke, o yo fihla Sebulone, ka nqa borwa; o be o yo fihla le Ashere ka bophirimela; ka nqa botjhabela o yo fihla Juda le Jorodane." 
Joshua19:35 Metse e neng e haheleditswe e ne e le Sidime, le Sere, le Hamate, le Rakate, le Kinerete," 
Joshua19:36 le Edama, le Rama, le Hasore," 
Joshua19:37 le Kedeshe, le Ederei, le Ene-Hasore," 
Joshua19:38 le Jirone, le Migedale-Ele, le Horeme, le Bete-Anate, le Bete-Shemeshe. E ne e le metse e leshome le metso e robong, le metsana ya yona." 
Joshua19:39 Ena ke yona naha ya morabe wa bana ba Nafthali, le metse le metsana ya yona, ho ya ka malapa abo bona." 
Joshua19:40 Lotho la bosupa la tswa e le la bana ba morabe wa Dane, ho ya ka malapa abo bona." 
Joshua19:41 Moedi wa bona o ne o akaretsa Sora, le Eshetaole, le Ire-Shemeshe," 
Joshua19:42 le Shaalebine, le Aiyalone, le Jitela," 
Joshua19:43 le Elone, le Timina, le Ekerone," 
Joshua19:44 le Eleteke, le Gibetone, le Baalate," 
Joshua19:45 le Jehude, le Bene-Berake, le Gate-Rimone," 
Joshua19:46 le Me-Jarekone, le Rakone, le naha e tobaneng le Jafo." 
Joshua19:47 Bana ba Dane ba ne ba haellwa ke naha ya bona, mme ba nyoloha, ba futuhela Lesheme. Ba e hapa, ba bolaya baahi ba yona ka sabole, ya eba ya bona. Ba aha ho yona, yaba Lesheme ba se ba e bitsa Dane ka ho e reella ntata bona Dane." 
Joshua19:48 Ena ke yona naha ya morabe wa bana ba Dane, le metse le metsana ya yona, ho ya ka malapa abo bona." 
Joshua19:49 Ha Baiseraele ba qetile ho aba naha eo e leng lefa, ka ho seha meedi ya yona, yaba bana ba Iseraele ba nea Joshua, mora wa Nune, naha ya hae kahara ya bona." 
Joshua19:50 Ho ya ka taelo ya Morena, ba mo nea motse oo a o kopileng, e leng Timina-Sera, e naheng e maralla ya Efraime. A tsosa motse oo, mme a aha teng." 
Joshua19:51 Ena ke naha e ileng ya ajwa ke moprista Eleasare, le Joshua mora wa Nune, le bao e leng dihlooho tsa malapa a bo-ntata bona, ba merabe ya bana ba Iseraele; ba e aba ka lotho ba le Shilo, kapele ho Morena, monyakong wa Tente ya Morena. Yaba jwale ba qetile ho aba naha." 
Joshua20:1 Morena a bua ho Joshua, a re:" 
Joshua20:2 “Bua le bana ba Iseraele, o re: Ikgetheleng metse eo ho tla tshabelwa ho yona, eo ke buileng ka yona ho lona, ka molomo wa Moshe." 
Joshua20:3 Ke moo motho ya ka bolayang motho e mong e se ka morero, a sa hlokomela, a tla tshabela teng. Metse eo e tla ba eo le tshabelang ho yona, ho baleha mophetetsi wa madi." 
Joshua20:4 “ Motho eo o tla tshabela ho o mong wa metse eo, a eme monyakong wa motse, a bolelle baholo ba motse ditaba tsa hae. Bona ba tla mo kenya ka motseng, ba mo nee sebaka, hore a phele le bona." 
Joshua20:5 Haeba mophetetsi wa madi a ka mo lelekisa, ha ba na ho neelana ka yena matsohong a mophetetsi eo, hobane mmolai o bolaile wa habo e se ka morero, mme le pele ho moo a ne a sa mo hloya." 
Joshua20:6 O tla phela motseng oo ho fihlela a emiswa kapele ho phutheho hore e mo ahlole, le ho fihlela eo e leng Moprista e Moholo nakong eo a eshwa. Jwale mmolai a ka kgutlela motseng wa habo, le tlung ya hae, moo a neng a balehe teng. ”" 
Joshua20:7 Jwale Galelea, naheng e maralla ya Nafthali ba kgetha Kedeshe; naheng e maralla ya Efraime ba kgetha Shekeme, mme naheng e maralla ya Juda ba kgetha Motse wa Areba, e leng Heborone." 
Joshua20:8 Kamose wane ho Jorodane, ka botjhabela ho Jeriko, morabeng wa Rubene, ba kgetha Besere e lehwatateng le phuleng; morabeng wa Gade ba kgetha Rama e Gileade; morabeng wa Manase ba kgetha Golane e Bashane." 
Joshua20:9 Ena ke yona metse e ileng ya kgethelwa bana bohle ba Iseraele, le bajaki ba jakileng hara bona. Ho yona ho tla balehela mang kapa mang ya ka bolayang motho e se ka morero, hore a se ke a bolawa ke mophetetsi wa madi, ho fihlela mmolai a emiswa kapele ho phutheho." 
Joshua21:1 Dihlooho tsa malapa a Balevi tsa tla ho moprista Eleasare, le ho Joshua mora wa Nune, le dihlooho tsa merabe ya bana ba Iseraele." 
Joshua21:2 Tsa bua le bona ba le Shilo, naheng ya Kanana, tsa re: “Morena o ile a laela ka molomo wa Moshe, hore re newe metse eo re tla phela ho yona, le makgulo a yona, moo dikgomo tsa rona di tla fula teng.”" 
Joshua21:3 Ho ya ka taelo ya Morena, bana ba Iseraele ba nea Balevi metse ena e naheng ya bona, mmoho le makgulo a yona." 
Joshua21:4 Lotho la malapa a Kohate la tswa. Bana ba moprista Arone, e leng Balevi, ba abelwa ka lotho metse e leshome le metso e meraro, e tswang ho ba morabe wa Juda, le ho ba morabe wa Simeone, le ho ba morabe wa Benjamine." 
Joshua21:5 Bana ba Kohate ba setseng ba abelwa ka lotho metse e leshome, e tswang malapeng a morabe wa Efraime, le a morabe wa Dane, le a karolo e nngwe ya morabe wa Manase." 
Joshua21:6 Naheng ya Bashane bana ba Gereshone ba abelwa ka lotho metse e leshome le metso e meraro, e tswang malapeng a morabe wa Isakare, le a morabe wa Ashere, le a morabe wa Nafthali, le a karolo e nngwe ya morabe wa Manase." 
Joshua21:7 Bana ba Merari, ho ya ka malapa abo bona, ba abelwa metse e leshome le metso e mmedi, e tswang ho ba morabe wa Rubene, le ho ba morabe wa Gade, le ho ba morabe wa Sebulone." 
Joshua21:8 Bana ba Iseraele ba abela Balevi metse ena le makgulo a yona ka lotho, jwalokaha Morena a ne a laetse ka molomo wa Moshe." 
Joshua21:9 Metseng ya morabe wa bana ba Juda, le metseng ya morabe wa bana ba Simeone, Balevi ba abelwa metse ena, e bolelwang ka mabitso." 
Joshua21:10 E ne e le ditloholo tsa Arone, tsa malapa a Kohate, tseo e neng e le bana ba Levi, hobane lotho la pele e ne e le la bona." 
Joshua21:11 Ba ba nea Motse wa Areba o naheng e maralla ya Juda, e leng Heborone, le makgulo a yona a e potapotileng. Areba e ne e le ntata Anake." 
Joshua21:12 Empa masimo a motse oo, le metsana ya wona, wona ba a abela Kalebe, mora wa Jefune, hore e be a hae." 
Joshua21:13 Bara ba moprista Arone ba newa motse wa Heborone, oo babolai ba tshabelang ho wona, hore e be wa bona hammoho le makgulo a wona, le motse wa Lebena le makgulo a wona, le motse wa Lebena le makgulo a wona," 
Joshua21:14 le Jatire le makgulo a yona, le Eshetemoa le makgulo a yona," 
Joshua21:15 le Holone le makgulo a yona, le Debiri le magkulo a yona," 
Joshua21:16 le Aine le makgulo a yona, le Juta le makgulo a yona, le Bete-Shemeshe le makgulo a yona. Ya eba metse e robong, e tswang merabeng eo e mmedi." 
Joshua21:17 Naheng ya morabe wa Benjamine ya eba Gibeone le makgulo a yona, le Geba le makgulo a yona," 
Joshua21:18 le Anatote le makgulo a yona, le Alamone le makgulo a yona. Ya eba metse e mene." 
Joshua21:19 Metse yohle ya bana ba Arone, e leng baprista, e ne e le metse e leshome le metso e meraro le makgulo a yona." 
Joshua21:20 Malapa a bana ba Kohate, e leng Balevi, ke ho re bana ba bang ba Kohate, metse eo a ileng a e abelwa ka lotho e ne e etswa morabeng wa Efraime." 
Joshua21:21 Ba ba abela motse oo babolai ba tshabelang ho wona, e leng Shekeme e naheng e maralla ya Efraime, le makgulo a yona, le Gesere le makgulo a yona," 
Joshua21:22 le Kibesaime le makgulo a yona, le Bete-Horone le makgulo a yona. Ya eba metse e mene." 
Joshua21:23 Naheng ya morabe wa Dane ba abelwa Eleteke le makgulo a yona, le Gibetone le makgulo a yona," 
Joshua21:24 le Aiyalone le makgulo a yona, le Gade-Rimone le makgulo a yona. Ya eba metse e mene." 
Joshua21:25 Naheng ya karolo e nngwe ya morabe wa Manase ba abelwa Taanake le makgulo a yona, le Gade-Rimone le makgulo a yona. Ya eba metse e mmedi." 
Joshua21:26 Metse yohle e ileng ya abelwa malapa a bana ba bang ba Kohate e ne e le metse e leshome le makgulo a yona. 
Joshua21:27 Naheng ya karolo e nngwe ya morabe wa Manase bana ba Gereshone, ba malapa a Balevi, ba abelwa motse oo babolai ba tshabelang ho wona, e leng Golane e Bashane le makgulo a yona, le Beshetera le makgulo a yona. Ya eba metse e mmedi." 
Joshua21:28 Naheng ya morabe wa Isakare ba abelwa Kishione le makgulo a yona, le Daberate le makgulo a yona," 
Joshua21:29 le Jaremute le makgulo a yona, le Ene-Gannime le makgulo a yona. Ya eba metse e mene." 
Joshua21:30 Naheng ya morabe wa Ashere ba abelwa Mishale le makgulo a yona, le Abadone le makgulo a yona," 
Joshua21:31 le Helekate le makgulo a yona, le Rehobe le makgulo a yona. Ya eba metse e mene." 
Joshua21:32 Naheng ya morabe wa Nafthali ba abelwa motse oo babolai ba tshabelang ho wona, e leng Kedeshe e Galelea, le makgulo a yona, le Hamote-Dore le makgulo a yona, le Karatane le makgulo a yona. Ya eba metse e meraro." 
Joshua21:33 Metse yohle ya morabe wa Gereshone, ho ya ka malapa abo bona, e ne e le leshome le metso e meraro hammoho le makgulo a yona." 
Joshua21:34 Naheng ya morabe wa Sebulone, malapa a bana ba Merari, e leng a mang a Balevi, a abelwa Jokoneame le makgulo a yona, le Karata le makgulo a yona," 
Joshua21:35 le Dimena le makgulo a yona, le Nahalole le makgulo a yona. Ya eba metse e mene." 
Joshua21:36 Kamose ho Jorodane, naheng ya morabe wa Rubene, ba abelwa motse oo babolai ba tshabelang ho wona, e leng Besere e lehwatateng le hodima sehlaba le makgulo a yona, le Jahase le makgulo a yona," 
Joshua21:37 le Kedemote le makgulo a yona, le Mefaata le makgulo a yona. Ya eba metse e mene." 
Joshua21:38 Naheng ya morabe wa Gade ba abelwa motse oo babolai ba tshabelang ho wona, e leng Rama e Gileade, le makgulo a yona, le Mahanaime le makgulo a yona," 
Joshua21:39 le Heshebone le makgulo a yona, le Jasere le makgulo a yona. Metse eo kaofela ya eba e mene." 
Joshua21:40 Metse ena yohle e ne e le ya bana ba Merari, ho ya ka malapa abo bona, e leng ba bang ba malapa a Balevi. Metse eo ba ileng ba e abelwa ka lotho ya eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
Joshua21:41 Metse yohle ya Balevi, e neng e le kahara naha ya bana ba Iseraele, e ne e le metse e mashome a mane a metso e robedi, le makgulo a yona." 
Joshua21:42 Motse o mong le o mong wa metse ena o ne o ena le makgulo a wona a o potapotileng, mme ho ne ho le jwalo metseng ena yohle." 
Joshua21:43 Morena a nea Baiseraele naha yohle eo a neng a hlapanye hore o tla e nea bo-ntata bona, mme ya eba ya bona, ba aha ho yona." 
Joshua21:44 Morena a ba nea phomolo hohle, ho ya ka tsohle tseo a neng a di hlapanyetse bo-ntata bona, mme ha se ke ha eba le ya mong wa dira tsa bona ya emang kapele ho bona. Morena a neelana ka dira tsa bona matsohong a bona." 
Joshua21:45 Ha se ke ha haella letho la tse molemo, tseo Morena a neng a buile ka tsona ho ba ntlo ya Iseraele. Tsohle tsa phethahala." 
Joshua22:1 Joshua a bitsa ba morabe wa Rubene, le ba morabe wa Gade, le ba karolo e nngwe ya morabe wa Manase," 
Joshua22:2 a re ho bona: “Le bolokile tsohle tseo Moshe, mohlanka wa Morena, a le laetseng tsona; le nna le mametse lentswe la ka dinthong tsohle tseo ke le laetseng tsona." 
Joshua22:3 Ka nako e telele ena, ho fihlela kajeno, ha le eso lahle bana babo lona, empa le bolokile taelo ya Morena Modimo wa lona." 
Joshua22:4 Morena Modimo wa lona, o phomoditse bana babo lona jwalokaha a ne a ba tshepise; ka baka leo, kgutlang, le boele ditenteng tsa lona mose ho Jorodane, naheng ya lona, eo Moshe mohlanka wa Morena, a neng a le nee yona." 
Joshua22:5 Feela le ele hloko, le boloke taelo le molao oo Moshe mohlanka wa Morena, a le laetseng wona: Le rate Morena Modimo wa lona, le tsamaye ditseleng tsohle tsa hae, le boloke melao ya hae, le mo kgomarele, le mo sebeletse ka dipelo tsa lona tsohle, le ka moya wa lona wohle.”" 
Joshua22:6 Yaba Joshua o a ba hlohonolofatsa, o a ba qhala, mme ba ikela ditenteng tsa bona." 
Joshua22:7 Moshe o ne a ile a nea karolo e nngwe ya morabe wa Manase naha, Bashane; Joshua yena a nea karolo e nngwe ya bona naha hara bana babo bona, mose ho Jorodane, ka bophirimela. Le bona, ha Joshua a ba qhala hore ba boele ditenteng tsa bona, a ba hlohonolofatsa." 
Joshua22:8 A bua le bona, a re: “Le boela ditenteng tsa lona le ena le leruo le lengata, le diphoofolo tse ngata, le silefera, le kgauta, le lethose, le tshepe, le diaparo tse ngata. Arolelang bana babo lona tseo le di hapileng ho dira tsa lona.”" 
Joshua22:9 Bana ba Rubene, le bana ba Gade, le ba karolo e nngwe ya morabe wa Manase, ba tloha ho bana ba Iseraele, Shilo, e naheng ya Kanana, ba ya naheng ya bona ya Gileade, eo ba neng ba e newe ke Moshe ka taelo ya Morena." 
Joshua22:10 Ha ba fihla seterekeng sa Jorodane, se naheng ya Kanana, bana ba Rubene, le bana ba Gade, le ba karolo e nngwe ya morabe wa Manase, ba haha aletare e kgolo moo, hodima lebopo la Jorodane." 
Joshua22:11 Bana ba bang ba Iseraele ba utlwa ho thwe: “Helang! bana ba Rubene, le bana ba Gade, le ba karolo e nngwe ya morabe wa Manase, ba hahile aletare Gelelote, seterekeng sa Jorodane, lehlakoreng le ka ho bana ba Iseraele.”" 
Joshua22:12 Ha bana ba bang ba Iseraele ba utlwa taba ena setjhaba sohle sa bana ba Iseraele sa phuthehela Shilo, ho ba futuhela." 
Joshua22:13 Bana ba Iseraele ba roma Finease, mora wa moprista Eleasare, ho bana ba Rubene, le ho bana ba Gade, le ho ba karolo e nngwe ya morabe wa Manase, ba le Gileade." 
Joshua22:14 Ba mo roma le mahosana a leshome, kgosana e nngwe le e nngwe e le ya lelapa ka leng la malapa wohle a Iseraele, mme kgosana e nngwe le e nngwe e le hlooho ya lelapa labo yona hara merabe ya Iseraele." 
Joshua22:15 Ba fihla Gileade ho bana ba Rubene, le ho bana ba Gade, le ho ba karolo e nngwe ya morabe wa Manase, ba bua le bona, ba re:" 
Joshua22:16 “Setjhaba sohle sa Morena se bua tjena: Bohlabaphiyo boo ke bo jwang, boo le bo etseditseng Modimo wa Iseraele, ha e le moo kajeno le tlohetse ho latela Morena, ka ho ikgahela aletare, hore le fetohele Morena kajeno?" 
Joshua22:17 Ebe le bona bokgopo bo entsweng ha re le Peore, boo le kajeno re eso itlose sesila sa bona, bo sa lekana, leha setjhaba sa Morena se ne se welwe ke sewa," 
Joshua22:18 hoo kajeno le ka fetohelang Morena? Ha e le mona kajeno le fetohela Morena, ho tla etsahala hore hosasane a halefele setjhaba sohle sa Iseraele." 
Joshua22:19 Jwale he, haeba naha eo e leng ya lona e silafetse, tshelelang ka naheng eo e leng ya Morena, moo Tente ya Morena e leng teng, mme lona le ahe hara rona. Empa le se ke la fetohela Morena, kapa le rona la re fetohela, ka ho ikgahela aletare esele ho aletare ya Morena Modimo wa rona." 
Joshua22:20 Kapa le se le lebetse hore Akane, mora wa Sera, o ne a etse tshito ka ho nka dintho tse neng di rohakilwe, yaba Morena o halefela setjhaba sohle sa Iseraele? Bokgopo bono ba hae ha bo a ka ba timetsa yena a le mong feela! ”" 
Joshua22:21 Bana ba Rubene, le bana ba Gade, le ba karolo e nngwe ya morabe wa Manase, ba araba dihlooho tsa merabe ya Iseraele, ba re:" 
Joshua22:22 “Morena Modimo wa medimo! Morena Modimo wa medimo! Modimo o a tseba, le lona Baiseraele le tsebe! Haeba hona ke bofetohedi kapa bohlabaphiyo, re timetswe hona kajeno!" 
Joshua22:23 Haeba re ikgahetse aletare hore re tlohele ho latela Morena, kapa ho nyehella hodima yona ka nyehelo ya setjheso, kapa ka nyehelo ya dijo, kapa ho nyehella ho yona ka dinyehelo tsa teboho, Morena a re ahlole ka boyena." 
Joshua22:24 “Re entse hona hobane re ne re tshaba hore ka nako e tlang bana ba lona ba tla re ho bana ba rona: Le kopana ka eng le Morena Modimo wa Iseraele? 
Joshua22:25 Pakeng tsa rona le lona, lona bana ba Rubene, le lona bana ba Gade, Morena o entse hore Jorodane e be moedi. Lona ha le na kabelo ya letho ho Morena! Ke moo bana ba lona ba tla etsa hore bana ba rona ba se ke ba hlola ba tshaba Morena." 
Joshua22:26 “Ka baka leo, re ile ra re: A re haheng aletare, feela e se be eo ho etsetswang nyehelo ya setjheso, kapa ya sehlabelo hodima yona," 
Joshua22:27 empa e be paki e pakeng tsa rona le lona, le pakeng tsa ditloholo tsa rona, hore le rona re tla etsetsa Morena tshebeletso moo a leng teng, ka dinyehelo tsa rona tsa setjheso, le ka mahlabelo a rona, le ka dinyehelo tsa rona tsa teboho; esere ka nako e tlang bana ba lona ba re ho bana ba rona: “Ha le na kabelo ya letho ho Morena!”" 
Joshua22:28 “ Ka baka leo, re ile ra re etlare ka nako e tlang, ha ba bua jwalo ho rona kapa ho bana ba rona, ebe re re: “Bonang moaho ona wa aletare ya Morena, e tshwanang le eo bo-ntata rona ba e hahileng, ba sa e hahe e le e etsetsang nyehelo ya setjheso, kapa ya sehlabelo, e mpa e le paki e pakeng tsa rona le lona.”" 
Joshua22:29 “ Re thoko haholo le ho fetohela Morena, lehore kajeno re mo furalle, re se ke ra mo latela ka ho haha aletare eo ho yona ho etsetswang nyehelo ya setjheso, le nyehelo ya dijo, kapa ya sehlabelo, e le e kathoko ho aletare ya Morena Modimo wa rona, e kapele ho Tente ya hae. ”" 
Joshua22:30 Yare ha bo-moprista Finease, le mahosana a setjhaba, le dihlooho tsa merabe ya Iseraele, ba utlwa mantswe a builweng ke bana ba Rubene, le bana ba Gade, le bana ba karolo e nngwe ya Manase, ba kgotsofala." 
Joshua22:31 Finease, mora wa moprista Eleasare, a re ho bana ba Rubene, le ho bana ba Gade, le ho ba karolo e nngwe ya morabe wa Manase: “Kajeno re a tseba hore Morena o teng kahara rona, hobane ha le a etsetsa Morena bohlabaphiyo bona; le pholositse bana ba Iseraele matsohong a Morena.”" 
Joshua22:32 Jwale bo-Finease, mora wa moprista Eleasare, le mahosana, ba tloha ho bana ba Rubene, le ho bana ba Gade, ba tswa naheng ya Gileade, ba kgutlela naheng ya Kanana ho bana ba Iseraele, ba fihla ba ba phetela ditaba." 
Joshua22:33 Tsena tsa kgotsofatsa bana ba Iseraele, mme bana ba Iseraele ba boka Modimo. Ba kgaotsa ho bua ka ho ba futuhela, le ho ripitla naha eo bana ba Rubene, le bana ba Gade ba neng ba ahile ho yona." 
Joshua22:34 Bana ba Rubene le bana ba Gade ba rea aletare eo lebitso la “Paki”, hobane ba ne ba re: “Ena ke paki ho rona bohle hore Morena ke Modimo.”" 
Joshua23:1 Ha ho se ho fetile nako e telele Morena a phomoditse Baiseraele dintweng tsa bona le ho dira tsohle tsa bona tse neng di ba potapotile, Joshua a nna a tsofala, dilemo tsa hae tsa nna tsa ya." 
Joshua23:2 Ke ha Joshua a phutha Baiseraele bohle, le baholo ba bona, le dihlooho tsa bona, le baahlodi ba bona, le balaodi ba bona, mme a re ho bona: “Ke se ke tsofetse, le dilemo tsa ka di se di ile." 
Joshua23:3 Le bone tsohle tseo Morena Modimo wa lona, a di entseng ho ditjhaba tsena tsohle, ka baka la lona. Morena Modimo wa lona, ke yena ya le lwanetseng." 
Joshua23:4 Ke le abetse naha ya ditjhaba tsena tse sa ntsaneng di setse, le ya ditjhaba tsohle tseo ke di ripitlileng ho tloha Jorodane, ho ya fihla Lewatleng le Leholo, nqa bophirimela, hore e be lefa la lona." 
Joshua23:5 Morena Modimo wa lona, ke yena ya tla di leleka, a di falatse kapele ho lona, mme naha ya tsona e be ya lona, jwalokaha Morena Modimo wa lona, a le tshepisitse." 
Joshua23:6 “Ka baka leo, tiyang, le boloke, mme le phethe tsohle tse ngotsweng Bukeng ya Molao wa Moshe; le se ke la o kgeloha jwang kapa jwang." 
Joshua23:7 Le se ke la kopakopana le ditjhaba tsena tse setseng hara lona; le se ke la bua le ka mabitso a medimo ya tsona, kapa la hlapanya ka yona, kapa la e sebeletsa, kapa la e kgumamela." 
Joshua23:8 Le kgomarele Morena Modimo wa lona, jwalokaha le entse ho fihlela kajeno." 
Joshua23:9 “Morena o faladitse ditjhaba tse kgolo, tse matla, kapele ho lona, mme ha ho ya kileng a ema kapele ho lona ho fihlela kajeno." 
Joshua23:10 Monna a le mong wa lona o lelekile batho ba sekete, hobane Morena Modimo wa lona, ke yena ya le lwanetseng, jwalokaha a ne a le tshepise." 
Joshua23:11 Ka baka leo, itlhokomeleng, le rate Morena Modimo wa lona." 
Joshua23:12 “Haeba le ka kweneha, la kgomarelana le masalla a ditjhaba tsena a setseng hara lona, la nyallana le wona, la kopakopana le wona," 
Joshua23:13 le hle le tsebe hore Morena Modimo wa lona, a ke ke a hlola a falatsa ditjhaba tsena kapele ho lona. Ditjhaba tseo e tla ba leraba le sefi ho lona, le phafa dikgopong tsa lona, le meutlwa ka mahlong a lona, ho fihlela le timela naheng ena e ntle, eo Morena Modimo wa lona, a le neileng yona." 
Joshua23:14 “Bonang, kajeno le nna ke ya boyabatho. Botebong ba dipelo tsa lona, le maikutlong a lona, le tseba hantle hore ha ho ntho le e nngwe ya dintho tsohle tse molemo, tseo Morena Modimo wa lona, a le tshepisitseng tsona, e sa kang ya phethahala. Tsohle di phethahetse, ha ho le e nngwe e sa kang ya phethahala." 
Joshua23:15 Jwalokaha dintho tsohle tse molemo, tseo Morena Modimo wa lona, a neng a le tshepisitse tsona, di ile tsa phethahala, ka mokgwa o jwalo Morena o tla le tlisetsa tsohle tse mpe, ho fihlela a le timetsa naheng ena e ntle, eo Morena Modimo wa lona, a le neileng yona." 
Joshua23:16 Haeba le roba selekane sa Morena Modimo wa lona, seo a le laetseng sona, eba le a tsamaya le ilo sebeletsa medimo e meng, le a e kgumamela, bohale ba Morena bo tla le tlokomela, mme le tla timela ka ho panya ha ntshi naheng ena e ntle, eo a le neileng yona.”" 
Joshua24:1 Joshua a memela merabe yohle ya Iseraele, Shekeme. A bitsa baholo ba Baiseraele, le dihlooho tsa bona, le baahlodi ba bona, le balaodi ba bona. Ba itlhahisa kapele ho Morena." 
Joshua24:2 Joshua a re ho setjhaba sohle: “Morena Modimo wa Iseraele, o bua tjena: Mehleng ya kgalekgale, bo-ntata lona, e leng Tera, ntata Aborahama, le ntata Nakore, ba ne ba ahile mose wane ho Noka, mme ba sebeletsa medimo e meng." 
Joshua24:3 Ka nka ntata lona Aborahama mose wane wa Noka, ka mo tsamaisa hara naha yohle ya Kanana. Ka ngatafatsa bana ba hae, ka mo nea Isaka." 
Joshua24:4 Isaka ka mo nea Jakobo le Esau; Esau ka mo nea naha e maralla ya Seire hore e be ya hae. Jakobo yena, le bana ba hae, a theohela Egepeta." 
Joshua24:5 “ Hamorao ka romela Moshe le Arone, mme ka otla Egepeta ka diwa tseo ke ileng ka di etsa hara yona. Hamorao ka le ntsha moo." 
Joshua24:6 Ka ntsha bo-ntata lona Egepeta, mme ba fihla lewatleng. Baegepeta ba phaladisa bo-ntata lona ka dikariki tsa ntwa, le ka dipere ho ya fihla Lewatleng la Lehlaka." 
Joshua24:7 Ke ha bo-ntata lona ba ipiletsa ho Morena, mme yena a hlahisa lefifi pakeng tsa lona le Baegepeta. A phuthumanya lewatle hodima Baegepeta, a ba pupetsa ka lona, mme le bone seo ke se entseng Baegepeta. La phela lehwatateng ka nako e telele." 
Joshua24:8 “ Yaba ke le tlisa naheng ya Baamore ba neng ba phela mose wane ho Jorodane. Ba le lwantsha, empa ka neelana ka bona matsohong a lona. Naha ya bona ya eba ya lona, mme ka ba timetsa kapele ho lona." 
Joshua24:9 Jwale ha hlaha Balake, mora wa Sipore, kgosi ya Moabe, le yena a lwantsha Baiseraele. A romela maqosa ho Bileame, mora wa Beore, hore a le rohake." 
Joshua24:10 Empa ka se ke ka rata ho mamela Bileame, ka baka leo, a ba a le hlohonolofatsa. Kahoo ka le lopolla matsohong a hae." 
Joshua24:11 “ La tshela Jorodane, la fihla Jeriko. Banna ba Jeriko, le Baamore, le Baperise, le Bakanana, le Bahete, le Bagirigashe, le Bahife, le Bajebuse, ba le lwantsha, empa ka neelana ka bona matsohong a lona." 
Joshua24:12 Ka eteletsa bobi kapele, mme ba ba leleka kapele ho lona. Ba leleka le dikgosi tse pedi tsa Baamore; e seng ka sabole ya hao, kapa ka seqha sa hao." 
Joshua24:13 Yaba ke le nea naha eo le sa e sebeletsang, le metse eo le sa e hahang, mme la aha ho yona. La ja le ditholwana tsa masimo a morara le tsa masimo a mohlwaare, ao le sa kang la a lema." 
Joshua24:14 “Ka baka leo he, tshabang Morena, le mo sebeletse ka botshepehi le ka nnete, le furalle medimo eo bo-ntata lona ba neng ba e sebeletsa ha ba le mose wane ho Noka, leha ba le Egepeta, mme lona le sebeletse Morena." 
Joshua24:15 Haeba le bona hore ke ntho e mpe ho sebeletsa Morena, ikgetheleng hona kajeno hore na le tla sebeletsa mang: E ka ba medimo eo bo-ntata lona ba neng ba e sebeletsa ha ba le mose wane ho Noka, kapa medimo ya Baamore, bao le ahileng naheng ya bona. Empa ha e le nna le ba lelapa la ka re tla sebeletsa Morena.”" 
Joshua24:16 Setjhaba sa araba, sa re: “Le kgale! ha re ka ke ra furalla Morena, ra sebeletsa medimo esele," 
Joshua24:17 hobane Morena Modimo wa rona, ke yena ya re nyolotseng le bo-ntata rona Egepeta, moo re neng re le makgoba teng. Ke yena ya entseng dipontsho tse kgolo, a re baballa tseleng yohle eo re e tsamaileng, le hara ditjhaba tsohle tseo re fetileng hara tsona." 
Joshua24:18 Morena ke yena ya ileng a falatsa ditjhaba tsohle tse neng di le kapele ho rona, le Baamore ba neng ba ahile naheng ena. Ka baka leo, le rona re tla sebeletsa Morena, hobane ke yena Modimo wa rona.”" 
Joshua24:19 Joshua a re ho setjhaba: “Le ke ke la sebeletsa Morena, hobane ke Modimo ya halalelang, ke Modimo ya boulelang. A ke ke a le tshwarela ditshito tsa lona, kapa dibe tsa lona." 
Joshua24:20 Haeba le ka furalla Morena, la sebeletsa medimo esele, o tla le fetohela, a le etse hampe, a le timetse, le hoja a kile a le etsa hantle.”" 
Joshua24:21 Setjhaba sa re ho Joshua: “Tjhe, re tla sebeletsa Morena.”" 
Joshua24:22 Joshua a boela a re ho setjhaba: “Lona, ka bolona, le a ipakela hore le ikgethetse ho sebeletsa Morena!” Sa re: “E, re dipaki!”" 
Joshua24:23 Joshua a re: “Ha ho le jwalo, furallang medimo esele, e teng hara lona, mme le lebise dipelo tsa lona ho Morena Modimo wa Iseraele.”" 
Joshua24:24 Setjhaba sa re ho Joshua: “Re tla sebeletsa Morena Modimo wa rona, mme re tla mamela lentswe la hae.”" 
Joshua24:25 Ka lona letsatsi leo Joshua a etsa selekane le setjhaba, a se beela molao le taelo a le Shekeme." 
Joshua24:26 Joshua a ngola mantswe ana Bukeng ya Molao wa Modimo. A nka lejwe le leholo, a le hloma moo, tlasa sefate sa eike, se neng se le haufi le Sehalalelo sa Morena." 
Joshua24:27 Yaba Joshua o re ho setjhaba sohle: “Bonang, lejwe lena e tla ba paki e tla re tswa, hobane le utlwile dipolelo tsohle tsa Morena, tseo a di buileng ho rona. Ka baka leo, ke paki e tla le tswa, haeba le ka latola Modimo wa lona.”" 
Joshua24:28 Yaba Joshua o qhala setjhaba, mme motho ka mong a kgutlela ha hae." 
Joshua24:29 Kamora tsena Joshua, mora wa Nune, mohlanka wa Morena, a shwa a le dilemo tse lekgolo le leshome." 
Joshua24:30 Ba mo epela naheng eo a e jeleng lefa, Timina-Sera, e naheng e maralla ya Efraime, ka leboya ho thaba ya Gaashe." 
Joshua24:31 Baiseraele ba sebeletsa Morena ka matsatsi wohle a bophelo ba Joshua, le ka matsatsi wohle a ho phela ha baholo ba ileng ba nna ba phela kamora lefu la Joshua, ba neng ba tseba mesebetsi yohle ya Morena, eo a neng a e etseditse Baiseraele." 
Joshua24:32 Masapo a Josefa, ao bana ba Iseraele ba neng ba ile ba nyoloha le wona Egepeta, ba a epela Shekeme, seratswaneng seo Jakobo a neng a ile a se reka ho bana ba Hamore, ntata Shekeme, ka ditjhelete tse lekgolo tsa silefera, mme ya eba lefa la bana ba Josefa." 
Joshua24:33 Le Eleasare, mora wa Arone, a shwa. Ba mo epela Gibea, motseng wa mora wa hae Finease, oo a neng a o newe, o naheng e maralla ya Efraime." 
Judges1:1 Hoba Joshua a shwe, bana ba Iseraele ba botsa Morena, ba re: “Ke mang ho rona ya tla futuhela Bakanana pele, a ba lwantshe?”" 
Judges1:1 Hoba Joshua a shwe, bana ba Iseraele ba botsa Morena, ba re: “Ke mang ho rona ya tla futuhela Bakanana pele, a ba lwantshe?”" 
Judges1:2 Morena a re: “Ke ba morabe wa Juda ba tla futuha pele. Bonang, ke neelane ka naha ena matsohong a bona.”" 
Judges1:3 Ba morabe wa Juda ba re ho bana babo bona, e leng ba morabe wa Simeone: “Nyolohelang le rona naheng eo re e abetsweng, re tle re lwantsheng Bakanana, mme le rona re tla ya le lona naheng eo le e abetsweng.” Ba morabe wa Simeone ba tsamaya le bona." 
Judges1:4 Ba morabe wa Juda ba nyoloha, mme Morena a neelana ka Bakanana le Baperise matsohong a bona. Ba bolaya banna ba bona ba dikete tse leshome motseng wa Beseke." 
Judges1:5 Ba fumana Adoni-Beseke a le Beseke, ba mo lwantsha, ba hlola Bakanana le Baperise." 
Judges1:6 Empa Adoni-Beseke a baleha. Ba mo phaladisa, ba mo tshwara, ba mo kgaola menwana e metona ya matsoho le ya maoto." 
Judges1:7 Yaba Adoni-Beseke o re: “Dikgosi tse mashome a supileng, tseo ke neng ke di kgaole menwana e metona ya matsoho le ya maoto, di ne di ye di thonake makumane tlasa tafole ya ka. Jwalokaha le nna ke ile ka etsa, Modimo o nketsa jwalo.” Ba mo isa Jerusalema, mme a shwela hona teng." 
Judges1:8 Bana ba Juda ba futuhela Jerusalema, ba e hapa, ba bolaya baahi ba yona ka sabole, ba tjhesa motse ka mollo." 
Judges1:9 Kamora moo, bana ba Juda ba theoha ho ya lwantsha Bakanana, e leng baahi ba naha e maralla, le ya Negebe, le e diphuleng." 
Judges1:10 Jwale ba morabe wa Juda ba futuhela Bakanana ba neng ba ahile Heborone. Pele ho mona, lebitso la Heborone e ne e le Motse wa Areba. Ba hlola Sheshai, le Ahimane, le Talamai." 
Judges1:11 Ho tloha moo ba futuhela baahi ba Debiri. Pele ho mona lebitso la Debiri e ne e le Kiriate-Sefere. 
Judges1:12 Yaba Kalebe o re: “Ya ka futuhelang Kiriate-Sefere, a e hapa, ke tla mo nea moradi wa ka Akasa, hore e be mosadi wa hae.”" 
Judges1:13 Jwale Oteniele, mora wa Kenase, moena Kalebe, a e hapa, mme Kalebe a mo nea moradi wa hae Akasa, hore e be mosadi wa hae." 
Judges1:14 Yare ha Akasa a fihla ho Oteniele, a mo pheella hore a kope mohwe wa hae, a ke a mo qothele naha. Ha Akasa a tholoha tonki ya hae, Kalebe a re ho yena: “O batlang?”" 
Judges1:15 Akasa a re ho yena: “Ako mphe mpho e nngwe hape. Erekaha o nneile naha ya Negebe, ako nnee le didiba.” Kalebe a mo nea didiba tse hodimo le didiba tse tlase." 
Judges1:16 Bana ba mohwe wa Moshe, eo e leng Mokene, ba nyoloha le banna ba Juda ho tloha motseng wa dipalema, ho ya lefeelleng la Juda le ka borwa ho Arada. Ba ya, ba aha le setjhaba seo." 
Judges1:17 Ba morabe wa Juda ba tsamaya le bana babo bona, e leng ba morabe wa Simeone, ba hlola Bakanana, e leng baahi ba Sefate, ba ba timetsa ho hang. Motse oo ba o rea lebitso la Horema." 
Judges1:18 Ba morabe wa Juda ba hapa le motse wa Gasa mmoho le naha ya wona, le motse wa Ashekelone mmoho le naha ya wona, le motse wa Ekerone mmoho le naha ya wona." 
Judges1:19 Morena a nna a ba le ba morabe wa Juda, ba leleka baahi ba naha e maralla, empa ba se ke ba leleka baahi ba ka kgohlong, hobane ba ne ba ena le dikariki tsa ntwa tse entsweng ka tshepe." 
Judges1:20 Ba nea Kalebe motse wa Heborone, jwalokaha Moshe a ne a buile, mme yena a leleka bara ba bararo ba Anake." 
Judges1:21 Bana ba Benjamine ba se ke ba leleka Bajebuse bao e neng e le baahi ba Jerusalema, empa Bajebuse ba aha hara bana ba Benjamine ho fihlela kajeno-ya-bokajeno." 
Judges1:22 Ba ntlo ya Josefa le bona ba futuhela motse wa Bethele, mme Morena a nna a ba le bona." 
Judges1:23 Ba ntlo ya Josefa ba romela dihlwela ho ya hlwela motse wa Bethele. Pele lebitso la motse ona e ne e le Lose. 
Judges1:24 Dihlwela tsa bona monna a etswa motseng, mme tsa re ho yena: “Ako re bontshe tsela e kenang ka motseng, re tla o hauhela.”" 
Judges1:25 Monna eo a di bontsha tsela e kenang ka motseng, tsa kena, tsa bolaya baahi ba motse oo ka sabole, empa ha e le monna eo le ba lelapa la hae tsa mo tlohela a ikela." 
Judges1:26 Monna eo a ya naheng ya Bahete, a haha motse, a o bitsa Lose, mme leo ke lebitso la wona ho fihlela kajeno-ya-bokajeno." 
Judges1:27 Ba morabe wa Manase ba se ke ba leleka baahi ba Bete-Sheane le ba metsana ya yona, le ba Taanake le ba metsana ya yona, le ba Dore le ba metsana ya yona, le ba Jibeleame le ba metsana ya yona, le ba Megido le ba metsana ya yona. Bakanana ba tsitlella ho aha naheng eo." 
Judges1:28 Empa yare ha Baiseraele ba se ba matlafetse, ba fetola Bakanana makgoba, feela ba se ke ba ba leleka ho hang." 
Judges1:29 Ba morabe wa Efraime le bona ba se ke ba leleka Bakanana ba neng ba ahile Gesere, mme Bakanana bao ba nna ba aha hara bona, Gesere." 
Judges1:30 Ba morabe wa Sebulone ba se ke ba leleka baahi ba Kiterone, le baahi ba Nahalole. Bakanana ba aha hara bona, mme ya eba makgoba." 
Judges1:31 Ba morabe wa Ashere le bona ba se ke ba leleka baahi ba Ako, le baahi ba Sidone, le ba Ahalaba, le ba Akasibe, le ba Heleba, le ba Afike, le ba Rehobe." 
Judges1:32 Baashere ba aha hara Bakanana, e leng baahi ba naha, hobane ha ba a ka ba ba leleka." 
Judges1:33 Ba morabe wa Nafthali le bona ba se ke ba leleka baahi ba Bete-Shemeshe, le baahi ba Bete-Anate; ba aha hara Bakanana, e leng baahi ba naha. Baahi ba Bete-Shemeshe le baahi ba Bete-Anate ya eba makgoba a bona." 
Judges1:34 Baamore ba sutuletsa bana ba Dane naheng e maralla, ba ba hanela ho theohela kgohlong." 
Judges1:35 Baamore ba tsitlella ho aha thabeng ya Herese, le Aiyalone le Shaalebime, empa ba ntlo ya Josefa ba ba hlola, mme ya eba makgoba a bona." 
Judges1:36 Moedi wa Baamore o ne o tloha moepeng wa Akarabime, o tloha Sela, o nyolosa." 
Judges2:1 Jwale lengeloi la Morena la fihla Bokime, le etswa Gilegale. La fihla ho Baiseraele, la re: “Ke le nyolotse Egepeta, ke le tlisitse naheng ena eo ke neng ke e hlapanyetse bo-ntata lona, ka re: Nke ke ka roba selekane sa ka le lona le ka mohla." 
Judges2:2 Feela lona le se ke la etsa selekane le baahi ba naha ena, le heletse dialetare tsa bona. Empa ha le a ka la mamela lentswe la ka. Jwale le entse eng?" 
Judges2:3 Ka baka leo, ke re: Nke ke ka ba leleka kapele ho lona; e tla ba leraba ho lona, medimo ya bona e be sefi ho lona. ”" 
Judges2:4 Hoba lengeloi la Morena le bue mantswe ana ho bana bohle ba Iseraele, setjhaba sa bokolla haholo." 
Judges2:5 Sebaka seo ba se rea lebitso la Bokime, ba etsetsa Morena mahlabelo hona moo." 
Judges2:6 Ha Joshua a se a qhadile setjhaba, motho e mong le e mong wa bana ba Iseraele a boela naheng eo a e jeleng lefa, a dula ho yona." 
Judges2:6 Ha Joshua a se a qhadile setjhaba, motho e mong le e mong wa bana ba Iseraele a boela naheng eo a e jeleng lefa, a dula ho yona." 
Judges2:7 Setjhaba sa sebeletsa Morena ka matsatsi wohle a bophelo ba Joshua, le ka matsatsi wohle a ho phela ha baholo ba ileng ba nna ba phela kamora lefu la Joshua, ba boneng mesebetsi yohle e meholo ya Morena, eo a ileng a e etsetsa Baiseraele." 
Judges2:7 Setjhaba sa sebeletsa Morena ka matsatsi wohle a bophelo ba Joshua, le ka matsatsi wohle a ho phela ha baholo ba ileng ba nna ba phela kamora lefu la Joshua, ba boneng mesebetsi yohle e meholo ya Morena, eo a ileng a e etsetsa Baiseraele." 
Judges2:8 Jwale Joshua, mora wa Nune, mohlanka wa Morena, a shwa a ena le dilemo tse lekgolo le leshome." 
Judges2:8 Jwale Joshua, mora wa Nune, mohlanka wa Morena, a shwa a ena le dilemo tse lekgolo le leshome." 
Judges2:9 Ba mo epela naheng eo a e jeleng lefa, e leng Timina-Herese, naheng e maralla ya Efraime, ka leboya ho thaba ya Gaashe." 
Judges2:10 Ha moloko oo wohle o se o oroseditswe ho bo-ntata wona, ha hlaha moloko o mong, o sa kang wa tseba Morena, kapa mesebetsi eo Morena a e etseditseng Baiseraele." 
Judges2:11 Bana ba Iseraele ba sitelwa Morena, ba sebeletsa bo-Baale." 
Judges2:12 Ba furalla Morena Modimo wa bo-ntata bona, ya ileng a ba ntsha naheng ya Egepeta, ba latela medimo e meng, medimo ya ditjhaba tse ba potapotileng, ba e kgumamela, mme ba halefisa Morena." 
Judges2:13 Ba furalla Morena, ba sebeletsa bo-Baale le Asetarote." 
Judges2:14 Bohale ba Morena ba tlokomela Baiseraele. A neelana ka bona matsohong a dinokwane, mme tsa ba senyetsa. A neelana ka bona matsohong a dira tsa bona tse ba potapotileng, hoo ba neng ba ke ke ba hlola ba ema kapele ho dira tseo tsa bona." 
Judges2:15 Kamehla ha ba eya ntweng, Morena o ne a ba lwantsha, jwalokaha a ne a ile a bua, le jwalokaha a ne a ile a ba hlapanyetsa, mme ba tsieleha haholo." 
Judges2:16 Morena a ba hlahisetsa baahlodi ba ileng ba ba pholosa matsohong a dinokwane tse ba senyetsang. 
Judges2:17 Empa ha ba a ka ba mamela le baahlodi bao ba bona, hobane ba nnile ba kgeloha, ba latela medimo e meng, ba e kgumamela. Kapelepele ba kgeloha tsela eo bo-ntata bona ba neng ba tsamaya ho yona, ba hlompha molao wa Morena, empa bona ha ba a ka ba etsa jwalo." 
Judges2:18 E ne e ye ere ha Morena a ba hlahisetsa moahlodi, Morena o ne a ye a be le moahlodi eo, a ba pholose matsohong a dira tsa bona, ka matsatsi wohle a ho phela ha moahlodi eo. Morena o ne a ba utlwela bohloko ka baka la ho dumaela ha bona ho bakwang ke ba ba hateletseng, ba ba robokelang." 
Judges2:19 Empa e ne e ye ere ha moahlodi a eshwa, ba boele mekgweng ya bona, ba etse tse kgopo le ho feta bo-ntata bona; ba boele ba latele medimo e meng, ba e sebeletse, ba e kgumamele. Ba ne ba sa ke be ba tlohele mesebetsi ya bona e kgopo, kapa manganga a bona." 
Judges2:20 Kgalefo ya Morena ya tlokomela Baiseraele, mme a re: “Kaha setjhaba sena se robile selekane sa ka, seo ke se laetseng bo-ntata sona, mme se sa ka sa mamela lentswe la ka," 
Judges2:21 le nna, ho tloha jwale, ha ke sa tla hlola ke leleka ditjhaba tse kapele ho sona, tseo Joshua a ileng a di siya ha a eshwa." 
Judges2:21 le nna, ho tloha jwale, ha ke sa tla hlola ke leleka ditjhaba tse kapele ho sona, tseo Joshua a ileng a di siya ha a eshwa." 
Judges2:22 Hona ke hore ke leke Baiseraele ka tsona, ke bone hore na ba tla boloka tsela ya Morena jwalokaha bo-ntata bona ba ile ba e boloka, ba tsamaya ka yona, kapa tjhe.”" 
Judges2:23 Yaba Morena o tlohela ditjhaba tseo hore di sale, a se ke a potlakela ho di leleka, mme a se ke a neelana ka tsona matsohong a Joshua." 
Judges2:23 Yaba Morena o tlohela ditjhaba tseo hore di sale, a se ke a potlakela ho di leleka, mme a se ke a neelana ka tsona matsohong a Joshua." 
Judges3:1 Tsena ke ditjhaba tseo Morena a ileng a di tlohela tsa sala hore a leke Baiseraele ka tsona, e leng ba bangata ba sa kang ba tseba dintwa tsohle tsa Kanana." 
Judges3:2 E ne e le hore meloko ya bana ba Iseraele e ithute ntwa, haholoholo meloko e neng e sa ka ya tseba ntwa." 
Judges3:3 Ditjhaba tseo ke tsa marena a mahlano a Bafilesita, le Bakanana bohle, le Basidone, le Bahife, e leng baahi ba thaba ya Lebanone, ho tloha Baale-Heremone, ho ya fihla lekgalong la Hamate." 
Judges3:4 Ba ile ba siuwa hore ho lekwe Baiseraele ka bona, ho tsejwe hore na ba tla mamela melao ya Morena, eo a e laetseng bo-ntata bona ka Moshe." 
Judges3:5 Bana ba Iseraele ba aha hara Bakanana, le Bahete, le Baamore, le Baperise, le Bahife, le Bajebuse." 
Judges3:6 Ba nyallana le ditjhaba tseo, mme ba sebeletsa medimo ya tsona." 
Judges3:7 Bana ba Iseraele ba sitelwa Morena, ba lebala Morena Modimo wa bona, ba sebeletsa bo-Baale le ditshwantsho tsa Ashera." 
Judges3:8 Bohale ba Morena ba tlokomela Baiseraele, mme a neelana ka bona matsohong a Kushane-Rashataime, kgosi ya Arame-Naharaime, mme bana ba Iseraele ba sebeletsa Kushane-Rashataime ka dilemo tse robedi." 
Judges3:9 Ha bana ba Iseraele ba ipiletsa ho Morena, Morena a ba hlahisetsa mopholosi ya ileng a ba namolela. Ke Oteniele, mora wa Kenase, moena wa Kalebe." 
Judges3:10 Moya wa Morena wa theohela hodima hae, ya eba moahlodi wa Baiseraele. A futuha, mme Morena a neelana ka Kushane-Rashataime, kgosi ya Arame, matsohong a hae. Oteniele a hlola Kushane-Rashataime." 
Judges3:11 Naha ya eba le kgotso ka dilemo tse mashome a mane. Yaba Oteniele, mora wa Kenase, o a shwa." 
Judges3:12 Bana ba Iseraele ba boela ba sitelwa Morena. Morena a matlafatsa Egelone, kgosi ya Moabe, hore a hlole Baiseraele, hobane ba ne ba sitetswe Morena." 
Judges3:13 Egelone a kopanya mabotho a hae le a Baamore le a Baamaleke, yaba o a futuha, o hlola Baiseraele, o hapa motse wa Jeriko." 
Judges3:14 Bana ba Iseraele ba sebeletsa Egelone, kgosi ya Moabe, ka dilemo tse leshome le metso e robedi." 
Judges3:15 Empa ha bana ba Iseraele ba ipiletsa ho Morena, Morena a ba hlahisetsa mopholosi. Ke Ehude, mora wa Gera wa Mobenjamine, monna ya leqele. Bana ba Iseraele ba mo roma ho isetsa Egelone, kgosi ya Moabe, nyehelo." 
Judges3:16 Ehude o ne a iketseditse sabole e hlathang ka mahohle, bolelele ba yona e le disenthimethara tse mashome a mahlano. O ne a e tlama tlasa seaparo sa hae, hodima qholo ya letsoho la hae le letona." 
Judges3:17 Yaba o nea Egelone, kgosi ya Moabe, nyehelo eo. Egelone e ne e le pesolahadi ya monna." 
Judges3:18 Ha Ehude a se a neelane ka nyehelo, a re ho batho ba neng ba nkile nyehelo eo, ba tsamaye." 
Judges3:19 Empa yena a kgutla ha a le pela medimo e betlilweng ka majwe, e pela Gilegale; a fihla, a re: “Motlotlehi kgosi, ke o tliseditse thomo ya lekunutu.” Kgosi ya re: “Kgutsang!” Bohle ba neng ba eme pela kgosi ba tswela kantle." 
Judges3:20 Ehude a tla ho kgosi, e dutse kamoreng e maphodi, e kahodimo, eo e neng e le ya yona e inotshi. Ehude a re: “Ke na le molaetsa wa hao, o tswang ho Modimo.” Egelone a phahama setulong." 
Judges3:21 Ehude a ntsha letsoho la leqele, a hula sabole e qholong ya letsoho la hae le letona, a mo phehlela ka yona mpeng." 
Judges3:22 Mofeng wa kena le sabole, yaba mafura a kwahela sabole, hobane ha a a ka a hula sabole ka mpeng, ya phunyeletsa, ya ya hlaha kamorao." 
Judges3:23 Jwale Ehude a tswela lethuleng, a kwalla kgosi ka kamoreng e kahodimo, a ba a notlela mamati." 
Judges3:24 Ha a se a tswile, bahlanka ba kgosi ba tla. Ba bona hore mamati a kamore e kahodimo a notletswe, mme ba re: “O sa ntsane a ithoma ka ntlwaneng ya kamore e maphodi.”" 
Judges3:25 Ba lebella ho fihlela ba be ba belaela. Ha ba bona a sa bule mamati a kamore e kahodimo, ba nka senotlolo ba notlolla. Ba bona kgosi ya bona e tjapaletse fatshe, e shwele." 
Judges3:26 Ka nako eo ba neng ba ntse ba lebeletse, Ehude yena a ipha dimenyane, a ba a fetela ka nqane ho medimo e betlilweng ka majwe, a tshabela Seira." 
Judges3:27 Ha a fihla naheng e maralla ya Efraime a letsa lenaka. Bana ba Iseraele ba tloha naheng e maralla, ba theoha, yena a ba eteletse pele." 
Judges3:28 Yaba o re ho bona: “Ntateleng, hobane Morena o neelane ka dira tsa lona, e leng Bamoabe, matsohong a lona.” Ba theoha ba mo latetse, ba hapa madiboho a Jorodane ao Bamoabe ba tshelang ho wona, mme ba se ke ba dumella le ya mong ho tshela." 
Judges3:29 Ka yona nako eo ba bolaya banna ba Moabe ba ka bang kete tse leshome, bohle e le banna ba dikwankwetla, le banna ba bahlabani, mme ha se ke ha phonyoha le ya mong." 
Judges3:30 Ka lona letsatsi leo, Bamoabe ba hlolwa, ba ba katlasa Baiseraele. Naha ya eba le kgotso ka dilemo tse mashome a robedi." 
Judges3:31 Kamora Ehude moahlodi ya eba Shamegare, mora wa Anate, ya neng a bolaye Bafilesita ba makgolo a tsheletseng ka tsenene e potlakisang dipholo, mme le yena a namolela Baiseraele." 
Judges4:1 Ha Ehude a se a shwele, bana ba Iseraele ba boela ba sitelwa Morena." 
Judges4:2 Morena a neelana ka bona matsohong a Jabine, kgosi ya Kanana, e neng e busa Hasore. Molaodi wa mabotho a hae e ne e le Sisera, ya neng a ahile Haroshete ya Baditjhaba." 
Judges4:3 Bana ba Iseraele ba ipiletsa ho Morena, hobane Jabine o ne a ena le dikariki tsa ntwa tse makgolo a robong, tse entsweng ka tshepe. A hatella bana ba Iseraele habohloko ka dilemo tse mashome a mabedi." 
Judges4:4 Ka nako eo, moporofeta Debora, mosadi wa Lapidote, e ne e le yena moahlodi wa Baiseraele." 
Judges4:5 Debora o ne a ye a dule tlasa sefate sa hae sa palema, pakeng tsa Rama le Bethele, naheng e maralla ya Efraime. Bana ba Iseraele ba ne ba ye ba ye ho yena ho ya ahlolelwa." 
Judges4:6 A roma maqosa ho ya bitsa Barake, mora wa Abinoame, ya tswang Kedeshe e Nafthali, mme Debora a re ho yena: “Morena Modimo wa Iseraele, o o laetse, a re: Tsamaya, o lebe thabeng ya Tabore, o ye le bana ba dikete tse leshome ba tswang hara bana ba Nafthali le hara bana ba Sebulone." 
Judges4:7 Sisera, molaodi wa mabotho a Jabine, ke tla mo nonoeletsa molatswaneng wa Kishone, a tle ka dikariki tsa hae tsa ntwa, le ka mabotho a hae, ebe ke neelana ka yena matsohong a hao. ”" 
Judges4:8 Barake a re ho yena: “Haeba o tla tsamaya le nna, ke tla tla ya, empa haeba o sa tsamaye le nna, ha ke na ho ya.”" 
Judges4:9 Debora a re: “Ruri ke tla tsamaya le wena, empa leeto leo o le nkang ha le na ho o tlisetsa tlotla, hobane Morena o tla neelana ka Sisera matsohong a mosadi.” Yaba Debora o a ema, o tsamaya le Barake ho ya Kedeshe." 
Judges4:10 Barake a bitsetsa banna ba Sebulone le ba Nafthali Kedeshe, mme a nyolohela teng a ena le banna ba dikete tse leshome. Debora a nyoloha le yena." 
Judges4:11 Jwale Hebere wa Mokene o ne a ikarohantse ho Bakene, e leng ditloholo tsa Hobabe, mohwe wa Moshe, a hlomme tente ya hae tlasa sefate sa eike se Saananime, e pela Kedeshe." 
Judges4:12 Ba tsebisa Sisera hore Barake, mora wa Abinoame, o nyolohetse thabeng ya Tabore." 
Judges4:13 Sisera a bokella dikariki tsa hae tsohle tsa ntwa, e le dikariki tse makgolo a robong tsa ntwa, tse entsweng ka tshepe; le mabotho wohle ao a neng a ena le wona, ho tloha Haroshete ya Baditjhaba ho ya fihla molatswaneng wa Kishone." 
Judges4:14 Debora a re ho Barake: “Tsamaya! Lena ke letsatsi leo ka lona Morena a neelanang ka Sisera matsohong a hao. Ha ke re Morena o se a o eteletse pele?” Barake a theoha thabeng ya Tabore, a ena le banna ba dikete tse leshome." 
Judges4:15 Morena a qhalanya Sisera le dikariki tsa hae tsohle tsa ntwa, le lebotho la hae lohle ka sabole, kapele ho Barake. Sisera a theoha kariking ya hae ya ntwa, a hlanola tlhabela." 
Judges4:16 Barake a phaladisa dikariki le lebotho ho ya fihla Haroshete ya Baditjhaba, moo lebotho lohle la Sisera le ileng la bolaelwa teng ka sabole, ha se ke ha sala le ya mong." 
Judges4:17 Empa Sisera a hlanola tlhabela ho ya fihla tenteng ya Jaele, mosadi wa Hebere wa Mokene, hobane kgotso e ne e le teng pakeng tsa Jabine, kgosi ya Hasore, le lelapa la Hebere wa Mokene." 
Judges4:18 Jaele a ya kgahlanyetsa Sisera, mme a re ho yena: “Fapohela mona, monghadi; kena ka tenteng yaka, o se ke wa tshaba.” Yaba Sisera o kena ka tenteng, Jaele a mo kwahela ka kobo." 
Judges4:19 Sisera a re ho Jaele: “Ako mphe metsinyana ke nwe, hobane ke nyorilwe.” A bula lekuka la lebese, a mo nea, a nwa, yaba o mo kwahela hape." 
Judges4:20 Sisera a re ho Jaele: “Ema monyakong wa tente, mme ere ha motho a ka fihla, a o botsa, a re: Na ho na le motho moo? Wena o tle o re: Tjhe! ”" 
Judges4:21 Jwale Jaele, mosadi wa Hebere, a nka thakgisa ya tente, a nka le noto ka letsohong, a mo nanyetsa, a kgokgothella thakgisa eo tlhafunelong ya hae, ya phunyeletsa ho ya fihla fatshe. Sisera o ne a ile le sephume sa boroko, a kgathetse. Yaba o a shwa." 
Judges4:22 Yare ha Barake a ntse a phaladisa Sisera, Jaele a ya mo kgahlanyetsa, a re ho yena: “Tloo, ke tla o bontsha motho eo o ntseng o mmatla.” Barake a kena ka tenteng ya Jaele, mme a bona Sisera a tjapaletse fatshe, a se a shwele, thakgisa e kene tlhafunelong ya hae." 
Judges4:23 Ka lona letsatsi leo Modimo a kokobetsa Jabine, kgosi ya Kanana, kapele ho bana ba Iseraele." 
Judges4:24 Bana ba Iseraele ba nna ba tswela pele ho imela Jabine, kgosi ya Kanana, ho fihlela ba timetsa kgosi eo ya Kanana." 
Judges5:1 Ka lona letsatsi leo Debora, le Barake, mora wa Abinoame, ba bina, ba re:" 
Judges5:2 “Kaha baetapele ba Iseraele ba eteletse Baiseraele pele, kaha setjhaba se ikentse sehlabelo ka boithaopo, lona rorisang Morena!" 
Judges5:3 “Lona dikgosi mamelang, lona mahosana sekehang tsebe, nna ke tla binela Morena, ke binele Morena Modimo, Modimo wa Iseraele." 
Judges5:4 “Morena, ha o futuha o etswa Seire, o haola, o etswa naheng ya Edomo, lefatshe la na la thothomela, mahodimo a thwathwaretsaka, e, maru a nesa ya ditlwebelele." 
Judges5:5 Dithaba tsa qhibidiha kapela Morena, le Sinai ya qhibidiha kapela Morena Modimo wa Iseraele." 
Judges5:6 “Mehleng ya Shamegare mora wa Anate, mehleng ya Jaele ditsela tsa mela mohlwa, batsamai ba hlahlathela ka ditselana." 
Judges5:7 Iseraele ya hloka babusi, ya ba hloka ho fihlela nna Debora ke ema ka maoto, ke le mma Baiseraele." 
Judges5:8 Ba ikgethela medimo e metjha, ntwa ya eba teng kgorong tsa metse ya bona. Hara ba kete tse mashome a mane tsa Baiseraele, na ho kile ha bonwa thebe kapa lerumo?" 
Judges5:9 Pelo ya ka e rata balaodi ba Iseraele, lona ba ikentseng sehlabelo sa setjhaba ka boithaopo, lona rorisang Morena!" 
Judges5:10 “Lona ba palamang ditonki, tonki tse tshweu, lona ba dutseng dibutshabutsheng, le lona bo-mofetakatsela, bolelang jwalo." 
Judges5:11 Holehole le marata a bo-rametsu, bakeng tseo ho kguwang metsi ho tsona, teng ba tla pheta ketso tse lokileng tsa Morena, ketso tse lokileng tsa babusi ba hae ba Iseraele; jwale tjhaba sa Morena sa theohela kgorong tsa metse." 
Judges5:12 “ Phaphama, phaphama, Debora! Phaphama, phaphama, phokola sefela! Tsamaya Barake, mora wa Abinoame, o kganne bathopuwa ba hao!" 
Judges5:13 “Masalla a mahosana a theoha, tjhaba sa Morena sa theoha jwaloka bahale ho nthusetsa." 
Judges5:14 Banna ba Efraime ba theohela naheng ya Amaleke, Benjamine a o latela a le hara mabotho a hao. Balaodi ba theoha ba etswa ha Makiri, ha Sebulone ha tswa ba nkileng mokgele wa molaodi." 
Judges5:15 Mahosana a Isakare a tsamaya le Debora, Isakare le yena a tsamaya le Barake, ya eba letlaburu retheng tsa hae ho leba kgohlong. Ba morabe wa Rubene ba ferekana, ba ipotsa hore na ba ka ya thusetsa." 
Judges5:16 Le duletseng hara mehlape ya lona, le mametse makodilo a badisana? Ba morabe wa Rubene ba ferekana, ba ipotsa hore na ba ka ya thusetsa." 
Judges5:17 Gileade a itulela mose ho Jorodane, Dane yena o duletseng ka dikepeng? Ashere yena o ituletse lebopong la lewatle, o iphomoletse dikoung tsa lona." 
Judges5:18 Morabe wa Sebulone o ipeile kotsing ya lefu, le wa Nafthali o entse jwalo o le hodima dithaba." 
Judges5:19 “Dikgosi tsa fihla tsa lwana, dikgosi tsa Kanana tsa lwana di le Taanake, di le Taanake pela metsi a Megido, empa ha di a ka tsa hapa silefera."
