1Chronicles1:7 Bana ke bara ba Jafane: Elisha, le Tarashishe, le Kitime, le Dodanime." 
1Chronicles1:8 Bana ke bara ba Kama: Kushe, le Miseraime, le Pute, le Kanana." 
1Chronicles1:9 Bana ke bara ba Kushe: Seba, le Hafila, le Sabeta, le Rama, le Sabeteka. Bara ba Rama ke Sheba le Dedane." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kushe a tswala Nimerode. Nimerode ke yena eo e bileng mohale wa pele, e moholo, lefatsheng." 
1Chronicles1:11 Miseraime a tswala Balode, le Baaname, le Balehabe, le Banafetuhe," 
1Chronicles1:12 le Bapatarusi, le Bakasalohe ba tswetseng Bafilesita, le Bakafatore." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanana a itsibola ka Sidone, ya tla ba Hete," 
1Chronicles1:14 le Bajebuse, le Baamore, le Bagirigashe," 
1Chronicles1:15 le Bahife, le Baareki, le Basine," 
1Chronicles1:16 le Baarefade, le Basemare, le Bahamate." 
1Chronicles1:17 Bara ba Sema ke: Elame, le Asure, le Arepakeshade, le Lode, le Arame, le Use, le Hule, le Getere, le Mashe." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arepakeshade a tswala Shela, mme Shela a tswala Ebere." 
1Chronicles1:19 Ebere a tswala bara ba babedi. Lebitso la e mong e ne e le Pelege, hobane baahi ba lefatshe ba ne ba arohane mehleng ya hae; moena wa hae e ne e le Jokotane." 
1Chronicles1:20 Jokotane a tswala Alamodade, le Shelefe, le Hasere-Mafete, le Jera," 
1Chronicles1:21 le Hadorame, le Usale, le Dikela," 
1Chronicles1:22 le Ebale, le Abimaele, le Sheba," 
1Chronicles1:23 le Ofire, le Hafila, le Jobabe. Bana bohle ke bara ba Jokotane." 
1Chronicles1:23 le Ofire, le Hafila, le Jobabe. Bana bohle ke bara ba Jokotane." 
1Chronicles1:24 Bana ke bara ba Sema: Arepakeshade, le Shela," 
1Chronicles1:25 le Ebere, le Pelege, le Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 le Seruge, le Nakore, le Tera," 
1Chronicles1:27 le Aborame, e leng Aborahama." 
1Chronicles1:28 Bana ke bara ba Aborahama: Isaka, le Ishemaele." 
1Chronicles1:29 Lena ke leloko la Ishemaele: Nebajota, letsibolo la Ishemaele, le Kedare, le Adabeele, le Mibesame," 
1Chronicles1:30 le Mishema, le Duma, le Masa, le Hadade, le Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 le Jeture, le Nafishe, le Kedema. Bana ke bona bara ba Ishemaele." 
1Chronicles1:32 Bana ke bara ba Ketura, mosadi wa lefielo wa Aborahama. Ketura a tswala Simerane, le Jokoshane, le Medane, le Midiane, le Jishebaka, le Shua. Bara ba Jokoshane ke Sheba le Dedane." 
1Chronicles1:33 Bara ba Midiane e ne e le Efa, le Efere, le Hanoke, le Abida, le Eledaa. Bana bohle ke ditloholo tsa Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Aborahama a tswala Isaka. Bara ba Isaka ke Esau le Iseraele. 
1Chronicles1:35 Bara ba Esau ke Elefase, le Reuele, le Jeushe, le Jalame, le Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Bara ba Elefase e ne e le Temana, le Omare, le Sefo, le Fatame, le Kenase, le Timina, le Amaleke." 
1Chronicles1:37 Bara ba Reuele ke bana: Nahate, le Sera, le Shamma, le Misa." 
1Chronicles1:38 Bana ke bara ba Seire: Lotane, le Shobale, le Sebone, le Ana, le Dishone, le Esere, le Dishane." 
1Chronicles1:39 Bana ke bara ba Lotane: Hori, le Homame. Kgaitsedi ya Lotane e ne e le Timina." 
1Chronicles1:40 Bara ba Shobale e ne e le Aleana, le Manahate, le Ebale, le Shefi, le Oname. Bana ke bara ba Sebone: Aya, le Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Mora wa Ana ke Dishone. Bara ba Dishone ke Hamerane, le Eshebane, le Jiterane, le Kerane." 
1Chronicles1:42 Bana ke bara ba Esere: Bilehane, le Saafane, le Jakane. Bara ba Dishane ke Use le Arane." 
1Chronicles1:43 Tsena ke dikgosi tse ileng tsa busa naha ya Edomo, ho eso be le kgosi e busang bana ba Iseraele: Bela, mora wa Beore, mme lebitso la motse wa hae e ne e le Dinehaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Ha Bela a eshwa, Jobabe, mora wa Sera, ya tswang Bosera, a mo hlahlama." 
1Chronicles1:44 Ha Bela a eshwa, Jobabe, mora wa Sera, ya tswang Bosera, a mo hlahlama." 
1Chronicles1:45 Ha Jobabe a eshwa, Hushame, wa naha ya Batemane, a mo hlahlama." 
1Chronicles1:45 Ha Jobabe a eshwa, Hushame, wa naha ya Batemane, a mo hlahlama." 
1Chronicles1:46 Ha Hushame a eshwa, Hadade, mora wa Bedade, ya neng a hlole Bamediane naheng ya Moabe, a mo hlahlama. Lebitso la motse wa hae e ne e le Afite." 
1Chronicles1:47 Ha Hadade a eshwa, Samela wa Masereka a mo hlahlama." 
1Chronicles1:48 Ha Samela a eshwa, Shaule wa Rehobote, e lebopong la Noka a mo hlahlama." 
1Chronicles1:49 Ha Shaule a eshwa, Baale-Hanane, mora wa Akabore, a mo hlahlama." 
1Chronicles1:50 Ha Baale-Hanane a eshwa, Hadade a mo hlahlama. Lebitso la motse wa hae e ne e le Pai, athe la mosadi wa hae e ne e le Mehetabela, moradi wa Matereta, setloholo sa Me-Sahabe." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hadade le yena a shwa. Tsena ke dikgosi tsa Edomo: Timina, le Alea, le Jetete," 
1Chronicles1:52 le Aholebama, le Ela, le Pinone," 
1Chronicles1:53 le Kenase, le Temana, le Mibesare," 
1Chronicles1:54 le Magedeele, le Irame. Tsena ke tsona dikgosi tsa Edomo." 
1Chronicles2:1 Bana ke bara ba Iseraele: Rubene, le Simeone, le Levi, le Juda, le Isakare, le Sebulone," 
1Chronicles2:2 le Dane, le Josefa, le Benjamine, le Nafthali, le Gade, le Ashere." 
1Chronicles2:3 Bana ke bara ba Juda: Ere, le Onane, le Shela. Bana ba bararo o ile a ba tswallwa ke moradi wa Shua wa Mokanana. Ere, letsibolo la hae, o ne a le kgopo mahlong a Morena, mme Morena a mmolaya." 
1Chronicles2:4 Tamare, ngwetsi ya Juda, a tswalla Juda Perese le Sera. Kaofela bara ba Juda ba ne ba le bahlano." 
1Chronicles2:5 Bara ba Perese ke Heserone, le Hamule." 
1Chronicles2:6 Bara ba Sera ke Simeri, le Etane, le Hemane, le Kalekole, le Dara. Kaofela ba ne ba le bahlano." 
1Chronicles2:7 Bara ba Karimi ke Akare, ya ileng a kenya Baiseraele tshotso dinaleng, ka ho inkela dintho tse rohakehileng." 
1Chronicles2:8 Mora wa Etane ke Asariya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Heserone a tswallwa bara bana: Jerahemeele, le Rama, le Kalebe." 
1Chronicles2:10 Rama a tswala Aminadabe, Aminadabe a tswala Naheshone, e leng yena kgosana ya bana ba Juda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Naheshone a tswala Salemone, Salemone a tswala Boase." 
1Chronicles2:12 Boase a tswala Obede, Obede a tswala Jese." 
1Chronicles2:13 Mora wa Jese wa letsibolo ke Eliabe, wa bobedi ke Abinadabe, wa boraro ka Shima," 
1Chronicles2:14 wa bone ke Netanele, wa bohlano ke Radai," 
1Chronicles2:15 wa botshelela ke Oseme, wa bosupa ke Davida." 
1Chronicles2:16 Dikgaitsedi tsa bona e ne e le Seruya le Abikaele. Bara ba Seruya ba ne ba le bararo, e le Abishai, le Joabe, le Asaele." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abikaele a tswala Amasa, eo ntatae e neng e le Jetere wa Moishemaele." 
1Chronicles2:18 Asuba a tswalla Kalebe, mora wa Heserone, moradi ya bitswang Jeriote. A mo tswalla le bara bana: Jeshere, le Shobabe, le Aradone." 
1Chronicles2:19 Hoba Asuba a shwe, Kalebe a nyala Eferata, ya ileng a mo tswalla Hure." 
1Chronicles2:20 Hure a tswala Uri, Uri a tswala Besalele." 
1Chronicles2:21 Ha Heserone a ena le dilemo tse mashome a tsheletseng, a nyala moradi wa Makiri, ntata Gileade. Mosadi eo a mo tswalla mora ya bitswang Segube." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segube a tswala Jaire, ya ileng a ba le metse e mashome a mabedi a metso e meraro naheng ya Gileade." 
1Chronicles2:23 Gesure, le Arame ba hapa Metse ya Jaire, le Kenate le metsana ya yona. E ne e le metsana e mashome a tsheletseng. Bana bohle ke ditloholo tsa Makiri, ntata Gileade." 
1Chronicles2:24 Hoba Heserone a shwe, Kalebe, mora wa hae, a kenela Eferata, mohatsa ntatae, mme eo a mo tswalla Ashehure, ya ileng a thea Tekowa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Bana ke bara ba Jerahemeele, letsibolo la Heserone: Rama ke yena letsibolo, e nto ba Buna, le Orene, le Oseme, le Ahiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Jerahemeele o ne a ena le mosadi e mong ya bitswang Atara; Atara a tswala Oname. 
1Chronicles2:27 Bara ba Rama, letsibolo la Jerahemeele, ke bana: Maase, le Jamine, le Ekere." 
1Chronicles2:28 Bara ba Oname ke Shamai le Jada. Bara ba Shamai ke Nadabe le Abishure. 
1Chronicles2:29 Lebitso la mosadi wa Abishure e ne e le Abihaele, ya ileng a mo tswalla Akabane, le Molede." 
1Chronicles2:30 Bara ba Nadabe ke Selede, le Apaime. Selede a shwa a se na bana." 
1Chronicles2:31 Apaime a tswala Ishi, Ishi a tswala Sheshane, Sheshane a tswala Akalai." 
1Chronicles2:32 Bana ke bara ba Jada, ngwanabo Shamai: Jetere le Jonathane. Jetere a shwa a se na bana." 
1Chronicles2:33 Bara ba Jonathane ke Pelete le Sasa. Bana kaofela ke bona ditloholo tsa Jerahemeele. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshane o ne a se na bara, a ena le baradi feela. O ne a ena le mohlanka wa Moegepeta ya bitswang Jareha." 
1Chronicles2:35 Sheshane a nea mohlanka eo wa hae, Jareha, moradi wa hae, mme moradi eo a mo tswalla Atai." 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai a tswala Nathane, Nathane a tswala Sabada," 
1Chronicles2:37 Sabada a tswala Efalale, Efalale a tswala Obede." 
1Chronicles2:38 Obede a tswala Jehu, mme Jehu a tswala Asariya." 
1Chronicles2:39 Asariya a tswala Helese, Helese a tswala Eleasa," 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleasa a tswala Sisemai, Sisemai a tswala Shalome," 
1Chronicles2:41 Shalome a tswala Jekamia, Jekamia a tswala Eleshama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Bana ke bara ba Kalebe, ngwanabo Jerahemeele: Mesha, e leng letsibolo la hae, a tswala Sife, Sife a tswala Maresha, Maresha a tswala Heborone." 
1Chronicles2:43 Bara ba Heborone ke Kora, le Tapua, le Rekeme, le Shema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema a tswala Rahama, Rahama a tswala Jorokowame. Regeme a tswala Shamai." 
1Chronicles2:45 Mora wa Shamai e ne e le Maone, ya ileng a thea Bete-Sure." 
1Chronicles2:46 Kalebe o ne a ena le mosadi wa lefielo ya bitswang Efa, mme a mo tswalla bara ba bararo, e leng Harane, le Mosa, le Gasese. Harane e ne e le ntata Gasese." 
1Chronicles2:47 Bana ke bara ba Jahadai: Regeme, le Jotame, le Geshane, le Pelete, le Efa, le Shaafe." 
1Chronicles2:48 Maaka, mosadi wa lefielo wa Kalebe, a tswala Shebere, le Tirehana." 
1Chronicles2:49 A ba a tswala le Shaafe, ya ileng a thea Mademana; a tswala le Shefa, ya ileng a thea Makebena, le Gibea. Moradi wa Kalebe e ne e le Akasa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Bana ke ditloholo tsa Kalebe, mora wa Hure, letsibolo la Eferata: Shobale a thea Kiriate-Jearime," 
1Chronicles2:51 le Salema, ya ileng a thea Betlelehema, le Harefe, ya ileng a thea Bete-Gadere." 
1Chronicles2:52 Ditloholo tsa Shobale, ya ileng a thea Kiriate-Jearime, e ne e le Baharowe, e leng halofo ya morabe wa Bamanahate." 
1Chronicles2:53 Merabe ya Kiriate-Jearime ke ena: Bajethero, le Baputi, le Bashoma, le Bamishera. Bona ba ile ba tswala merabe ya Basore le Baeshetaole." 
1Chronicles2:54 Bana ke ditloholo tsa Salema: Betlelehema, Banetofa, le Atarote-Bete-Joabe, le halofo ya morabe wa Bamanahate, le Basora." 
1Chronicles2:55 Ena ke merabe ya bangodi ba neng ba ahile Jabese: Batire, le Bashima, le Basuka. Bana ke bona Bakene ba tswetsweng ke Hamate, e leng ntata ba lelapa la Rekabe." 
1Chronicles3:1 Bana ke bara bao Davida a ileng a ba tswala ha a le Heborone. Mora wa hae wa matsibolo ke Amanone, ya tswetsweng ke Ahinoame wa Mojesereele; wa bobedi ke Daniele, ya tswetsweng ke Abikaele wa Mokaramele;" 
1Chronicles3:1 Bana ke bara bao Davida a ileng a ba tswala ha a le Heborone. Mora wa hae wa matsibolo ke Amanone, ya tswetsweng ke Ahinoame wa Mojesereele; wa bobedi ke Daniele, ya tswetsweng ke Abikaele wa Mokaramele;" 
1Chronicles3:2 wa boraro ya eba Abosalome, mora wa Maaka, moradi wa Talamai, kgosi ya Gesure; wa bone ya eba Adoniya, mora wa Hagite;" 
1Chronicles3:3 wa bohlano ya eba Shefatiya, mora wa Abitale; wa botshelela ya eba Jitereame, wa mosadi wa hae ya bitswang Egela." 
1Chronicles3:4 Bana ba tsheletseng ba ile ba tswallwa Heborone, moo Davida a ileng a busa a le hona teng ka dilemo tse supileng le dikgwedi tse tsheletseng. A busa ka dilemo tse mashome a mararo a metso e meraro a le Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles3:5 Bana ba ile ba tswalwa ha a se a le Jerusalema: Shima, le Shobabe, le Nathane, le Solomone. Bana ba bane ba ile ba tswalwa ke Batesheba, moradi wa Amiele." 
1Chronicles3:6 Ba bang e ne e le bo-Jibehare, le Eleshua, le Elipelete," 
1Chronicles3:7 le Noga, le Nefege, le Jafia," 
1Chronicles3:8 le Eleshama, le Eleada, le Elefelede, mme bona ba le robong." 
1Chronicles3:9 Bana kaofela e ne e le bara ba Davida, kantle ho bara bao a ba tswaletsweng ke basadi ba hae ba mafielo. Kgaitsedi ya bona e ne e le Tamare." 
1Chronicles3:10 Mora wa Solomone e ne e le Rehoboame. Rehoboame a tswala Abiya, Abiya a tswala Asa, Asa a tswala Jehoshafate," 
1Chronicles3:11 Jehoshafate a tswala Jehorame, Jehorame a tswala Akasiya, Akasiya, a tswala Jowashe," 
1Chronicles3:12 Jowashe a tswala Amasiya, Amasiya a tswala Asariya, Asariya a tswala Jotame," 
1Chronicles3:13 Jotame a tswala Akase, Akase a tswala Hesekiya, Hesekiya a tswala Manase," 
1Chronicles3:14 Manase a tswala Amona, Amona a tswala Josiya." 
1Chronicles3:15 Bara ba Josiya ke: Johanane, letsibolo la hae, wa bobedi ya eba Jehoyakime, wa boraro ya eba Sedekiya, wa bone ya eba Shalome." 
1Chronicles3:16 Bara ba Jehoyakime e ne e le Jekoneya le Sedekiya. 
1Chronicles3:17 Bara ba Jekoneya, ya ileng a thopuwa, a iswa Babilona, e ne e le Shealetiele," 
1Chronicles3:18 le Malakirame, le Pedaya, le Shenasara, le Jekameya, le Hoshama, le Nedabiya." 
1Chronicles3:19 Bara ba Pedaya ke Serubabele, le Shimei. Bara ba Serubabele ke Meshulame, le Hananiya; kgaitsedi ya bona ke Shelomite." 
1Chronicles3:20 Bara ba bang ba hae ba bahlano ke Hashuba, le Ohele, le Berekiya, le Hasadiya, le Jushabe-Heseda." 
1Chronicles3:21 Bara ba Hananiya ke Pelatiya, le Jeshaya. Jeshaya a tswala Refaya, Refaya a tswala Arenane, Arenane a tswala Obadiya, Obadiya a tswala Shekaniya," 
1Chronicles3:22 Shekaniya a tswala Shemaya, le Hatushe, le Jigale, le Baria, le Neareya, le Shafate. Kaofela ba ne ba tsheletse." 
1Chronicles3:23 Bara ba Neareya ke Eleunai, le Hesekiya, le Asarikama. Ba ne ba le bararo." 
1Chronicles3:24 Bara ba Eleunai ba ne ba supile, e le Hodafiya, le Eleashibe, le Pelaya, le Akube, le Johanane, le Delaya, le Anani." 
1Chronicles4:1 Bana ke bara ba Juda: Perese, le Heserone, le Karimi, le Hure, le Shobale." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reaya, mora wa Shobale, a tswala Jahate, Jahate a tswala Ahumai le Lahade. Ena ke yona merabe ya Basora." 
1Chronicles4:3 Bana ke bara ba Etame: Jesereele, le Jishema, le Jidebashe. Lebitso la kgaitsedi ya bona ke Haseleleponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 Penuele a tswala Gedore. Esere a tswala Husha. Bana ke bona bara ba Hure, letsibolo la Eferata, ya ileng a thea Betlelehema." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashehure ya ileng a thea Tekowa, o ne a ena le basadi ba babedi, e leng Hela le Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara a mo tswalla Ahusame, le Hefere, le Temeni, le Hahashatari. Bana ke bara ba Naara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Bara ba Hela ke Serete, le Sohare, le Etenane," 
1Chronicles4:8 le Kose, ya ileng a tswala Anube, le Hasobeba, le ba morabe wa Aharahele, mora wa Harume." 
1Chronicles4:9 Hasobeba o ne a hlompheha ho feta bana babo. Mmae o ne a ile a mo rea lebitso la Jabese, hobane o ne a re: “Ke ile ka mmeleha ka mahlaba a maholo.”" 
1Chronicles4:10 Jabese a ipiletsa ho Modimo wa Iseraele, a re: “Ke a o rapela: O ke o ntlohohonolofatse, o nkekeletse naha, o mpaballe, o ntshireletse, mme ke se ke ka hlokofatswa.” Modimo a mo nea seo a se kopileng." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelobe, ngwanabo Shuha, a tswala Mehire, Mehire a tswala Eshetone," 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshetone a tswala Bete-Rafa, le Paseya, le Tehina, Tehina a tswala Ire-Nahashe. Bana ke bona baahi ba Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Bana ke bara ba Kenase: Oteniele, le Seraya. Bara ba Oteniele ke Hatate le Meonotai." 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonotai a tswala Ofera. Seraya a tswala Joabe. Joabe a thea motse o bitswang Kgohlo ya Ditsebi, hobane baahi ba wona e ne e le ditsebi tsa mesebetsi ya matsoho." 
1Chronicles4:15 Bana ke bara ba Kalebe, mora wa Jefune: Iru, le Ela, le Naame. Mora wa Ela ke Kenase." 
1Chronicles4:16 Bana ke bara ba Jehalelele: Sife, le Sifa, le Tiriya, le Asarele." 
1Chronicles4:17 Bana ke bara ba Esera: Jetere, le Merede, le Efere, le Jalone, Merede a nyala Bitiya, moradi wa Faro, mme a mo tswalla moradi ya bitswang Meriama, le bara ba babedi, Shamai le Jisheba. Jisheba ke yena mothei wa Eshetemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Mosadi wa hae wa Mojuda a tswala Jerede ya ileng a thea Gedore, le Hebere ya ileng a thea Soko, le Jekutiele ya ileng a thea Sanowa." 
1Chronicles4:19 Bara ba mosadi wa hae Hodiya, kgaitsedi ya Nahama, ke Keila wa Mogarimi, le Eshetemoa wa Maaka." 
1Chronicles4:20 Bara ba Shimone ke Amanone, le Rina, le Bene-Hanane, le Tilone. Bara ba Ishi ke Sohete, le Bene-Sohete." 
1Chronicles4:21 Bana ke bara ba Shela, mora wa Juda: Ere ya ileng a thea Leka, le Lada ya ileng a thea Maresha, le ba merabe ya ba neng ba etsa masela a lene, mane Bete-Ashebea," 
1Chronicles4:22 le Jokime, le baahi ba Koseba, le Jowashe, le Sarafa, e leng ba neng ba busa Moabe le Jashobi-Leheme. Tsena di tswa dingodilweng tsa boholoholo." 
1Chronicles4:23 Bana e ne e le dibopi tse neng di ahile Netaime le Kedera, di sebeletsa kgosi." 
1Chronicles4:24 Bana ke bara ba Simeone: Nemuele, le Jamine, le Jaribe, le Sera, le Shaule." 
1Chronicles4:25 Shaule a tswala Shalome, Shalome a tswala Mibesame, Mibesame a tswala Mishema." 
1Chronicles4:26 Bara ba Mishema ke Hamuele, Hamuele a tswala Sakure, Sakure a tswala Shimei." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimei o ne a ena le bara ba leshome le metso e tsheletseng, le baradi ba tsheletseng, empa bana babo ba ne ba se na bana; ka lebaka lena morabe wa bona wa se ke wa ata jwaloka morabe wa Juda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Ba ne ba ahile Beeresheba le Molada, le Hasere-Shuale," 
1Chronicles4:29 le Bileha, le Eseme, le Tolada," 
1Chronicles4:30 le Bethuele, le Horema, le Sikelage," 
1Chronicles4:31 le Bete-Marakabote, le Hasere-Susime, le Bete-Biri, le Shaaraime. Ena e bile metse ya bona ho fihlela pusong ya Davida." 
1Chronicles4:32 Metsana e ba potapotileng e ne e le Etame, le Aine, le Rimone, le Tokene, le Ashane, e ne e le metsana e mehlano," 
1Chronicles4:33 le metsana yohle e neng e potapotile metse eo, ho ya fihla Baalate. Ena ke yona metse eo ba neng ba phela ho yona." 
1Chronicles4:34 Lenane la tlhatlhamano ya bona ke lena: Meshobabe, le Jameleke, le Josha, mora wa Amasiya," 
1Chronicles4:35 le Joele, le Jehu, mora wa Joshibiya, setloholo sa Seraya, setloholwana sa Asiele;" 
1Chronicles4:35 le Joele, le Jehu, mora wa Joshibiya, setloholo sa Seraya, setloholwana sa Asiele;" 
1Chronicles4:36 le Eleunai, le Jaakoba, le Jeshohaya, le Asaya, le Adiele, le Jesimiele, le Benaya," 
1Chronicles4:37 le Sisa, mora wa Shifi, setloholo sa Alone, ya tswetsweng ke Jedaya, Jedaya yha tswetsweng ke Shimeri, Shimeri ya tswetsweng ke Shemaya." 
1Chronicles4:38 Banna bana ba boletsweng kahodimo e ne e le mahosana a merabe yabo bona. Malapa abo bona a ata. 
1Chronicles4:39 Ba nna ba tsamaya ho ya fihla kantle ho meedi ya Gedore, le ho ya fihla botjhabela ho kgohlo, ba ntse ba batlela mehlape ya bona makgulo." 
1Chronicles4:40 Ba fumana makgulo a matle, a nonneng, le naha e namileng, e nang le kgotso, e kgutsitseng. Baahi ba yona ba pele e ne e le Bahame." 
1Chronicles4:41 Banna bana ba boletsweng ka mabitso ba ne ba fihle mehleng ya Hesekiya, kgosi ya Juda. Ba futuhela diahelo tsa Bahame le tsa Bameune ba neng ba ahile moo, ba ba ripitla ho hang, jwalokaha ho ntse ho bonahala le kajeno-ya-bokajeno. Jwale ba aha naheng eo ya bona, hobane mehlape ya bona e ne e fumane makgulo." 
1Chronicles4:42 Banna ba ka bang makgolo a mahlano, ba morabe ona wa Simeone, ba futuhela Thaba ya Seire ba eteletswe pele ke Pelatiya, le Neareya, le Refaya, le Usiele, bara ba Ishi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Ba bolaya masalla a Baamaleke a ileng a phonyoha, mme ba aha naheng eo ya bona ho fihlela kajeno-ya-bokajeno." 
1Chronicles5:1 Rubene ke yena letsibolo la Iseraele. Empa ka lebaka la ho silafatsa diphate tsa ntatae, tokelo tsa hae tsa boholo di ile tsa newa bara ba Josefa, mora wa Iseraele; ka hona ha a yo lenaneng, ho latela tswalo ya hae." 
1Chronicles5:2 Le hoja Juda a ne a le matla ho feta bana babo, mme mmusi a ile a hlaha lapeng la hae, ditokelo tsa boholo e ile ya eba tsa Josefa." 
1Chronicles5:3 Bara ba Rubene, letsibolo la Iseraele, ke bana: Hanoke, le Palo, le Heserone, le Karimi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Bara ba Joele ke Shemaya ya tswetseng Gogo, Gogo ya tswetseng Shimei." 
1Chronicles5:4 Bara ba Joele ke Shemaya ya tswetseng Gogo, Gogo ya tswetseng Shimei." 
1Chronicles5:5 Shimei yena a tswala Mmika, Mmika a tswala Reaya, Reaya a tswala Baala," 
1Chronicles5:6 Baala a tswala Beera, eo Tigelate-Pilesere, kgosi ya Asiria, a ileng a mo thopa. E ne e le yena kgosana ya ba morabe wa Rubene." 
1Chronicles5:7 Lenaneng la bana babo, ho ya ka malapa abo bona, ke kgosana Jeiele, le Sekariya," 
1Chronicles5:8 le Bela ya tswetsweng ke Asase, Asase ya tswetsweng ke Shema, Shema ya tswetsweng ke Joele. Naha ya bona, e ne e tloha Arowere, ho ya fihla Nebo, le Baale-Meone." 
1Chronicles5:8 le Bela ya tswetsweng ke Asase, Asase ya tswetsweng ke Shema, Shema ya tswetsweng ke Joele. Naha ya bona, e ne e tloha Arowere, ho ya fihla Nebo, le Baale-Meone." 
1Chronicles5:9 Ka botjhabela ba aha ho tloha qetheng ya lehwatata le ilo fihla nokeng ya Euferatese, hobane mehlape ya bona e ne e ile ya ata ha ba le Gileade." 
1Chronicles5:10 Nakong ya puso ya Saule ba futuhela Bahagare, mme ba ba hlola. Yaba ba se ba kena ditenteng tsa Bahagare, naheng yohle e ka botjhabela ho Gileade." 
1Chronicles5:11 Ba morabe wa Gade ba ne ba ahile naheng ya Bashane, ho ya fihla Saleka." 
1Chronicles5:12 Moo Bashane, Joele e ne e le kgosana ya bona, Shafame a mo hlahlama, e ntano ba Janai, le Shafate." 
1Chronicles5:12 Moo Bashane, Joele e ne e le kgosana ya bona, Shafame a mo hlahlama, e ntano ba Janai, le Shafate." 
1Chronicles5:13 Bang ka bona, ho ya ka malapa abo bona, e ne e le Mikaele, le Meshulame, le Sheba, le Jorai, le Jakane, le Sia, le Ebere. Ba ne ba supile." 
1Chronicles5:14 Bana ke bona bara ba Abihaele, mora wa Huri, ya tswetsweng ke Jarowa, Jarowa wa Gileade, Gileade wa Mikaele, Mikaele wa Jeshishai, Jeshishai wa Jahedo, Jahedo wa Buse." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi, mora wa Abadiele, setloholo sa Guni, e ne e le yena kgosana ya malapa ana." 
1Chronicles5:16 Ba morabe wa Gade ba ne ba ahile Gileade e Bashane, le metsaneng ya yona, le makgulong wohle a naha ya Sharone, ho ya fihla moo e fellang teng." 
1Chronicles5:17 Tsena tsohle di ile tsa ngolwa lenaneng la ditaba tsa bona mehleng ya ha Jotame e le kgosi ya Juda, Jeroboame yena e le kgosi ya Iseraele." 
1Chronicles5:18 Ba morabe wa Rubene le ba morabe wa Gade, le halofo ya ba morabe wa Manase, ba ne ba ena le bahale ba tsebang ho lwana ka thebe le sabole, ba tsebang le ho fula ka metsu, ba kwetliseditsweng ntwa. Palo ya bona e ne e le dikete tse mashome a mane a metso e mene le makgolo a supileng le mashome a tsheletseng." 
1Chronicles5:19 Ba futuhela Bahagare, le Bajeture, le Banafishe, le Banodabe." 
1Chronicles5:20 Ba ile ba ipiletsa ho Modimo ha ba le ntweng, a mamela dithapelo tsa bona, hobane ba ne ba mo tshepa, mme a neelana ka Bahagare le bathusi bohle ba bona matsohong a bona." 
1Chronicles5:21 Ba hapa mehlape ya bona, e le dikamele tse dikete tse mashome a mahlano, le dinku tse dikete tse makgolo a mabedi le mashome a mahlano, le ditonki tse dikete tse pedi. Ba thopa le bahlabani ba dikete tse lekgolo." 
1Chronicles5:22 Ba bolaya ba bangata, hobane e ne e le Modimo ya ba lwanelang. Ba aha naheng eo, ho fihlela ha ba thopuwa." 
1Chronicles5:23 Halofo ya setjhaba sa ba morabe wa Manase e ne e atile haholo, kahoo ya aha naheng eo, ho tloha Bashane ho ya fihla Baale-Heremone, le Senire, le thabeng ya Heremone." 
1Chronicles5:24 Dihlooho tsa malapa abo bona ke tsena: Efere, le Ishi, le Eleele, le Asariele, le Jeremia, le Hodafiya, le Jahediele. E ne e le bahale ba tumileng, e bile e le dihlooho tsa malapa abo bona." 
1Chronicles5:25 Empa ba sitelwa Modimo wa bontata bona, ba kgumamela medimo ya ditjhaba tsa naha eo, tseo Modimo a ileng a di fedisa kapele ho bona." 
1Chronicles5:26 Ka baka leo, Modimo wa Iseraele a hlohleletsa Pule, kgosi ya Asiria, e leng Tigelate-Pilesere, hore a thope ba morabe wa Rubene, le ba morabe wa Gade, le halofo ya setjhaba sa ba morabe wa Manase, a ba ise Hala, le Habore, le Hara, le nokeng ya Gosane, moo ba ntseng ba ahile teng le kajeno-ya-bokajeno." 
1Chronicles6:1 Bana ke bara ba Levi: Gereshone, le Kohate, le Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Bara ba Kohate ke Amorame, le Isihare, le Heborone, le Usiele." 
1Chronicles6:3 Bana ba Amorame ke Arone, le Moshe, le Meriama; bara ba Arone ke Nadabe, le Abidu, le Eleasare, le Itamare." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleasare a tswala Finease, Finease a tswala Abishua," 
1Chronicles6:5 Abishua a tswala Buki, Buki a tswala Usi," 
1Chronicles6:6 Usi a tswala Seraya, Seraya a tswala Meraote," 
1Chronicles6:7 Meraote a tswala Amariya, Amariya a tswala Ahitube," 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitube a tswala Sadoke, Sadoke a tswala Ahimase," 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimase a tswala Asariya, Asariya a tswala Johanane;" 
1Chronicles6:10 Johanane a tswala Asariya. Enwa ke yena ya neng a sebeletsa ka Tempeleng eo Solomone a ileng a e haha Jerusalema. 
1Chronicles6:11 Asariya a tswala Amariya, Amariya a tswala Ahitube," 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahitube a tswala Sadoke, Sadoke a tswala Shalome," 
1Chronicles6:13 Shalome a tswala Hilekiya, Hilekiya a tswala Asariya," 
1Chronicles6:14 Asariya a tswala Seraya, Seraya a tswala Jehosadaka." 
1Chronicles6:15 Jehosadaka ya eba mothopuwa ha Morena a etsa hore Nebukadenesare a thope Juda le Jerusalema. 
1Chronicles6:16 Bana ke bara ba Levi: Gereshone, le Kohate, le Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Ana ke mabitso a bara ba Gereshone: Lebeni, le Shimei." 
1Chronicles6:18 Bana ke bara ba Kohate: Amorame, le Isihare, le Heborone, le Usiele." 
1Chronicles6:19 Bana ke bara ba Merari: Mahele le Mushi. Ana ke wona malapa a morabe wa Levi, ho ya ka bo-ntata bona." 
1Chronicles6:20 Ba lelapa la Gereshone: Gereshone a tswala Lebeni, Lebeni a tswala Johate, Johate a tswala Simma," 
1Chronicles6:21 Simma a tswala Jowa, Jowa a tswala Ido, Ido a tswala Sera, Sera a tswala Jeaterai." 
1Chronicles6:22 Bara ba Kohate: Kohate a tswala Aminadabe, Aminadabe a tswala Kora, Kora a tswala Asire," 
1Chronicles6:23 Asire a tswala Elekana, Elekana a tswala Abiasafo, Abiasafo a tswala Asire," 
1Chronicles6:24 Asire a tswala Tahate, Tahate a tswala Uriele, Uriele a tswala Usiya, Usiya a tswala Shaule." 
1Chronicles6:25 Bara ba Elekana ke Amasai le Ahimote; 
1Chronicles6:26 Ahimote a tswala Elekana, Elekana a tswala Sofai, Sofai a tswala Nahate," 
1Chronicles6:27 Nahate a tswala Eliabe, Eliabe a tswala Jerohame, Jerohame a tswala Elekana, Elekana a tswala Samuele." 
1Chronicles6:28 Bara ba Samuele: Joele ke letsibolo la hae, a hlahlangwa ke Abiya." 
1Chronicles6:28 Bara ba Samuele: Joele ke letsibolo la hae, a hlahlangwa ke Abiya." 
1Chronicles6:29 Bara ba Merari: Merari a tswala Mahele, Mahele a tswala Lebeni, Lebeni a tswala Shimei, Shimei a tswala Usa," 
1Chronicles6:30 Usa a tswala Shima, Shima a tswala Hagiya, Hagiya a tswala Asaya." 
1Chronicles6:31 Bana ke banna bao Davida a ileng a ba kgetha ho tsamaisa mmino ka Tempeleng ya Morena, kamora hoba areka e fihle Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles6:32 Ha Solomone a eso ka a haha Tempele ya Morena, Jerusalema, ba ne ba ye ba binele kapele ho areka, ka Tenteng ya Morena. Ba ne ba bina ka ho hlahlamana, ho latela lenane le neng le hlophisitswe." 
1Chronicles6:33 Bana ke bona banna ba neng ba sebeletsa, hammoho le bara ba bona: Ba morabe wa Kohate: Hemane wa kgeleke ke mora wa Joele, setloholo sa Samuele," 
1Chronicles6:33 Bana ke bona banna ba neng ba sebeletsa, hammoho le bara ba bona: Ba morabe wa Kohate: Hemane wa kgeleke ke mora wa Joele, setloholo sa Samuele," 
1Chronicles6:34 Samuele mora wa Elekana, Elekana mora wa Jerohame, Jerohame mora wa Eleele, Eleele mora wa Towa," 
1Chronicles6:35 Towa mora wa Sufe, Sufe mora wa Elekana, Elekana mora wa Mahate, Mahate mora wa Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 Amasai mora wa Elekana, Elekana mora wa Joele, Joele mora wa Asariya, Asariya mora wa Sofonea," 
1Chronicles6:36 Amasai mora wa Elekana, Elekana mora wa Joele, Joele mora wa Asariya, Asariya mora wa Sofonea," 
1Chronicles6:37 Sofonea mora wa Tahate, Tahate mora wa Asire, Asire mora wa Abiasafo, Abiasafo mora wa Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 Kora mora wa Isihare, Isihare mora wa Kohate, Kohate mora wa Levi, Levi mora wa Iseraele." 
1Chronicles6:39 Ya neng a bina a eme ka letsohong le letona le Hemane, ke Asafo: Asafo mora wa Berekiya, Berekiya mora wa Shima," 
1Chronicles6:40 Shima mora wa Mikaele, Mikaele mora wa Baaseya, Baaseya mora wa Malakiya," 
1Chronicles6:41 Malakiya mora wa Eteni, Eteni mora wa Sera, Sera mora wa Adaya," 
1Chronicles6:42 Adaya mora wa Etane, Etane mora wa Simma, Simma mora wa Shimei," 
1Chronicles6:43 Shimei mora wa Johate, Johate mora wa Gereshone, Gereshone mora wa Levi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Bana babo bona, e leng bara ba Merari, ba neng ba bina ba le ka letsohong la hae le letshehadi ke Etane mora wa Kishi, Kishi mora wa Abade, Abade mora wa Maloke," 
1Chronicles6:45 Maloke mora wa Hashabiya, Hashabiya mora wa Amasiya, Amasiya mora wa Hilekiya," 
1Chronicles6:46 Hilekiya mora wa Amasi, Amasi mora wa Bani, Bani mora wa Shemere," 
1Chronicles6:47 Shemere mora wa Mahele, Mahele mora wa Mushi, Mushi mora wa Merari, Merari mora wa Levi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Balevi ba bang ba ne ba abetswe mesebetsi e meng yohle ka Tenteng ya Morena. 
1Chronicles6:49 Bo-Arone le ditloholo tsa hae e ne e le bona ba etsetsang nyehelo ya setjheso hodima aletare ya mahlabelo, ba tjhesetsang le mokubetso hodima aletare ya mokubetso. Ba ne ba bile ba etsa tsohle tse neng di etswa ka Sehalalelong se halalelang ka ho fetisisa, ba etsetsa Iseraele tefelo ya dibe, ho latela tsohle tseo Moshe, mohlanka wa Modimo, a neng a di laetse." 
1Chronicles6:50 Bana ke bara ba Arone: Arone a tswala Eleasare, Eleasare a tswala Finease, Finease a tswala Abishua," 
1Chronicles6:51 Abishua a tswala Buki, Buki a tswala Usi, Usi a tswala Seraya," 
1Chronicles6:52 Seraya a tswala Meraote, Meraote a tswala Amariya, Amariya a tswala Ahitube," 
1Chronicles6:53 Ahitube a tswala Sadoke, Sadoke a tswala Ahimase." 
1Chronicles6:54 Ena ke meedi ya dibaka tseo ba morabe wa Kohate, e leng ditloholo tsa Arone, ba ileng ba di abelwa ka lotho, mme ba haha ho tsona." 
1Chronicles6:55 Ba ile ba abelwa Heborone e naheng ya Juda, le makgulo a e potapotileng." 
1Chronicles6:56 Empa ha e le masimo a motse le metsana ya yona, a ile a abelwa Kalebe, mora wa Jefune." 
1Chronicles6:57 Bara ba Arone ba newa metse ena e naheng ya Juda: Heborone, motse oo ho tshabelwang ho wona, le Lebena le makgulo a yona, le Jatire le makgulo a yona, le Eshetemoa le makgulo a yona," 
1Chronicles6:58 le Hilene le makgulo a yona, le Debiri le makgulo a yona," 
1Chronicles6:59 le Ashane le makgulo a yona, le Bete-Shemeshe le makgulo a yona." 
1Chronicles6:60 Naheng ya ba morabe wa Benjamine ba abelwa Geba le makgulo a yona, le Alemete le makgulo a yona, le Anatote le makgulo a yona. Kaofela metse ya bona, ho ya ka malapa abo bona, e ne le leshome le metso e meraro." 
1Chronicles6:61 Ba bang ba morabe wa Kohate ba abelwa ka lotho metse e leshome naheng e abetsweng karolo ya ba morabe wa Manase. 
1Chronicles6:62 Ditloholo tsa Gereshone, ho ya ka malapa abo tsona, tsa abelwa metse e leshome le metso e meraro naheng ya ba morabe wa Isakare, le ho ya ba morabe wa Ashere, le ho ya ba morabe wa Nafthali, le ho ya ba morabe wa Manase, ba ahileng Bashane." 
1Chronicles6:63 Ditloholo tsa Merari, ho ya ka malapa abo tsona, tsa abelwa metse e leshome le metso e mmedi naheng ya ba morabe wa Rubene, le wa Gade, le wa Sebulone, tsa e abelwa ka lotho." 
1Chronicles6:64 Bana ba Iseraele ba abela Balevi metse ena le makgulo a yona. 
1Chronicles6:65 Metse ena e seng e boletswe ka mabitso, e neng e le ya ba morabe wa Juda, le wa Simeone, le wa Benjamine, ba e abelwa ka lotho." 
1Chronicles6:66 Ba bang ba morabe wa Kohate ba abelwa metse naheng ya ba morabe wa Efraime. 
1Chronicles6:67 Ba abelwa metse eo ho tshabelwang ho yona, e leng Shekeme e naheng e maralla ya Efraime, le makgulo a yona, le Gesere le makgulo a yona," 
1Chronicles6:68 le Jokomeame le makgulo a yona, le Bete-Horone le makgulo a yona;" 
1Chronicles6:69 le Aiyalone le makgulo a yona, le Gate-Rimone le makgulo a yona." 
1Chronicles6:70 Naheng e abetsweng karolo ya ba morabe wa Manase ba abelwa Anere le makgulo a yona, le Bileame le makgulo a yona. Metse ena ya abelwa malapa a setseng a ba morabe wa Kohate." 
1Chronicles6:71 Ba morabe wa Gereshone ba abelwa metse ena: Naheng e abetsweng karolo ya ba morabe wa Manase ba abelwa Golane e Bashane le makgulo a yona, le Ashetorate le makgulo a yona." 
1Chronicles6:72 Naheng e abetsweng ba morabe wa Isakare ba abelwa Kedeshe le makgulo a yona, le Daberate le makgulo a yona," 
1Chronicles6:73 le Rama le makgulo a yona, le Anema le makgulo a yona." 
1Chronicles6:74 Naheng e abetsweng ba morabe wa Ashere ba abelwa Mashala le makgulo a yona, le Abadone le makgulo a yona," 
1Chronicles6:75 le Hukoke le makgulo a yona, le Rehobe le makgulo a yona." 
1Chronicles6:76 Naheng e abetsweng ba morabe wa Nafthali ba abelwa Kedeshe e Galelea le makgulo a yona, le Hamone le makgulo a yona, le Kiriataime le makgulo a yona." 
1Chronicles6:77 Naheng ya ba morabe wa Sebulone, karolo e setseng ya ba morabe wa Merari ya abelwa Rimone le makgulo a yona, le Tabore le makgulo a yona." 
1Chronicles6:78 Mose wane ho Jorodane, ka botjhabela ho Jeriko, naheng ya ba morabe wa Rubene, ba abelwa Besere e lehwatateng le makgulo a yona, le Jahasa le makgulo a yona," 
1Chronicles6:79 Le Kedemote le makgulo a yona, le Mefaata le makgulo a yona." 
1Chronicles6:80 Naheng ya ba morabe wa Gade ba abelwa Rama e Gileade le makgulo a yona, le Mahanaime le makgulo a yona," 
1Chronicles6:81 le Heshebone le makgulo a yona, le Jasere le makgulo a yona." 
1Chronicles7:1 Bara ba Isakare e ne e le Tola, le Pua, le Jashobe, le Shimerone. Kaofela ba ne ba le bane." 
1Chronicles7:2 Bara ba Tola e ne e le Usi, le Refaya, le Jeriele, le Jahemai, le Jibesame, le Samuele. E ne e le dihlooho tsa malapa a ntata bona Tola, e bile e le bahale. Mehleng ya Davida palo ya ditloholo tsa Tola e ne e le dikete tse mashome a mabedi a metso e mmedi le makgolo a tsheletseng." 
1Chronicles7:3 Mora wa Usi e ne e le Jiserahiya, bara ba Jiserahiya e le Mikaele, le Obadiya, le Joele, le Jishiya. Ba ne ba le bahlano. Kaofela ha bona e ne e le dihlooho tsa malapa abo bona." 
1Chronicles7:3 Mora wa Usi e ne e le Jiserahiya, bara ba Jiserahiya e le Mikaele, le Obadiya, le Joele, le Jishiya. Ba ne ba le bahlano. Kaofela ha bona e ne e le dihlooho tsa malapa abo bona." 
1Chronicles7:4 Ho ya ka ho hlahlamana ha malapa abo bona, ba ne ba ena le bahlabani ba dikete tse mashome a mararo a metso e tsheletseng, kaha ba ne ba nyetse sethepu, mme ba ena le bana ba bangata." 
1Chronicles7:5 Bang ka bona, e leng ba leloko lohle la Isakare, e ne e le bahlabani ba dikete tse mashome a robedi a metso e supileng." 
1Chronicles7:6 Bara ba Benjamine e ne e le Bela, le Bekere, le Jediaele. Ba ne ba le bararo." 
1Chronicles7:7 Bara ba Bela bona e ne e le Esebone, le Usi, le Usiele, le Jerimote, le Iri. Ba ne ba le bahlano. E ne e le dihlooho tsa malapa abo bona, e bile e le bahale. Bukeng eo ba ngotsweng ho yona, ba ne ba le dikete tse mashome a mabedi a metso e mmedi, le mashome a mararo a metso e mene." 
1Chronicles7:8 Bara ba Bekere bona e ne e le Semira, le Jowashe, le Eleesere, le Eleunai, le Omeri, le Jeremote, le Abiya le Anatotiya, le Alemete. Bana kaofela e ne e le bara ba Bekere." 
1Chronicles7:9 Buka eo ba ngotsweng ho yona ho ya ka malapa abo bona, e hlahisa dihlooho tsa malapa, le bahlabani ba dikete tse mashome a mabedi le makgolo a mabedi." 
1Chronicles7:10 Mora wa Jediaele e ne e le Bilehane; bara ba Bilehane e le Jeushe, le Benjamine, le Ehude, le Kenaneya, le Setane, le Tarashishe, le Ahishahare." 
1Chronicles7:11 Bana kaofela e ne e le ditloholo tsa Jediaele, e le dihlooho tsa malapa abo bona, e bile e le bahale. Ba ne ba le dikete tse leshome le metso e supileng le makgolo a mabedi, mme e le malalaalaotswe." 
1Chronicles7:12 Bara ba Ire e ne e le Shupime, le Hupime; mora wa Ahere e le Hushime." 
1Chronicles7:13 Bara ba Nafthali e ne e le Jaheseele, le Guni, le Jesere, le Shalome. E ne e le ditloholo tsa Bileha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Bara ba Manase, bao a ba tswaletsweng ke mosadi wa hae wa lefielo, wa Moarame, e ne e le Aserele le Makiri, ntata Gileade." 
1Chronicles7:15 Yaba Makiri o nyala kgaitsedi ya Hupime le Shupime, eo lebitso la yona e neng e le Maaka. Mora wa bobedi wa Manase e ne e le Selofehade, ya ileng a ba le baradi feela." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka, mohatsa Makiri, a tswala mora, mme a mo rea lebitso la Pereshe; moena wa hae e le Shereshe. Bara ba Pereshe e ne e le Ulame, le Rakema." 
1Chronicles7:17 Mora wa Ulame e ne e le Bedane. Bana e ne e le bona ditloholo tsa Gileade, mora wa Makiri, setloholo sa Manase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Kgaitsedi ya Gileade, Hamolekete, a tswala Ishe-Hode, le Abiesere, le Mahala." 
1Chronicles7:19 Bara ba Shemida e ne e le Akiane, le Shekeme, le Lekehi, le Aniame." 
1Chronicles7:20 Mora wa Efraime e ne e le Shutela. Shutela a tswala Berede, Berede a tswala Elada, Elada a tswala Tahate," 
1Chronicles7:21 Tahate a tswala Sabada, Sabada a tswala Shutela. Efraime o ne a ena le bara ba bang ba babedi, e leng Esere le Elade, ba neng ba bolawe ke banna ba matswallwa a Gate, ha ba ne ba ilo hapa mehlape ya bona." 
1Chronicles7:22 Ntata bona Efraime a ba llela ka nako e telele, mme bana babo ba tla ho tla mo tshedisa." 
1Chronicles7:23 Efraime a boela a kena dikobong tsa mosadi wa hae. Mosadi eo wa hae a ithwala, mme a tswala mora. Efraime a mo rea lebitso le Beria, hobane lelapa la hae le ne le hlahetswe ke bomadimabe." 
1Chronicles7:24 Moradi wa Efraime e ne e le Sheera ya ileng a haha Bete-Horone e tlase, le e hodimo, le Usene-Sheera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Mora e mong wa Efraime e ne e le Refa. Refa a tswala Reshefe, Reshefe a tswala Tela, Tela a tswala Tahane," 
1Chronicles7:26 Tahane a tswala Ladane, Ladane a tswala Amihude, Amihude a tswala Eleshama," 
1Chronicles7:27 Eleshama a tswala Nune, Nune a tswala Joshua." 
1Chronicles7:27 Eleshama a tswala Nune, Nune a tswala Joshua." 
1Chronicles7:28 Naha ya bona, eo ba neng ba ahile ho yona, e ne e le Bethele le metsana ya yona. Ka botjhabela e le Naarane, ka bophirimela e le Gesere le metsana ya yona, le Shekeme le metsana ya yona, le ho ya fihla Aya le metsaneng ya yona." 
1Chronicles7:29 Meeding ya ba morabe wa Manase e le Bete-Sheane le metsana ya yona, le Taanake le metsana ya yona, le Megido le metsana ya yona, le Dore le metsana ya yona. Bara ba Josefa, mora wa Iseraele, ba ne ba ahile metseng ena." 
1Chronicles7:30 Bara ba Ashere e ne e le Jimena, le Jishefa, le Jishefi, le Beria, kgaitsedi ya bona e le Sera." 
1Chronicles7:31 Bara ba Beria e ne e le Hebere, le Malekiele, ntata Biresaite." 
1Chronicles7:32 Hebere a tswala Jafelete, le Shomere, le Hotame, le kgaitsedi ya bona Shua." 
1Chronicles7:33 Bara ba Jafelete e ne e le Pasaka, le Bimehale, le Ashefate." 
1Chronicles7:34 Bara ba Shemere e ne e le Ahi, le Rohega, le Jehuba, le Arame." 
1Chronicles7:35 Bara ba ngwanabo Heleme e ne e le Sofa, le Jimena, le Sheleshe, le Amale." 
1Chronicles7:36 Bara ba Sofa e ne e le Shua, le Harenefere, le Shuale, le Beri, le Jimera," 
1Chronicles7:37 le Besere, le Hode, le Shamma, le Shilesha, le Jiterane, le Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Bara ba Jetere e ne e le Jefune, le Pisepa, le Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Bara ba Ula e ne e le Arake, le Haniele, le Riseya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Bana bohle e ne e le ditloholo tsa Ashere, e le dihlooho tsa malapa abo bona. E ne e le mokgetho wa bahale, e bile e le baokamedi ba mahosana. Ba ngotsweng bukeng ya leloko e ne e le bahlabani ba dikete tse mashome a mabedi a metso e tsheletseng." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benjamine a itsibola ka Bela, wa bobedi ya eba Ashebele, wa boraro ya eba Ahara," 
1Chronicles8:2 wa bone ya eba Noha, wa bohlano ya eba Rafa." 
1Chronicles8:3 Bara ba Bela e ne e le Adare, le Gera, le Abihude," 
1Chronicles8:4 le Abishua, le Naamane, le Ahowake," 
1Chronicles8:5 le Gera, le Shefufane, le Hurame." 
1Chronicles8:6 Bana ke bara ba Ehude, e leng bona dihlooho tsa malapa a ba neng ba ahile Geba, ba ileng ba fallisetswa Manahate." 
1Chronicles8:7 Bara bao ba Ehude e ne e le Naamane, le Ahiya, le Gera. Ke Gera, ntata Usa le Ahihude ya ileng a ba fallisetsa Manahate." 
1Chronicles8:8 Hoba Shaharaime a hlale Hushime le Baara, basadi ba hae, o ile a tswala bana ha a le naheng ya Moabe." 
1Chronicles8:9 Bara bao Hodeshe, mosadi wa hae, a ileng a mo tswalla bona, e ne e le Jobabe, le Sebiya, le Mesha, le Malekame," 
1Chronicles8:9 Bara bao Hodeshe, mosadi wa hae, a ileng a mo tswalla bona, e ne e le Jobabe, le Sebiya, le Mesha, le Malekame," 
1Chronicles8:10 le Jeuse, le Shakiya, le Mirema. Bara bana ba hae e ne e le dihlooho tsa malapa abo bona." 
1Chronicles8:11 Hushime o ne a ile a mo tswalla bara bana: Abitube le Elepaale. 
1Chronicles8:12 Bara ba Elepaale e ne e le Ebere, le Mishame, le Shemede. Ke Shemede ya ileng a haha motse wa Ono le Lode, le metsana ya yona." 
1Chronicles8:13 Beria le Shema, bara ba Elepaale, ba neng ba leleke baahi ba Gate, e ne e le bona dihlooho tsa malapa a ba neng ba ahile Aiyalone." 
1Chronicles8:14 Bara ba bang ba Elepaale e ne e le Ako, le Shashake, le Jeremote," 
1Chronicles8:15 le Sebadiya, le Arada, le Etere," 
1Chronicles8:16 le Mikaele, le Jishepa, le Joha, e leng bara ba Beria," 
1Chronicles8:17 le Sebadiya, le Meshulame, le Hisiki, le Hebere," 
1Chronicles8:18 le Jishemerai, le Jiseleya, le Jobabe, e leng bara ba Elepaale." 
1Chronicles8:18 le Jishemerai, le Jiseleya, le Jobabe, e leng bara ba Elepaale." 
1Chronicles8:19 Bara ba Shimei e ne e le Jakime, le Sikeri, le Sabedi," 
1Chronicles8:20 le Eleenai, le Siletai, le Eleele," 
1Chronicles8:21 le Adaya, le Beraya, le Shimerate." 
1Chronicles8:22 Bara ba Shashake e ne e le Jishepane, le Ebere, le Eleele," 
1Chronicles8:23 le Abadone, le Sikeri, le Hanane," 
1Chronicles8:24 le Hananiya, le Elame, le Anetotiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 le Jifediya, le Penuele." 
1Chronicles8:26 Bara ba Jerohame e ne e le Shamesherai, le Shehariya, le Ataleya," 
1Chronicles8:27 le Jaareshiya, le Elia, le Sikeri." 
1Chronicles8:28 Bana e ne e le bona dihlooho tsa malapa abo bona, kamoo a ngotsweng kateng bukeng ya leloko. Ba ne ba ahile Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles8:29 Jeiele, mothei wa Gibeone, o ne a ahile Gibeone. Lebitso la mosadi wa hae e ne e le Maaka." 
1Chronicles8:30 A itsibola ka Abadone, Abadone a hlahlangwa ke Sure, le Kishe, le Baale, le Nadabe," 
1Chronicles8:31 le Gedore, le Ako, le Sakere," 
1Chronicles8:32 le Mikelote, ya ileng a tswala Shima. Le bona bana ba ne ba ahile Jerusalema, pela bana babo bona." 
1Chronicles8:33 Nere a tswala Kishe, Kishe a tswala Saule, Saule a tswala Jonathane, le Malekishuwa, le Abinadabe, le Eshebaale." 
1Chronicles8:34 Mora wa Jonathane e ne e le Meriba-Baale. Meriba-Baale a tswala Mmika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Bara ba Mmika e ne e le Pitone, le Meleke, le Tarea, le Akase." 
1Chronicles8:36 Akase a tswala Jehowada, Jehowada a tswala Alemete, le Asemafete, le Simeri. Simeri a tswala Mosa." 
1Chronicles8:37 Mosa a tswala Bina, Bina a tswala Rafa, Rafa a tswala Eleasa, Eleasa a tswala Asele." 
1Chronicles8:38 Asele o ne a ena le bara ba tsheletseng. Mabitso a bona ke ana: Asarikama, le Bokeru, le Ishemaele, le Sheariya, le Obadiya, le Hanane. Bana bohle e ne e le bara ba Asele." 
1Chronicles8:39 Bara ba ngwanabo Esheke e ne e le Ulame, letsibolo la hae, a hlahlangwa ke Jeushe, le Elefelede." 
1Chronicles8:40 Bara ba Ulame e ne e le bahale ba tsebang ho fula ka metsu. Ba ne ba ena le bara ba bangata, le ditloholo tse ngata. Palo ya bone e ne e le lekgolo le mashome a mahlano. Bana bohle ke ditloholo tsa Benjamine." 
1Chronicles9:1 Baiseraele bohle ba balwa ho ya ka meloko ya bona, mme ba ngolwa Bukeng ya Dikgosi tsa Iseraele, le tsa Juda. Ka baka la ditshito tsa bona, ba thopuwa, ba iswa Babilona." 
1Chronicles9:2 Ba pele ba ileng ba kgutla ho ya aha naheng ya bona le metseng ya bona e bile Baiseraele, le baprista, le Balevi, le bahlanka ba sebeletsang ka Tempeleng." 
1Chronicles9:3 Ba morabe wa Juda, le ba morabe wa Benjamine, le ba morabe wa Efraime, le ba morabe wa Manase ba ileng ba aha Jerusalema ke bana:" 
1Chronicles9:4 Utai, mora wa Amihude, setloholo sa Omeri, setloholwana sa Imeri, setlohotloholwana sa Bani ya tswetsweng ke Perese, mora wa Juda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Ho bara ba Shilo ya eba letsibolo la hae Asaya le bara ba hae; 
1Chronicles9:6 ho bara ba Sera ya eba Jeuele le bana babo, ba le makgolo a tsheletseng le mashome a robong;" 
1Chronicles9:7 ho bara ba Benjamine ya eba Salo, mora wa Meshulame, setloholo sa Hodafiya, setloholwana sa Hasenuwa," 
1Chronicles9:8 le Jibeneya, mora wa Jerohame, le Ela, mora wa Usi, setloholo sa Mikeri, le Meshulame, mora wa Shefatiya, setloholo sa Reuele, setloholwana sa Jibeneya." 
1Chronicles9:9 Bana babo bona, ho ya ka meloko ya bona, ba ne ba le makgolo a robong le mashome a mahlano a metso e tsheletseng. Banna bana bohle e ne e le dihlooho tsa malapa abo bona." 
1Chronicles9:10 Baprista ba neng ba ahile Jerusalema ke bana: Jedaya, le Jehoyaribe, le Jakine," 
1Chronicles9:11 le Asariya, mora wa Hilekiya, eo baholoholo ba hae e neng e le bo-Meshulame, le Sadoke, le Meraote, le Ahitube, eo e neng e le mookamedi wa Tempele ya Modimo," 
1Chronicles9:12 le Adaya, mora wa Jerohame, eo baholoholo ba hae e neng e le bo-Pashahure, le Malakiya, le Maasai, le Adiele, le Jahesera, le Meshulame, le Meshilemite, le Imere." 
1Chronicles9:13 Bana babo bona bao e neng e le dihlooho tsa malapa abo bona, ba ne ba le sekete le makgolo a supileng le mashome a tsheletseng. E ne e le banna ba tsebang ho sebeletsa ka Tempeleng ya Modimo." 
1Chronicles9:14 Balevi ba neng ba ahile Jerusalema ke bana: Shemaya, mora wa Hashube, setloholo sa Asarikama, setloholwana sa Hashabiya, e mong wa bara ba Merari," 
1Chronicles9:15 le Bakabakare, le Hereshe, le Galale, le Mataneya, mora wa Mmika, setloholo sa Sikeri, setloholwana sa Asafo," 
1Chronicles9:16 le Obadiya, mora wa Shemaya, setloholo sa Galale, setloholwana sa Jedutune, le Berekiya, mora wa Asa, setloholo sa Elekana ya neng a ahile metseng ya Banetofa." 
1Chronicles9:17 Balebedi ba menyako ya Tempele e ne e le Shalome, le Akube, le Talamone, le Ahimane, le bana babo bona. Mookamedi wa bona e ne e le Shalome." 
1Chronicles9:18 Pele ho mona, ba ne ba lebela kgoro ya kgosi e ka botjhabela, e le bona ba lebelang kgoro ya diahelo tsa Balevi." 
1Chronicles9:19 Shalome, mora wa Kore, setloholo sa Abiasafo, setloholwana sa Kora, le bana babo, ba lelapa la Kora, e ne e le baokamedi ba mosebetsi oo, e le balebedi ba menyako ya Tente ya Morena, jwalokaha bo-ntata bona ba ne ba okametse lebotho le lebelang menyako ya Tente ya Morena." 
1Chronicles9:20 Mehleng ya pele, Finease, mora wa Eleasare, e ne e le mookamedi wa bona, mme Morena a ena le yena." 
1Chronicles9:21 Sekariya, mora wa Meshelemiya, e ne e le molebedi wa monyako wa Tente ya Morena." 
1Chronicles9:22 Bohle ba ileng ba kgethelwa hore e be balebedi ba menyako ba ne ba le makgolo a mabedi le leshome le metso e mmedi. Ba ne ba badilwe ho ya ka meloko ya bona, metseng ya habo bona. Bo-Davida le moporofeta Samuele ke bona ba neng ba hlomamise banna bana mosebetsing ona wa bona, o nang le boikarabelo." 
1Chronicles9:23 Ka baka leo, banna bao le bara ba bona, ba ne ba lebela menyako ya Tempele ya Morena, e leng Tente ya Morena." 
1Chronicles9:24 Balebedi ba menyako ba ne ba lebela mahlakore a mane, ke ho re ka botjhabela, le ka bophirimela, le ka leboya, le ka borwa." 
1Chronicles9:25 Bana babo bona, ba metseng ya bona, ba ne ba etla ka nako le nako, kamora matsatsi a supileng, ho tla ba phomotsa." 
1Chronicles9:26 Balebedi ba menyako ba bane, ba baholo, bao e neng e le Balevi, ba ne ba hlokomela dikamore, le matlole a Tempele ya Modimo." 
1Chronicles9:27 Ba ne ba qeta bosiu ba potapotile Tempele ya Modimo, hobane ba ne ba laetswe ho e lebela, le ho e bula hoseng ho hong le ho hong." 
1Chronicles9:28 Balevi ba bang ba ne ba hlokomela thepa e sebeletsang, ba e bale ha ba e tlisa ka Tempeleng, leha ba e kgutlisetsa polokelong." 
1Chronicles9:29 Ba bang ba ne ba hlokomela dintho tsohle tsa Sehalalelo, le phofo e thumisehileng, le veine, le ole, le mokubetso, le dinoko." 
1Chronicles9:30 Ba bang ba bara ba baprista ba ne ba etsa ditlolo ka dinoko. 
1Chronicles9:31 Matiteya, e mong wa Balevi, e leng letsibolo la Shalome, wa morabe wa Kora, o ne a hlokomela tsohle tse phehwang ka dipane." 
1Chronicles9:32 Bana babo bona ba bang, e leng bara ba Kohate, ba ne ba hlokomela bohobe bo halalelang, ba bo bea tafoleng ka letsatsi le leng le le leng la Sabatha." 
1Chronicles9:33 Bao e neng e le dibini le dihlooho tsa malapa a Balevi, ba ne ba dula ka dikamoreng tsa Tempele, ba sa sebetse mesebetsi e meng, hobane bona ba ne ba sebetsa motsheare le bosiu." 
1Chronicles9:34 Bana e ne e le dihlooho tsa malapa a Balevi, e le dihlooho tsa meloko yohle ya bona, mme ba ahile Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles9:35 Jeiele, mothei wa Gibeone, o ne a ahile Gibeone. Lebitso la mosadi wa hae e ne e le Maaka." 
1Chronicles9:36 Mora wa hae wa matsibolo e ne e le Abadone, a hlahlangwa ke Sure, le Kishe, le Baale, le Nere, le Nadabe," 
1Chronicles9:37 le Gedore, le Ako, le Sekariya, le Mikelote." 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikelote a tswala Shimeame. Le bona ba ne ba ahile Jerusalema, haufi le bana babo bona." 
1Chronicles9:39 Nere a tswala Kishe, Kishe a tswala Saule, Saule a tswala Jonathane le Malekishuwa, le Abinadabe, le Eshebaale." 
1Chronicles9:40 Mora wa Jonathane e ne e le Meriba-Baale; Meriba-Baale a tswala Mmika. 
1Chronicles9:41 Bana ba Mmika e ne e le Pitone, le Meleke, le Taherea, le Akase." 
1Chronicles9:42 Akase a tswala Jara, Jara a tswala Alemete, le Asemafete, le Simeri, mme Simeri a tswala Mosa." 
1Chronicles9:43 Mosa a tswala Bina, Bina a tswala Refaya, Refaya a tswala Eleasa, Eleasa a tswala Asele." 
1Chronicles9:44 Asele o ne a ena le bara ba tsheletseng. Mabitso a bona ke ana: Asarikama, le Bokeru, le Ishemaele, le Sheariya, le Obadiya, le Hanane. Bana e ne e le bara ba Asele." 
1Chronicles10:1 Bafilesita ba lwantsha Baiseraele. Banna ba Iseraele ba ba baleha, ba wa mofela hodima thaba ya Gileboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Bafilesita ba bea Saule le bara ba hae merebele, ba bolaya Jonathane, le Abinadabe, le Malekishuwa, bara ba Saule." 
1Chronicles10:3 Ntwa ya imela Saule. Banna ba diqha ba fula Saule ka metsu, mme a tswa kotsi e mpe." 
1Chronicles10:4 Yaba Saule o re ho mojari wa dihlomo tsa hae: “Nka sabole ya hao, o ntlhabe, esere maqai ana a fihla a nqetela, mme ka tlontloloha.” Empa mojari wa dihlomo tsa hae a hana, hobane o ne a tshohile haholo. Ka baka leo, Saule a nka sabole ya hae, a itihela hodima yona." 
1Chronicles10:5 Ha mojari wa dihlomo tsa hae a bona hore Saule o shwele, le yena a itihela hodima sabole ya hae, a shwa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Saule a shwa hammoho le bara ba hae ba bararo, le ba lelapa la hae bohle." 
1Chronicles10:7 Ha Baiseraele bohle ba neng ba le ka kgohlong ba bona hore bahlabani ba a baleha, le hore Saule le bara ba hae ba se ba bolailwe, ba siya metse ya bona, ba baleha. Yaba Bafilesita ba a tla, ba ikgahela ho yona." 
1Chronicles10:8 Ka le hlahlamang, ha Bafilesita ba tlilo hlobodisa ba bolailweng, ba fumana Saule le bara ba hae ba bolaetswe thabeng ya Gileboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Ha ba se ba hlobodisitse Saule, ba nka hlooho ya hae, le seaparo sa hae sa ntwa, ba romela maqosa hohle naheng ya Bafilesita ho phatlalatsa taba ena e thabisang ho medimo ya bona ya bohata, le ho setjhaba sohle." 
1Chronicles10:10 Ba bea seaparo sa Saule sa ntwa ka tempeleng ya medimo ya bona ya bohata, hlooho ya hae yona ba e fanyeha ka tempeleng ya Dagone." 
1Chronicles10:11 Ha baahi bohle ba Jabeshe-Gileade ba utlwa seo Bafilesita ba se entseng Saule," 
1Chronicles10:12 banna bohle ba bahale ba phalla, ba nka setopo sa Saule, le ditopo tsa bara ba hae, ba di isa Jabeshe. Ba epela masapo a bona tlasa sefate sa eike se Jabeshe, mme ba itima dijo ka matsatsi a supileng." 
1Chronicles10:13 Yaba Saule o shwa ka baka la ditshito tsa hae, tseo a ileng a sitelwa Morena ka tsona, e leng ho se boloke ditaelo tsa Morena, le ho batla dikeletso ho mathuela." 
1Chronicles10:14 O ne a sa ka a botsa Morena, mme ka baka leo, Morena o ile a mmolaya, mmuso wa hae a o nea Davida, mora wa Jese." 
1Chronicles11:1 Baiseraele bohle ba kgobokanela Heborone, ho Davida, mme ba re: “Bona, re madi a le mang." 
1Chronicles11:2 Mehleng ya ha Saule e ne e le kgosi ya rona, e ne e le wena ya etellang Baiseraele pele ha ba futuha. Morena Modimo wa hao, a na a re ho wena: O tla disa setjhaba sa ka sa Baiseraele, mme o tla ba kgosi ya setjhaba sa ka sa Baiseraele. ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Yaba baholo bohle ba Iseraele ba ya ho kgosi e le Heborone. Davida a etsa selekane le bona moo Heborone, kapele ho Morena, mme ba mo tlotsa hore e be kgosi ya Iseraele, ho ya ka polelo ya Morena, eo a neng a e bolele ka Samuele." 
1Chronicles11:4 Yaba Davida le Baiseraele bohle ba ya Jerusalema, e neng e bitswa Jebuse, e leng moo Bajebuse, baahi ba naha eo, ba neng ba ahile teng." 
1Chronicles11:5 Baahi ba Jebuse ba re ho Davida: “O ke ke wa kena mona!” Leha ho le jwalo, Davida a hapa qhobosheane ya Sione, e leng yona Motse wa Davida." 
1Chronicles11:6 Davida a re: “Mang kapa mang ya tla bolaya Mojebuse pele, e tla ba molaodi e moholo.” Joabe, mora wa Seruya, a tlola pele, mme ya eba yena molaodi." 
1Chronicles11:7 Davida a aha qhobosheaneng eo; ka baka leo, ba e bitsa Motse wa Davida." 
1Chronicles11:8 A haha motse o potapotileng qhobosheane eo ho tloha Milo. Joabe yena a tsosa marako wohle a motse. 
1Chronicles11:9 Davida a nna a tswela pele ho matlafala, hobane Morena wa mabotho o ne a ena le yena." 
1Chronicles11:10 Bana ke bona baokamedi ba bahale ba Davida, ba neng ba mo tsheheditse mmusong wa hae, mmoho le Baiseraele bohle, hore e be kgosi, ho ya ka polelo ya Morena, eo a neng a e bue mabapa le Iseraele." 
1Chronicles11:11 Palo ya bahale ba Davida ke ena: Jashobame wa Mohakemoni e ne e le yena mookamedi wa balaodi. Ke yena ya neng a fekefe banna ba makgolo a mararo ka lerumo, a ba bolaya ka nako e le nngwe." 
1Chronicles11:12 O ne a hlahlangwa ke Eleasare, mora wa Dodo, wa morabe wa Ahohi, e le e mong wa bahale ba bararo." 
1Chronicles11:13 O ne a ena le Davida ha a le Pasa-Damime, moo Bafilesita ba neng ba theile theko ya ntwa teng, tshimong ya harese. Bahlabani ba baleha Bafilesita." 
1Chronicles11:14 Eleasare le bahlabani ba hae ba ikema hara tshimo, ba e hapa, ba bolaya Bafilesita, mme Morena a ba tlisetsa tlholo e kgolo." 
1Chronicles11:15 Ba bararo ba baokamedi ba mashome a mararo ba theohela ho Davida lefikeng, ka lehaheng la Adulame. Lebotho la Bafilesita le ne le hlomme ka kgohlong ya Refaime." 
1Chronicles11:16 Davida o ne a le ka qhobosheaneng, ha lebotho la Bafilesita lona le ne le le Betlelehema." 
1Chronicles11:17 Davida a utlwa a nyorilwe, mme a re: “Eka motho a ka mpha metsi a tswang sedibeng sa Betlelehema, se pela kgoro ya motse!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Jwale bahale ba bararo ba phunyeletsa mabotho a Bafilesita, ba ya kga metsi sedibeng sa Betlelehema se pela kgoro ya motse. Ba ekga metsi ao, ba a isa ho Davida. Empa Davida a hana ho a nwa, a a qhalla fatshe e le nyehelo ho Morena," 
1Chronicles11:19 a re: “Modimo wa ka a nthuse ke se ke ka etsa ntho ena. Na nka nwa madi a banna bao ba ileng ba ipea kotsing?” Ba ne ba ile ba ipea kotsing ka ho ya kga metsi, ka baka leo, a se ke a a nwa. Tsena di ile tsa etswa ke bahale bana ba bararo." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abishai, ngwanabo Joabe, e ne e le yena mookamedi wa ba mashome a mararo. Ke yena ya neng a fekefe ba makgolo a mararo ka lerumo, a ba bolaya, mme lebitso la hae la tuma hara ba mashome a mararo." 
1Chronicles11:21 A tuma ho feta bahlabani ba mashome a mararo, ya eba molaodi wa bona. Empa a se ke a tuma jwaloka balaodi ba bararo ba pele." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaya, mora wa Jehoyada, ya neng a etswa Kabeseele, e ne e le monna ya tumileng ka diketso tsa bokwankwetla. A bolaya bahale ba babedi ba Moabe, ba bohale jwaloka tau. A ba a bolaya le tau e neng e le ka lemeneng, mohla lehlwa le neng le kgethehile." 
1Chronicles11:23 A bolaya monna wa Moegepeta, wa seqhobane, eo bolelele ba hae bo neng bo feta dimethara tse pedi. Moegepeta eo o ne a tshwere lerumo le lekaalo ka mofeng wa motjhine o ohlang, empa Benaya a ya ho yena a tshwere molamu; a hlotha lerumo letsohong la Moegepeta, a mmolaya ka lerumo leo la hae." 
1Chronicles11:24 Tsena ke tsona diketso tsa Benaya, mora wa Jehoyada, tse ileng tsa mo tumisa hara ba mashome a mararo." 
1Chronicles11:25 O ne a tumile ho feta ba mashome a mararo, empa a sa tuma jwaloka balaodi ba bararo ba pele. Davida a mo etsa mookamedi wa balebedi ba hae." 
1Chronicles11:26 Bahale ba bang ba Davida e ne e le Bana: Asaele, ngwanabo Joabe, le Elehanane, mora wa Dodo wa Betlelehema," 
1Chronicles11:27 le Shamote wa Harode, le Helese wa Mopelone," 
1Chronicles11:28 le Ira mora wa Ikeshe wa Tekowa, le Abiesere wa Anatote," 
1Chronicles11:29 le Sibekai wa Husha, le Ilai wa Ahohi," 
1Chronicles11:30 le Maharai wa Netofa, le Helede, mora wa Baana wa Netofa," 
1Chronicles11:31 le Itai mora wa Ribai wa Gibea, wa ba morabe wa Benjamine, le Benaya wa Piratone," 
1Chronicles11:32 le Hurai wa melatswaneng ya Gaasha, le Abiele wa Areba," 
1Chronicles11:33 le Asemafete wa Bahurime, le Eleaheba wa Shaaleboni," 
1Chronicles11:34 le bara ba Hasheme wa Gisone, le Jonathane mora wa Shage wa Harare," 
1Chronicles11:35 le Ahiame, mora wa Sakara wa Harare, le Elefale, mora wa Ure," 
1Chronicles11:36 le Hefere wa Mekera, le Ahiya wa Mopelone," 
1Chronicles11:37 le Hesero wa Karamele, le Naarai, mora wa Esebai," 
1Chronicles11:38 le Joele, ngwanabo Nathane, le Mibehare, mora wa Hageri," 
1Chronicles11:38 le Joele, ngwanabo Nathane, le Mibehare, mora wa Hageri," 
1Chronicles11:39 le Seleke wa Moamone, le Naharai wa Berota, mojari wa dihlomo tsa Joabe, mora wa Seruya," 
1Chronicles11:40 le Ira wa Jethero, le Garebe wa Jethero," 
1Chronicles11:41 le Uriya wa Mohete, le Sabada, mora wa Akalai," 
1Chronicles11:42 le Adina, mora wa Shisa wa morabe wa Rubene, eo e neng e le molaodi wa ba morabe wa Rubene, le ba mashome a mararo ba neng ba ena le yena," 
1Chronicles11:43 le Hanane, mora wa Maaka, le Joshafate wa Miteni," 
1Chronicles11:44 le Usiya wa Ashetarote, le Shama, le Jeiele, bara ba Hotame wa Arowere," 
1Chronicles11:45 le Jediaele, mora wa Shimeri, le Joha wa Tise, e leng ngwanabo," 
1Chronicles11:46 le Eleele wa Mohafa, le Jeribai, le Joshafeya, bara ba Elenaama, le Jitema wa Moabe," 
1Chronicles11:47 le Eleele, le Obede, le Jaasiele wa Mesobaya." 
1Chronicles12:1 Bana ke bona ba ileng ba tla ho Davida ha a ntse a ipatile Sikelage, ka baka la ho tshaba Saule, mora wa Kishe. E ne e le ba bang ba bahale ba neng ba mo thusa ntweng." 
1Chronicles12:2 Ba ne ba hlometse ka diqha, mme ha ba betsa majwe ka matjeketjane, kapa ba fula ka metsu, ba ne ba tseba ho sebedisa matsoho a matona kapa a matshehadi ka ho tshwana. E ne e le ba morabe wa Benjamine, e le bang ka Saule." 
1Chronicles12:3 Mookamedi wa bona e ne e le Ahiesere, a hlahlangwa ke Jowashe. Bobedi ba bona e ne e le bara ba Shemaa wa Gibea. Baokamedi ba bang e ne e le Jesiele, le Pelete, bara ba Asemafete, le Beraka, le Jehu wa Anatote," 
1Chronicles12:4 le Jisemaya wa Gibeone, eo e neng e le e mong wa bahale ba mashome a mararo, e bile e le molaodi wa bona, le Jeremia, le Jahasiele, le Johanane, le Josabada wa Gedera," 
1Chronicles12:5 le Elosai, le Jerimote, le Bealeya, le Shemariya, le Shefatiya wa Harufe," 
1Chronicles12:6 le Elekana, le Jeshia, le Asariele, le Joesere, le Jashobame, e leng ba morabe wa Kora," 
1Chronicles12:7 le Joela, le Sebadiya, e leng bara ba Jerohame wa motse wa Gedore." 
1Chronicles12:7 le Joela, le Sebadiya, e leng bara ba Jerohame wa motse wa Gedore." 
1Chronicles12:8 Ba bang ba morabe wa Gade ba fetohela ka ho Davida ha a le qhobosheaneng e lehwatateng. E ne e le banna ba dinatla, ba matsholathebe, ba tsebang ho lwana ka thebe le lerumo. Difahleho tsa bona di ne di ka tsa ditau, ba le lebelo jwaloka dikgama tsa thaba." 
1Chronicles12:9 Wa pele e ne e le Esere, wa bobedi e le Obadiya, wa boraro e le Eliabe," 
1Chronicles12:10 wa bone e le Mishemanna, wa bohlano e le Jeremia," 
1Chronicles12:11 wa botshelela a le Atai, wa bosupa e le Eleele," 
1Chronicles12:12 wa borobedi e le Johanane, wa borobong e le Elesabade," 
1Chronicles12:13 wa leshome e le Jeremia, wa leshome le motso o mong e le Makabanai." 
1Chronicles12:14 Bana e ne e le bara ba Gade, e le balaodi ba mabotho. Molaodi ya ka sehloohong o ne a ka phaladisa lebotho la bahlabani ba sekete, ya katlasetlase a ka phaladisa lebotho la ba lekgolo." 
1Chronicles12:15 Bana ke bona ba neng ba tshele noka ya Jorodane, ka kgwedi ya pele, ha noka eo e ne e eja ditlhokwa. Ba leleka bohle ba phelang ka kgohlong, ba ka botjhabela le ka bophirimela." 
1Chronicles12:16 Ba bang ba morabe wa Benjamine le ba morabe wa Juda le bona ba ya ho Davida qhobosheaneng. 
1Chronicles12:17 Davida a ya ba kgahlanyetsa, a re ho bona: “Haeba le tlile ka kgotso, ho tla nthusa, ke tla le kgomarela, empa haeba le tlile ho tla nkekela dira tsa ka, leha ke se na molato, Modimo wa bo-ntata rona o tla le bona, a le otle.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Jwale Moya wa Modimo wa theohela hodima Amasai, molaodi wa ba mashome a mararo, mme a re: “Oho, Davida, re ba hao, re ba hao, mora wa Jese! Kgotso e ke e be le wena, kgotso ho bathusi ba hao, hoba o thuswa ke Modimo wa hao.” Yaba Davida o a ba amohela, mme a ba etsa balaodi ba mabothwana a hae." 
1Chronicles12:19 Ba bang ba morabe wa Manase le bona ba fetohela ka ho Davida, mohla a neng a ena le Bafilesita ha ba futuhetse Saule. Empa a se ke a thusa Bafilesita, hobane mahosana a bona a ne a ile a eletswa hore a mo leleke, a re: “O tla fetohela ka ho monga hae Saule, ebe re a bolawa.”" 
1Chronicles12:20 Yare ha Davida a eya Sikelage banna bana ba morabe wa Manase ba fetohela ka ho yena: Adenake, le Josabada, le Jediaele, le Mikaele, le Josabada, le Elehu, le Siletai. E mong le e mong wa bona e ne e le molaodi wa bahlabani ba sekete." 
1Chronicles12:21 Ke bona ba ileng ba thusa Davida ho lwantsha mabothwana a hlaselang, hobane kaofela ha bona e ne e le bahale, e bile e le balaodi ba mabotho." 
1Chronicles12:22 Ka tsatsi le leng le le leng banna ba nna ba tla ho Davida, ho tla mo thusa, ho fihlela lebotho la hae le eba leholo jwalokaha eka ke lebotho la Modimo." 
1Chronicles12:23 Ena ke palo ya bahlabani ba mabothwana a hlometseng, a ileng a tla ho Davida ha a le Heborone, ho ya mmea hore e be kgosi sebakeng sa Saule, ho ya ka polelo ya Morena." 
1Chronicles12:24 Ba morabe wa Juda ba neng ba tshwara thebe le lerumo, e ne e le banna ba dikete tse tsheletseng le makgolo a robedi." 
1Chronicles12:25 Ba morabe wa Simeone e ne e le bahale ba dikete tse supileng le lekgolo. 
1Chronicles12:26 Ba morabe wa Levi e ne e le dikete tse nne le makgolo a tsheletseng. 
1Chronicles12:27 Jehoyada e ne e le moetapele wa lelapa la Arone, a ena le banna ba dikete tse tharo le makgolo a supileng." 
1Chronicles12:28 Sadoke, mohale wa mohlankana, o ne a ena le balaodi ba mashome a mabedi a metso e mmedi, ba tswang lapeng labo." 
1Chronicles12:29 Ba morabe wa Benjamine, bao e neng e le bang ka Saule, ba ne ba le dikete tse tharo. Ho fihlela ka nako eo, bongata ba bona bo ne bo ntse bo le ka lehlakoreng la Saule." 
1Chronicles12:30 Ba morabe wa Efraime e ne e le bahale ba dikete tse mashome a mabedi le makgolo a robedi, ba tumileng malapeng abo bona." 
1Chronicles12:31 Ba karolo ya morabe wa Manase, ba neng ba thontswe ka mabitso ho tla bea Davida hore e be kgosi, ba ne ba le dikete tse leshome le metso e robedi." 
1Chronicles12:32 Ba morabe wa Isakare, ba neng ba tseba ditaba tsa mehla eo, ba tseba le seo Iseraele e lokelang ho se etsa, e ne e le baetapele ba makgolo a mabedi, e le bona ba laolang bang ka bona bohle." 
1Chronicles12:33 Ba morabe wa Sebulone, ba neng ba futuha, ba kwetliseditswe ho lwana ka mefuta yohle ya dihlomo, ba theile theko ya ntwa, ba ne ba le dikete tse mashome a mahlano, mme ba tshepahala." 
1Chronicles12:34 Ba morabe wa Nafthali e ne e le balaodi ba sekete, ba ena le bahlabani ba dikete tse mashome a mararo a metso e supileng, ba hlometseng ka dithebe le marumo." 
1Chronicles12:35 Ba morabe wa Dane, ba neng ba kwetliseditswe ntwa, ba ne ba le dikete tse mashome a mabedi a metso e robedi, le makgolo a tsheletseng." 
1Chronicles12:36 Ba morabe wa Ashere, ba neng ba kwetliseditswe ntwa, e le malalaalaotse, ba ne ba le dikete tse mashome a mane." 
1Chronicles12:37 Ba morabe wa Rubene, le ba morabe wa Gade, le karolo ya ba morabe wa Manase, ba neng ba le ka botjhabela ho Jorodane, ba ne ba le dikete tse lekgolo le mashome a mabedi, ba hlometse ka mefuta yohle ya dihlomo." 
1Chronicles12:38 Bahlabani bana bohle, ba neng ba ema thekong ya ntwa, ba fihla Heborone ba ikemiseditse ho bea Davida hore e be kgosi ya Iseraele. Le Baiseraele bohle ba ne ba le maikutlo a le mang a hore Davida a bewe, e be kgosi." 
1Chronicles12:39 Bana bohle ba qeta matsatsi a mararo ba ena le Davida, ba ntse ba eja, ba enwa tseo bana babo bona ba neng ba ba lokiseditse tsona." 
1Chronicles12:40 Le ba neng ba le haufi le bona, e leng ba merabe ya Isakare, le Sebulone, le Nafthali, ba ba tlisetsa dijo ba di bofile ditonking, le dikameleng, le dimmeileng, le dipeleseng: phofo, le diphaphatha tsa mangangajane a feiye, le diphaphatha tsa mangangajane a morara, le veine, le ole, le dipholo le dinku. Tsena ba di tlisa ka bongata, hobane Baiseraele ba ne ba thabile." 
1Chronicles13:1 Davida a rerisana le balaodi ba bahlabani ba dikete, le ba ba makgolo, le mookamedi e mong le e mong wa mabotho." 
1Chronicles13:2 Yaba o re ho setjhaba sohle sa Iseraele: “Haeba le rata, eba le Morena Modimo wa rona o a rata, a re romeleng molaetsa hohle naheng ya Iseraele, moo bana babo rona ba ahileng teng; re o romele le ho baprista, le ho Balevi ba metseng le metsaneng, hore ba phuthehele kwano." 
1Chronicles13:3 Jwale re boele re late areka ya Modimo wa rona, re e tlise kwano, hobane mehleng ya Saule ha re a ka ra e natsa.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Setjhaba sohle sa re se tla etsa jwalo, hobane se ne se bona hore hoo ho lokile." 
1Chronicles13:5 Yaba Davida o kgobokanya Baiseraele bohle, ho tloha nokeng ya Shihore e Egepeta, ho ya fihla kgorong ya Hamate, hore ba yo lata areka ya Modimo, Kiriate-Jearime." 
1Chronicles13:6 Jwale Davida le Baiseraele bohle ba nyolohela Baala, e leng hona Kiriate-Jearime e Juda, ho ya lata areka ya Morena Modimo, ya dutseng hodima dikerubime, e leng areka eo a tla kgumamellwa ho yona." 
1Chronicles13:7 Ba bea areka ya Modimo hodima kariki e ntjha, ba e ntsha ka tlung ya Abinadabe. Bo-Usa le Ako ba qhoba kariki eo." 
1Chronicles13:8 Davida le bohle ba ntlo ya Iseraele ba etsa motjeko ka sefutho se seholo, ba le kapele ho Modimo. Ba letsa diharepa, le dikatara, le meropa, le matlheretlhere, le diterompeta." 
1Chronicles13:9 Ha ba fihla seotlong sa Kidone, Usa a nanabetsa letsoho, a tshwara areka, hobane dipholo di ne di kgothometseha." 
1Chronicles13:10 Bohale ba Modimo ba tlokomela Usa, mme Morena a mmolaya, hobane o ne a ile a ama areka. A shwela hona moo, kapele ho Modimo." 
1Chronicles13:11 Davida a tshwenyeha haholo, hobane Morena o ne a bolaile Usa; ka baka leo, yaba sebaka seo se rewa lebitso la Kotlo ya Usa, mme le kajeno-ya-bokajeno se ntse se bitswa jwalo." 
1Chronicles13:12 Ka lona letsatsi leo, Davida a tshaba Modimo, mme a re: “Ekaba areka ya Modimo ke tla e isa jwang ha ka?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Yaba Davida ha a sa isa areka eo ha hae, Motseng wa Davida, o se a e isa tlung ya Obede-Edomo wa Mogate." 
1Chronicles13:14 Areka eo ya Modimo ya qeta kgwedi tse tharo e le moo ha Obede-Edomo, ka tlung ya hae. Morena a hlohonolofatsa lelapa la Obede-Edomo le tsohle tseo a neng a ena le tsona." 
1Chronicles14:1 Jwale kgosi Hirame wa Tire a romela maqosa ho Davida; a ba a mo romella le mapolanka a kedare, le dibetli tsa majwe le tsa mapolanka, ho ya mo hahela ntlo." 
1Chronicles14:2 Davida a elellwa hore Morena o mo tsitsisitse bokgosing ba Iseraele, hobane puso ya hae e ile ya atlehiswa haholo, ka baka la setjhaba sa hae sa Iseraele." 
1Chronicles14:3 Davida a boela a nyala basadi ba bang hape ha a le Jerusalema, mme a tswala bara le baradi ba bang ba bangata." 
1Chronicles14:4 Ana ke mabitso a bana ba Davida, bao a ileng a ba tswala ha a le Jerusalema: Shamua, le Shobabe, le Nathane, le Solomone," 
1Chronicles14:5 le Jibehare, le Eleshua, le Elepalete," 
1Chronicles14:6 le Noga, le Nefege, le Jafia," 
1Chronicles14:7 le Eleshama, le Beleada, le Elefelede." 
1Chronicles14:8 Ha Bafilesita ba utlwa hore Davida o tlotsitswe hore e be kgosi ya naha ya Iseraele, ba futuha ho ya mo tsoma. Davida a utlwela, mme a ya ba kgahlanyetsa." 
1Chronicles14:9 Bafilesita ba tla, ba fihla ba shatamana ka kgohlong ya Refaime." 
1Chronicles14:10 Yaba Davida o botsa Morena, o re: “Na nka futuhela Bafilesita? Na o tla neelana ka bona matsohong a ka?” Morena a re ho yena: “Futuha, hobane ke tla neelana ka bona matsohong a hao.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Yaba Davida o ba futuhela ha ba le Baale-Perasime, mme a ba hlolela hona moo. Jwale Davida a re: “Modimo o phunyeleditse theko ya dira tsa ka ka letsoho la ka, jwaloka metsi ha a phatlola lerako.” Ka baka leo, ba rea sebaka seo lebitso la Baale-Perasime." 
1Chronicles14:12 Bafilesita ba siya medimo ya bona hona moo, mme Davida a laela hore e tjheswe." 
1Chronicles14:13 Bafilesita ba boela ba shatamana ka kgohlong. 
1Chronicles14:14 Ka baka leo, Davida a boela a botsa Modimo, mme Modimo a re ho yena: “O se ke wa ba futuhela o ba setse morao; o ba pote ka nqane, o ba futuhele o hlaha ka difateng tsa monokotshwai." 
1Chronicles14:15 E tle ere ha o utlwa mohlwathatsa hodima difate tsa monokotshwai, ebe o a futuha, hobane Modimo o tla be a o eteletse pele ho ya bolaya lebotho la Bafilesita.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Ka baka leo, Davida a etsa kamoo Modimo a mo laetseng kateng, mme Baiseraele ba phaladisa lebotho la Bafilesita ho tloha Gibeone, ho ya fihla Gesere." 
1Chronicles14:17 Botumo ba Davida ba phatlalla le dinaha tsohle, mme Morena a etsa hore ditjhaba tsohle di mo tshabe." 
1Chronicles15:1 Davida a ikgahela matlo Motseng wa Davida, a lokisetsa areka ya Modimo sebaka sa yona, a e hlomela tente." 
1Chronicles15:2 Yaba Davida o re: “Ho se be ya ka jarang areka ya Modimo, haese Balevi feela, hobane bona ba kgethilwe ke Morena hore ba jare areka ya Modimo, mme ba mo sebeletse kamehla yohle.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Davida a kgobokanyetsa Baiseraele bohle Jerusalema, hore ba ise areka ya Morena sebakeng seo a e lokiseditseng sona." 
1Chronicles15:4 Davida a kgobokanya bana ba Arone le Balevi. 
1Chronicles15:5 Ho bara ba Kohate, hlooho ya bona e ne e le Uriele, bana babo ba le lekgolo le mashome a mabedi." 
1Chronicles15:6 Ho bara ba Merari, hlooho ya bona e ne e le Asaya, bana babo ba le makgolo a mabedi le mashome a mabedi." 
1Chronicles15:7 Ho bara ba Gereshone, hlooho ya bona e ne e le Joele, bana babo ba le lekgolo le mashome a mararo." 
1Chronicles15:7 Ho bara ba Gereshone, hlooho ya bona e ne e le Joele, bana babo ba le lekgolo le mashome a mararo." 
1Chronicles15:8 Ho bara ba Elesafane, hlooho ya bona e ne e le Shemaya, bana babo ba le makgolo a mabedi." 
1Chronicles15:9 Ho bara ba Heborone, hlooho ya bona e ne e le Eleele, bana babo ba le mashome a robedi." 
1Chronicles15:10 Ho bara ba Usiele, hlooho ya bona e ne e le Aminadabe, bana babo ba le lekgolo le leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles15:11 Jwale Davida a bitsa baprista, e leng Sadoke le Abiatare; a bitsa le Balevi, e leng Uriele, le Asaya, le Joele, le Shemaya, le Eleele, le Aminadabe." 
1Chronicles15:11 Jwale Davida a bitsa baprista, e leng Sadoke le Abiatare; a bitsa le Balevi, e leng Uriele, le Asaya, le Joele, le Shemaya, le Eleele, le Aminadabe." 
1Chronicles15:12 Yaba o re ho bona: “Ke lona dihlooho tsa malapa a Balevi; ka hona itlhwekiseng, lona le bana babo lona, le tle le tsebe ho tlisa areka ya Morena Modimo wa Iseraele, sebakeng seo ke e lokiseditseng sona." 
1Chronicles15:13 Kahobane ha e a ka ya tliswa ke lona ka lekgetlo la pele, Morena Modimo wa Iseraele, o ile a re halefela, hobane re ne re sa ka ra mo hlompha ka mokgwa o tshwanetseng.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Yaba baprista le Balevi ba a itlhwekisa, hore ba tle ba tsebe ho lata areka ya Morena Modimo wa Iseraele." 
1Chronicles15:15 Balevi ba jara areka ya Modimo ka mefeng, jwalokaha Moshe a ne a ba laele, ho ya ka polelo ya Morena." 
1Chronicles15:16 Davida a buisana le bao e leng dihlooho tsa Balevi, hore ba kgethe bana babo bona ba tla bina ka diletsa, e leng dikatara, le diharepa, le matlheretlhere, ba bine haholo, ba thabile." 
1Chronicles15:17 Balevi ba kgetha Hemane, mora wa Joele; ho bana babo ba kgetha Asafo, mora wa Berekiya; ho bara ba Merari ba kgetha Etane, mora wa Kushaya." 
1Chronicles15:17 Balevi ba kgetha Hemane, mora wa Joele; ho bana babo ba kgetha Asafo, mora wa Berekiya; ho bara ba Merari ba kgetha Etane, mora wa Kushaya." 
1Chronicles15:18 Ba ba hlahlamang ka boemo ya eba Sekariya, le Jaasiele, le Shemiramote, le Jeiele, le Uni, le Eliabe, le Benaya, le Maasiya, le Matiteya, le Elefelehu, le Mikeniya, le Obede-Edomo, le Jeiele, e leng balebedi ba monyako." 
1Chronicles15:19 Dibini tsena, bo-Hemane le Asafo, le Etane, tsa kgethelwa hore di letse matlheretlhere a lethose." 
1Chronicles15:20 Bo-Sekariya, le Jaasiele, le Shemiramote, le Jehiele, le Uni, le Eliabe, le Maasiya, le Benaya, ba letsa dikatara tse lentswe le lesesanyane." 
1Chronicles15:21 Bo-Matiteya le Elefelehu le Mikeniya, le Obede-Edomo, le Jeiele, le Asasiya ba letsa diharepa tse lentswe le letenya." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenaniya, eo e neng e le hlooho ya Balevi, o ne a okametse dibini, a di ruta mmino, kaha e ne e le kgeleke." 
1Chronicles15:23 Bo-Berekiya le Elekana e ne e le balebedi ba areka. 
1Chronicles15:24 Baprista, bo-Shebaniya, le Jehoshafate, le Netanele, le Amasai, le Sekariya, le Benaya, le Eleesere, bona ba ne ba letsa diterompeta ba le kapele ho areka ya Modimo. Bo-Obede-Edomo le Jehiya e ne e le balebedi ba areka." 
1Chronicles15:25 Jwale bo-Davida, le baholo ba Iseraele, le balaodi ba bahlabani ba dikete, ba ya tlung ya Obede-Edomo, ho ya lata areka ya selekane sa Morena, ba thabile." 
1Chronicles15:26 Kahobane Modimo a ne a ile a thusa Balevi ba jereng areka ya selekane sa Morena, ba etsa nyehelo ka dipohwana tse supileng le dipheleu tse supileng." 
1Chronicles15:27 Davida o ne a apere seaparo se setle, se entsweng ka lesela la lene, esita le Balevi bohle ba neng ba jere areka, le dibini, le Kenaniya, motsamaisi wa dibini. Davida o ne a bile a apere le setipe se entsweng ka motsitla." 
1Chronicles15:28 Yaba Baiseraele bohle ba tlisa areka ya Morena ka ditlatse, le ka medumo ya manaka, le ka diterompeta, le ka matlheretlhere; ba letsa le dikatara, le diharepa." 
1Chronicles15:29 Yare ha areka ya selekane sa Morena e kena Motseng wa Davida, Mikale, moradi wa Saule, a sheba ka fesetere, a bona Davida a tlala, a etsa menyakwe, mme a mo nyedisa." 
1Chronicles16:1 Baiseraele ba tla le areka ya Modimo, ba e bea bohareng ba tente eo Davida a e hlometseng yona. Ba etsetsa Modimo dinyehelo tsa setjheso, le dinyehelo tsa teboho." 
1Chronicles16:2 Ha Davida a qetile ho etsa dinyehelo tsa setjheso le dinyehelo tsa teboho, a hlohonolofatsa setjhaba ka lebitso la Morena." 
1Chronicles16:3 Yaba o abela monna e mong le e mong, le mosadi e mong le e mong wa Moiseraele senkgwa sa bohobe, le leqahadi la nama, le diphaphatha tsa mangangajane a morara." 
1Chronicles16:4 Davida a kgetha ba bang ba Balevi ho sebeletsa kapele ho areka ya Morena, ho ipiletsa ho Morena, le ho leboha, le ho boka Morena Modimo wa Iseraele." 
1Chronicles16:5 Asafo ya eba yena hlooho, a hlahlangwa ke Sekariya. Bo-Jeiele, le Shemiramote, le Jehiele, le Matiteya, le Eliabe, le Benaya, le Obede-Edomo, le Jeiele, bona ba ne ba letsa dikatara, le diharepa, athe Asafo yena o ne a letsa matlheretlhere." 
1Chronicles16:6 Baprista, bo-Benaya le Jahasiele, bona ba ne ba letsa diterompeta ka nako tsohle, kapele ho areka ya selekane sa Modimo." 
1Chronicles16:7 Ka lona letsatsi leo, Davida a laela Asafo le bana babo, mme e le kgetlo la pele, hore ba boke Morena ka sefela sena:" 
1Chronicles16:8 Lebohang Morena, le ipiletse ho yena, phatlalatsang ketso tsa hae hara ditjhaba." 
1Chronicles16:9 Mmineleng, mmineleng difela, le boledise mesebetsi ya hae yohle e hlollang." 
1Chronicles16:10 Ithoriseng ka lebitso le halalelang la hae: Pelo tsa bohle ba batlang Morena di nyakalle. 
1Chronicles16:11 Ipatleleng Morena le matla a hae, le ipatlele yena le sa kgaotse." 
1Chronicles16:12 Hopolang mesebetsi e hlollang eo a e entseng, dimakatso tsa hae le kahlolo tsa hae," 
1Chronicles16:13 lona bana ba Iseraele, mohlanka wa hae, lona bana ba Jakobo, mokgethwa wa hae." 
1Chronicles16:14 Ke yena Morena Modimo wa rona, ke yena ya ahlolang lefatshe lohle." 
1Chronicles16:15 Kamehla o hopola selekane sa hae, lentswe leo a le laetseng meloko e sekete;" 
1Chronicles16:16 selekane seo a se entseng, a se etsa le Aborahama, kano eo a e etseditseng Isaka," 
1Chronicles16:17 a ba a tiisetsa Jakobo hore ke molao, ke selekane sa hae le Iseraele sa mehla yohle." 
1Chronicles16:18 A re: “Ke tla o nea naha ya Kanana, e be lefa leo o le abetsweng.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 Ha ba ne ba sa le mmalwana, e le baditjhaba naheng eo;" 
1Chronicles16:20 ha ba ntse ba lelera hara ditjhaba, ba tloha mmusong o mong ba eya ho o mong," 
1Chronicles16:21 Modimo ha a a ka a dumella motho hore a ba tube, mme ka baka la bona a kgalemela dikgosi." 
1Chronicles16:22 A re: “Le se ke la ama batlotsuwa ba ka, le se ke la etsa baporofeta ba ka hampe.”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Lona ba lefatshe lohle le ke le binele Morena, ka letsatsi le letsatsi le phatlalatse tsa ho pholosa ha hae." 
1Chronicles16:24 Bolelang tsa tlotla ya hae hara ditjhaba, le makatso tsa hae hara merabe yohle." 
1Chronicles16:25 Morena o moholo, o lokelwa ke thoriso e kgolo, o tshabeha ho feta medimo yohle." 
1Chronicles16:26 Medimo yohle ya ditjhaba ke ya bohata, athe Morena yena o entse, o entse mahodimo." 
1Chronicles16:27 Tlotla le hlompho di teng ho yena, matla le kganya di Sehalalelong sa hae." 
1Chronicles16:28 Thoholetsang Morena, lona ditjhaba tsa mefutafuta, thoholetsang tlotla le matla a Morena." 
1Chronicles16:29 Thoholetsang tlotla e lokelang lebitso la Morena, tloong kapele ho yena le mo nyehelleng, kgumamelang Morena le kgabile ka tse halalelang." 
1Chronicles16:30 Lefatshe lohle le thothomele kapele ho yena! O tiisitse lefatshe, le ke ke la sisinyeha." 
1Chronicles16:31 Mahodimo a thabe, fatshe le nyakalle, hara matjhaba ho thwe: “Morena ke yena kgosi!”" 
1Chronicles16:32 Lewatle le hwase, le tsohle tse ka ho lona, naha e nyakalle, le tsohle tse ho yona." 
1Chronicles16:33 Jwale difate, merung, di tla bina, di binela Morena ho tla, ha a etla ho ahlola lefatshe." 
1Chronicles16:34 Bokang Morena, hobane o molemo, mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle." 
1Chronicles16:35 E reng: “Modimo, mopholosi wa rona, ako re pholose; ako re phuthe, ho baditjhaba o re namolele, re tle re lebohe lebitso le halalelang la hao, ho boka wena e be motlotlo wa rona." 
1Chronicles16:36 Ho bokwe Morena Modimo wa Iseraele, a bokwe jwale, le kamehla yohle.” Setjhaba sohle sa re: “A ho ke ho be jwalo! Bokang Morena!”" 
1Chronicles16:37 Yaba Davida o bea Asafo le bana babo kapele ho areka ya selekane sa Morena, hore ba nne ba sebeletse teng, ho ya kamoo mosebetsi wa letsatsi ka leng o leng kateng." 
1Chronicles16:38 A bea Obede-Edomo le bana babo ba mashome a tsheletseng a metso e robedi hore ba ba thuse. Bo-Obede-Edomo, mora wa Jedutune, le Hosa ya eba balebedi ba monyako." 
1Chronicles16:39 Kapele ho Tente ya Morena, pela aletare e sebakeng sa borapedi se Gibeone, Davida a bea moprista Sadoke le baprista ba bang ba habo hona teng," 
1Chronicles16:40 hore ba nne ba etsetse Morena dinyehelo tsa setjheso hodima aletare ya nyehelo ya setjheso hoseng le mantsiboya; ba etse tsohle tse ngotsweng Molaong wa Morena, oo a neng a o laele Baiserale."
