1Chronicles16:41 Ba ne ba ena le Hemane le Jedutune, le bohle ba neng ba kgethwe, ba bolelwa ka mabitso, hore ba boke Morena, “hobane mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle.”" 
1Chronicles16:42 Bo-Hemane le Jedutune e ne e le bona ba okametseng baletsi ba diterompeta, le ba matlheretlhere, le ba diletsa tse ding, tse neng di letsetswa ho binela Modimo difela. Bara ba Jedutune e ne e le balebedi ba monyako." 
1Chronicles16:43 Setjhaba sohle sa qhalana, motho ka mong a ikela lapeng ha hae. Davida le yena a tsamaya ho ya hlohonolofatsa ba lelapa la hae." 
1Chronicles17:1 Ha Davida a se a dula tlung ya hae, ka letsatsi le leng a re ho moporofeta Nathane: “Ako bone, nna ke dula tlung e hahilweng ka dithupa tsa dikedare, empa areka ya selekane sa Morena yona e dula hara masira!”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Nathane a re ho Davida: “Etsa tsohle tseo o di hopotseng, hobane Modimo o na le wena.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Hona bosiung boo, lentswe la Modimo la fihla ho Nathane, la re:" 
1Chronicles17:4 “Tsamaya, o yo bolella mohlanka wa ka Davida, o re: Morena o bua tjena: O ke ke wa nkgahela ntlo eo ke tla dula ho yona." 
1Chronicles17:5 Ho tloha mohla ke nyollang Baiseraele naheng ya Egepeta, ho fihlela kajeno, ha ke eso ka ke dula ka tlung; ke nnile ka kena tenteng e nngwe, ka tswa, ka kena ho e nngwe; ka kena leahong le leng, ka tswa, ka kena ho le leng." 
1Chronicles17:6 Dibakeng tsohle tseo ke tsamaileng ho tsona le Baiseraele bohle, na nkile ka botsa e mong wa baahlodi ba Iseraele, bao ke neng ke ba laele ho disa setjhaba sa ka, ka re: Ke hobaneng ha o sa nkgahela ntlo ya dithupa tsa dikedare?" 
1Chronicles17:7 “Ka baka lena, o tle o bolelle mohlanka wa ka Davida, o re: Morena wa mabotho o bua tjena: Ke ne ke o late motebong, moo o neng o disa dinku teng, hore o tlo ba kgosi ya setjhaba sa ka sa Baiseraele." 
1Chronicles17:8 Ke bile le wena hohle moo o nnileng wa tsamaya teng, ka timetsa dira tsa hao tsohle. Ke tumisitse lebitso la hao jwaloka mabitso a banna ba tumileng ba teng mona lefatsheng." 
1Chronicles17:9 Ke tla kgethela setjhaba sa ka sa Iseraele sebaka, ke se bee ho sona, mme se ke ke sa hlola se tshwenyeha. Batho ba kgopo ba ke ke ba hlola ba se tshwenya jwaloka pele," 
1Chronicles17:10 ha ke tla be ke kgethele setjhaba seo sa ka sa Baiseraele baahlodi. Ke tla hlola dira tsa hao tsohle. Hape ke o tsebisa hore Morena o tla atisa lelapa la hao. 
1Chronicles17:11 “ Ha matsatsi a hao a se a fetile, o se o orohetse ho bo-ntatao, ke tla etsa hore e mong wa bara ba hao a o hlahlame, ke tiise mmuso wa hae." 
1Chronicles17:12 Ke yena ya tla nkgahela Tempele, mme ke tla tsitsisa terone ya hae kamehla." 
1Chronicles17:13 Ke tla ba ntatae, yena e be mora wa ka. Feela nke ke ka kgaotsa ho mo rata jwalokaha ke ile ka kgaotsa ho rata ya bileng teng pele ho wena." 
1Chronicles17:14 Ke tla mmea ho okamela setjhaba sa ka le mmuso wa ka kamehla, mme terone ya hae e tla tsitsa kamehla yohle. ”" 
1Chronicles17:15 Nathane a phetela Davida ditaba tsena tsohle, ho ya kahohle kamoo a di senoletsweng kateng." 
1Chronicles17:16 Jwale kgosi Davida a kena ka Tenteng, a ya dula kapele ho Morena, mme a re: “Oho, Morena Modimo, ekaba nna ke mang? Ekaba ntlo ya ka ke eng, hoo o mphihlisitseng hole hakaale?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Oho, Morena, ho a bonahala hore ho wena tsena e ne e sa le dinyane, hobane o boetse o buile ka seo o se reretseng lelapa la mohlanka wa hao, nako e sa le hole. Oho, Morena Modimo, o se o ntadima jwalokaha eka ke motho wa boemo bo phahameng!" 
1Chronicles17:18 “Ekaba Davida a ka hlola a reng ho wena, ha o hlomphile mohlanka wa hao? Ke wena ya tsebang mohlanka wa hao!" 
1Chronicles17:19 Oho, Morena, ka baka la mohlanka wa hao, le ka baka la ho rata ha hao, o entse ntho ena e kgolo, wa etsa hore tsena tsohle tse kgolo di tsejwe." 
1Chronicles17:20 “Oho, Morena, ha ho ya kang wena; ebile hape ha ho Modimo e mong ntle ho wena, ho ya ka tsohle tseo re di utlwileng ka ditsebe tsa rona." 
1Chronicles17:21 Ke setjhaba sefe moo lefatsheng, se kang setjhaba sa hao sa Baiseraele, seo Modimo a kileng a ya se lopolla hore e be setjhaba sa hae? O tumisitse lebitso la hao ka ho etsa tse kgolo, tse tshabehang, ka ho hleka matjhaba tseleng ya setjhaba sa hao, seo o se lopolotseng Egepeta." 
1Chronicles17:22 Setjhaba sa hao sa Iseraele o se entse setjhaba sa hao kamehla yohle, mme wena, Morena, o Modimo wa sona." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Jwale, ka baka leo, Morena, tshepiso eo o e etseditseng mohlanka wa hao, le lelapa la hae, o ke o e phethahatse kamehla yohle, mme o etse kamoo o buileng kateng." 
1Chronicles17:24 Le yona o ke o e phethahatse, lebitso la hao le tle le tumiswe kamehla yohle, batho ba re: Morena wa mabotho ke Modimo wa Iseraele, ke yena Modimo wa Iseraele. Lelapa la Davida, mohlanka wa hao, le ke le tiye kamehla yohle." 
1Chronicles17:25 “Wena, Modimo wa ka, o senoletse mohlanka wa hao hore o tla mo hodisetsa lelapa la hae; ka baka lena, mohlanka wa hao o bile sebete ho o rapela." 
1Chronicles17:26 Jwale wena, Morena, ke wena feela o leng Modimo, mme o tshepisitse mohlanka wa hao taba ena e molemo." 
1Chronicles17:27 O hlohonolofaditse lelapa la mohlanka wa hao, hore le nne le be tlhokomelong ya hao kamehla yohle. Oho, Morena, o le hlohonolofaditse, mme le tla hlohonolofala kamehla yohle.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Kamora tsena, Davida a hlola Bafilesita, a ba busa, mme a ba amoha Gate le metsana ya yona." 
1Chronicles18:2 Ahlola Bamoabe, mme Bamoabe ya eba bahlanka ba Davida, ba mo thellang." 
1Chronicles18:3 Ha Hadade-Esere, kgosi ya Soba, a ne a ilo hloma puso ya hae pela noka ya Euferatese, Davida a mo hlola Hamate." 
1Chronicles18:4 Davida a hapa dikariki tsa Hadade-Esere tsa ntwa tse sekete, le banna ba dipere ba dikete tse supileng, le ba ditaaso ba dikete tse mashome a mabedi. Dipere tsohle tse hulang dikariki tsa ntwa a di kgaola mesifa, a siya feela tse lekaneng ho hula dikariki tsa ntwa tse lekgolo." 
1Chronicles18:5 Ha Baarame ba Damaseka ba eya ho ya thusetsa Hadade-Esere, kgosi ya Soba, Davida a bolaya banna ba Baarame ba dikete tse mashome a mabedi a metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles18:6 Davida a hloma diahelo tsa mabotho naheng ya Baarame e Damaseka, mme Baarame ya eba bahlanka ba Davida, ba mo thellang. Ka mokgwa o jwalo, Morena a etsa hore Davida a hlole hohle moo a neng a futuhela teng." 
1Chronicles18:7 Davida a nka dithebe tsa bahlabani ba Hadade-Esere tse neng di entswe ka kgauta, a di isa Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles18:8 Ka mokgwa o jwalo, le metseng ya Hadade-Esere, e leng Tibehate le Kune, Davida a nka lethose le lengata, leo ka lona Solomone a ileng a etsa tanka ya lethose eo baprista ba tollang ka ho yona, le ditshiya, le dintho tsa lethose." 
1Chronicles18:9 Ha Toi, kgosi ya Hamate, a utlwa kamoo Davida a hlotseng lebotho lohle la Hadade-Esere kgosi ya Soba kateng," 
1Chronicles18:10 a romela mora wa hae Hadorame ho Davida, ho ya mo dumedisa, le ho mo lebohela ha a lwantshitse Hadade-Esere, mme a mo hlola, hobane Hadade-Esere o ne a ile a lwantsha Toi hangata. Hadorame a isetsa Davida mefuta yohle ya dintho tse entsweng ka kgauta, le ka silefera, le ka lethose." 
1Chronicles18:11 Le tsona, kgosi Davida a di kgethela Morena, hammoho le silefera, le kgauta eo a neng a e hapile ditjhabeng tsena tsohle, e leng Baedomo, le Bamoabe, le Baamone, le Bafilesita, le Baamaleke." 
1Chronicles18:12 Abishai, mora wa Seruya, le yena a bolaya Baedomo ba dikete tse leshome le metso e robedi, a ba bolaela ka Kgohlong ya Letswai." 
1Chronicles18:13 Davida a hloma diahelo tsa mabotho naheng ya Edomo, mme Baedomo bohle ya eba bahlanka ba Davida, ba mo thellang. Ka mokgwa o jwalo, Morena a etsa hore Davida a hlole hohle moo a neng a futuhela teng." 
1Chronicles18:14 Davida a busa naha yohle ya Iseraele. A ahlolela setjhaba sohle sa hae ka toka le ka nnete. 
1Chronicles18:15 Joabe, mora wa Seruya, ya eba molaodi wa mabotho; Jehoshafate, mora wa Ahilode, yena ya eba mongodi wa diketsahalo." 
1Chronicles18:16 Sadoke, mora wa Ahitube, le Abimeleke, mora wa Abiatare, bona ya eba baprista, mme Shafesha yena ya eba mongodi wa puso." 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaya, mora wa Jehoyada, o ne a laola Bakerete le Bapelete; bara ba Davida bona e le batlatsi ba kgosi." 
1Chronicles19:1 Kamorao ho mona, Nahashe, kgosi ya Baamone, a shwa, mme mora wa hae a mo hlahlama." 
1Chronicles19:2 Yaba Davida o re: “Hanune, mora wa Nahashe, ke tla mo etsetsa tse molemo, hobane ntatae le yena o ile a nketsetsa tse molemo.” Ka baka leo, Davida a roma maqosa a hae ho isetsa Hanune matshediso, ka baka la lefu la ntatae. Bahlanka ba Davida ba fihla naheng ya Baamone ho isetsa Hanune matshediso." 
1Chronicles19:3 Empa mahosana a Baamone a re ho Hanune: “O bona eka Davida o tlotla ntatao, ha a rometse maqosa ho tla o tshedisa? Na bahlanka ba hae ha ba a tla ho wena moo ho tla hlahloba naha, le ho e hlwela, hore ba tle ba e hape?”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Yaba Hanune o tshwara bahlanka ba Davida, o ba beola ditedu, o hahola diaparo tsa bona ka lehare, ho ya fihla dibonong, a nto re ba tsamaye." 
1Chronicles19:5 Davida a tsebiswa kamoo banna bao ba entsweng kateng, mme a romela maqosa ho ya ba kgahlanyetsa, hobane banna bao ba ne ba hlabilwe ke dihlong haholo. Yaba kgosi Davida o re ho bona: “Dulang moo Jeriko ho fihlela ditedu tsa lona di hlomela, ebe jwale le a kgutla.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 Ha Baamone ba bona hore ba kgopisitse Davida, Hanune le Baamone ba romela silefera e boima ba dikilo tse dikete tse mashome a mararo a metso e mene, ho ya hira dikariki tsa ntwa, le bahlabani ba dipere ba tswang Mesopotamia, le Maaka, le Soba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Ba hira dikariki tsa ntwa tse dikete tse mashome a mararo a metso e mmedi; ba hira le kgosi ya Maaka le bahlabani ba yona, mme bona ba tla, ba fihla ba hloma diahelo tsa bona haufi le Medeba. Baamone ba phutheha metseng ya bona, ba itokisetsa ho lwana." 
1Chronicles19:8 Ha Davida a utlwa taba ena, a romela Joabe le lebotho lohle la bahlabani." 
1Chronicles19:9 Baamone ba tswa, ba thea theko ya ntwa kapele ho kgoro ya motse. Dikgosi tse neng di tlile ho tla thusetsa, di ne di le naheng, di le ding." 
1Chronicles19:10 Ha Joabe a bona hore ba direng ba mo hlahile kapele le kamorao, a kgetha mokgetho hara bahale bohle ba Baiseraele, a o emisa ka theko, wa thulana le Baarame." 
1Chronicles19:11 Bahlabani ba bang bona a ba bea tlasa taolo ya ngwanabo, Abishai, le bona ba thea theko, ba thulana le Baamone." 
1Chronicles19:12 Joabe a re: “Haeba Baarame ba ka nkimela, wena o tla nthusetsa; le nna, ke tla o thusetsa haeba Baamone ba ka o imela." 
1Chronicles19:13 Tiisa matla, re lwane ka sebete, re lwanele setjhaba sa habo rona, le metse ya Modimo wa rona. Morena a ke a etse seo yena a bonang hore se lokile.”" 
1Chronicles19:14 Jwale Joabe le bahlabani ba neng ba ena le yena ba atamela thekong ya Baarame, mme ditheko tsa kopana. Baarame ba baleha." 
1Chronicles19:15 Ha Baamone ba bona hore Baarame ba balehile, le bona ba baleha Abishai, ba ba ba ya kena motseng. Jwale Joabe a kgutlela Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles19:16 Ha Baarame ba bona hore Baiseraele ba ba hlotse, ba roma maqosa hore a late Baarame ba neng ba le kamose wane ho Noka, mme ba tla ba eteletswe pele ke Shofake, molaodi wa mabotho a Hadade-Esere." 
1Chronicles19:17 Hoba Davida a tsebiswe hona, a kgobokanya bahlabani bohle ba Baiseraele, a tshela Jorodane, mme a fihla ho Baarame, a thea theko ya ntwa. Ha a se a theile theko ya ntwa kapele ho Baarame, ba mo lwantsha." 
1Chronicles19:18 Baarame ba baleha Baiseraele. Davida a bolaya Baarame ba dikete tse supileng ba palamang dikariki tsa ntwa, le banna ba ditaaso ba dikete tse mashome a mane. A bolaya le Shofake, molaodi wa mabotho a bona." 
1Chronicles19:19 Ha bahlabani ba Hadade-Esere ba bona hore Baiseraele ba ba hlotse, ba etsa kgotso le Davida, ya eba bahlanka ba hae. Baarame ba se ke ba hlola ba thusetsa Baamone." 
1Chronicles20:1 Ha selemo se thwasa, e leng nako eo dikgosi di tlwaetseng ho futuha ka yona, Joabe a tswa le mabotho, me a ripitla naha ya Baamone. Kamorao ho moo a ya etsetsa motse wa Raba thibella. Ha e le Davida yena o ne a setse Jerusalema. Joabe a hlola motse wa Raba, mme a o timetsa." 
1Chronicles20:2 Davida a rodisa kgosi ya bona mofapahlooho wa yona wa kgauta, oo boima ba wona e neng e le dikilo tse mashome a mararo a metso e mene. O ne o kgabisitswe ka mahakwe a bohlokwa, mme ba o rwesa Davida. A tswa motseng oo a haharile kgapo e ngata," 
1Chronicles20:3 a bile a hapile le baahi ba motse oo; a ba sebedisa ka disakga, le ka dipeke, le ka dilepe. Metse yohle ya Baamone o ne a ye a e etse jwalo. Yaba Davida o kgutlela Jerusalema le bahlabani bohle." 
1Chronicles20:4 Kamorao ho mona, ntwa ya qhoma Gesere, pakeng tsa Baiseraele le Bafilesita. Sibekai wa Mohusha a bolaya Sipai, eo e neng e le seqhobane, mme Bafilesita ba hlolwa." 
1Chronicles20:5 Ntwa ya boela ya qhoma pakeng tsa Baiseraele le Bafilesita. Elehanana, mora wa Jaire, a bolaya Lahemi, ngwanabo Goliate wa Mogate, eo theko ya lerumo la hae e neng e le kaalo ka mofeng wa motjhine o ohlang." 
1Chronicles20:6 Ntwa e nngwe ya boela ya qhoma Gate, moo ho neng ho ena le safola ya monna. Le leng le le leng la matsoho a hae le maoto a hae le ne le ena le menwana e tsheletseng, kaofela e le menwana e mashome a mabedi a metso e mene. Le yena e ne e le seqhobane." 
1Chronicles20:7 Jonathane, mora wa Shima, ngwanabo Davida, a mmolaya, hobane o ne a ile a nyedisa Baiseraele." 
1Chronicles20:8 Batho bana ba ne ba tswetswe ke diqhobane tsa Gate; feela ba ile ba bolawa ke Davida le bahlanka ba hae. 
1Chronicles21:1 Satane a tsohela Baiseraele matla, mme a hlohleletsa Davida hore a bale Baiseraele." 
1Chronicles21:2 Davida a re ho Joabe le ho balaodi ba mabotho: “Tsamayang, le yo bala Baiseraele ho tloha Beeresheba, ho ya fihla Dane; le ntlisetse palo ya bona, ke tle ke e tsebe.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Joabe a re: “Morena a ke a atise palo ya setjhaba sa hae halekgolo! Feela, monga ka, kgosi ya ka, ha ke re Baiseraele bohle ke bahlanka ba monga ka? Jwale ke ka lebaka lang ha monga ka a lakatsa ho etsa ntho ee? Ke ka lebaka lang ha monga ka a etsa Baiseraele ba tle ba sitwe?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Leha ho le jwalo, yaba le se le dumme; Joabe a tsamaya le naha yohle ya Iseraele, mme qetellong a kgutlela Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles21:5 Joabe a fihla a bolella kgosi Davida palo ya setjhaba. Baiseraele bohle, bao e neng e le matsholathebe, ba ne ba le mileone le dikete tse lekgolo. Ba morabe wa Juda ba ne ba le dikete tse makgolo a mane le mashome a supileng." 
1Chronicles21:6 Empa Joabe o ne a sa ka a balella ba morabe wa Levi le ba morabe wa Benjamine, hobane o ne a hanyetsa taelo ya kgosi." 
1Chronicles21:7 Ketso ena ya Davida ya se ke ya kgahla Modimo, mme ka baka leo, a otla Baiseraele." 
1Chronicles21:8 Yaba Davida o re ho Modimo: “Ke entse sebe se seholo ka ho etsa ntho ena. Empa jwale ke a o rapela: Ako hlakole bokgopo bona ba mohlanka wa hao, hobane ke sebeditse ka bothoto bo boholo.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Morena a bua ho Gade, senohe sa Davida, a re ho yena:" 
1Chronicles21:10 “Eya ho Davida, o fihle o re ho yena: Morena o bua tjena: Dintho ke tsena tse tharo: Ikgethele e le nngwe ya tsona, eo ke tla o otla ka yona. ”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Yaba Gade o fihla ho Davida, o re ho yena: “Morena o bua tjena: Ikgethele!" 
1Chronicles21:12 Ho be le sekoboto ka dilemo tse tharo; kapa ka nako ya kgwedi tse tharo o balehe dira tsa hao ha di ntse di o manakisa ka disabole; kapa, ho seng jwalo, ka matsatsi a mararo Morena a o futuhele ka sabole ya hae, e leng hore a dihele naha ee sewa, lengeloi la Morena le tsamaye hohle kahare ho naha ya Iseraele, le ntse le timetsa tsohle? Ka baka leo, inahanele karabo eo ke tla e isetsa ya nthomileng.”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Davida a re ho Gade: “Ke tlaletswe haholo! Ho ena le ho wela diatleng tsa motho, nka mpa ka wela diatleng tsa Morena, hobane mohau wa hae o moholo haholo.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Jwale Morena a romela sewa naheng ya Iseraele, mme ha eshwa batho ba dikete tse mashome a supileng." 
1Chronicles21:15 Modimo a romela lengeloi Jerusalema ho ya e timetsa, empa yare ha le ntse le e timetsa, Morena a bona, mme a hauha ha a nahana koduwa eo, a re ho lengeloi le neng le ntse le timetsa batho: “Ho lekane! Kgaotsa!” Lengeloi la Morena le ne le eme seotlong sa Orenane wa Mojebuse." 
1Chronicles21:16 Ha Davida a re mahlo tloha! a bona lengeloi la Morena le eme sepakapakeng, le tshwere sabole, le e kokoseditse hodima Jerusalema. Bo-Davida le baholo ba setjhaba, ba neng ba apere diaparo tse mahwashe, ba obamela fatshe ka difahleho." 
1Chronicles21:17 Davida a re ho Modimo: “Ha ke re ke nna ya laetseng hore ho balwe setjhaba? Ke nna ya entseng sebe; ruri ke nna ya entseng bokgopo. Jwale dinku tsee tsona di entseng? Oho, Morena Modimo wa ka, ke a o rapela: Mpe o otle nna le ba lelapa leso, o se ke wa otla setjhaba sa hao.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Yaba lengeloi la Morena le laela Gade hore a bolelle Davida a nyolohe, a yo hahela Morena aletare seotlong sa Orenane wa Mojebuse." 
1Chronicles21:19 Davida a nyoloha ho ya ka polelo eo Gade a ileng a e bolela ka lebitso la Morena. 
1Chronicles21:20 Orenane o ne a ntse a pola koro. Ha a hetla, a bona lengeloi, empa bara ba hae ba bane bona ba ipata." 
1Chronicles21:21 Ha Davida a ntse a atamela ho Orenane, Orenane a mmona, a tloha seotlong, a isa hlompho ho Davida ka ho obama." 
1Chronicles21:22 Davida a re ho yena: “Nnee seotlo sena ke tle ke hahele Morena aletare ho sona, e le hore sewa se tle se kgaotse setjhabeng. O nthekisetse sona ka theko ya sona.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Orenane a re ho Davida: “Se nke feela, monga ka, kgosi ya ka, o etse ka sona kamoo o ratang kateng. Ke bile ke o fa le dipholo tsena hore o etse nyehelo ya setjheso ka tsona; ke o fa le selei sena se polang hore o etse patsi ka sona, le koro hore o etse nyehelo ya dijo ka yona. Tsena tsohle ke o fa tsona.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Empa kgosi Davida a re ho Orenane: “Tjhe, ke tla di reka ka theko ya tsona, hobane nke ke ka nka dintho tsa hao ke di nkela Morena, empa ke sa di reka; leha e le nyehelo ya setjheso nke ke ka e etsa ka tseo ke sa di rekang.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Yaba Davida o reka seotlo seo ka ditjhelete tsa kgauta tse ka bang boima ba dikilo tse supileng. 
1Chronicles21:26 Davida a hahela Morena aletare hona moo, a etsa nyehelo ya setjheso, le nyehelo ya teboho. A rapela Morena, mme Morena a mo arabela ka ho theola mollo o tswang lehodimong, a o theolela hodima aletare ya nyehelo ya setjheso." 
1Chronicles21:27 Jwale Morena a laela lengeloi, mme la busetsa sabole ya lona selateng sa yona." 
1Chronicles21:28 Ka yona nako eo, ha Davida a elellwa hore Morena o mo arabetse a le seotlong sa Orenane wa Mojebuse, yaba o se a ntse a etsetsa mahlabelo hona moo seotlong sa Orenane wa Mojebuse." 
1Chronicles21:29 Leaho la Morena, leo Moshe a neng a le etse ha a le nahathothe, le aletare ya nyehelo ya setjheso, di ne di ntse di le sebakeng sa borapedi se Gibeone." 
1Chronicles21:30 Empa Davida o ne a ke ke a ya teng ho ya botsa Morena, hobane o ne a tshaba sabole ya lengeloi la Morena." 
1Chronicles22:1 Jwale Davida a re: “Ena ke yona ntlo ya Morena Modimo, mme ena ke aletare ya nyehelo ya setjheso, moo Baiseraele ba tla sebeletsa Morena teng.”" 
1Chronicles22:2 Davida a laela hore ho phuthwe baditjhaba ba neng ba le kahara naha ya Iseraele, mme a kgetha dibetli tsa majwe a tla haha Tempele ya Modimo." 
1Chronicles22:3 A bokella le tshepe e ngata, e tla etsa dipekere tsa mamati a menyako, le tsa manonyeletso a wona, le lethose le lengata hoo le neng le ke ke la lekanngwa." 
1Chronicles22:4 A fana le ka difate tsa kedare tse se nang palo, hobane Basidone le Batire ba ne ba ile ba mo tlisetsa difate tse ngata tse kedare." 
1Chronicles22:5 Davida a re: “Solomone, mora wa ka, o sa le monyenyane, o a tetema, mme Tempele e lokelang ho hahelwa Morena e tshwanela ho ba ntle haholo, e tume, e tlotlwe ke dinaha tsohle. Ha ho le jwalo, ke tla qalella ho etsa ditokiso tsa hore e tle e hahwe.” Kahoo, yare Davida a eso ka a eshwa, a etsa ditokiso tse kgolo." 
1Chronicles22:6 Jwale Davida a bitsa Solomone, mora wa hae, mme a mo laela ho hahela Morena Modimo wa Iseraele, Tempele." 
1Chronicles22:7 Davida a re ho Solomone: “Mora ka, ke ne ke rerile ho hahela Morena Modimo wa ka, Tempele." 
1Chronicles22:8 Empa polelo ya Morena e ile ya fihla ho nna, ya re: O tsholotse madi a mangata, o lwanne dintwa tse kgolo. Ka baka lena, o ke ke wa nkgahela Tempele, hobane o tsholotse madi a mangata pontsheng ya ka." 
1Chronicles22:9 Bona, o tla tswala mora, eo e tla ba motho wa kgotso. O tla phela ka kgotso le dira tsa hae tsohle, tse mo potapotileng. Lebitso la hae e tla ba Solomone, mme mehleng ya puso ya hae Baiseraele ba tla phela ka kgotso le ka kgutso." 
1Chronicles22:10 Ke yena ya tla nkgahela Tempele. E tla ba mora wa ka, nna ke be ntatae, mme ke tla tsitsisa terone ya hae naheng ena ya Iseraele kamehla." 
1Chronicles22:11 “Jwale he, mora ka, Morena a ke a be le wena, a o atlehise, o tle o tsebe ho hahela Morena Modimo wa hao, Tempele, jwalokaha a itse o tla etsa." 
1Chronicles22:12 Morena a ke a o fe bohlale le kutlwisiso, a etse hore o buse Baiseraele, o tle o tsebe ho boloka molao wa Morena Modimo wa hao." 
1Chronicles22:13 Ha o ka ela hloko ho phethahatsa ditaelo le melao eo Morena a e laetseng Moshe malebana le Baiseraele, o tla atleha. Eba monna, o be sebete; o se ke wa tshaba leha e le ho tsieleha." 
1Chronicles22:14 “Ke se ke ikgathaditse haholo, ke bokeletse kgauta e boima ba dithane tse ka bang dikete tse tharo le mashome a mane bakeng sa Tempele ya Morena, le silefera e boima ba dithane tse ka bang dikete tse mashome a mararo a metso e mene, le lethose, le tshepe, e leng dintho tse ke keng tsa lekanngwa ka baka la bongata ba tsona. Ke se ke bokeletse le difate le majwe. Dintho tsena o ka nna wa di eketsa." 
1Chronicles22:15 Etswe o na le basebetsi ba bangata: ba thuang majwe, le ba a betlang, le ba betlang mapolanka, le mefuta yohle ya ditsebi tsa mesebetsi yohle." 
1Chronicles22:16 Bongata ba kgauta, le silefera, le lethose, le tshepe, ke bo ke keng ba balwa. O eme ka maoto, o sebetse, mme Morena a ke a be le wena.”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Davida o ne a ile a laela mahosana wohle a Baiseraele hore a thuse mora wa hae, Solomone, mme a re ho wona:" 
1Chronicles22:18 “Ha ke re Morena Modimo wa lona, o na le lona? Ha ke re o le neile kgotso kahohle? O neelane ka baahi ba naha ena matsohong a ka, mme naha ena e buswa ke Morena le setjhaba sa hae." 
1Chronicles22:19 Ka baka leo, ineeleng ho Morena Modimo wa lona, ka dipelo tsa lona, le ka meya ya lona. Emang ke hona, le hahe Sehalalelo sa Morena Modimo, e le hore areka ya selekane sa Morena, le dintho tse halalelang tsa Modimo, di tle di tliswe ka Tempeleng e tla hahelwa Morena.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Ha Davida a se a hodile, e se e le mobu, a bea mora wa hae Solomone hore e be kgosi ya Baiseraele." 
1Chronicles23:2 Davida a phutha mahosana wohle a Baiseraele, le baprista, le Balevi." 
1Chronicles23:3 Ha balwa Balevi ho tloha ka ba dilemo tse mashome a mararo ho ya hodimo. Palo ya bona, ha ba balwa ka bomong, ya eba dikete tse mashome a mararo a metso e robedi." 
1Chronicles23:4 Ba dikete tse mashome a mabedi a metso e mene ba bona ba bewa ho okamela mesebetsi ya Tempele ya Morena; ba dikete tse tsheletseng bona ya eba batsamaisi ba ditaba tsa naha ya Iseraele le baahlodi. 
1Chronicles23:5 Ba dikete tse nne ya eba balebedi ba menyako, mme ba dikete tse nne hape ba rorisa Morena ka diletsa tseo Davida a neng a laele hore di etswe." 
1Chronicles23:6 Davida a ba arola dihlopha tse tharo, ho ya ka bara ba Levi, e leng Gereshone, le Kohate, le Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Bara ba Gereshone e ne e le Ladane le Shimei. 
1Chronicles23:8 Bara ba Ladane ba ne ba le bararo: Letsibolo e ne e le Jehiele, a hlahlangwa ke Setame, le Joele." 
1Chronicles23:8 Bara ba Ladane ba ne ba le bararo: Letsibolo e ne e le Jehiele, a hlahlangwa ke Setame, le Joele." 
1Chronicles23:9 Bara ba Shimei le bona ba ne ba le bararo, e le Shelomite, le Hasiele, le Harane. Bana e ne e le dihlooho tsa lelapa la Ladane." 
1Chronicles23:10 Bara ba Shimei ba ne ba le bane, e le Jahate, le Sisa, le Jeushe, le Beriya." 
1Chronicles23:11 Jahate e ne e le yena hlooho, a hlahlangwa ke Sisa. Jeushe le Beriya ha ba a ka ba eba le bana ba bangata; ka baka leo, ba balellwa mmoho ho phetha mosebetsi o le mong." 
1Chronicles23:12 Bara ba Kohate ba ne ba le bane, e le Amorame, le Isihare, le Heborone, le Usiele." 
1Chronicles23:13 Bara ba Amorame e ne e le Arone le Moshe. Bo-Arone le bara ba hae ba kgethelwa hore kamehla yohle ba hlokomele dintho tse halalelang haholo, ba tjhesetse Morena mokubetso, ba mo sebeletse, ba hlohonolofatse setjhaba ka lebitso la hae kamehla." 
1Chronicles23:14 Bara ba Moshe, mohlanka wa Modimo, bona ba ile ba balellwa le ba morabe wa Levi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Bara ba Moshe e ne e le Gereshome, le Eleesere." 
1Chronicles23:16 Hlooho ya bara ba Gereshome e ne e le Shebuele; 
1Chronicles23:17 ya bara ba Eleesere e le Rehabeya. Eleesere o ne a se na bara ba bang, empa bara ba Rehabeya ba ne ba le bangata haholo." 
1Chronicles23:18 Hlooho ya bana ba Isihare e ne e le Shelomite. 
1Chronicles23:19 Letsibolo la Heborone e ne e le Jeriya, mora wa bobedi e le Amariya, wa boraro e le Jahasiele, wa bone e le Jekameame." 
1Chronicles23:20 Ho bara ba Usiele letsibolo e ne e le Mmika, wa bobedi e le Jeshia." 
1Chronicles23:21 Bara ba Merari e ne e le Mahele le Mushi; ba Mahele e le Eleasare le Kishe. 
1Chronicles23:22 Eleasare a shwa a se na bara, a ena le baradi feela. Bana babo bona, e leng bara ba Kishe, ba ba nyala." 
1Chronicles23:23 Bara ba Mushi ba ne ba le bararo, e le Mahele, le Edere, le Jeremote." 
1Chronicles23:24 Bana ke bara ba Levi, ho ya ka malapa a bo-ntata bona. E ne e le dihlooho tsa malapa a bo-ntata bona, mme ba ngotswe ka bomong bukeng ya mabitso. Ba ne ba sebeletsa ka Tempeleng ya Morena, ho tloha ha ba le dilemo tse mashome a mabedi ho ya hodimo." 
1Chronicles23:25 Davida o ne a re: “Morena Modimo wa Iseraele, o phomoditse setjhaba sa hae, e le hore se tle se ahe Jerusalema kamehla.”" 
1Chronicles23:26 Ho tloha nakong eo, ha se ke ha hlola ho sa hlokahala hore Balevi ba jare Leaho le tsohle tseo ho neng ho sebeletswa ka tsona." 
1Chronicles23:27 Ka taelo ya ho qetela ya Davida, ha balwa Balevi ba dilemo tse mashome a mabedi ho ya hodimo." 
1Chronicles23:28 Mosebetsi wa bona e ne e le ho thusa ditloholo tsa Arone ha di sebeletsa ka Tempeleng ya Morena, le mabaleng a yona, le ka dikamoreng tsa yona, le ka ho hlwekisa dintho tsohle tse halalelang, le ka ho etsa mosebetsi ofe kapa ofe wa Tempele ya Morena." 
1Chronicles23:29 Ba ne ba hlokomela le bohobe bo halalelang, ba hlokomela le phofo e thumisehileng ya nyehelo ya dijo, le dikuku tse sa lomoswang, le tsohle tsa dipane, le tse neng di hadikwa, le tsohle tse neng di sebediswa ha ho lekanngwa bongata kapa boholo ba ntho." 
1Chronicles23:30 Hape mosebetsi wa bona e ne e le ho tsoha hoseng ba leboha Morena, mme ba mo rorisa, ba etsa jwalo le mantsiboya;" 
1Chronicles23:31 leha ho etsetswa Morena dinyehelo tsohle tsa setjheso ka matsatsi a Sabatha, le ka mekete ya ho thwasa ha kgwedi, le ka mekete e kgethehileng. Ba ne ba etsa jwalo kapele ho Morena, ho ya ka palo eo ba e beetsweng ka molao." 
1Chronicles23:32 Ka tsela ena ba ne ba hlokomela Tente ya Morena, le Sehalalelo, mme ba thusa bara ba Arone, e leng bana babo bona, ho hlokomela ditshebeletso tsa Tempele ya Morena." 
1Chronicles24:1 Dihlopha tsa bara ba Arone ke tsena: Bara ba Arone e ne e le Nadabe, le Abihu, le Eleasare, le Itamare." 
1Chronicles24:2 Empa bo-Nadabe le Abihu ba ile ba shwa pele ho ntata bona, ba se na bara; kahoo Eleasare le Itamare ya eba bona baprista." 
1Chronicles24:3 Davida a ba arola dihlopha, ho ya ka mosebetsi oo ba neng ba o abetswe. Ha a ba arola o ne a thusitswe ke Sadoke, setloholo sa Eleasare, le Ahimeleke, setloholo sa Itamare." 
1Chronicles24:4 Bara ba Eleasare, bao e neng e le dihlooho, ba ne ba le bangata ho feta bara ba Itamare, mme ba arolwa jwalo. Hara bara ba Eleasare, bao e neng e le dihlooho tsa malapa abo bona, ba ne ba le leshome le metso e tsheletseng, mme hara bara ba Itamare bao e neng e le dihlooho tsa malapa abo bona ba ne ba le robedi." 
1Chronicles24:5 Ha ho kgethwa baprista ba Sehalalelo le baprista ba Tempele ya Modimo hara ditloholo tsa Eleasare le Itamare, ba arolwa ka lotho, ho se leeme." 
1Chronicles24:6 Mongodi ya bitswang Shemaya, mora wa Netanele, e leng e mong wa Balevi, a ngola mabitso a bona bukeng, moo kgosi, le mahosana, le moprista Sadoke, le Ahimeleke, mora wa Abiatare, le dihlooho tsa malapa a baprista le a Balevi, ba leng teng. Ho ne ho ye ho ngolwe lelapa le le leng la Eleasare, ho ngolwe le le leng la Itamare, jwalojwalo." 
1Chronicles24:7 Lotho la pele la ntsha Jehoyaribe, la bobedi la ntsha Jedaya," 
1Chronicles24:8 la boraro la ntsha Harime, la bone la ntsha Seorime," 
1Chronicles24:9 la bohlano la ntsha Malakiya, la botshelela la ntsha Miamine," 
1Chronicles24:10 la bosupa la ntsha Hakose, la borobedi la ntsha Abiya," 
1Chronicles24:11 la borobong la ntsha Jeshua, la leshome la ntsha Shekaniya," 
1Chronicles24:12 la leshome le motso o mong la ntsha Eleashibe, la leshome le metso e mmedi la ntsha Jakime," 
1Chronicles24:13 la leshome le metso e meraro la ntsha Hupa, la leshome le metso e mene la ntsha Jeshebabe," 
1Chronicles24:14 la leshome le metso e mehlano la ntsha Bilega, la leshome le metso e tsheletseng la ntsha Imere," 
1Chronicles24:15 la leshome le metso e supileng la ntsha Hesire, la leshome le metso e robedi la ntsha Hapisese," 
1Chronicles24:16 la leshome le metso e robong la ntsha Petahiya, la mashome a mabedi la ntsha Jehesekele," 
1Chronicles24:17 la mashome a mabedi a motso o mong la ntsha Jakine, la mashome a mabedi a metso e mmedi la ntsha Gamule," 
1Chronicles24:18 la mashome a mabedi a metso e meraro la ntsha Delaya, la mashome a mabedi a metso e mene la ntsha Maasiya." 
1Chronicles24:19 Ba ne ba sebeletsa ka Tempeleng ya Morena ka tlhatlhamano yona ena, ho latela melao eo ba neng ba e laetswe ke Arone, moholoholo wa bona, jwalokaha Morena Modimo wa Iseraele, a ne a ile a mo laela." 
1Chronicles24:20 Bara ba bang ba Levi e ne e le bana: Shubaele e ne e le e mong wa bara ba Amorame; Jehedeya e le e mong wa bara ba Shubaele. 
1Chronicles24:21 Hara bara ba Rehabeya, Jishiya e ne e le letsibolo;" 
1Chronicles24:22 ho ba Isihare, e mong e ne e le Shelomote; hara bara ba Shelomote e mong e le Jahate." 
1Chronicles24:23 Ho bara ba Heborone letsibolo e ne e le Jeriya, wa bobedi e le Amariya, wa boraro e le Jahasiele, wa bone e le Jekameame." 
1Chronicles24:24 Ho bara ba Usiele e ne e le Mmika; ho bara ba Mmika e le Shamire. 
1Chronicles24:25 Ngwanabo Mmika e ne e le Jishiya; ho bara ba Jishiya e le Sekariya. 
1Chronicles24:26 Bara ba Merari e ne e le Mahele le Mushi; mora wa Jaasiya e le Beno. 
1Chronicles24:27 Ditloholo tsa Merari tse tswetsweng ke Jaasiya e ne e le Beno, le Shohame, le Sakure, le Ibiri." 
1Chronicles24:28 Mahele a tswala Eleasare ya sa kang a ba le bara. 
1Chronicles24:29 Mora wa Kishe e ne e le Jerahemeele. 
1Chronicles24:30 Bara ba Mushi e ne e le Mahele, le Edere, le Jerimote. Bana e ne e le bona Balevi ho ya ka malapa abo bona." 
1Chronicles24:31 Jwalokaha bana babo bona, e leng ditloholo tsa Arone, ba ile ba etsa lotho, le bona ba le etsa moo Davida, le Sadoke, le Ahimeleke, le dihlooho tsa malapa a baprista le a Balevi, ba leng teng. Malapa a matsibolo le a dikgorula a ne a etswa ka ho tshwana." 
1Chronicles25:1 Bo-Davida le balaodi ba mabotho ba kgetha ba bang ba bara ba Asafo, le ba Hemane, le ba Jedutune, hore ha diharepa, le dikatara, le matlheretlhere, di ba kenya moya, ba phatlalatse molaetsa wa Modimo. Lenane la banna ba neng ba sebetsa mosebetsi ona ke lena:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Hara bara ba Asafo e ne e le Sakure, le Josefa, le Netaniya, le Asarela. Ba ne ba okametswe ke Asafo, ya neng a phatlalatsa molaetsa ho ya ka taelo ya kgosi." 
1Chronicles25:3 Hara bara ba Jedutune e ne e le Gedaleya, le Seri, le Jeshaya, le Shimei, le Hashabiya, le Matiteya. Ba ne ba tsheletse, mme ba okametswe ke ntata bona Jedutune, ya neng a letsa harepa ha a phatlalatsa molaetsa wa Modimo, a leboha Morena, a bile a mo rorisa." 
1Chronicles25:4 Hara bara ba Hemane teng e ne e le Bukiya, le Mataneya, le Usiele, le Shebuele, le Jerimote, le Hananiya, le Hanani, le Eleata, le Gidaleti, le Romameti-Esere, le Joshebekasha, le Maloti, le Hotire, le Mahasiote." 
1Chronicles25:5 Bana bohle e ne e le bara ba Hemane, senohe sa kgosi ditabeng tsa Modimo. Modimo a matlafatsa Hemane ka ho mo fa bara ba leshome le metso e mene, le baradi ba bararo." 
1Chronicles25:6 Batho bana bohle ba ne ba okametswe ke ntata bona, ba bina ka Tempeleng ya Morena; ba letsa matlheretlhere, le dikatara, le diharepa, nakong ya ditshebeletso ka Tempeleng ya Modimo, ho latela taelo ya kgosi ho bo-Asafo, le Jedutune, le Hemane." 
1Chronicles25:7 Bana bohle, hammoho le bang ka bona, ba ne ba rutilwe, mme ba tseba ho binela Morena. Ba ne ba le makgolo a mabedi, le mashome a robedi a metso e robedi." 
1Chronicles25:8 Batjha le maqheku, baruti le barutuwa, ba abelwa mosebetsi ka lotho, ka ho tshwana." 
1Chronicles25:9 Lotho la pele, e leng la lelapa la Asafo, la ntsha Josefa. La bobedi la ntsha Gedaleya, le bana babo, le bara ba hae, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:10 La boraro la ntsha Sakure, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:11 La bone la ntsha Isiri, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:12 La bohlano la ntsha Netaniya le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:13 La botshelela la ntsha Bukiya, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:14 La bosupa la ntsha Jesharela, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:15 La borobedi la ntsha Jeshaya, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:16 La borobong la ntsha Mataneya, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:17 La leshome la ntsha Shimei, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:18 La leshome le motso o mong la ntsha Asariele, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:19 La leshome le metso e mmedi la ntsha Mashabiya, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:20 La leshome le metso e meraro la ntsha Shubaele, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:21 La leshome le metso e mene la ntsha Matiteya, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:22 La leshome le metso e mehlano la ntsha Jerimote, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:23 La leshome le metso e tsheletseng la ntsha Hananiya, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:24 La leshome le metso e supileng la ntsha Joshebekasha, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:25 La leshome le metso e robedi la ntsha Hanani, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:26 La leshome le metso e robong la ntsha Maloti, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:27 La mashome a mabedi la ntsha Eleata, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:28 La mashome a mabedi a motso o mong la ntsha Hotire, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:29 La mashome a mabedi a metso e mmedi la ntsha Gidaleti, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:30 La mashome a mabedi a metso e meraro la ntsha Mahasiote, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles25:31 La mashome a mabedi a metso e mene la ntsha Romameti-Esere, le bara ba hae, le bana babo, mme kaofela ba eba leshome le metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles26:1 Dihlopha tsa balebedi ba menyako di ne di eme tjena: Ho bara ba Kora e ne e le Meshelemiya, mora wa Kore, e mong wa bara ba Asafo." 
1Chronicles26:2 Bara ba Meshelemiya e ne e le Sekariya, letsibolo la hae, wa bobedi e le Jediaele, wa boraro e le Sebadiya, wa bone e le Jateniele," 
1Chronicles26:3 wa bohlano e le Elame, wa botshelela e le Jehohanane, wa bosupa e le Eleunai." 
1Chronicles26:4 Bara ba Obede-Edomo e ne e le Shemaya, letsibolo la hae, wa bobedi e le Jehosabada, wa boraro e le Jowa, wa bone e le Sakara, wa bohlano e le Netanele," 
1Chronicles26:5 wa botshelela e le Amiele, wa bosupa e le Isakare, wa borobedi e le Peuletai, ho ya kamoo Modimo a neng a hlohonolofaditse Obede-Edomo kateng." 
1Chronicles26:6 Mora wa hae Shemaya a tswala bara ba neng ba busa lelapa lohle labo bona, hobane e ne e le bahale." 
1Chronicles26:7 Bara ba Shemaya e ne e le Oteni, le Refaele, le Obede, le Elesabade. Baena ba bona, e leng Elehu le Semakiya, e ne e le banna ba matla." 
1Chronicles26:8 Bana bohle e ne e le ditloholo tsa Obede-Edomo; bona le bara ba bona, le bang ka bona, e ne e le banna ba matla, ba sebetsang ka thata. Ditloholo tsa Obede-Edomo di ne di le mashome a tsheletseng a metso e mmedi." 
1Chronicles26:9 Meshelemiya le yena o ne a ena le bara, le baena ba matla, ba leshome le metso e robedi." 
1Chronicles26:10 Le Hosa, wa bana ba Merari, o ne a ena le bara. Shimeri e ne e le yena hlooho ya bona. Le hoja e ne e se yena letsibolo, feela ntatae o ile a mo etsa hlooho." 
1Chronicles26:11 Mora wa bobedi e ne e le Hilekiya, wa boraro e le Tebaleya, wa bone e le Sekariya. Kaofela bara ba Hosa le baena ba hae ba ne ba le leshome le metso e meraro." 
1Chronicles26:12 Dihlopha tsena tsa balebedi ba menyako, di le tlasa baokamedi ba tsona, di ne di abetswe ho sebeletsa ka Tempeleng ya Morena, sehlopha ka seng se sebeletsa jwaloka tse ding." 
1Chronicles26:13 Monyako ka mong wa kgethelwa balebedi ba wona ka lotho, ho ya ka malapa abo bona, ha kgethwa ba baholo le ba banyenyane." 
1Chronicles26:14 Lotho le kgethang molebedi wa monyako o ka botjhabela la ntsha Shelemiya. Mora wa hae Sekariya, eo e neng e le moeletsi ya bohlale, le yena a etsetswa lotho, mme la mo ntshetsa ho lebela monyako o ka leboya." 
1Chronicles26:15 Lotho le kgethang molebedi wa monyako o ka borwa la ntsha Obede-Edomo, mme lotho le kgethang balebedi ba ntlo ya polokelo la ntsha bara ba hae." 
1Chronicles26:16 Lotho le kgethang balebedi ba monyako o ka bophirimela, le balebedi ba monyako wa Shalekete, o mmileng o kahodimo, la ntsha Shupime le Hosa. Balebedi ba ne ba suthelana." 
1Chronicles26:17 Ka letsatsi le leng le le leng, Balevi ba tsheletseng ba ne ba lebela ka botjhabela, ba bane ba lebela ka leboya, ba bane ba lebela ka borwa, mme tlung ya polokelo ba lebela ka bobedi, ba suthelana." 
1Chronicles26:18 Lebaleng le ka bophirimela, ba bane ba ne ba lebela pela tsela, ba babedi ba lebela hona lebaleng moo." 
1Chronicles26:19 Tsena e ne e le tsona dihlopha tsa balebedi ba menyako, bao e neng e le ditloholo tsa Kore le tsa Merari." 
1Chronicles26:20 Balevi, le bana babo bona, e ne e le bona balebedi ba matlotlo a Tempele ya Modimo, le balebedi ba matlotlo a dimpho tse halalelang." 
1Chronicles26:21 Hara ditloholo tsa Ladane, wa morabe wa Gereshone, bao e neng e le dihlooho tsa malapa abo bona e ne e le ditloholo tsa Jehiele." 
1Chronicles26:22 Bara ba Jehiele, e leng Setame le Joele ngwanabo, e ne e le balebedi ba matlotlo a Tempele ya Morena." 
1Chronicles26:22 Bara ba Jehiele, e leng Setame le Joele ngwanabo, e ne e le balebedi ba matlotlo a Tempele ya Morena." 
1Chronicles26:23 Hara ditloholo tsa Amorame, le tsa Isihare, le tsa Heborone, le tsa Usiele," 
1Chronicles26:24 setloholo sa Moshe, e leng Shebuele, mora wa Gereshome, e ne e le yena mookamedi wa balebedi ba matlotlo." 
1Chronicles26:25 Bang ka yena, ba tswetsweng ke Eleesere, ke bana: Eleesere a tswala Rehabeya, Rehabeya a tswala Jeshaya, Jeshaya a tswala Jorame, Jorame a tswala Sikeri, Sikeri a tswala Shelomite." 
1Chronicles26:26 Ke bo-Shelomite le bana babo, bao e neng e le balebedi ba matlotlo a dimpho tse abetsweng Morena, tseo kgosi Davida, le dihlooho tsa malapa, le balaodi ba bahlabani ba sekete, le ba bahlabani ba lekgolo, le balaodi ba mabotho, ba ileng ba di abela Morena." 
1Chronicles26:27 Dinthong tse ileng tsa hapuwa ntweng, ba fana ka tse ding hore di tle di sebediswe Tempeleng ya Morena." 
1Chronicles26:28 Tsohle tseo moporofeta Samuele, le Saule mora wa Kishe, le Abinere mora wa Nere, le Joabe mora wa Seruya, ba neng ba di abetse Morena, le tsohle tseo mang kapa mang a neng a di abetse Morena, di ne di laolwa ke Shelomite le bana babo." 
1Chronicles26:29 Hara ditloholo tsa Isihare, Kenaniya le bara ba hae ba ne ba abetswe mosebetsi wa ho tsamaisa ditaba tsa naha ya Iseraele, e le bangodi le baahlodi." 
1Chronicles26:30 Hara ditloholo tsa Heborone, Hashabiya le bana babo ba sekete le makgolo a supileng bao e neng e le bahale, e ne e le bona baokamedi ba mosebetsi wohle wa Morena, ba okametse le tshebeletso yohle ya kgosi naheng ya Iseraele e ka bophirimela ho Jorodane." 
1Chronicles26:31 Hara ditloholo tsa Heborone, Jeriya e ne e le yena hlooho, ho ya ka ho hlahlamana ha malapa abo tsona. Ka selemo sa mashome a mane sa puso ya Davida, ba fuputsa hara ba morabe wa Heborone, mme ha fumanwa bahale Jasere e Gileade." 
1Chronicles26:32 Bang ka yena, ba dikete tse pedi le makgolo a supileng bao e neng e le bahale, e bile e le dihlooho tsa malapa abo bona, ba laelwa ke Davida hore ditabeng tsohle tsa borapedi, le tsa puso, ba okamele ba morabe wa Rubene, le wa Gade, le ba karolo ya morabe wa Manase." 
1Chronicles27:1 Lena ke lenane la bana ba Iseraele, ho ya ka palo ya bona, e leng dihlooho tsa malapa a bona, le balaodi ba bahlabani ba dikete, le ba bahlabani ba makgolo, le bahlanka ba sebeletsang kgosi ditabeng tsohle tse amanang le mabotho. Ba ne ba sebetsa ka dihlopha tse suthelanang ka kgwedi le kgwedi, selemo sohle. Lebotho ka leng le ne le ena le bahlabani ba dikete tse mashome a mabedi a metso e mene." 
1Chronicles27:2 Jeshobame, mora wa Sabediele, o ne a laola lebotho le kenang mosebetsing ka kgwedi ya pele. Le ne le ena le bahlabani ba dikete tse mashome a mabedi a metso e mene." 
1Chronicles27:3 E ne e le wa leloko la Perese, e le hlooho ya balaodi bohle ba mabotho a sebetsang ka kgwedi ya pele." 
1Chronicles27:4 Dodai, wa morabe wa Ahohi, o ne a laola lebotho le kenang mosebetsing ka kgwedi ya bobedi, motlatsi wa hae e ne e le Mikelote. Le yena lebotho la hae le ne le ena le bahlabani ba dikete tse mashome a mabedi a metso e mene." 
1Chronicles27:5 Benaya, mora wa Moprista e Moholo Jehoyada, e ne e le molaodi wa lebotho le kenang mosebetsing ka kgwedi ya boraro. Lebotho la hae le ne le ena le bahlabani ba dikete tse mashome a mabedi a metso e mene." 
1Chronicles27:6 Ke yena Benaya yane eo e neng e le e mong wa bahale ba mashome a mararo e bile e le mookamedi wa bona. Amisabade, mora wa hae, e ne e le yena ya laolang lebotho lena." 
1Chronicles27:7 Asaele, ngwanabo Joabe, e ne e le molaodi wa lebotho le kenang mosebetsing ka kgwedi ya bone. Sebadiya, mora wa hae, o ne a mo hlahlama. Lebotho la hae le ne le ena le bahlabani ba dikete tse mashome a mabedi a metso e mene." 
1Chronicles27:8 Shameute, wa morabe wa Isera, e ne e le molaodi wa lebotho le kenang mosebetsing ka kgwedi ya bohlano. Lebotho la hae le ne le ena le bahlabani ba dikete tse mashome a mabedi a metso e mene." 
1Chronicles27:9 Ira, mora wa Ikeshe wa Tekowa, e ne e le molaodi wa lebotho le kenang mosebetsing ka kgwedi ya botshelela. Lebotho la hae le ne le ena le bahlabani ba dikete tse mashome a mabedi a metso e mene." 
1Chronicles27:10 Helese wa Mopelone, wa morabe wa Efraime, e ne e le molaodi wa lebotho le kenang mosebetsing ka kgwedi ya bosupa. Lebotho la hae le ne le ena le bahlabani ba dikete tse mashome a mabedi a metso e mene." 
1Chronicles27:11 Sibekai wa Mohusha, wa morabe wa Sera, e ne e le molaodi wa lebotho le kenang mosebetsing ka kgwedi ya borobedi. Lebotho la hae le ne le ena le bahlabani ba dikete tse mashome a mabedi a metso e mene." 
1Chronicles27:12 Abiesere wa Moanatote, wa morabe wa Benjamine, e ne e le molaodi wa lebotho le kenang mosebetsing ka kgwedi ya borobong. Lebotho la hae le ne le ena le bahlabani ba dikete tse mashome a mabedi a metso e mene." 
1Chronicles27:13 Maharai wa Monetofa, wa morabe wa Sera, e ne e le molaodi wa lebotho le kenang mosebetsing ka kgwedi ya leshome. Lebotho la hae le ne le ena le bahlabani ba dikete tse mashome a mabedi a metso e mene." 
1Chronicles27:14 Benaya wa Mopiratone, wa morabe wa Efraime, e ne e le molaodi wa lebotho le kenang mosebetsing ka kgwedi ya leshome le motso o mong. Lebotho la hae le ne le ena le bahlabani ba dikete tse mashome a mabedi a metso e mene." 
1Chronicles27:15 Heledai wa Monetofa, wa morabe wa Oteniele, e ne e le molaodi wa lebotho le kenang mosebetsing ka kgwedi ya leshome le metso e mmedi. Lebotho la hae le ne le ena le bahlabani ba dikete tse mashome a mabedi a metso e mene." 
1Chronicles27:16 Dihlooho tsa merabe ya Iseraele e ne e le tsena: Hlooho ya ba morabe wa Rubene e ne e le Eleesere, mora wa Sikeri; ya ba morabe wa Simeone e le Shefatiya, mora wa Maaka." 
1Chronicles27:17 Ho ba morabe wa Levi, hlooho e ne e le Hashabiya, mora wa Kemuele; ho ba morabe wa Arone e le Sadoke." 
1Chronicles27:18 Ho ba morabe wa Juda hlooho e ne e le Elehu, e mong wa bana babo Davida; ho ba morabe wa Isakare e le Omeri, mora wa Mikaele." 
1Chronicles27:19 Ho ba morabe wa Sebulone hlooho e ne e le Jishemaya, mora wa Obadiya; ho ba morabe wa Nafthali e le Jeremote, mora wa Aseriele." 
1Chronicles27:20 Ho ba morabe wa Efraime hlooho e ne e le Hoshea, mora wa Asasiya; ho ba karolo e nngwe ya ba morabe wa Manase e le Joele, mora wa Pedaya." 
1Chronicles27:20 Ho ba morabe wa Efraime hlooho e ne e le Hoshea, mora wa Asasiya; ho ba karolo e nngwe ya ba morabe wa Manase e le Joele, mora wa Pedaya." 
1Chronicles27:21 Ho ba karolo e nngwe ya ba morabe wa Manase e Gileade, hlooho e ne e le Ido, mora wa Sekariya; ho ba morabe wa Benjamine e le Jaasiele, mora wa Abinere." 
1Chronicles27:22 Ho ba morabe wa Dane hlooho e ne e le Asariele, mora wa Jerohame. Bana e ne e le mahosana a merabe ya Iseraele." 
1Chronicles27:23 Empa Davida ha a a ka a bala ba dilemo tse mashome a mabedi ho ya tlase, hobane Morena o ne a itse o tla ngatafatsa Baiseraele, ba be kaalo ka dinaledi tsa lehodimo." 
1Chronicles27:24 Joabe, mora wa Seruya, o ne a ile a qala ho bala batho, empa a se ke a qeta. Ho bala setjhaba hoo ha tlisetsa Baiseraele kotlo; ka baka leo, palo eo ha ya ka ya ngolwa Bukeng ya Diketsahalo tsa kgosi Davida." 
1Chronicles27:25 Matlotlo a kgosi a ne a hlokomelwa ke Asemafete, mora wa Adiele; athe disiu tse ka mathoko, le tse metseng, le tse metsaneng, le tse diqhobosheaneng, di ne di hlokomelwa ke Jehonathane, mora wa Usiya." 
1Chronicles27:26 Eseri, mora wa Kelobe, o ne a hlokomela balemi." 
1Chronicles27:27 Shimei, ya neng a ahile Rama, o ne a hlokomela masimo a morara; Sabedi, ya neng a ahile Shifame, o ne a hlokomela morara o yang ditlhotlelong." 
1Chronicles27:28 Baale-Hanane wa Mogedere, o ne a hlokomela difate tsa mohlwaare le tsa monokotshwai tse maralleng a ka bophirimela; Jowashe o ne a hlokomela matlo ao ho bolokwang ole ka ho wona." 
1Chronicles27:29 Shiterai wa Mosharone o ne a hlokomela dikgomo tse neng di le metebong e Sharone; Shafate, mora wa Adelai, o ne a hlokomela dikgomo tse neng di le ka dikgohlong." 
1Chronicles27:30 Obile wa Moishemaele o ne a hlokomela dikamele; Jehedeya, ya neng a ahile Meronote, o ne a hlokomela ditonki." 
1Chronicles27:31 Jasise wa Mohagare o ne a hlokomela dikgutshwane. Bana bohle e ne e le badisa ba maruo wohle a kgosi Davida. 
1Chronicles27:32 Jonathane, rangwana Davida, e ne e le moeletsi ya bohlale, e bile e le mongodi, mme Jehiele, mora wa Hakemoni, o ne a hlokomela bara ba kgosi." 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitofele e ne e le moeletsi wa kgosi; Hushai wa Moarake e le motswalle wa kgosi. 
1Chronicles27:34 Ahitofele a hlahlangwa ke Jehoyada, mora wa Benaya, le Abiatare. Molaodi wa mabotho a kgosi e ne e le Joabe." 
1Chronicles28:1 Davida a kgobokanya mahosana wohle a Iseraele, Jerusalema, le mahosana a merabe, le balaodi ba mabotho a sebeletsang kgosi ka dihlopha tsa wona ka ho suthelana, le balaodi ba bahlabani ba dikete, le balaodi ba ba makgolo, le bahlokomedi ba maruo wohle le matlotlo wohle a kgosi, le bahlokomedi ba bara ba kgosi, le bahlanka bohle, le banna ba dinatla, le bahale." 
1Chronicles28:2 Jwale kgosi Davida a ema, a re: “Mmameleng, lona bana beso, le setjhaba sa heso. Ke ne ke ena le maikutlo a ho hahela areka ya selekane sa Morena Tempele, eo e tla dula ka ho yona, le moo Modimo wa rona a tla namela teng, mme ke se ke entse ditokiso tsa ho e haha." 
1Chronicles28:3 Empa Modimo o ile a re ho nna: O ke ke wa nkgahela Tempele, hobane o bile motho wa dintwa, mme o tsholotse madi." 
1Chronicles28:4 “Leha ho le jwalo, Morena Modimo wa Iseraele, o kgethile nna, ho ba lelapa lohle la ntate, hore ke be kgosi ya Iseraele kamehla yohle. O kgethile Juda ho ba moetapele, mme morabeng wa Juda o kgethile lelapa leso. Hara bana beso o ile a kgahlwa ke nna, mme a mpea kgosi ya Iseraele yohle." 
1Chronicles28:5 Morena o mphile bara ba bangata, mme hara bara bohle o kgethile Solomone, mora wa ka, ho dula teroneng ya mmuso wa Morena, a buse Iseraele." 
1Chronicles28:6 “Morena o ile a re ho nna: Solomone, mora wa hao, ke yena ya tla nkgahela Tempele, le mabala a yona, hobane ke mo kgethile hore e be mora wa ka, mme nna ke be ntatae." 
1Chronicles28:7 Ke tla tiisa mmuso wa hae kamehla yohle, haeba a ka nna a boloka melao ya ka le ditemoso tsa ka, jwalokaha a ntse a etsa." 
1Chronicles28:8 “Ka baka leo, pontsheng ya Baiseraele bohle, e leng setjhaba sa Morena, le moo Modimo wa rona a ntseng a utlwa, batlang, mme le boloke melao yohle ya Morena Modimo wa lona, e le hore le tle le rue naha ena e ntle, le e siele bana ba lona, e be ya bona kamehla yohle." 
1Chronicles28:9 “Jwale wena Solomone, mora wa ka, tseba Modimo wa ntatao, o mo sebeletse ka pelo ya hao yohle, le ka maikutlo a hao wohle. Morena o lekola dipelo tsohle, mme o tseba menahano yohle, le mehopolo yohle. Ha o ka mmatla, o tla mo fumana, empa haeba o ka mo furalla, o tla o lahlela ruri!" 
1Chronicles28:10 Hlokomela he, hobane Morena o o kgethetse hore o mo hahele Tempele eo e leng Sehalalelo sa hae. Eba monna, o etse jwalo.”" 
1Chronicles28:11 Jwale Davida a nea Solomone, mora wa hae, setshwantsho sa lethule la Tempele, le sa matlo a yona, le sa dikamore tsa matlotlo, le sa dikamore tse kahodimo, le sa dikamore tse kahare, le sa sekwahelo sa tefelo ya sebe." 
1Chronicles28:12 A mo nea le setshwantsho sa tsohle tse neng di le mohopolong wa hae, e leng mabala a Tempele ya Morena, le dikamore tse a potapotileng, le dikamore tsa matlotlo a Tempele ya Modimo, le dikamore tsa dimpho tse halalelang." 
1Chronicles28:13 Davida a laela Solomone kamoo a tla hlopha baprista le Balevi kateng, hore ba etse mosebetsi wohle wa tshebeletso ya Tempele ya Morena; le kamoo thepa yohle e tla sebediswa kateng ha ho sebeletswa ka Tempeleng ya Morena." 
1Chronicles28:14 A mo laela le hore na boima ba kgauta le ba silefera e tla etsa thepa yohle, e tla sebediswa, bo be bokae." 
1Chronicles28:15 A mmolella le boima ba kgauta e tla etsa didulwana tsa mabone, le e tla etsa mabone, le boima ba silefera e tla etsa didulwana tsa mabone, le e tla etsa mabone, ho ya kamoo sedulwana ka seng se tla sebediswa kateng." 
1Chronicles28:16 A mmolella le boima ba kgauta e tla etsa tafole e nngwe le e nngwe e tla bea bohobe bo halalelang, le boima ba silefera e tla etsa ditafole tsa silefera," 
1Chronicles28:17 le boima ba kgauta e hlwekisitsweng e tla etsa difereko, le dikotlolwana, le dikomiki, le boima ba kgauta e tla etsa sekotlolo ka seng sa kgauta, le boima ba silefera e tla etsa sekotlolo ka seng sa silefera." 
1Chronicles28:18 A ba a mmolella le boima ba kgauta e hlwekisitsweng, e tla etsa aletare ya ho tjhesetsa mokubetso, a mo nea le setshwantsho sa kariki, ke ho re sa dikerubime tsa kgauta, tse tla thathalatsa mapheo, di kgurumetse areka ya selekane sa Morena." 
1Chronicles28:19 Yaba Davida o re: “Tsena tsohle ke di ngotse, hobane letsoho la Morena le ile la ntataisa, mme a etsa hore ke utlwisise diqaqiso tsohle tsa setshwantsho sena.”" 
1Chronicles28:20 Davida a boela a re ho mora wa hae Solomone: “Eba monna, o be sebete, o etse jwalo. O se ke wa tshaba, kapa wa tsieleha, hobane Morena Modimo, e leng Modimo wa ka, o tla ba le wena. Ha a ka ke a o lahla, kapa a o furulla, ho fihlela o qeta mosebetsi wohle wa ho haha Tempele ya Morena." 
1Chronicles28:21 Dihlopha tsa baprista le tsa Balevi di tla o thusa mosebetsing wohle wa Tempele ya Modimo. Banna bohle ba ditsebi ba tla o thusa mesebetsing yohle e batlang tsebo; le mahosana le setjhaba sohle se tla mamela taelo ya hao.” 
1Chronicles29:1 Kgosi Davida a boela a re ho setjhaba sohle: “Solomone, mora wa ka, eo e leng yena feela eo Modimo a mo kgethileng, o sa le monyenyane, o a tetema, athe mosebetsi o moholo, hobane Tempele ena hase ya motho, empa ke ya Morena Modimo." 
1Chronicles29:2 Ka matla a ka wohle ke lokisitse dintho tsa Tempele ya Modimo wa ka: Kgauta e tla etsa dintho tsa kgauta, le silefera e tla etsa dintho tsa silefera, le lethose le tla etsa dintho tsa lethose, le tshepe e tla etsa dintho tsa tshepe, le mapolanka a tla etsa dintho tsa mapolanka, le majwe a bohlokwa a oniki, le majwe a phatsimang a tla kgabisa, a mebalabala, le mefuta yohle ya majwe a bohlokwa, le mahakwe." 
1Chronicles29:3 Ho feta mona, kaha ke rata Tempele ya Modimo wa ka, kahodima tsohle tseo ke seng ke di lokiseditse Tempele ena e halalelang, le nna ke abela Tempele ena ya Modimo wa ka matlotlo a ka a kgauta le a silefera:" 
1Chronicles29:4 Ke kgauta ya Ofire, e etsang boima ba dithane tse lekgolo, le silefera e hlwekisitsweng, e etsang boima ba dithane tse makgolo a mabedi le mashome a mane, e tla manehwa maboteng a Tempele;" 
1Chronicles29:5 e leng kgauta e tla etsa dintho tsa kgauta, le silefera e tla etsa dintho tsa silefera, le mesebetsi yohle e tla etswa ke ditsebi tsa mesebetsi ya matsoho. Jwale ke mang ya ithaopelang ho sebeletsa Morena kajeno?”" 
1Chronicles29:6 Yaba bao e leng dihlooho tsa malapa abo bona, le mahosana a merabe ya Iseraele, le balaodi ba bahlabani ba sekete, le ba ba lekgolo, le baokamedi ba mesebetsi ya kgosi, ba a ithaopa." 
1Chronicles29:7 Bakeng sa mesebetsi ya Tempele ya Modimo ba fana ka kgauta eo boima ba yona bo fetang dithane tse lekgolo le mashome a supileng, le silefera eo boima ba yona bo fetang dithane tse makgolo a mararo le mashome a mane, le lethose le etsang boima bo ka bang dithane tse makgolo a tsheletseng le mashome a mabedi, le tshepe eo boima ba yona bo fetang dithane tse dikete tse tharo le makgolo a mane." 
1Chronicles29:8 Ba neng ba ena le majwe a bohlokwa ba a abela letlole la Tempele ya Morena le neng le hlokomelwa ke Jehiele wa Mogereshone. 
1Chronicles29:9 Setjhaba sa nyakalla, hobane bao ba ne ba ithaopetse ho fana, mme ba efa Morena ka dipelo tsa bona tsohle. Kgosi Davida le yena a thaba haholo." 
1Chronicles29:10 Davida a rorisa Morena moo setjhaba sohle se leng teng, a re: “Kamehla le mehla ho roriswe wena, Morena Modimo wa ntata rona, wa ntata rona Iseraele." 
1Chronicles29:11 Boholo, le matla, le tlotla ke tsa hao, Morena, le tlholo, le botlotlehi. Tsohle tse lehodimong le lefatsheng ke tsa hao; mmuso ke wa hao, Morena, ke wena hlooho, o phahametse tsohle." 
1Chronicles29:12 Maruo le hlompho di tswa ho wena, tsohle di buswa ke wena; tsoho la hao le matla, le sefea, ho phahamisa le ho matlafatsa bohle." 
1Chronicles29:13 Re a o leboha Modimo wa rona, re rorisa lebitso la hao le tlotlehang." 
1Chronicles29:14 “Empa nna ke mang? Tjhaba sa ka sona ke eng, hoo re ka ithaopelang ho fana hakaalekaale? Tsohle ke tsa hao, mme tseo re faneng ka tsona di tswa ho wena." 
1Chronicles29:15 Mahlong a hao re baeti le bajaki, jwaloka bo-ntata rona bohle. Matsatsi a rona, lefatsheng mona, a jwaloka seriti, mme ha ho ya nang le tshepo." 
1Chronicles29:16 Oho, Morena Modimo wa rona, dintho tsena tsohle, tseo re di lokiseditseng ho o hahela Tempele ka tsona, ho tlotla lebitso la hao le halalelang, di tswa ho wena, ke tsa hao." 
1Chronicles29:17 Hape ke a tseba, Modimo wa ka, hore o leka pelo ya motho, mme o thabela ho loka. Ha e le nna ke o nyeheletse ka dintho tsena tsohle ka boithaopo, ka pelo ya ka yohle. Jwale ke thabetse le ho bona setjhaba sa hao, se teng mona, se o nyehella ka boithaopo." 
1Chronicles29:18 Oho, Morena Modimo wa bo-ntata rona Aborahama, le Isaka, le Iseraele, etsa hore maikutlo ana a nne a be teng mehopolong ya dipelo tsa setjhaba sa hao, se nne se tshepahale ho wena." 
1Chronicles29:19 Ako etse hore Solomone, mora wa ka, a tshepahale, hore a boloke melao ya hao, le ditemoso tsa hao, le ditaelo tsa hao, a phethe dintho tsena tsohle, a hahe Tempele eo ke seng ke lokiseditse hore e hahwe.”" 
1Chronicles29:20 Yaba Davida o re ho setjhaba sohle: “Rorisang Morena Modimo wa lona!” Setjhaba sohle sa rorisa Morena Modimo wa bo-ntata sona; sa inamisa dihlooho tsa sona, sa kgumamela Morena, sa isa hlompho ho kgosi." 
1Chronicles29:21 Ka letsatsi le hlahlamang leo, setjhaba sa etsetsa Morena mahlabelo le dinyehelo tsa setjheso ka dipohwana tse sekete, le dipheleu tse sekete, le dikonyana tse sekete, le dinyehelo tsa dino, le mahlabelo a mang a mangata, a etsetswang Baiseraele bohle." 
1Chronicles29:22 Ka lona letsatsi leo ba eja, ba enwa ba nyakaletse haholo, ba le kapele ho Morena. Ba boela ba bea Solomone, mora wa Davida, kgetlo la bobedi, hore e be kgosi; ba mo tlotsetsa Morena, hore e be mmusi e moholo, Sadoke yena e be moprista." 
1Chronicles29:23 Solomone a dula teroneng ya Morena, ya eba kgosi sebakeng sa ntatae Davida, mme a atleha. Baiseraele bohle ba mo hlompha." 
1Chronicles29:24 Mahosana wohle, le bahale, le bara bohle ba kgosi, ba ipea tlasa kgosi Solomone." 
1Chronicles29:25 Morena a phahamisa Solomone haholo mahlong a Baiseraele bohle; a mo apesa botlotlehi boo ho seng kgosi e neng e kile ya eba le bona, naheng ya Iseraele, pele ho yena." 
1Chronicles29:26 Davida, mora wa Jese, a busa Baiseraele bohle." 
1Chronicles29:27 A ba busa ka dilemo tse mashome a mane; ka tse supileng a busa a le Heborone, ka tse mashome a mararo a metso e meraro a le Jerusalema." 
1Chronicles29:28 A shwa a se a tsofetse haholo, a phetse dilemo tse ngata, a bile le maruo, mme a hlompheha. Solomone, mora wa hae, a mo hlahlama." 
1Chronicles29:29 Diketso tsa kgosi Davida, ho tloha qalong ho isa qetellong, di ngotswe Bukeng ya Moporofeta Samuele, le Bukeng ya Moporofeta Nathane, le Bukeng ya Moporofeta Gade." 
1Chronicles29:30 Di ngotswe mmoho le tsohle tsa puso ya hae, le tsa bonatla ba hae, le diketsahalo tsohle tse ileng tsa mo hlahela naheng ya Iseraele, le mebusong yohle ya dinaha tse ding." 
2Chronicles1:1 Solomone, mora wa Davida, a tsitsa mmusong wa hae; Morena Modimo wa hae, a ba le yena, mme a mo phahamisa haholo." 
2Chronicles1:2 Jwale Solomone a bua le Baiseraele bohle, le balaodi ba bahlabani ba sekete, le ba bahlabani ba lekgolo, le baahlodi, le mahosana wohle a Baiseraele, e leng dihlooho tsa malapa abo bona." 
2Chronicles1:3 A tsamaya le setjhaba sohle, a ya sebakeng sa borapedi se neng se le Gibeone, hobane Tente ya Modimo eo Moshe, mohlanka wa Morena, a neng a e etse ha a le lehwatateng, e ne e le hona moo Gibeone." 
2Chronicles1:4 Feela Davida o ne a ile a nyolla areka ya Modimo Kiriate-Jearime, a e isa sebakeng seo a neng a e lokiseditse sona. O ne a e hlometse tente Jerusalema." 
2Chronicles1:5 Le aletare ya lethose eo Besalele, mora wa Uri, setloholo sa Hure, a neng a e entse, o ne a e hlomme kapele ho Leaho la Morena moo bo-Solomone le setjhaba ba neng ba eya teng ho ya bua le Morena." 
2Chronicles1:6 Solomone a hlwella aletareng ya lethose, kapele ho Morena. Aletare eo e ne e le pela Tente ya Morena, mme a etsetsa dinyehelo tsa setjheso tse sekete hodima yona." 
2Chronicles1:7 Hona bosiung boo Modimo a iponahatsa ho Solomone, a re ho yena: “Kopa seo o lakatsang hore ke o fe sona!”" 
2Chronicles1:8 Solomone a re ho Modimo: “O bontshitse lerato le leholo ho Davida, ntate, mme o entse hore ke be kgosi, ke mo hlahlame." 
2Chronicles1:9 Jwale Morena Modimo, tshepiso eo o e etseditseng Davida, ntate, e ke e phethahale, hobane ke mona o nkentse kgosi ya setjhaba se sengata jwaloka lerole la lefatshe." 
2Chronicles1:10 Ako nnee bohlale le tsebo, e le hore ke tle ke tsebe ho etella setjhaba sena pele, hobane ke mang ya ka tsebang ho busa setjhaba see sa hao se sekaalekaale?”" 
2Chronicles1:11 Modimo a re ho Solomone: “Kaha o kopile se ka pelong ya hao, o sa ikopela matlotlo, kapa maruo, kapa tlotla, kapa hore dira tsa hao di timetswe, kapa hore o phele halelele, o mpa o ikopetse bohlale le tsebo, hore o tle o tsebe ho busa setjhaba sa ka, seo ke o beileng ho ba kgosi ya sona," 
2Chronicles1:12 ke o nea bohlale, le tsebo. Ke tla be ke o nee le matlotlo, le tlotla, e leng tseo ho eso be le kgosi e kileng ya eba le tsona pele ho wena, kapa e tla ba le tsona kamorao ho wena.”" 
2Chronicles1:13 Yaba Solomone o kgutlela Jerusalema, a etswa sebakeng sa borapedi se neng se le Gibeone, moo a neng a le kapele ho Tente ya Morena, mme a fihla a busa Baiseraele." 
2Chronicles1:14 Solomone a kgobokanya dikariki tsa ntwa le bahlabani ba palamang. O ne a ena le dikariki tsa ntwa tse sekete le makgolo a mane, le bahlabani ba palamang ba dikete tse leshome le metso e mmedi, bao a ileng a ba bea metseng eo ho bolokwang dikariki tsa ntwa ho yona, le Jerusalema moo a neng a le hona teng." 
2Chronicles1:15 Kgosi ya etsa hore motseng wa Jerusalema, silefera le kgauta di be ngata jwaloka majwe, le difate tsa dikedare di be ngata jwaloka difate tsa monokotshwai tse phuleng." 
2Chronicles1:16 Bahwebi ba kgosi Solomone ba ne ba mo rekela dipere Egepeta le Kuwe. 
2Chronicles1:17 Kariki ya ntwa e ne e rekwa ka silefera e ka etsang boima ba dikilo tse supileng, pere yona e le silefera e boima bo ka bang kilo le halofo. Bahwebi ba ne ba rekisetsa dikgosi tsohle tsa Bahete le tsa Baarame dipere tsena." 
2Chronicles2:1 Solomone a rera ho hahela Morena Tempele le ho ikgahela ntlo ya bokgosi. 
2Chronicles2:2 A kgetha banna ba dikete tse mashome a supileng ho thotha thepa ya ho haha, le ba dikete tse mashome a robedi ho betla majwe thabeng. A kgetha baokamedi ba bona ba dikete tse tharo le makgolo a tsheletseng." 
2Chronicles2:3 Solomone a romela molaetsa ho Hirame, kgosi ya Tire, a re: “Jwalokaha o ile wa sebetsa le Davida, ntate, wa mo romela difate tsa dikedare ho ikgahela ntlo, le nna ako sebetse le nna jwalo." 
2Chronicles2:4 Bona, ke hahela Morena Modimo wa ka, Tempele moo a tla kgumamellwa teng, mme ke mo abela yona. Ke moo ke tla mo tjhesetsa mokubetso o monko o monate teng. Ke moo re tla bea bohobe bo halalelang teng, re etsetse le nyehelo ya setjheso teng, hoseng le mantsiboya, le ka disabatha, le ka mekete ya ho thwasa ha kgwedi, le ka mekete e halalelang ya Morena Modimo wa rona. Ena ke taelo ya kamehla yohle e laetsweng Baiseraele." 
2Chronicles2:5 “Tempele ena eo ke tla e haha e kgolo hobane Modimo wa rona o moholo ho feta medimo yohle. 
2Chronicles2:6 Empa ke mang ya ka mo hahelang Tempele, haesitana le mahodimo a maholo hakaanakaana, a ke ke a mo lekana? Jwale ebe nna ke mang, hoo nka mo hahelang Tempele, haese feela ho haha sebakana sa ho mo tjhesetsa mahlabelo?" 
2Chronicles2:7 “Ka lebaka lena, ako nthomelle monna wa setsebi, ya tsebang ho etsa dintho tsa kgauta, le tsa silefera, le tsa lethose, le tsa tshepe; ya tsebang le ho etsa masela a perese, le a mafubedu, le a maputswa; ya tla tseba ho rala ditshwantsho, a sebetse le banna ba ditsebi, bao ke nang le bona mona naheng ya Juda le Jerusalema, bao Davida, ntate, a seng a ba hlophile." 
2Chronicles2:8 “Hape o nthomelle difate tsa dikedare, le tsa modutu, le tsa alemaka, tse tswang Lebanone. Ke a tseba hore bahlanka ba hao ke ditsebi tsa ho rema difate, moo Lebanone, mme bahlanka ba ka ba tla sebetsa le ba hao," 
2Chronicles2:9 ba ntlhophele difate tse ngata, hobane Tempele eo ke tla e haha e tla ba kgolo ka mokgwa o makatsang." 
2Chronicles2:10 “Ke tla o romela koro e etsang boima ba dithane tse dikete tse pedi, le harese e etsang boima ba dithane tse dikete tse pedi, le veine e etsang dilethara tse dikete tse makgolo a mane, le ole ya mohlwaare e etsang dilethara tse dikete tse makgolo a mane, hore e be dijo tsa bahlanka ba hao ba tla rema difate.”" 
2Chronicles2:11 Yaba Hirame, kgosi ya Tire, o araba Solomone ka lengolo, o re: “Kahobane Morena a ratile setjhaba sa hae, o o entse hore o be kgosi ya sona.”" 
2Chronicles2:12 Hirame a tswela pele, a re: “Ho bokwe Morena Modimo wa Iseraele, ya entseng lehodimo le lefatshe, ya neileng Davida mora ya bohlale, ya nang le kelello le kutlwisiso, ya tla hahela Morena Tempele, a be a ikgahele ntlo ya bokgosi." 
2Chronicles2:13 “Jwale ke o romela monna ya bohlale, ya nang le kutlwisiso, ya bitswang Hurame." 
2Chronicles2:14 Ke mora wa mosadi e mong wa ba morabe wa Dane. Ntatae o ne a ahile Tire. Monna enwa o tseba ho etsa dintho tsa kgauta, le tsa silefera, le tsa lethose, le tsa tshepe; le ho betla majwe, le ho etsa dintho tsa lehong, le tsa masela a perese, le a maputswa, le a lene e lohehileng, le a mafubedu. O tseba le ho etsa moralo wa ntho efe le efe, le ho etsa setshwantsho sa ntho efe le efe eo ho thweng a e etse. Monna enwa o tla sebetsa le ditsebi tsa hao, le ditsebi tsa monga ka Davida, ntatao." 
2Chronicles2:15 “Ka baka lena, monga ka a ke a romele koro, le harese, le veine, le ole, e leng tseo a buileng ka tsona, ho rona bahlanka ba hae." 
2Chronicles2:16 Rona re tla rema difate tsohle tseo o di hlokang, mona Lebanone, re di tlamahanye, re di akgele lewatleng, di sike le lebopo di phaphametse, ho ya fihla Jopo. Jwale wena o tla di nka, o di ise Jerusalema.”" 
2Chronicles2:17 Solomone a bala bajaki bohle ba neng ba le naheng ya Iseraele; a ba bala jwalokaha Davida, ntatae, a ne a ile a ba bala. Ha fumanwa ba le dikete tse lekgolo le mashome a mahlano a metso e meraro, le makgolo a tsheletseng." 
2Chronicles2:18 Ba dikete tse mashome a supileng a ba abela ho jara thoto; ba dikete tse mashome a robedi a ba abela ho thua majwe thabeng, mme ba dikete tse tharo le makgolo a tsheletseng bona a ba abela ho hlokomela batho ba sebetsang." 
2Chronicles3:1 Jwale Solomone a qala ho haha Tempele ya Morena, Jerusalema, thabeng ya Moria, seotlong sa Orenane wa Mojebuse, moo Morena a neng a iponahatse teng ho Davida, ntatae; e leng sebaka seo Davida a neng a se kgethe." 
2Chronicles3:2 A qala ho e haha ka letsatsi la bobedi la kgwedi ya bobedi, selemong sa bone sa puso ya hae." 
2Chronicles3:3 Ditekanyo tsa Tempele ya Modimo, eo Solomone a ileng a e haha, ke tsena: Bolelele e ne e le dimethara tse ka bang mashome a mabedi a metso e supileng, bophara e le dimethara tse ka bang robong." 
2Chronicles3:4 Bolelele ba lethule le kapele ho Tempele e ne e ka ba dimethara tse robong, bo lekana le bophara ba Tempele; bophahamo le bona e ka ba dimethara tse robong. Bokahare ba lethule a bo maneha kgauta e hlwekisitsweng." 
2Chronicles3:5 Mabota a Tempele a a maneha mapolanka a modutu, le wona a a kwahela ka kgauta a hlwekisitsweng. Hodima wona a etsa ditshwantsho tsa difate tsa dipalema, le meqhaka e lohilweng jwaloka ketane." 
2Chronicles3:6 A kgabisa Tempele ka majwe a bohlokwa, le ka kgauta e tswang Parefaime." 
2Chronicles3:7 A maneha bokahare ba marulelo, le dikosene tsa menyako, le mabota, le mamati a Tempele ka kgauta, mme a etsa ditshwantsho tsa dikerubime maboteng." 
2Chronicles3:8 A haha Sehalalelo se halalelang ka ho fetisisa. Bolelele ba sona bo ne bo lekana le bophara ba Tempele, e le dimethara tse ka bang robong, le bophara ba sona e le dimethara tse ka bang robong. A se maneha kgauta e hlwekisitsweng, e etsang boima ba dithane tse ka bang mashome a mabedi a motso o mong." 
2Chronicles3:9 Boima ba dipekere tsa kgauta e ne e ka ba dikeramo tse makgolo a tsheletseng. Le bokahare ba dikamore tse kahodimo bo ne bo manehilwe kgauta. 
2Chronicles3:10 Ka Sehalalelong se halalelang ka ho fetisisa a etsa dikerubime tse pedi, tse betlilweng, mme a di maneha kgauta." 
2Chronicles3:11 Bolelele ba mapheo a dikerubime ha a thathaletse e ne e ka ba dimethara tse robong. Bolelele ba lepheo le le leng la kerubime ya pele e ne e ka ba dimethara tse pedi le halofo. Le ne le thetsitse lebota la Tempele, ha lepheo le leng, le ntseng le lekana le lona, lona le ne le thetsana le lepheo la kerubime e nngwe." 
2Chronicles3:12 Ka mokgwa o tshwanang, lepheo le leng la kerubime ya bobedi le ne le etsa bolelele ba dimethara tse ka bang pedi le halofo, le thetsitse lebota le leng la Tempele, ha lepheo le leng, le bolelele bo lekanang le ba lepheo la pele, le ne le thetsitse lepheo la kerubime ya pele." 
2Chronicles3:13 Mapheo a dikerubime tsena tse pedi, ha a thathaletse, a ne a etsa bolelele ba dimethara tse ka bang robong. Dikerubime tsena di ne di eme ka maoto, di tadimile Sehalalelong." 
2Chronicles3:14 A etsa lesira ka masela a maputswa, le a perese, le a mafubedu, le a lene, mme a etsa ditshwantsho tsa dikerubime hodima lona." 
2Chronicles3:15 Kapele ho Tempele a haha ditshiya tse pedi, tseo bolelele ba tsona e neng e ka ba dimethara tse leshome le metso e tsheletseng. Tshiya e nngwe le e nngwe e ne e ena le kotola eo bophahamo ba yona e neng e ka ba dimethara tse pedi le halofo." 
2Chronicles3:16 A etsa mekgabiso e jwaloka diketane, a e bea kahodimo ho ditshiya; a etsa le dikgarenate tse lekgolo, mme a di hokela mekgabisong eo." 
2Chronicles3:17 A hloma ditshiya tseo kapele ho Tempele; e nngwe ya eba ka letsohong le letona, mme a e bitsa Jakine, e nngwe ya eba ka ho le letshehadi, mme a e bitsa Boase." 
2Chronicles4:1 Solomone a etsa aletare ya lethose. Bolelele ba yona e ne e le dimethara tse ka bang robong, bophara ba yona le bona e ka ba dimethara tse robong, bophahamo e ka ba dimethara tse nne le halofo." 
2Chronicles4:2 A etsa le tanka e tjhitja ka tshepe e qhibidisitsweng. Boahlamo ba molomo wa yona e ne e ka ba dimethara tse nne le halofo, bophahamo e ka ba dimethara tse tharo. Bolelele ba ho potapota boahlamo ba yona bo ne bo etsa dimethara tse ka bang leshome le metso e meraro le halofo." 
2Chronicles4:3 Katlasa molomo wa yona, ho o potapota, ho ne ho ena le ditshwantsho tsa dipohwana, mme halofong e nngwe le e nngwe ya methara ho ena le dipohwana tse leshome. Dipohwana di ne di entse mela e mmedi, di bopeletswe le tanka." 
2Chronicles4:4 Tanka e ne e dutse hodima mekokotlo ya dipohwana tse leshome le metso e mmedi; tse tharo di tadimile leboya, tse tharo di tadimile bophirimela, tse tharo di tadimile borwa, tse tharo di tadimile botjhabela. Tanka e ne e beilwe hodima mekokotlo ya tsona, di furallane." 
2Chronicles4:5 Morumo wa tanka e ne e le dimilemethara tse ka bang mashome a supileng a metso e mehlano, molomo wa yona o ahlame jwaloka molomo wa komiki, o ena le dithunthung tsa kgahla. E ne e tshela dilethara tse ka bang dikete tse mashome a tsheletseng." 
2Chronicles4:6 Jwale Solomone a etsa dikotlolo tse leshome tsa lethose, tsa ho hlatswetsa. A bea tse hlano ka lehlakoreng le letona, tse hlano ka lehlakoreng le letshehadi. Ka ho tsona ho ne ho hlatswetswa dintho tse sebediswang ha ho etswa nyehelo ya setjheso. Tanka yona e ne e sebediswa ke baprista ha ba itlhatswa." 
2Chronicles4:7 A etsa didulwana tsa mabone, tsa kgauta, tse leshome, ho ya kamoo di neng di tshwanetse ho ba kateng, a di bea ka Tempeleng, tse hlano ka letsohong le letona, tse hlano ka ho le letshehadi." 
2Chronicles4:8 A etsa le ditafole tse leshome, a di bea ka Tempeleng; tse hlano ka letsohong le letona, tse hlano ka ho le letshehadi. A etsa le dikotlolo tse lekgolo tsa kgauta." 
2Chronicles4:9 A etsa seotlwana sa baprista, le seotlwana se seng se seholo, le mamati a diotlwana, mme mamati ao a a maneha lethose." 
2Chronicles4:10 A bea tanka ka lehlakoreng le letona, qetheng e ka borwa bo ka botjhabela." 
2Chronicles4:11 Hurame a bopa dipitsa, a etsa le dikgarafu le dikotlolo. Jwale yaba Hurame o qetile mosebetsi wa Tempele ya Modimo, oo a neng a o etsetsa kgosi Solomone." 
2Chronicles4:12 E ne e le dintho tsena: ditshiya tse pedi, le dikotola tse pedi tse neng di le hodima ditshiya, le meqhaka a mmedi e kgabisitseng dikotola tse pedi tse hodima ditshiya," 
2Chronicles4:13 le dikgarenate tse makgolo a mane tse kgabisitseng matlowa a mabedi. Letlowa ka leng le ne le ena le mela e mmedi ya dikgarenate tse kgabisitseng dikotola tse pedi tse hodima ditshiya. 
2Chronicles4:14 A etsa didulwana le dikotlolo tse bewang hodima tsona," 
2Chronicles4:15 le tanka, le dipohwana tse leshome le metso e mmedi tse e jereng," 
2Chronicles4:16 le dipitsa, le dikgarafu, le difereko, le dintho tsohle tsa tsona. Dintho tsohle tseo Hurame a neng a di etseditse kgosi Solomone, bakeng sa Tempele ya Morena, e ne e le tsa lethose le phatsimang." 
2Chronicles4:17 Kgosi ya etsetsa dintho tsena phuleng ya Jorodane, sethulelong sa letsopa se pakeng tsa Sukote le Sereda." 
2Chronicles4:18 Solomone o ile a etsa dintho tsena di le ngata; le boima ba lethose leo di entsweng ka lona bo ne bo ke ke ba lekanngwa. 
2Chronicles4:19 Solomone a etsa dintho tsohle tsa Tempele ya Morena, le aletare ya kgauta, le ditafole tse neng di bea bohobe bo halalelang." 
2Chronicles4:20 A etsa didulwana tsa mabone le mabone a tsona ka kgauta e hlwekisitsweng, e le hore a tle a nne a tuke kapele ho Sehalalelo jwalokaha ho ne ho laetswe." 
2Chronicles4:21 Ka kgauta e hlwekisitsweng a etsa dipalesa, le mabone, le matlao." 
2Chronicles4:22 A etsa le dikere tse lokisang dikgwele tsa mabone, le dikotlolo, le dikgaba, le dipitsana tsa mokubetso, ka kgauta e hlwekisitsweng. Hodima monyako wa Tempele, le hodima mamati a Sehalalelo se halalelang ka ho fetisisa, le hodima mamati a Tempele, a maneha kgauta e hlwekisitsweng." 
2Chronicles5:1 Yaba mosebetsi wohle, oo Solomone a neng a o etsetsa Tempele ya Morena, o a phethwa. Jwale Solomone a kenya dintho tsohle tseo Davida, ntatae, a neng a di abetse Morena, ka matlung a polokelo a Tempele. E ne e le silefera, le kgauta, le dintho tsohle." 
2Chronicles5:2 Jwale Solomone a kgobokanya baholo bohle ba Iseraele, le dihlooho tsohle tsa merabe, le mahosana a malapa a bana ba Iseraele. Bohle ba tla Jerusalema ho kgosi Solomone, hore ba tlo nyolla areka ya selekane sa Morena, e tswe Motseng wa Davida, e leng Sione." 
2Chronicles5:3 Banna bohle ba Iseraele ba kgobokanela ho kgosi Solomone mohla mokete, ka kgwedi ya bosupa." 
2Chronicles5:4 Baholo bohle ba Iseraele ba tla, mme Balevi ba nka areka." 
2Chronicles5:5 Baprista le Balevi ba nyolla areka, le Tente ya Morena, le dintho tsohle tse halalelang, tse neng di le ka Tenteng." 
2Chronicles5:6 Jwale bo-kgosi Solomone le setjhaba sohle sa Iseraele, se neng se kgobokanetse ho yena, ba ema kapele ho areka, ba etsa mahlabelo ka dikgutshwane, le ka dipohwana tse ngata, hoo di neng di ke ke tsa balwa." 
2Chronicles5:7 Baprista ba tlisa areka ya selekane sa Morena ka Tempeleng, ba e bea ditulong tsa yona, ka Sehalalelong se halalelang ka ho fetisisa, tlasa mapheo a dikerubime." 
2Chronicles5:8 Dikerubime tseo di ne di thathaladitse mapheo a tsona hodima moo areka e bewang teng, a okametse areka le mefeng ya yona." 
2Chronicles5:9 Mefeng e ne e hlahisitse dintlha tsa yona, hoo dintlha tseo di neng di bonahala ha motho a le ka Sehalalelong, a tobane le Sehalalelo se halalelang ka ho fetisisa, empa di ne di sa bonahale ha motho a le kantle ho Sehalalelo, mme di sa ntsane di le moo le kajeno-ya-bokajeno." 
2Chronicles5:10 Ho ne ho se letho kahara areka, ha e se matlapa a mabedi, ao Moshe a neng a a kenye kateng ha ba le Horebe, mohla Morena a etsang selekane le bana ba Iseraele, ha ba ne ba etswa naheng ya Egepeta." 
2Chronicles5:11 Baprista ba tswa ka Sehalalelong. Bohle ba neng ba etswa kamoo ba ne ba itlhwekisitse ho sa natswe dihlopha tsa bona. 
2Chronicles5:12 Balevi bohle, bao e neng e le dibini, e leng bo-Asafo, le Hemane, le Jedutune, le bara ba bona, le bana babo bona, ba ne ba eme ka botjhabela ho aletare, ba apere diaparo tsa lene tse tshweu, ba letsa matlheretlhere, le dikatara, le diharepa. Ba ne ba tlatsitswe ke baprista ba lekgolo le mashome a mabedi, ba neng ba letsa diterompeta." 
2Chronicles5:13 Baletsi ba diterompeta, le dibini, ba amohela pina jwalokaha eka ho bina motho a le mong, ba rorisa Morena. Ba ne ba tlatsitswe ke diterompeta, le matlheretlhere le diletsa tse ding, ba rorisa Morena, ba re: “Bokang Morena hobane o molemo; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle.” Yaba leru le tlala ka Tempeleng ya Morena." 
2Chronicles5:14 Baprista ba sitwa ho ntshetsa mosebetsi wa bona pele ka baka la leru, hobane tlotla ya Morena e ne e tletse ka Tempeleng ya Modimo." 
2Chronicles6:1 Jwale Solomone a re: “Morena o itse o tla dula kahara lefifi le letholetsho. 
2Chronicles6:2 Empa ke o hahetse Tempele, e leng sebaka seo o tla dula ka ho sona kamehla yohle.”" 
2Chronicles6:3 Yare setjhaba sohle sa Iseraele se sa eme moo, kgosi ya retelehela ka ho sona, ya se hlohonolofatsa." 
2Chronicles6:4 Yaba kgosi e re: “Ho bokwe Morena Modimo wa Iseraele, ya phethahaditseng seo a neng a se tshepise Davida, ntate, a re:" 
2Chronicles6:5 Ho tloha mohla ke ntshang setjhaba sa ka Egepeta, ha ho motse, hara merabe ya Iseraele, oo nkileng ka o kgetha hore ke hahe Tempele eo ke tla dula ho yona ho wona, mme ha ke eso kgethe motho hore e be mmusi wa setjhaba sa ka sa Iseraele." 
2Chronicles6:6 Empa ke kgethile Jerusalema hore ke tle ke kgumamellwe teng, mme ke kgethile Davida hore a buse setjhaba sa ka sa Iseraele." 
2Chronicles6:7 “E ne e le takatso ya Davida, ntate, ho hahela Morena Modimo wa Iseraele Tempele, moo a tla kgumamellwa teng." 
2Chronicles6:8 Empa Morena a re ho Davida, ntate: Ke hantle ha o ile wa lakatsa ho nkgahela Tempele;" 
2Chronicles6:9 leha ho le jwalo, hase wena ya tla nkgahela Tempele, empa mora wa hao, ya tswang lethekeng la hao, ke yena ya tla nkgahela yona." 
2Chronicles6:10 “Jwale Morena o phethahaditse polelo eo a neng a e bue, hobane ke tswetswe tlung ya Davida, ntate. Ke dutse terone ya Iseraele jwalokaha Morena a ne a tshepise, mme ke bile ke hahetse Morena Modimo wa Iseraele Tempele." 
2Chronicles6:11 Ke kentse areka ka ho yona, e leng areka eo selekane sa Morena, seo a neng a se etse le bana ba Iseraele, se leng ka ho yona.”" 
2Chronicles6:12 Yaba Solomone o ema kapele ho aletare ya Morena, moo setjhaba sohle sa Iseraele se ntseng se bona, a phakalatsa matsoho." 
2Chronicles6:13 Solomone o ne a hahile sethala sa lethose. Bolelele ba sona e ne e ka ba dimethara tse pedi le halofo, bophara ba sona e ka ba dimethara tse pedi le halofo, ha bophahamo ba sona e ne e ka ba methara le halofo. O ne a se beile bohareng ba lebala. A hlwella hodima sona, a nto kgumama moo setjhaba sohle sa Iseraele se ntseng se mmona, a phahamisetsa matsoho a hae lehodimong," 
2Chronicles6:14 a re: “Oho, Morena Modimo wa Iseraele, ha ho Modimo ya kang wena lehodimong le lefatsheng; ya bolokang selekane, ya hauhelang bahlanka ba hae ba latelang melao ya hae ka dipelo tsa bona tsohle." 
2Chronicles6:15 O bolokile tshepiso eo o neng o e etsetse mohlanka wa hao Davida, ntate. O bile o ne o bue ka molomo wa hao, mme ka letsatsi lena o phethahaditse polelo eo ka matla a hao." 
2Chronicles6:16 “Jwale wena Morena Modimo wa Iseraele, ako boloke tshepiso eo o neng o e etsetse mohlanka wa hao Davida, ntate, wa re: O ke ke wa hloka mohlahlami ya tla dula teroneng ya Iseraele, ha feela bara ba hao ba ka hlokomela metsamao ya bona, ba latela melao ya ka jwalokaha o ile wa etsa."
