Psalms92:14 Ba hlomilweng ka tlung ya Morena ba tla atleha mabaleng a Modimo wa rona. 
Psalms92:15 Le boqhekung ba beha ditholwana, jwaloka difate tse nonneng, fate tse talana," 
Psalms92:16 ho bontsha hore Morena o lokile, ke lefika la ka, ha ho na bobe ho yena." 
Psalms93:1 Morena ke kgosi, o kgabile ka botlotlehi; matla ke seaparo sa hae le leqhama la hae. O tiisitse lefatshe, le ke ke la sisinyeha." 
Psalms93:2 Terone ya hao haesale e tiya ho tloha kgalekgale, haesale o le teng ho tloha mehleng ya kgalekgale." 
Psalms93:3 Dinoka di a tlala, Morena, dinoka di a hwasa, dinoka di a duma." 
Psalms93:4 O matla ho feta diaduma, diaduma tsa metsi a lewatle, o matla ho feta maqhubu a lona; Morena ya hodimodimo o matla." 
Psalms93:5 Ditemoso tsa hao di tshepahala haholo; ntlo ya hao e tshwanelwa ke kgalalelo, kamehla le mehla, wena Morena." 
Psalms94:1 Morena, wena Modimo ya phetetsang, ako iponahatse, wena Modimo ya phetetsang." 
Psalms94:2 Tsoha, wena moahlodi wa lefatshe, o nee baikgohomosi moputso wa bona." 
Psalms94:3 Ba kgopo ba tla thaba ho fihlela neng? E tla ba ho fihlela neng, Morena?" 
Psalms94:4 Ba a hehla, ba bua ka boikakaso, bohle ba kgopo ba a ithorisa." 
Psalms94:5 Morena, ba hatakela setjhaba sa hao, ba hatella bao e leng lefa la hao." 
Psalms94:6 Ba fenetha mohlolohadi le mojaki, ba bolaya le dikgutsana." 
Psalms94:7 Ba re: “Morena ha a bone, Modimo wa Jakobo ha a lemohe.”" 
Psalms94:8 Utlwisisang, lona setjhaba sa mawatla; dithoto ting! le tla hlalefa neng?" 
Psalms94:9 Na ya entseng tsebe a ke ke a utlwa? Ya bopileng leihlo na a ke ke a bona? 
Psalms94:10 Na yena ya kgalemelang ditjhaba a ke ke a di otla, yena ya rutang batho bohlale?" 
Psalms94:11 Morena o tseba mehopolo ya motho, o a tseba hore ke lefeela." 
Psalms94:12 Morena, ho lehlohonolo motho eo o mo kgalemelang, eo o mo rutang ka Molao wa hao," 
Psalms94:13 hore o tle o mo kgatholle, o mo kgatholle matsatsing a mabe, ha ba kgopo bona ba tjhekelwa lemena." 
Psalms94:14 Morena a ke ke a furalla tjhaba sa hae, a ke ke a lahla bao e leng lefa la hae." 
Psalms94:15 Dikahlolo di tla boela di etswa ka toka, bohle ba pelo di ntle ba tla e latela." 
Psalms94:16 Ke mang ya tla ntshireletsa ho ba kgopo? Ke mang ya tla mpuella ho ba bolotsana? 
Psalms94:17 Hoja Morena a se ke a nthusa, nka be ke se ke robetse lebitleng." 
Psalms94:18 Moo ke reng: “Leoto la ka le a thella,” mohau wa hao o a ntshehetsa, Morena." 
Psalms94:19 Ha pelo ya ka e touta haholo, matshediso a hao a hlabolla moya wa ka." 
Psalms94:20 Na o ka ba le kopano le baahlodi, baahlodi ba kgopo, ba fetolang bobe molao?" 
Psalms94:21 Ba ikopanya mmoho ho fedisa bophelo ba ya lokileng, ba ahlolela ya se nang molato lefu." 
Psalms94:22 Empa Morena ke qhohosheane ya ka, Modimo wa ka ke lefika leo ke tshabelang ho lona." 
Psalms94:23 O tla ba buseletsa bokgopo ba bona, a ba timetse ka baka la bobe ba bona. Morena Modimo wa rona, o tla ba timetsa." 
Psalms95:1 Tloong, a re etsetseng Morena mehoo, re mo etsetse mehoo ya thabo, lefika le re pholosang re le etsetse ditlatse." 
Psalms95:2 A re itlhahiseng kapele ho yena, re itlhahise ka teboho, re mo rokeng ka mehoo ya thabo." 
Psalms95:3 Morena ke Modimo e moholo, ke kgosi e kgolo, e phahametseng medimo yohle." 
Psalms95:4 Dikgohlo tsohle tsa lefatshe di matsohong a hae, le tsona ditlhoro tsa dithaba ke tsa hae." 
Psalms95:5 Lewatle ke la hae, ke yena ya le entseng; lefatshe o le bopile ka diatla tsa hae." 
Psalms95:6 Tloong, a re itiheleng maotong a hae, re itihele ka hlompho, re weng ka mangwele kapele ho Morena, Morena, Mmopi wa rona." 
Psalms95:7 Ke yena Modimo wa rona, re setjhaba se diswang ke yena, re mohlape o matsohong a hae. Kajeno ha le utlwa lentswe la hae," 
Psalms95:8 se thatafatseng dipelo tsa lona jwaloka mohla Meriba, jwaloka mohla Masa, lehwatateng;" 
Psalms95:9 moo bo-ntata lona ba ileng ba nteka teng, ba nnonya leha ba ne ba bone diketso tsa ka." 
Psalms95:10 Ka halefela moloko oo ka dilemo tse mashome a mane, ka ba ka re: “Ke setjhaba se pelo di kgelohileng, ha se tsebe ditsela tsa ka.”" 
Psalms95:11 Yaba ke hlapanya ke halefile, ke re: “Ba ke ke ba ba ba kena ba kena phomolong ya ka.”" 
Psalms96:1 Binelang Morena sefela se setjha, lona ba lefatshe lohle le ke le binele Morena." 
Psalms96:2 Binelang Morena, bokang lebitso la hae, ka letsatsi le letsatsi, phatlalatsang le phatlalatse tsa ho pholosa ha hae." 
Psalms96:3 Bolelang tsa tlotla ya hae hara ditjhaba, le dimakatso tsa hae hara merabe yohle." 
Psalms96:4 Morena o moholo, o lokelwa ke thoriso e kgolo, o tshabeha ho feta medimo yohle." 
Psalms96:5 Medimo yohle ya baditjhaba ke mafeelafelane, athe Morena ke yena ya entseng mahodimo." 
Psalms96:6 O eteletswe pele ke tlotla le botlotlehi, matla le kganya di Sehalalelong sa hae." 
Psalms96:7 Thoholetsang Morena, lona ditjhaba tsa mefutafuta, thoholetsang tlotla le matla a Morena." 
Psalms96:8 Thoholetsang tlotla e lokelang lebitso la Morena, tloong mabaleng a hae, le mo nyehelle." 
Psalms96:9 Kgumamelang Morena le kgabile ka tse halalelang, lefatshe lohle le thothomele, le thothomele kapele ho yena." 
Psalms96:10 Ereng ho baditjhaba: “Morena ke kgosi, o tiisitse lefatshe, le ke ke la sisinyeha; o ahlola ditjhaba ka ho loka.”" 
Psalms96:11 Mahodimo a ke a thabe, lefatshe le nyakalle, lewatle le hwase le tsohle tse ka ho lona." 
Psalms96:12 Naha e nyakalle le tsohle tse ho yona, difate tsa meru di etse ditlatse" 
Psalms96:13 kapele ho Morena, hobane o a tla, o tlilo ahlola lefatshe. O tla ahlola lefatshe ka toka, le ditjhaba ka nnete ya hae." 
Psalms97:1 Morena ke kgosi; lefatshe le ke le nyakalle, dihlekehleke tse ngata di ke di thabe." 
Psalms97:2 Maru a matshomatsho a mo teetse hare, ho loka le toka ke motheo, ke motheo wa terone ya hae." 
Psalms97:3 Mollo o mo eteletseng pele o tjhesa dira tse mo potapotileng. 
Psalms97:4 Mahadima a hae a bonesa lefatshe; lefatshe le a bona, mme le a thothomela." 
Psalms97:5 Dithaba di qhibidiha jwaloka tshotso, jwaloka tshotso kapele ho Morena, e, kapele ho Morena wa lefatshe lohle." 
Psalms97:6 Mahodimo a bolela ho loka ha hae, ditjhaba tsohle di bona tlotla ya hae." 
Psalms97:7 Bohle ba sebeletsang ditshwantsho ba ke ba hlajwe ke dihlong, bao ba ithorisang ka mafeela; medimo yohle e ke e itihele e itihele maotong a hae." 
Psalms97:8 Sione e utlwile, mme e a thaba, metse ya Juda e a nyakalla, ka baka la dikahlolo tsa hao, wena Morena." 
Psalms97:9 Wena Morena ya hodimodimo, ya phahametseng lefatshe lohle, o feta medimo yohle hole." 
Psalms97:10 Lona ba ratang Morena, hloyang bokgopo, o baballa bophelo ba batshepuwa ba hae, o ba namolela matsohong a ba kgopo." 
Psalms97:11 Lesedi le tjhabela ya lokileng, thabo ke ya ba pelo di ntle." 
Psalms97:12 Lona ba lokileng thabelang Morena, le boke lebitso la hae le halalelang." 
Psalms98:1 Pesalema. Binelang Morena sefela se setjha, hobane o entse dimakatso, o hlotse ka letsoho la hae le letona, letsoho la hae le halalelang." 
Psalms98:2 Morena o bonahaditse ho pholosa ha hae, a bontsha ditjhaba ho loka ha hae." 
Psalms98:3 O hopotse mohau wa hae le botshepehi ba hae ho ba ntlo ya Iseraele. Dipheletso tsohle tsa lefatshe di bone ho pholosa ha Modimo wa rona. 
Psalms98:4 Lona ba lefatshe lohle etsetsang Morena mehoo ya thabo, le tsanyaole, le mo roke ka thabo." 
Psalms98:5 Rokang Morena ka harepa, ka harepa le ka pina e monate," 
Psalms98:6 ka diterompeta le ka modumo wa lenaka; etsetsang kgosi, Morena, mehoo le mo etsetse mehoo ya thabo." 
Psalms98:7 Lewatle le ke le hwase le tsohle tse ka ho lona, lefatshe le bohle ba ahileng ho lona." 
Psalms98:8 Dinoka di ke di ope diatla, dithaba kaofela di etse ditlatse" 
Psalms98:9 kapele ho Morena, hobane o tlilo ahlola lefatshe. O tla ahlola lefatshe ka toka, le ditjhaba ka ho loka." 
Psalms99:1 Morena ke kgosi, ditjhaba di a thothomela; o dutse hodima dikerubime, lefatshe le a reketla." 
Psalms99:2 Morena o moholo, Sione, o okametse ditjhaba tsohle." 
Psalms99:3 Ho bokwe lebitso la hao le leholo, le a tshabeha, le a halalela." 
Psalms99:4 O kgosi e matla, e ratang toka; ke wena ya theileng ho loka, wa tlisetsa leloko la Jakobo toka le ho loka." 
Psalms99:5 Phafang Morena, Modimo wa rona, le itihele bonamelong ba maoto a hae: O a halalela." 
Psalms99:6 Moshe le Arone e ne e le ba bang ba baprista ba hae, Samuele e le e mong wa ba rapelang lebitso la hae. Ba ipiletsa ho Morena, mme a ba araba," 
Psalms99:7 a bua le bona a le hara leru; ba boloka ditemoso tsa hae, le ditaelo tseo a ba fileng tsona." 
Psalms99:8 Morena Modimo wa rona, o nnile wa ba araba, wa ba Modimo ya ba tshwarelang, ya mpang a ba otla ka baka la bokgopo ba bona." 
Psalms99:9 Phafang Morena Modimo wa rona, le mo kgumamele thabeng, thabeng ya hae e halalelang; hobane Morena Modimo wa rona, o a halalela." 
Psalms100:1 Pesalema ya teboho. Lona ba lefatshe lohle etsetsang Morena mehoo ya thabo," 
Psalms100:2 sebeletsang Morena ka thabo, tloong kapele ho yena ka ditlatse." 
Psalms100:3 Tsebang hore Morena ke Modimo, o re bopile, mme re ba hae; re setjhaba sa hae, mohlape wa makgulo a hae." 
Psalms100:4 Kenang dikgorong tsa hae le ntse le mmoka, le mabaleng a hae le ntse le mo rorisa; mo leboheng, le boke lebitso la hae." 
Psalms100:5 Morena o molemo, mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle, botshepehi ba hae ke bo isang melokong yohle." 
Psalms101:1 Pesalema ya Davida. Ke tla o binela tsa mohau le tsa toka, ke o roke, wena Morena." 
Psalms101:2 Ke tla tsamaya ka hloko tseleng e lokileng; ekaba o tla tla neng ho nna? Ka tlung ya ka ke tla phela ka pelo e hlwekileng," 
Psalms101:3 nke ke ka dumella mahlo a ka ho sheba letho le kgopo. Ke hloile diketso tsa ba kgelohileng, di ke ke tsa nkgomarela." 
Psalms101:4 Nke ke ka ba le bokgopo, ka le bona ka pelong ya ka, ha ke rate ho tseba letho le lebe." 
Psalms101:5 Ya etseletsang wa habo sephiring ke tla mo timetsa, nke ke ka mamella moikgantshi le moikgohomosi." 
Psalms101:6 Mahlo a ka a shebile ba tshepahalang, ba tshepahalang, ba lefatshe lena, ba tle ba ahisane le nna; ya tsamayang ka tsela e lokileng ke yena ya tla ntshebeletsa." 
Psalms101:7 Ya sebetsang bolotsana a ke ke a phela tlung ya ka; ya bolelang leshano a ke ke a ema kapele ho nna. 
Psalms101:8 Hoseng ho hong le ho hong ke tla timetsa bohle ba kgopo, ba kgopo ba lefatshe lena, ke fedise bohle ba etsang tse mpe, ba di etsang motseng wa Morena." 
Psalms102:1 Thapelo ya motho ya tsietsing, ya imetsweng, ya hlahisang sello sa hae kapele ho Morena." 
Psalms102:2 Morena, ako utlwe thapelo ya ka; sello sa ka se ke se fihle ho wena." 
Psalms102:3 Ha ke le matshwenyehong o se ke wa mpatela fahleho sa hao; ako ntshekehele tsebe, ha ke ipiletsa ho wena, o ke o nkarabe kapele." 
Psalms102:4 Ditshiu tsa ka di fela jwaloka mosi, masapo a ka a tjha sa patsi mollong." 
Psalms102:5 Ke otlilwe, pelo ya ka e ka jwang bo omeletseng, ke se ke lebala le ho ja." 
Psalms102:6 Ka baka la ho fehelwa haholo, nama ya ka e maname, e maname masapong a ka." 
Psalms102:7 Ke tshwana le letata la lehwatata, ke tshwana le sephooko sa dithako." 
Psalms102:8 Ke a hlobaela, mme ke a fehelwa, ke ka nonyana e dutseng e inotshi, e dutseng hodima sehlohlolo." 
Psalms102:9 Dira tsa ka di ntlaka kamehla, ba nkgalefetseng ba nyefola lebitso la ka." 
Psalms102:10 Ke ja molora jwaloka bohobe, seno sa ka se tswakana le meokgo," 
Psalms102:11 ka baka la bohale le kgalefo ya hao; hobane o ile wa mphamola, wa nto ntabanya!" 
Psalms102:12 Ditshiu tsa ka di tshwana le meriti e theang, ke omella jwaloka jwang." 
Psalms102:13 Empa wena Morena, o rena kamehla yohle, o tla hopolwa ke meloko yohle." 
Psalms102:14 Ako tsohe, o utlwele Sione bohloko; ke nako jwale ya ho e hauhela, motsotso o fihlile." 
Psalms102:15 Bahlanka ba hao ba kgahlwa ke majwe a yona, ba qenehela le lerole la yona." 
Psalms102:16 Baditjhaba ba tla hlompha, ba hlomphe lebitso la Morena, le dikgosi tsohle tsa lefatshe di tla hlompha tlotla ya hao." 
Psalms102:17 Ha Morena a tsosa marako a Sione, o tla bonahatsa tlotla ya hae, a e bonahatse ho yona." 
Psalms102:18 O tla mamela thapelo ya ba itlhophereng; thapelo eo ya bona a ke ke a e kgesa. 
Psalms102:19 Tsena di ke di ngollwe moloko, moloko o tlang, hore tjhaba se tla tswalwa se tle se rorise Morena." 
Psalms102:20 Morena o shebile fatshe a le sehalalelong sa hae se hodimo; o tadimile lefatshe a le mahodimong. 
Psalms102:21 hore a utlwe mefehelo, mefehelo ya batshwaruwa, a lokolle ba ahloletsweng lefu." 
Psalms102:22 Jwale lebitso la Morena le tla bolelwa Sione, dithoko tsa hae Jerusalema," 
Psalms102:23 ha ditjhaba tsohle di phuthehile mmoho, di ena le mebuso ya tsona, ho sebeletsa Morena." 
Psalms102:24 O mphokodisitse ke sa le motjha, a kgutsufatsa ditshiu tsa ka." 
Psalms102:25 Ka ba ka re: “Modimo wa ka, o se ke wa ntlosa lefatsheng ke sa le mahareng a bophelo ba ka. Wena dilemo tsa hao di akaretsa meloko yohle." 
Psalms102:26 O ne o thee lefatshe kgalekgale, mahodimo ke mosebetsi wa diatla tsa hao." 
Psalms102:27 Tsena di tla timela, empa wena o tla sala; tsohle di tla tsofala jwaloka seaparo, o tla di lahla jwaloka seaparo, mme di tla nyamela." 
Psalms102:28 Empa wena haesale e le wena, dilemo tsa hao di ke ke tsa fela." 
Psalms102:29 Bana ba bahlanka ba hao ba tla ba le leaho le tiileng, mme ditloholo tsa bona di tla nne di be teng pela hao.”" 
Psalms103:1 Pesalema ya Davida. Boka Morena, wena moya wa ka; botho bohle ba ka bo boke bitso la hae le halalelang." 
Psalms103:2 Boka Morena, wena moya wa ka; o se ke wa lebala melemo yohle ya hae." 
Psalms103:3 Ke yena ya o tshwarelang melato ya hao kaofela, ke yena ya o fodisang mahlokong a hao kaofela." 
Psalms103:4 Ke yena ya o lopollang lebitleng, ke yena ya o qhakang ka mohau, ya o qhakang le ka lerato." 
Psalms103:5 Ke yena ya o fepang tse molemo bophelong bohle ba hao, hore o boele o ntjhafale, o ntjhafale jwaloka ntsu." 
Psalms103:6 Morena o sebetsa ka ho loka, o ahlolela bohle ba hateletsweng." 
Psalms103:7 O ne a tsebise Moshe ditsela tsa hae, a bontsha bana ba Iseraele diketso tsa hae tse kgolo." 
Psalms103:8 Morena o na le kutlwelobohloko, Morena o mosa; o dieha ho halefa, o tletse mohau." 
Psalms103:9 Ha a re tsekise hoyahoile; ha a re jare ka pelo kamehla yohle. 
Psalms103:10 Ha a re otle ho ya ka dibe tsa rona, ha a re putse ho ya ka melato ya rona." 
Psalms103:11 Jwalokaha mahodimo a phahametse lefatshe, le mohau wa Modimo o moholo, o moholo hakaalo ho ba mo tshabang." 
Psalms103:12 Jwalokaha botjhabela bo le hole le bophirimela, le ditlolo tsa rona o a di suthisa, o di suthisetsa hole le yena hakaalo." 
Psalms103:13 Jwalokaha ntata bana a ba utlwela bohloko, ka mokgwa o jwalo le Morena o utlwela ba mo tshabang bohloko." 
Psalms103:14 Ke hobane yena o tseba seo re bopilweng ka sona, ha a lebale hore re lerole feela." 
Psalms103:15 Ditshiu tsa motho di tshwana le tsa jwang; o tlokoma jwaloka palesa ya naha; 
Psalms103:16 ha moya o foka hodima yona e a fela, ebe ditulo tsa yona di sala di le feela." 
Psalms103:17 Empa mohau wa Morena, ho ba mo tshabang, ke wa kamehla yohle, e se nang qaleho le qetello; le ho loka ha hae ho fihla le ditlohotloholwaneng tsa bona," 
Psalms103:18 ho ba bolokang selekane sa hae, ba hopolang ho phethahatsa ditaelo tsa hae." 
Psalms103:19 Morena o beile terone ya hae, o e beile mahodimong, tsohle di tlasa puso ya hae." 
Psalms103:20 Bokang Morena, lona mangeloi a hae, lona bahale ba phethang taelo tsa hae, ba mamelang seo a se bolelang." 
Psalms103:21 Bokang Morena, lona mabotho a hae wohle, lona basebeletsi ba hae ba phethang thato ya hae." 
Psalms103:22 Bokang Morena, lona mesebetsi ya hae yohle, hohle moo a busang teng. Boka Morena, wena moya wa ka." 
Psalms104:1 Boka Morena, wena moya wa ka. Morena Modimo wa ka, o moholo hakaakang! O apere tlotla le botlotlehi," 
Psalms104:2 o ipopile ka lesedi jwalokaha eka ke kobo. O adile mahodimo jwaloka lesela la tente," 
Psalms104:3 o hahile ntlo ya bokgosi ba hao kahodimo ho maru. Maru o a entse kariki ya hao, o fofa ka mapheo a moya." 
Psalms104:4 Meya o e entse baromuwa ba hao, mollo wa lehadima mosebeletsi wa hao." 
Psalms104:5 O tiisitse lefatshe hodima metheo ya lona, le ke ke la sisinyeha ho isa kgale." 
Psalms104:6 O le apesitse ka lewatle jwalokaha eka ke ka kobo, metsi a ne a kwahetse dithaba." 
Psalms104:7 Yare ha o kgaruma, metsi a baleha; ha letolo la hao le thwathwaretsa, a tutumolotseha;" 
Psalms104:8 a theohela dikgohlong, dithaba tsa hlaha, a ya moo o a lokiseditseng teng." 
Psalms104:9 Wa a sehela moedi oo a ke keng a o tlola, hore a se hlole a kwahela lefatshe hape." 
Psalms104:10 Wa phallisetsa didiba dinokaneng tse tswedipanang hara dithaba; 
Psalms104:11 metsi a tsona a nowa ke phoofolo tsa naha, tonki tsa naha di itlosa lenyora teng." 
Psalms104:12 Nonyana tse fofang di hahetse pela tsona, di letsa melodi di le makaleng a difate." 
Psalms104:13 O nesetsa dithaba pula o le tlung ya bokgosi ba hao, lefatshe le kgotshe ditholwana, tholwana tsa mesebetsi ya hao." 
Psalms104:14 O medisetsa diphoofolo jwang, o di medisetsa le dimela hore di sebediswe ke motho, a tle a fumane dijo tsa hae mobung," 
Psalms104:15 le veine, ho thabisa pelo ya motho; le ole, fahleho sa hae se be moropotsana, le dijo, ho matlafatsa mmele wa hae." 
Psalms104:16 Difate tsa Morena di nwesetswa ke pula, dikedare tsa Lebanone tse lemilweng ke yena." 
Psalms104:17 Dinonyana di etsa dihlaha ho tsona, mekotatsie e phela hodima difate." 
Psalms104:18 Thabeng tse telele ho phela podi tsa naha, diqhobo ke setshabelo sa dipela." 
Psalms104:19 O entse kgwedi ho tshwaya dinako tsa selemo, letsatsi le tseba nako ya lona nako ya ho dikela." 
Psalms104:20 O tlisa lefifi, ebe e ba bosiu, dibatana tsa meru ebe di a solla;" 
Psalms104:21 ditawana di purumele diphofu tsa tsona, di batle dijo tsa tsona ho Modimo." 
Psalms104:22 Ha tsatsi le tjhaba di a oroha, ebe di botha dilaong tsa tsona." 
Psalms104:23 Motho yena o ikela mosebetsing wa hae, a yo sebetsa ho fihlela mantsiboya." 
Psalms104:24 Morena, mesebetsi ya hao e mengata hakaakang! Tsohle o di entse ka bohlale, lefatshe le tletse dibopuwa tsa hao!" 
Psalms104:25 Ke leo lewatle, le leholo, le batsi; ka ho lona ho nyeunya dibopuwa, dibopuwa tse se nang palo, dibopuwa tse kgolo le tse nyenyane." 
Psalms104:26 Teng dikepe di sesa kahohle, le leruarua leo o le bopetseng ho bapalla ka ho lona." 
Psalms104:27 Tsohle di lebeletse wena, hore o di fe dijo ka nako e lokelang." 
Psalms104:28 Ha o di fa dijo, di a di bokella; ha o fuparolla seatla, di kgora tse molemo." 
Psalms104:29 Ha o ipata sefahleho, di a tshoha; ha o di amoha moya wa hao, di a shwa, di boele di kgutlele leroleng." 
Psalms104:30 Ha o romela moya wa hao, di a hloleha, mme o ntjhafatse tshobotsi ya lefatshe." 
Psalms104:31 Tlotla ya Morena e nne e be teng, e be teng kamehla yohle, Morena a ke a thabele mesebetsi ya hae;" 
Psalms104:32 yena eo ereng ha a tadima lefatshe, lefatshe le thothomele, ha a ama dithaba di foqohe mosi." 
Psalms104:33 Ke tla binela Morena ha ke ntse ke phela, ke roke Modimo bophelong ba ka bohle." 
Psalms104:34 Menahano ya ka e ke e mo kgahle; nna ke thabela Morena. 
Psalms104:35 Baetsadibe ba ke ba fele lefatsheng, ba kgopo ba se hlole ba eba teng. Boka Morena, wena moya wa ka. Haleluja!" 
Psalms105:1 Bokang Morena, le rapele lebitso la hae, le tumise diketso tsa hae, le di tumise hara ditjhaba." 
Psalms105:2 Mmineleng, le mo roke, le nahane dimakatso tsa hae tsohle." 
Psalms105:3 Ithoriseng ka lebitso la hae, lebitso la hae le halalelang, pelo tsa ba batlang Morena di ke di thabe." 
Psalms105:4 Batlang Morena le matla a hae; le nne le batle fahleho sa hae, le se batle kamehla le mehla." 
Psalms105:5 Hopolang dimakatso tsa hae tseo a di entseng, mehlolo ya hae, le dikahlolo tseo a di boletseng," 
Psalms105:6 lona ba leloko la Aborahama, mohlanka wa hae, lona bana ba Jakobo, bao a ikgethetseng bona." 
Psalms105:7 Morena ke yena Modimo wa rona, ke yena ya ahlolang lefatshe lohle." 
Psalms105:8 Ha a lebale selekane sa hae le ka mohla, tshepiso eo a e entseng, a e etsetsa meloko e sekete;" 
Psalms105:9 selekane seo a se entseng, a se etsa le Aborahama, le kano eo a e entseng, a e etsetsa Isaka," 
Psalms105:10 hore e be molao o tiileng ho Jakobo, le lekane sa kamehla yohle ho Iseraele," 
Psalms105:11 ha a re: “Ke tla o nea naha ya Kanana, e le lefa leo ke o abelang lona.”" 
Psalms105:12 Ha ba ne ba sa le mmalwana, e le bajaki ba seng bakae naheng eo," 
Psalms105:13 ba ntse ba lelera hara ditjhaba, ba tloha mmusong o mong, ba eya ho o mong," 
Psalms105:14 Modimo ha a a ka a dumela, a dumella motho hore a ba tube, mme ka baka la bona a kgalema dikgosi, a re:" 
Psalms105:15 “Le se ke la ama batlotsuwa ba ka, le se ke la etsa baporofeta ba ka hampe.”" 
Psalms105:16 Jwale a dihela tlala lefatsheng, dijo tsohle tse ba phedisang a di fedisa;" 
Psalms105:17 yaba o romela monna e le selelekela: Josefa a rekiswa ho ba lekgoba. 
Psalms105:18 Ba mo hlokofatsa ka ho mo tlama maoto ka ditshepe, ba mmofa ka mahlaahlela," 
Psalms105:19 ho fihlela se etsahala, seo a se boletseng e sa le pele, mme a pakwa ke lentswe la Modimo." 
Psalms105:20 Kgosi ya laela hore a tlamollwe, mmusi wa ditjhaba a mo lokolla." 
Psalms105:21 Ya mo etsa mookamedi wa lelapa la yona, le mmusi wa tsohle tseo e di ruileng," 
Psalms105:22 a tle a rute mahosana ho ya ka thato ya hae, a hlalefise baholo ba setjhaba sa yona." 
Psalms105:23 Yaba Iseraele o fallela Egepeta, Jakobo a jaka naheng ya Kama." 
Psalms105:24 Modimo a ngatafatsa setjhaba sa hae, a se ngatafatsa haholo, a se matlafatsa ho feta dira tsa sona." 
Psalms105:25 A fetola pelo tsa tsona, tsa hloya tjhaba sa hae, tsa sebetsa bahlanka ba hae ka bolotsana." 
Psalms105:26 A romela Moshe, mohlanka wa hae, le Arone eo a mo kgethileng." 
Psalms105:27 A etsa dipontsho tsa hae ka bona, le dimakatso tsa hae naheng ya Kama." 
Psalms105:28 A romela lefifi, mme ha fifala; empa Baegepeta ba hanyetsa, ba hanyetsa polelo tsa hae." 
Psalms105:29 Metsi a naha ya bona a a fetola madi, a bolaya le ditlhapi tse ho wona." 
Psalms105:30 Naha ya bona ya nyeunya dihohwana, esita le ka matlung a dikgosi tsa bona." 
Psalms105:31 A laela, ha hlaha diboba, le menwang, naheng yohle ya bona." 
Psalms105:32 Bakeng sa pula a ba nesetsa sefako, mollo wa lehadima wa wela naha ya bona." 
Psalms105:33 A senya morara wa bona le feiye, a roba difate tsa naha ya bona." 
Psalms105:34 A laela, ha hlaha ditsie, le bookgolane bo se nang palo." 
Psalms105:35 Tsa kumola jwang bohle ba naha ya bona, tsa kokona tsohle tse behwang ke naha." 
Psalms105:36 A bolaya matsibolo wohle a naha ya bona, bana ba bona ba matswathaka." 
Psalms105:37 A ntsha Baiseraele ba kakatetse, ba kakatetse silefera le kgauta, ho se ya tsiapaneng hara meloko ya bona." 
Psalms105:38 Egepeta ya thabela ho falla ha bona, hobane e ne e tshohile haholo." 
Psalms105:39 A phuphuthisa leru, la ba kwahela; mollo wa ba bonesetsa bosiu." 
Psalms105:40 Ba kopa, yaba o ba tlisetsa dikwekwe; a ba kgorisa ka bohobe bo tswang mahodimong." 
Psalms105:41 A petsola lefika, metsi a phorosela; a phalla dibataolong eka ke noka." 
Psalms105:42 Ke hobane o ne a hopotse tshepiso, tshepiso ya hae e halalelang, ho Aborahama, mohlanka wa hae." 
Psalms105:43 A ntsha setjhaba sa hae ka nyakallo, bakgethwa ba hae ka ditlatse tsa thabo." 
Psalms105:44 Yaba o ba nea naha tsa baditjhaba, ba ja lefa la mofufutso wa merabe eo," 
Psalms105:45 hore ba tle ba boloke ditaelo, ba boloke taelo tsa hae, ba hlomphe melao ya hae. Haleluja!" 
Psalms106:1 Haleluja! Bokang Morena, hobane o molemo; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle." 
Psalms106:2 Ke mang ya ka bolelang ketso tse matla tsa Morena, ya ka tumisang thoriso yohle ya hae?" 
Psalms106:3 Ho lehlohonolo ba etsang toka, ba etsang ho lokileng ka nako tsohle." 
Psalms106:4 Morena, ako nkgopole, ha o sitsa setjhaba sa hao, o nketele, o tlo mpholosa." 
Psalms106:5 A nke ke bone katleho ya bakgethwa ba hao, ke be le kabelo thabong ya setjhaba sa hao, ke tle ke ithorise mmoho le bao e leng lefa la hao." 
Psalms106:6 Rona le bo-ntata rona re entse dibe, re molato, re kgopo." 
Psalms106:7 Bo-ntata rona, ha ba sa le Egepeta, ha ba a ka ba utlwisisa dimakatso tsa hao; ba ile ba lebala mohau wa hao o moholo, ba mpa ba fetohela Ya Hodimodimo ha ba le Lewatleng la Sufe." 
Psalms106:8 Empa o ile a ba pholosa ka baka la lebitso la hae, hore ho tle ho bonahatswe matla a hae." 
Psalms106:9 A kgalemela Lewatle la Sufe, yaba le a psha; a ba tsamaisa madibeng jwalokaha eka ke sebataolong." 
Psalms106:10 A ba pholosa matsohong a ba ba hloileng, a ba namolela matsohong a sera." 
Psalms106:11 Metsi a kwahela ba ba lwantshang, ha se ke ha phonyoha le ya mong." 
Psalms106:12 Yaba ba qala ho kgolwa tshepiso tsa hae, ba mminela dithoko." 
Psalms106:13 Empa ba phakisa ho lebala, ho lebala diketso tsa hae, ba tlohela ho batla keletso ho yena." 
Psalms106:14 Ba mpa ba laolwa ke ditakatso tsa bona lefeelleng, ba leka Modimo ba le lehwatateng." 
Psalms106:15 A ba nea seo ba neng ba se kopa, A ba nea seo ba neng ba se kopa, athe o tla ba neella ka lefu le ba timetsang." 
Psalms106:16 Ba honohela Moshe ba le diahelong, le yena Arone, mohalaledi wa Modimo." 
Psalms106:17 Lefatshe la ahlama, la metsa Datane, la kwenya sehlopha sa Abirame." 
Psalms106:18 Mollo wa tuka hara sehlopha sa bona, malakabe a wona a tjhesa bao ba kgopo." 
Psalms106:19 Ha ba le Horebe, ba ipopela namane, ba kgumamela setshwantsho se bopilweng ka kgauta." 
Psalms106:20 Ba lahla tlotla ya Modimo, ba tlotlisa setshwantsho sa pohwana, ntho e jang jwang." 
Psalms106:21 Ba lebala Modimo, mopholosi wa bona, ya entseng tse kgolo Egepeta," 
Psalms106:22 dimakatso naheng ya Kama, le tse tshosang Lewatleng la Sufe." 
Psalms106:23 Yaba o re o a ba fedisa, empa Moshe, mokgethwa wa hae, a kena dipakeng, a phoka bohale ba hae hore bo se ba timetse." 
Psalms106:24 Ba nyedisa naha e kgahlehang, hobane ba ne ba sa kgolwe, ba sa kgolwe ditshepiso tsa hae." 
Psalms106:25 Ba dumaduma ba le ditenteng tsa bona, ba se ke ba mamela lentswe la Morena." 
Psalms106:26 A phahamisa letsoho, a ba hlapanyetsa hore o tla ba bolaela lehwatateng," 
Psalms106:27 a qhalanye tloholo tsa bona, a di qhalanyetse hara ditjhaba, a di qhalanyetse dinaheng." 
Psalms106:28 Ba kgomarela Baale wa Peore, ba eja mahlabelo a etseditsweng bafu." 
Psalms106:29 Ba phephetsa Modimo ka diketso tsa bona, ba welwa ke lefu la sewa." 
Psalms106:30 Empa Finease a ema, a ahlola ba molato, yaba lefu la sewa le a fela." 
Psalms106:31 Hoo a ho ballwa e le ho loka, ho isa melokong yohle, kamehla le mehla." 
Psalms106:32 Ba boela ba halefisa Morena, ba mo halefisa metsing a Meriba, Moshe a ba tsietsing ka baka la bona;" 
Psalms106:33 ba kgopisa moya wa hae, hoo a bileng a bua a sa inahana." 
Psalms106:34 Ha ba a ka ba timetsa ditjhaba jwalokaha Morena a ne a ba laetse; 
Psalms106:35 ba mpa ba nyallana le baditjhaba, ba ithuta mekgwa ya bona." 
Psalms106:36 Ba sebeletsa medimo ya bona, medimo ya bona ya ditshwantsho, e ileng ya ba fetohela leraba." 
Psalms106:37 Ba etsetsa bademona mahlabelo, ka bara le baradi ba bona." 
Psalms106:38 Ba tsholla madi a se nang molato, madi a bara le baradi ba bona, ba ba etsa mahlabelo a medimo, medimo ya ditshwantsho ya Kanana: Naha ya silafala ke madi." 
Psalms106:39 Ba itshilafatsa ka mesebetsi eo ya bona, ka ketso tseo tsa bona ba kwenehela Morena." 
Psalms106:40 Morena a halefela setjhaba sa hae, a nyonya bao e leng lefa la hae." 
Psalms106:41 A ba neela matsohong a baditjhaba, ba buswe ke ba ba hloileng." 
Psalms106:42 Dira tsa bona tsa ba hatella, ba ba katlasa taolo ya tsona." 
Psalms106:43 A nna a ba lopolla ka makgetlokgetlo, ba mpa ba ikgethela ho mo tella, ba tetebela bokgopong ba bona." 
Psalms106:44 Jwale a tadima ho tshwenyeha ha bona, ha a utlwa sello sa bona." 
Psalms106:45 A hopola selekane sa hae le bona, a ba hauhela ka baka la rato la hae le leholo." 
Psalms106:46 A etsa hore bohle ba neng ba ba isitse bothopuweng ba ba utlwele bohloko. 
Psalms106:47 Morena Modimo wa rona, ako re pholose; o re phuthe, o re ntshe ditjhabeng, re tle re boke lebitso la hao, lebitso la hao le halalelang, re o rorise re le motlotlo." 
Psalms106:48 Ho bokwe Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele, a bokwe kamehla yohle, e se nang qaleho le qetello. Setjhaba sohle se ke se re: “A ho be jwalo!” Haleluja!" 
Psalms107:1 Bokang Morena, hobane o molemo; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle." 
Psalms107:2 Ba ke ba rialo bao Morena a ba lopolotseng, a ba namolela matsohong a mohatelli;" 
Psalms107:3 a ba phutha, a ba ntsha dinaheng tsa botjhabela le bophirimela, tsa borwa le leboya." 
Psalms107:4 Ba ne ba phaila lefeelleng, ba phaila lehwatateng, ba sa fumane tsela e yang motseng oo ba ka ahang ho wona," 
Psalms107:5 ba lapile, ba nyorilwe, ba le lekgatheng la ho idibana." 
Psalms107:6 Matshwenyehong a bona ba ipiletsa ho Morena, mme a ba lopolla tsietsing ya bona." 
Psalms107:7 A ba tsamaisa tseleng e otlolohileng, a ba isa motseng oo ba ka ahang ho wona." 
Psalms107:8 Ba ke ba boke Morena ka baka la mohau wa hae, le dimakatso tsa hae ho bana ba batho." 
Psalms107:9 O ile a tima lenyora la ba nyorilweng, a kgorisa ba lapileng ka tse molemo." 
Psalms107:10 Ba bang ba ne ba phela lefifing le letsholetsho, ba tlamilwe ke ditlhopheho le ke wona mahlaahlela," 
Psalms107:11 hoba ba fetohetse taelo tsa Modimo, ba kgesitse keletso ya Ya Hodimodimo." 
Psalms107:12 A ba kokobetsa ka mesebetsi e boima, ba kgothometseha, ho se ya ka ba thusang." 
Psalms107:13 Matshwenyehong a bona ba lla ho Morena, mme a ba pholosa tsietsing ya bona." 
Psalms107:14 A ba ntsha lefifing, le bodutung, a kgaola ditlamo tsa bona." 
Psalms107:15 Ba ke ba boke Morena ka baka la mohau wa hae, le dimakatso tsa hae ho bana ba batho." 
Psalms107:16 O ile a pshatla mamati a koporo, a robaka mekwallo ya tshepe." 
Psalms107:17 Ba bang ba thotofatswa ke metsamao ya bona e kgopo, ba hlokofatswa ka baka la melato ya bona," 
Psalms107:18 ba tenwa ke dijo tsohle; ba ne ba se ba le dintshing tsa lefu. 
Psalms107:19 Matshwenyehong a bona ba lla ho Morena, mme a ba pholosa tsietsing ya bona." 
Psalms107:20 A laela, mme ba fola, a ba phemisa lebitla." 
Psalms107:21 Ba ke ba boke Morena ka baka la mohau wa hae, le dimakatso tsa hae ho bana ba batho." 
Psalms107:22 Ba nyehele ka mahlabelo a teboho, ba tumise mesebetsi ya hae, ba e tumise ka mehoo ya thabo." 
Psalms107:23 Ba bang ba tsamaya lewatleng ka dikepe, ba hweba ka ho haola mawatle." 
Psalms107:24 Le bona ba bone mesebetsi ya Morena, le dimakatso tsa hae madibeng." 
Psalms107:25 A laela, ha tsoha sefefo, sa phahamisa maqhubu a lewatle;" 
Psalms107:26 ba betsetswa hodimodimo, ba theolelwa tlasetlase, ba nyekelwa ke dipelo." 
Psalms107:27 Ba tshwarwa ke modikwadikwane, ba thekesela jwaloka matahwa, ba timellwa ke bohlale bohle." 
Psalms107:28 Matshwenyehong a bona ba lla ho Morena, mme a ba ntsha tsietsing ya bona." 
Psalms107:29 A kgutsisa sefefo, mme maqhubu a kgaotsa ho befa." 
Psalms107:30 Ba thaba hobane ho kgutsitse; a ba sesisetsa koung eo ba neng ba leba ho yona. 
Psalms107:31 Ba ke ba boke Morena ka baka la mohau wa hae, le dimakatso tsa hae ho bana ba batho." 
Psalms107:32 Ba mo tlotlise phuthehong ya setjhaba, ba mo rorise mokgatlong wa ba baholo." 
Psalms107:33 O ne a fetole dinoka lehwatata, le didiba a di fetola baka tse omeletseng." 
Psalms107:34 Mobu o nonneng a o fetola lenyekethe, ka baka la bokgopo ba baahi ba teng." 
Psalms107:35 Lehwatata a le fetola letsha la metsi, naha e tshehla a e fetola didiba." 
Psalms107:36 Ba lapileng a ba ahisa ho yona, ba thea motse oo ba ka ahang ho wona." 
Psalms107:37 Ba jala masimong, ba lema morara, kotulo ya eba kgolo." 
Psalms107:38 A ba hlohonolofatsa, ba ngatafala haholo, a ba atisetsa leruo la diphoofolo." 
Psalms107:39 Empa jwale ba qepha, ba kokobetswa, ka baka la ho imelwa ke ditsietsi le mahlomola." 
Psalms107:40 A theolela nyediso ho mahosana, a a sollisa lehwatateng moo ho seng tsela." 
Psalms107:41 Empa a ntsha mafutsana bohlophehing ba wona, a atisa malapa a wona jwaloka mohlape." 
Psalms107:42 Ba pelo di ntle ba bona hoo, mme ba thaba, empa ba kgopo bona ba thijwa melomo." 
Psalms107:43 Mang le mang ya bohlale a ke a ele tsena hloko, a ke a utlwisise ketso tsa mohau, mohau wa Morena." 
Psalms108:1 Pesalema ya Davida. Sefela. 
Psalms108:2 Pelo ya ka e matlafetse, Modimo; ke tla bina, ke o roke." 
Psalms108:3 Tsoha moya wa ka, tsohang, lona thomo le harepa; ke tla tsoha mafube a eso hlahe." 
Psalms108:4 Morena, ke tla o boka hara ditjhaba, ke o roke hara merabe;" 
Psalms108:5 hobane mohau wa hao o moholo, o fihla mahodimong, le botshepehi ba hao bo fihla marung." 
Psalms108:6 Modimo, ako bontshe hore o okametse mahodimo, tlotla ya hao e phahamele lefatshe lohle." 
Psalms108:7 Re pholose ka letsoho la hao le letona, o re utlwe, baratuwa ba hao ba tle ba lopollwe." 
Psalms108:8 Modimo o buile a le sehalalelong sa hae, a re: “Ke nyakaletse, ke tla arola Shekeme, ke sehe kgohlo ya Sukote dikoto." 
Psalms108:9 Gileade ke ya ka, le Manase ke ya ka; Efraime ke katiba ya ka ya tshepe, Juda yena ke lere la ka la puso." 
Psalms108:10 Moabe ke lefiso leo ke itlhatswetsang ho lona, Edomo ke tla e hatakela ka seeta; Filesitiya teng ke tla etsa ditlatse, ke etse ditlatse tsa tlholo.”" 
Psalms108:11 Ke mang ya tla nkisa motseng wa diqhobosheane? Ke mang ya tla mphihlisa Edomo," 
Psalms108:12 ha e le moo wena Modimo, o re lahlile, o se o sa tswe le mabotho a rona?" 
Psalms108:13 Ako re thuse direng tsa rona; hobane thuso ya motho ke lefeela. 
Psalms108:14 Ka thuso ya Modimo re tla lwana senna, ke yena ya tla hatakela dira tsa rona." 
Psalms109:1 Pesalema ya Davida, e qapetsweng motsamaisi wa dibini. Modimo, wena eo ke o rorisang, o se ke wa kgutsa," 
Psalms109:2 hobane ba kgopo le ba leshano ba ahlamisitse melomo ho ntwantsha. Ba bua le nna ka maleme a thetsang," 
Psalms109:3 ba nteela hare ka dipuo tsa lehloyo, ba mphutuhela ntle ho lebaka." 
Psalms109:4 Ba mpuseletsa lerato la ka, ba mpuseletsa lona ka ho nqosa, leha ke ntse ke ba rapella." 
Psalms109:5 Ba mputsa ka bobe bakeng sa botle, le lehloyo bakeng sa lerato." 
Psalms109:6 Ako bee ya kgopo ho ahlola motho eo, moqosi wa hae a nne a eme ka hlakoreng la hae le letona." 
Psalms109:7 Ha a ahlolwa a ke a fumanwe a le molato, thapedi ya hae e nkuwe e le sebe." 
Psalms109:8 Ditshiu tsa hae di ke di kgutsufale, e mong a ke a nke mosebetsi wa hae." 
Psalms109:9 Bana ba hae e ke be dikgutsana, le mosadi wa hae e be mohlolohadi." 
Psalms109:10 Bana ba hae ba lelere, e be mekopakopa, ba lelekwe thakong tsa habo bona." 
Psalms109:11 Moadimani a ke a mo amohe sohle seo a nang le sona; batho basele ba ikgapele tholwana tsa mofufutso wa hae. 
Psalms109:12 Ho se be motho ya mo hauhelang, kapa ya thusang dikgutsana tsa hae." 
Psalms109:13 Ditloholo tsa hae di ke di timetswe, mabitso a tsona a hlakolwe melokong e hlahlamang." 
Psalms109:14 Molato wa bo-ntatae o nne o hopolwe ke Morena, sebe sa mmae se se ke sa hlakolwa;" 
Psalms109:15 Morena a nne a di hopole kamehla, a ba hlakole lefatsheng, hore ba se hlole ba hopolwa." 
Psalms109:16 Motho eo ha a a ka a hopola, a hopola ho ba mohau, empa a hlorisa mohlophehi, a hlorisa le mofutsana, a tle a bolaye ya tepeletseng pelo." 
Psalms109:17 A rata ho rohakana: Thohako e ke be hodima hae! Ha a ka a thabela tlhohonolofatso: E ke be hole le yena! 
Psalms109:18 A apara thohako jwaloka kobo: E ke e monyele mmeleng wa hae, e monyele jwaloka metsi, le masapong a hae jwaloka ole." 
Psalms109:19 E ke be jwaloka seaparo seo a ipopileng ka sona, e be jwaloka leqhama leo a itlamileng ka lona kamehla." 
Psalms109:20 Morena a ke a putse baqosi ba ka jwalo, batho bana ba mpuang hampe." 
Psalms109:21 Empa wena Morena, Morena ka, ako nthusetse ka baka la lebitso la hao, o nnamolele ka baka la mohau wa hao o molemo." 
Psalms109:22 Ke mohlophehi, ke mofutsana, pelo ya ka e thulame ka sefubeng sa ka." 
Psalms109:23 Ke ikela jwaloka meriti e theang, ke fefolwa jwaloka tsie." 
Psalms109:24 Mangwele a ka a tsherema, a tsherema ke ho itima dijo, mmele wa ka o otile ke ho hloka mafura." 
Psalms109:25 Ke fetohile sekgobo ho baqosi ba ka, ha ba mpona ba ntshisinyetsa dihlooho." 
Psalms109:26 Ako nthuse, Morena, Modimo wa ka, o mpholose ka mohau wa hao," 
Psalms109:27 ba tle ba tsebe hore hona ho entswe ke wena, ke mosebetsi wa matsoho a hao, matsoho a hao wena Morena." 
Psalms109:28 Bona ba a rohakana, empa wena o a hlohonolofatsa; ba ntsohelang matla ba ke ba hlajwe ke dihlong, mohlanka wa hao yena a ke a thabe." 
Psalms109:29 Baqosi ba ka ba aparelwe ke dihlong, tlontlollo e be jwaloka seaparo seo ba ipopileng ka sona." 
Psalms109:30 Ke tla boka Morena ka lentswe le phefa, ke mo rorise ke le hara matshwele;" 
Psalms109:31 hobane o eme ka hlakoreng le letona hlakoreng le letona la mofutsana, hore a tle a mo pholose ho ba mo ahlolang." 
Psalms110:1 Pesalema ya Davida. Morena o itse ho Morena wa ka: “Dula ka letsohong la ka le letona, ho fihlela ke bea dira tsa hao katlasa maoto a hao.”" 
Psalms110:2 Morena o tla namisa mmuso wa hao, a o namise ho tloha Sione; a re: “Busa hara dira tsa hao.”" 
Psalms110:3 Setjhaba sa hao se tla ithaopa, mohla o futuhelang dira tsa hao. Jwaloka phoka e lalang kameso, bahlankana ba tla tla ho wena maralleng a halalelang." 
Psalms110:4 Morena o hlapantse, ha a ka ke a kweneha; o itse: “O moprista kamehla yohle, jwaloka Meleki-Sedeke.”" 
Psalms110:5 Morena o ka lehlakoreng la hao, hlakoreng le letona, o tla thuakanya dikgosi mohla letsatsi la kgalefo ya hae." 
Psalms110:6 O tla ahlola ditjhaba, ho tlale ditopo; o tla thuakanya hlooho tsa sera ka bophara ba lefatshe." 
Psalms110:7 Ha kgosi e le tseleng, e tla nwa nokaneng, e be moo e tsohang molota." 
Psalms111:1 Haleluja! Ke tla boka Morena ka pelo ya ka yohle, ke le phuthehong ya ba lokileng." 
Psalms111:2 Mesebetsi ya Morena e meholo, e fuputswa ke bohle ba e thabelang." 
Psalms111:3 Mosebetsi wa hae o bonahatsa tlotla le botlotlehi, ho loka ha hae ho teng kamehla yohle." 
Psalms111:4 O entse hore dimakatso tsa hae di se ke tsa lebalwa; Morena o mosa, o na le kutlwelobohloko." 
Psalms111:5 O fepa ba mo tshabang; o hopola selekane sa hae kamehla. 
Psalms111:6 O bontshitse setjhaba sa hae, a se bontsha matla a mesebetsi ya hae, ka ho se nea lefa la baditjhaba." 
Psalms111:7 Mesebetsi ya diatla tsa hae e a tshepahala, mesebetsi ya hae e lokile, ditaelo tsohle tsa hae ke tsa nnete;" 
Psalms111:8 di etseditswe mehla yohle, di hlophilwe ka botshepehi le ka ho loka." 
Psalms111:9 O lopolotse setjhaba sa hae, a laela hore selekane sa hae e be sa kamehla yohle; lebitso la hae le a halalela, mme le a tshabeha." 
Psalms111:10 Qaleho ya bohlale ke ho tshaba Morena, bohle ba sedi ba phela jwalo. O lokelwa ke thoriso kamehla." 
Psalms112:1 Haleluja! Ho lehlohonolo ya tshabang Morena, ya thabelang melao ya hae haholo." 
Psalms112:2 Ditloholo tsa hae di tla ba matla lefatsheng, moloko wa ba pelo di ntle o tla hlohonolofala." 
Psalms112:3 Menono le maruo di ka tlung ya hae, ho loka ha hae ho hlola kamehla yohle." 
Psalms112:4 Ho ba pelo di ntle o ka lesedi le tjhabang lefifing; o mosa, o na le kutlwelobohloko, hape o lokile." 
Psalms112:5 Ho lehlohonolo motho ya mosa, motho ya adimanang, ya sebetsang ditaba tsa hae ka toka." 
Psalms112:6 A ke ke a sisinngwa le ka mohla, ya lokileng o tla nne a hopolwe, a hopolwe kamehla yohle." 
Psalms112:7 A ke ke a tshoswa ke ho utlwa taba tse bohloko, pelo ya hae e matlafetse, o tshepile Morena;" 
Psalms112:8 pelo ya hae e tiile, ha a tshabe letho, o tella ba mo lwantshang." 
Psalms112:9 O fana ka matsoho a mabedi, o fana ho mafutsana, ho loka ha hae ho hlola kamehla yohle, o tsoha molota, o a tlotleha." 
Psalms112:10 Ya kgopo ha a bona hoo, o a tlallana, o tsikitlanya meno, o a monyela; takatso ya ya kgopo e tla fela." 
Psalms113:1 Haleluja! Lona bahlanka ba Morena, mo roriseng, le rorise lebitso la Morena." 
Psalms113:2 Ho bokwe lebitso la Morena, ho tloha jwale le kamehla yohle." 
Psalms113:3 Ho tloha botjhabela ho isa bophirimela, ho roriswe lebitso la Morena." 
Psalms113:4 Morena o phahametse tjhaba tsohle, tlotla ya hae e okametse mahodimo." 
Psalms113:5 Ke mang ya kang Morena, Morena Modimo wa rona, ya dutseng teroneng, teroneng e hodimodimo," 
Psalms113:6 empa a ikokobeletsa ho tadima mahodimo le lefatshe? 
Psalms113:7 O tsosa mofutsana leroleng, a phahamise mohloki thotobolong;" 
Psalms113:8 a mo dudise le mahosana, le mahosana a setjhaba sa habo." 
Psalms113:9 O fa nyopa lelapa, a e etse mma bana ya thabileng. Haleluja!" 
Psalms114:1 Mohla Iseraele a tswang Egepeta, ba ntlo ya Jakobo ba tloha, ba tloha setjhabeng sesele," 
Psalms114:2 Juda ya eba sehalalelo sa Morena, Iseraele ya eba mmuso wa hae." 
Psalms114:3 Lewatle ha le ba bona la baleha, Jorodane ya tjhetjha kasanthao." 
Psalms114:4 Dithaba tsa thala jwaloka dipheleu, maralla jwaloka dikonyana." 
Psalms114:5 Wena lewatle, o balehelang? Le wena Jorodane, o tjhetjhelang kasanthao?" 
Psalms114:6 Lona dithaba, keng ha le thala jwaloka dipheleu, le lona maralla, jwaloka dikonyana?" 
Psalms114:7 Wena lefatshe, thothomela, thothomela pela fahleho sa Morena, pela sefahleho sa Modimo wa Jakobo;" 
Psalms114:8 yena ya fetolang lefika letsha la metsi, lejwe la moralla a le fetole sediba." 
Psalms115:1 O se ke wa re nea tlotla, Morena, o se ke wa e nea rona, o mpe o e nee lebitso la hao, ka baka la mohau wa hao le botshepehi ba hao." 
Psalms115:2 Keng ha baditjhaba ba ka re: “O kae Modimo wa bona?” 
Psalms115:3 Modimo wa rona o mahodimong, o etsa tsohle tse mo kgahlang." 
Psalms115:4 Medimo ya bona ke ya silefera le ya kgauta, ke mosebetsi wa matsoho a batho." 
Psalms115:5 E na le melomo, empa ha e bue; e na le mahlo, empa ha e bone." 
Psalms115:6 E na le ditsebe, empa ha e utlwe; e na le dinko, empa ha e fofonele." 
Psalms115:7 E na le matsoho, empa ha e tshware; e na le maoto, empa ha e tsamaye; ha ho modumo o tswang qoqothong tsa yona." 
Psalms115:8 Ba e etsang ba ke ba tshwane le yona, ba be jwalo bohle ba e tshepang." 
Psalms115:9 Lona ba ntlo ya Iseraele, tshepang Morena: Ke yena thuso le thebe ya lona." 
Psalms115:10 Lona ba ntlo ya Arone, tshepang Morena: Ke yena thuso le thebe ya lona." 
Psalms115:11 Lona ba tshabang Morena, tshepang Morena: Ke yena thuso le thebe ya lona." 
Psalms115:12 Morena o ntsa re hopotse, o tla re hlohonolofatsa; a hlohonolofatse ba ntlo ya Iseraele, a hlohonolofatse ba ntlo ya Arone," 
Psalms115:13 a hlohonolofatse bohle, bohle ba tshabang Morena, ba banyenyane mmoho le ba baholo." 
Psalms115:14 Morena a ke a le ngatafatse, lona le bana ba lona." 
Psalms115:15 Morena a ke a le hlohonolofatse, yena ya entseng mahodimo, a etsa le lefatshe." 
Psalms115:16 Mahodimo ke mahodimo a Morena, lefatshe lona o le neile bana ba batho." 
Psalms115:17 Hase bafu ba ka rorisang Morena, leha e le ba theohetseng lebitleng." 
Psalms115:18 Empa ke rona ba phelang ba ka bokang Morena, ho tloha jwale le kamehla yohle. Haleluja!" 
Psalms116:1 Ke rata Morena, hobane o utlwile thapedi ya ka," 
Psalms116:2 a ntshekehela tsebe, mohla ke neng ke ipiletsa ho yena." 
Psalms116:3 Marapo a lefu a ne a ntlamile, maraba a Nqalo ya Bafu a ntshwasitse, ka ba matswalong le maswabing." 
Psalms116:4 Yaba ke rapela lebitso la Morena, ka rapela, ka re: “Oho, Morena, ako pholose bophelo ba ka.”" 
Psalms116:5 Morena o mosa, o lokile, Modimo wa rona o na le kutlwelobohloko." 
Psalms116:6 Morena o baballa ba hlokang mano, a na a mpholosa ha ke ne ke fokola." 
Psalms116:7 Moya wa ka, ako boele o kgatholohe, hoba Morena o o etseditse tse molemo." 
Psalms116:8 O mpholositse lefung, a ntlhakola meokgo, a mphemisa ho kgoptjwa;" 
Psalms116:9 ke tla tsamaya pontsheng ya Morena, lefatsheng la ba phelang." 
Psalms116:10 Ke ne ke ntse ke tshepile, ha ke re: “Ke tshwenyehile haholo.”" 
Psalms116:11 Pherekanong ya ka ka ba ka re: “Ha ho motho ya tshepahalang!” 
Psalms116:12 Ke tla buseletsa Morena kang, bakeng sa melemo yohle eo a nketseditseng yona?" 
Psalms116:13 Ke tla nyehela ka mohope, hobane ke pholositswe, mme ke rapele lebitso la Morena." 
Psalms116:14 Ke tla phetha dikano tsa ka, ke di phethe ho Morena, pontsheng ya setjhaba sohle sa hae." 
Psalms116:15 Lefu la batshepuwa ba hae ke ntho ya bohlokwa mahlong a Morena. 
Psalms116:16 Ruri, Morena, ke mohlanka wa hao, mora wa lekgabunyane la hao; o tlamolotse ditlamo tsa ka." 
Psalms116:17 Ke tla o nyehella ka sehlabelo sa teboho, mme ke rapele lebitso la Morena." 
Psalms116:18 Ke tla phetha dikano tsa ka, ke di phethe ho Morena, pontsheng ya setjhaba sohle sa hae," 
Psalms116:19 mabaleng a ntlo ya Morena, bohareng ba hao, wena Jerusalema. Haleluja!" 
Psalms117:1 Rorisang Morena, lona ditjhaba tsohle, mo tlotliseng, lona merabe yohle;" 
Psalms117:2 hoba mohau wa hae ho rona o moholo, botshepehi ba Morena bo hlola kamehla yohle. Haleluja!" 
Psalms118:1 Bokang Morena, hobane o molemo; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle." 
Psalms118:2 Iseraele a ke a re: “Mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle.” 
Psalms118:3 Ba ntlo ya Arone ba ke ba re: “Mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle.” 
Psalms118:4 Ba tshabang Morena ba ke ba re: “Mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle.” 
Psalms118:5 Ha ke ne ke patisitswe, ka ipiletsa ho Morena; Morena a nkarabela, a ntokolla." 
Psalms118:6 Morena o na le nna, ha ke tshabe letho; motho a ka nketsang?" 
Psalms118:7 Morena o na le nna, ke mothusi wa ka, ke tella ba ntlhoileng." 
Psalms118:8 Ho molemo ho tshabela ho Morena, ho ena le ho tshepa motho." 
Psalms118:9 Ho molemo ho tshabela ho Morena, ho ena le ho tshepa mahosana." 
Psalms118:10 Baditjhaba ba ne ba ntikanetse kaofela, empa ka ba tamukanya ka lebitso la Morena." 
Psalms118:11 Ba ntikanela, ba ntikanela kamahohle, empa ka ba tamukanya ka lebitso la Morena." 
Psalms118:12 Ba mpokanela jwaloka dinotshi, ba ka malakabe hara dihlahla tsa meutlwa, empa ka ba tamukanya ka lebitso la Morena." 
Psalms118:13 Ka sutumetswa haholo hoo ke batlileng ke ewa, empa Morena a nthusa." 
Psalms118:14 Morena ke matla a ka le thoko ya ka, ke yena mopholosi wa ka." 
Psalms118:15 Metlotlwaneng ya ba lokileng, ho utlwahala ditlatse tsa tlholo, ho thwe: “Letsoho le letona la Morena le sebeditse tse matla," 
Psalms118:16 letsoho le letona la Morena le a tlotleha, letsoho le letona la Morena le sebeditse tse matla.”" 
Psalms118:17 Ha nka ke ka shwa, empa ke tla phela, ke bolele mesebetsi ya Morena." 
Psalms118:18 Morena o nkgalemetse, empa ha a a ka a nneela lefu." 
Psalms118:19 Mpuleleng menyako ya Tempele, ke tle ke kene ka yona, ke boke Morena." 
Psalms118:20 Ona ke wona monyako, monyako wa ntlo ya Morena, ba lokileng ba tla kena ka wona." 
Psalms118:21 Ke a o boka hobane o ile wa nkaraba, o bile mopholosi wa ka." 
Psalms118:22 Lejwe le lahlilweng ke dihahi le fetohile lejwe la mantlha; 
Psalms118:23 ke Morena ya entseng hona, mme mahlong a rona ke mohlolo." 
Psalms118:24 Lena ke lona letsatsi le entsweng ke Morena; a re nyakalleng, re thabeng ke hona." 
Psalms118:25 Oho, Morena, ako re pholose! Oho, Morena, ako re atlehise!" 
Psalms118:26 Ho bokwe ya tlang ka bitso la Morena: Re le hlohonolofatsa re le ka tlung ya Morena. 
Psalms118:27 Morena ke Modimo; o a re bonesetsa. Tshwarang mahlaku, le koloke, le be le yo fihla manakaneng a aletare." 
Psalms118:28 O Modimo wa ka, ke a o boka; o Modimo wa ka, ke a o tlotlisa." 
Psalms118:29 Bokang Morena, hobane o molemo; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle." 
Psalms119:1 Ho lehlohonolo ba metsamao e se nang kodi, ba tsamayang ka Molao wa Morena." 
Psalms119:2 Ho lehlohonolo ba latelang ditemoso tsa hae, ba mmatlang ka pelo tsohle tsa bona;" 
Psalms119:3 ba sa etseng tse sa lokang, ba mpang ba tsamaya ditseleng tsa hae." 
Psalms119:4 O re neile ditaelo tsa hao, hore re di boloke ka ho tlala." 
Psalms119:5 Eka nka tiya metsamaong ya ka, ka phetha thato ya hao." 
Psalms119:6 Nke ke ka hlajwa ke dihlong, ha ke hlokomela melao yohle ya hao." 
Psalms119:7 Ke tla o boka ka pelo e hlwekileng, ha ke se ke ithutile dikahlolo tsa hao tse lokileng." 
Psalms119:8 Ke tla phetha thato ya hao, o se ke wa ntahlela ruri." 
Psalms119:9 Mohlankana a ka hlwekisa metsamao ya hae jwang? Ka ho hahela lentswe la hao lesaka. 
Psalms119:10 Ke o batla ka pelo ya ka yohle; se ntumelle ho kgeloha, ho kgeloha melao ya hao." 
Psalms119:11 Ke bolokile tshepiso ya hao, ka e boloka ka pelong ya ka, hore ke se ke ka o sitelwa." 
Psalms119:12 Ho bokwe wena Morena; ako nthute thato ya hao. 
Psalms119:13 Ka molomo wa ka ke bolela dikahlolo tsohle tse tswang molomong wa hao. 
Psalms119:14 Ke thabela ho latela ditemoso tsa hao, ho feta maruo wohle." 
Psalms119:15 Ke tla nahana ditaelo tsa hao, ke imamelle ditsela tsa hao." 
Psalms119:16 Ke thabela ho phetha thato ya hao, nke ke ka lebala lentswe la hao." 
Psalms119:17 Etsetsa mohlanka wa hao tse molemo, ke tle ke phele, ke mamele lentswe la hao ka hloko." 
Psalms119:18 Ntutubolle mahlo, ke bone dimakatso tsa Molao wa hao." 
Psalms119:19 Ke mofeti mona lefatsheng; o se ke wa mpatela melao ya hao. 
Psalms119:20 Moya wa ka o ngongorehela dikahlolo tsa hao ka nako tsohle. 
Psalms119:21 O kgalemela baikgohomosi, baikgohomosi ba rohakehileng, ba kgelohang melao ya hao." 
Psalms119:22 Ako tlose sekgobo le nyediso ho nna, hobane ke latela ditemoso tsa hao." 
Psalms119:23 Leha mahosana a kopane, a kopanetse ho nthera, nna, mohlanka wa hao, ke nahana thato ya hao." 
Psalms119:24 E, ditemoso tsa hao di a nthabisa, ke baeletsi ba ka." 
Psalms119:25 Ke rapaletse leroleng; ako nnee bophelo ho ya ka lentswe la hao. 
Psalms119:26 Ke o boleletse metsamao ya ka, wa nkaraba; ako nthute thato ya hao." 
Psalms119:27 Nthute, ke utlwisise tsela ya ditaelo tsa hao, ke tle ke nahane dimakatso tsa hao." 
Psalms119:28 Moya wa ka o lliswa ke maswabi; ako mmatlafatse ho ya ka lentswe la hao. 
Psalms119:29 Nqobise tsela ya leshano, o nkgauhele ka ho nthuta Molao wa hao." 
Psalms119:30 Ke ikgethetse tsela ya nnete, dikahlolo tsa hao ke di hlokometse." 
Psalms119:31 Ke kgomaretse ditemoso tsa hao; oho, Morena, ke se ke ka hlajwa ke dihlong." 
Psalms119:32 Ke tla matha tseleng ya melao ya hao, hobane wena o ntokolotse." 
Psalms119:33 Morena, nthute ho tsamaya ho ya ka thato ya hao, ke tle ke e latele ho isa qetellong." 
Psalms119:34 Nnee kutlwisiso ke tle ke hlomphe Molao wa hao, ke o boloke ka pelo ya ka yohle." 
Psalms119:35 Ntsamaise tseleng ya melao ya hao, hobane ke a e thabela." 
Psalms119:36 Ruta pelo ya ka ditemoso tsa hao, ho ena le ho rata maruo." 
Psalms119:37 Faposa mahlo a ka, a se ke a bona tsa mafeela, o nnee bophelo tseleng ya hao." 
Psalms119:38 Phethisetsa mohlanka wa hao tshepiso eo o e etseditseng ba o tshabang. 
Psalms119:39 Ntlose sekgobo seo ke se tshabang, hobane dikahlolo tsa hao di lokile." 
Psalms119:40 Ke lakatsa ditaelo tsa hao; ako nnee bophelo ka ho loka ha hao. 
Psalms119:41 Morena, ako ntshitse ka mohau wa hao, o mpholose ho ya ka tshepiso ya hao;" 
Psalms119:42 ke tle ke tsebe ho araba ba nnyefolang, hobane ke tshepile lentswe la hao." 
Psalms119:43 Nthuse, ke bue nnete feela, hobane ke tshepile dikahlolo tsa hao." 
Psalms119:44 Ke tla nne ke boloke Molao wa hao, ke o boloke kamehla le mehla." 
Psalms119:45 Ke tla phela ka bolokolohi, hobane ke thahasella ditaelo tsa hao." 
Psalms119:46 Ke tla bua ka ditemoso tsa hao, ke bue ka tsona kapele ho dikgosi, ke sa hlajwe ke dihlong." 
Psalms119:47 Ke thabela melao ya hao, mme ke e rata haholo." 
Psalms119:48 Ke tla hlompha melao ya hao, ke nahane thato ya hao." 
Psalms119:49 Hopola lentswe leo o le buileng, wa le bua ho mohlanka wa hao, hobane le nneile tshepo." 
Psalms119:50 Ho hlopheheng ha ka se ntshedisang ke sena: Tshepiso ya hao e nnea bophelo. 
Psalms119:51 Baikgohomosi ba ntlaka haholo, empa ha ke furalle Molao wa hao." 
Psalms119:52 Morena, ke hopola dikahlolo tsa hao, kahlolo tsa hao tsa boholoholo, mme ke a tshediseha." 
Psalms119:53 Ke halefiswa haholo ke ba kgopo, ba furallang Molao wa hao." 
Psalms119:54 Thato ya hao ke pina ho nna, fatsheng lena leo ke leng mofeti ho lona." 
Psalms119:55 Bosiu ke hopola lebitso la hao, lebitso la hao Morena, mme ke boloka Molao wa hao." 
Psalms119:56 Lehlohonolo la ka ke lena: Ke bolokile ditaelo tsa hao. 
Psalms119:57 Morena, ke itse kabelo ya ka ke ho mamela mantswe a hao ke a mamele ka hloko." 
Psalms119:58 Ke o rapela ka pelo ya ka yohle: Ako nkgauhele ho ya ka tshepiso ya hao. 
Psalms119:59 Ke hlahlobile metsamao ya ka, mme ke kgutletse tseleng eo o mpontshitseng yona." 
Psalms119:60 Ke ile ka potlaka, ka se ke ka dieha ho boloka melao ya hao." 
Psalms119:61 Le hoja maraba a ntshwasitse, maraba a ba kgopo a ntshwasitse, ha ke a lebala Molao wa hao." 
Psalms119:62 Ke tsoha ka seroko ho o boka, ka baka la kahlolo tsa hao, kahlolo tse lokileng." 
Psalms119:63 Ke motswalle wa bohle ba o tshabang, le wa ba bolokang ditaelo tsa hao." 
Psalms119:64 Lefatshe lohle le tletse mohau wa hao, Morena; ako nthute thato ya hao." 
Psalms119:65 Morena, o entse tse molemo, wa di etsetsa mohlanka wa hao, ho ya ka lentswe la hao." 
Psalms119:66 Nthute bohlale le tsebo, hobane ke tshepa melao ya hao." 
Psalms119:67 Pele ke eso kokobetswe ke ne ke kgelohile; jwale ke hlokometse tshepiso ya hao. 
Psalms119:68 Wena o molemo, o etsa tse molemo; ako nthute thato ya hao." 
Psalms119:69 Le hoja baikgohomosi ba nneta ka leshano, ke tla boloka ditaelo tsa hao, ke di boloke ka pelo ya ka yohle." 
Psalms119:70 Pelo tsa bona di tsherehane, empa nna ke thabela Molao wa hao." 
Psalms119:71 Ke hantle ha ke ile ka kokobetswa, ke tle ke ithute thato ya hao." 
Psalms119:72 Ho molemo ho nna ho ba le Molao o tswang ho wena, ho ena le ho ba le diketekete tsa tjhelete ya kgauta le ya silefera." 
Psalms119:73 O mpopile ka matsoho a hao, wa nnea sebopeho; ako nnee kutlwisiso, ke tle ke ithute melao ya hao." 
Psalms119:74 Ba o tshabang ba tla mpona, ba mpone ba thabe, hobane ke tshepile lentswe la hao." 
Psalms119:75 Morena, ke a tseba hore dikahlolo tsa hao di lokile; mme leha o nkokobeditse, wena o a tshepahala." 
Psalms119:76 Mohau wa hao o ke o ntshedise, ho ya ka tshepiso eo o e entseng, wa e etsetsa mohlanka wa hao." 
Psalms119:77 Lerato la hao le ke le nketele, ke tle ke phele, hobane ke thabela Molao wa hao." 
Psalms119:78 Baikgohomosi ba ntubang, ba ntubang ka mashano, ba ke ba hlajwe ke dihlong, empa nna ke tla nahana ditaelo tsa hao." 
Psalms119:79 Ba o tshabang ba ke ba kgutlele ho nna, le ba tsebang ditemoso tsa hao." 
Psalms119:80 Pelo ya ka e ke e phethe thato ya hao ka ho tlala, ke tle ke se ke ka hlajwa ke dihlong." 
Psalms119:81 Moya wa ka o ngongorehela ho pholoswa ke wena, ke tshepile lentswe la hao." 
Psalms119:82 Mahlo a ka a motela ke ho lebella tshepiso ya hao, ke re: “Ekaba o tla ntshedisa neneng?”" 
Psalms119:83 Le hoja ke le jwaloka lekuka, lekuka le ka mosing, ha ke a lebala thato ya hao." 
Psalms119:84 Mohlanka wa hao o sa tla phela ho le hokae? Bahlorisi ba ka o tla ba ahlola neng? 
Psalms119:85 Baikgohomosi ba ntjheketse mamena; bona ba sa yeng ka Molao wa hao. 
Psalms119:86 Melao ya hao yohle ke ya nnete; empa bona ba ntlhorisa ka mashano, ako nthuse." 
Psalms119:87 Ba batile ba ntlosa lefatsheng, empa ha ke a furalla ditaelo tsa hao." 
Psalms119:88 Ako nnee bophelo ka mohau wa hao, ke latele ditemoso tse tswang ho wena." 
Psalms119:89 Morena, lentswe la hao ke la mehla yohle, le tiile jwaloka mahodimo." 
Psalms119:90 Botshepehi ba hao ke ba meloko yohle, o theile lefatshe, mme le tsitsitse." 
Psalms119:91 Ho ya ka dikahlolo tsa hao, tsohle di ntse di tiile: Dintho tsohle di a o sebeletsa." 
Psalms119:92 Hoja Molao wa hao e ne e se thabo ya ka, nka be ke timeditswe ke ho hlopheha ha ka." 
Psalms119:93 Nke ke ka lebala ditaelo tsa hao le ka mohla, hobane ke ka tsona o nneang bophelo." 
Psalms119:94 Ke wa hao, ako mpholose, hobane ke thahasella ditaelo tsa hao." 
Psalms119:95 Ba kgopo ba ntaletse hore ba ntimetse, empa ke hlokometse ditemoso tsa hao." 
Psalms119:96 Ke bone hore tsohle tse phethehileng di na le bofelo, empa Molao wa hao ha o na moedi." 
Psalms119:97 Molao wa hao ke o rata hakaakang! ke o nahana letsatsi lohle. 
Psalms119:98 Molao wa hao o ntlhalefisa ho feta dira tsa ka, hobane ke na le wona kamehla yohle." 
Psalms119:99 Ke hlalefile ho feta bohle ba nthutileng, hobane ke nahana ditemoso tsa hao." 
Psalms119:100 Ke feta maqheku ka kutlwisiso, hobane ke boloka ditaelo tsa hao." 
Psalms119:101 Ke qobisa maoto a ka ditsela tsohle tse kgopo, ke tle ke mamele lentswe la hao ka hloko." 
Psalms119:102 Ha ke furalle dikahlolo tsa hao, hobane ke wena ya nthutileng tsona." 
Psalms119:103 Ditshepiso tsa hao di latsweha hamonate hakaakang! Di feta mahe a dinotshi ka hanong la ka. 
Psalms119:104 Ke na le kutlwisiso ka baka la ditaelo tsa hao, ka baka leo, ke hloile ditsela tsohle tsa leshano." 
Psalms119:105 Lentswe la hao ke lebone maotong a ka, ke lesedi tseleng ya ka." 
Psalms119:106 Ke ikanne, ke eme ke tiile: Ke tla ya ka kahlolo tsa hao, kahlolo tsa hao tse lokileng." 
Psalms119:107 Ke kokobeditswe ka ho fetisisa; oho, Morena, ako nnee bophelo ho ya ka lentswe la hao." 
Psalms119:108 Morena, amohela diteboho tse tswang molomong wa ka, o nthute dikahlolo tsa hao." 
Psalms119:109 Bophelo ba ka bo kotsing kamehla, empa ha ke lebale Molao wa hao." 
Psalms119:110 Ba kgopo ba ntjhehetse leraba, empa ha ke kgelohe ditaelo tsa hao." 
Psalms119:111 Ditemoso tsa hao ke lefa la ka la mehla yohle, ke thabo ya pelo ya ka." 
Psalms119:112 Ke rerile ka pelong ya ka ho phetha thato ya hao kamehla, ho e phetha ho isa qetellong." 
Psalms119:113 Ke hloile bo-temepedi, ke rata Molao wa hao." 
Psalms119:114 O setshabelo sa ka le thebe ya ka, ke tshepile lentswe la hao." 
Psalms119:115 Tlohang ho nna, lona ba etsang bobe, ke boloke melao ya Modimo wa ka." 
Psalms119:116 Mmatlafatse ho ya ka tshepiso ya hao, ke tle ke phele; o se ke wa ntshwabisa, hobane ke o tshepile." 
Psalms119:117 Nthuse, ke tle ke pholohe, ke nne ke thabele ho phetha thato ya hao." 
Psalms119:118 O nyedisa bohle ba kgelohang thato ya hao, hobane masene a bona ke lefeela." 
Psalms119:119 Bohle ba lefatshe ba kgopo o ba tadima e le manya, kahoo ke rata ditemoso tsa hao." 
Psalms119:120 Mmele wa ka o thothomela ke ho o tshaba, mme ke tshohile dikahlolo tsa hao." 
Psalms119:121 Ke phethile toka le ho lokileng; o se ke wa ntlohella matsohong a bahatelli ba ka. 
Psalms119:122 Sireletsa mohlanka wa hao, mohlanka wa hao a tle a atlehe, baikgohomosi ba se ke ba mo hatella." 
Psalms119:123 Mahlo a ka a motela ke ho lebella ho pholosa ha hao, le ho lebella tshepiso ya hao, tshepiso ya hao e lokileng." 
Psalms119:124 Tshwara mohlanka wa hao hantle ho ya ka mohau wa hao, o nthute thato ya hao." 
Psalms119:125 Ke mohlanka wa hao, ako nnee kutlwisiso, ke tle ke tsebe ditemoso tsa hao." 
Psalms119:126 Morena, ke nako ya hore o sebetse, hobane ba tlotse Molao wa hao." 
Psalms119:127 Ruri ke rata melao ya hao, ke e rata ho feta kgauta, le hona kgauta e hlwekisitsweng;" 
Psalms119:128 kahoo ke latela ditaelo tsa hao tsohle, ke hloile ditsela tsohle tsa leshano." 
Psalms119:129 Ditemoso tsa hao di a tsoteha, ke ka hoo ke di latelang." 
Psalms119:130 Qaqiso ya mantswe a hao e a edisa, ba hlokang mano e ba nea kutlwisiso." 
Psalms119:131 Ke ahlamisa molomo wa ka, ke sisa pelo ke ho labalabela melao ya hao." 
Psalms119:132 Retelehela ho nna, o nkgauhele, jwalokaha ho lokela ba ratang lebitso la hao." 
Psalms119:133 Matlafatsa mehato ya ka ho ya ka tshepiso ya hao, o se dumelle hore ke buswe ke bobe." 
Psalms119:134 Ntopolle ho batho ba nkgatellang, ke tle ke boloke ditaelo tsa hao." 
Psalms119:135 Ako bontshe mohlanka wa hao fahleho se kganyang kgotso, o nthute thato ya hao." 
Psalms119:136 Marameng a ka ho keleketla dikeledi, hoba ha ho ya bolokang Molao wa hao." 
Psalms119:137 Morena, wena o lokile, le dikahlolo tsa hao di nepahetse." 
Psalms119:138 Temoso tseo o faneng ka tsona di lokile, di tshepahala haholo." 
Psalms119:139 Tjheseho ya ka e a nqeta, hobane ba ntlhoileng ba lebala mantswe a hao." 
Psalms119:140 Tshepiso ya hao ke ya nnetenete, mohlanka wa hao o a e rata." 
Psalms119:141 Ke monyenyane, ke a nyediseha, empa ditaelo tsa hao ha ke di lebale." 
Psalms119:142 Ho loka ha hao ke ho loka ha kamehla, Molao wa hao ke nnete." 
Psalms119:143 Ke fihletswe ke matshwenyeho, ke fihletswe ke matswalo, empa melao ya hao ke thabo ya ka." 
Psalms119:144 Ditemoso tsa hao di lokile kamehla; ako nnee kutlwisiso, ke tle ke phele." 
Psalms119:145 Morena, ke a ipiletsa, ke ipiletsa ka pelo ya ka yohle, ako nkarabe; ke tle ke phethe thato ya hao." 
Psalms119:146 Ke ipiletsa ho wena, ako mpholose; ke tle ke latele ditemoso tsa hao." 
Psalms119:147 Ke tsoha e sa le ka madungwadungwana, ke lle ho wena, hobane ke tshepile mantswe a hao." 
Psalms119:148 Ke lala ke fadimehile ka nako tsa bosiu, ke ntse ke nahana tshepiso ya hao." 
Psalms119:149 Morena, mamela lentswe la ka, o le mamele ka baka la mohau wa hao, o nnee bophelo ho ya ka kahlolo ya hao." 
Psalms119:150 Bahlorisi ba bolotsana ba a atamela, bona ba holehole le Molao wa hao." 
Psalms119:151 Wena Morena, o haufi, mme melao yohle ya hao ke nnete." 
Psalms119:152 Kgale ke tsebile hore ditemoso tsa hao o di tiisitse, e be tsa mehla yohle." 
Psalms119:153 Ako tadime ho hlopheha ha ka, o nnamolele, hobane ha ke a lebala Molao wa hao." 
Psalms119:154 Ako emele nyewe ya ka, o ntopolle; o nnee bophelo ho ya ka tshepiso ya hao." 
Psalms119:155 Pholoho e holehole le ba kgopo, hobane ha ba batle thato ya hao." 
Psalms119:156 Lerato la hao le leholo, Morena; ako nnee bophelo ho ya ka dikahlolo tsa hao." 
Psalms119:157 Ba bangata ba ntlhorisang, le ba ntwantshang ba bangata, empa ha ke furalle ditemoso tsa hao." 
Psalms119:158 Ha ke bona bakwenehi ke a teneha, hoba tshepiso ya hao, ha ba e hlokomele." 
Psalms119:159 Morena, bona kamoo ke ratang ditaelo, ke ratang taelo tsa hao kateng! Ako nnee bophelo ho ya ka mohau wa hao." 
Psalms119:160 Nnete ke moko wa lentswe la hao, dikahlolo tsohle tsa hao ke tse lokileng, ke tsa mehla yohle." 
Psalms119:161 Mahosana a ntlhorisa ntle ho lebaka, empa pelo ya ka e tshoswa ke lentswe la hao feela." 
Psalms119:162 Ke thabela tshepiso ya hao, jwaloka ya fumaneng kgapo, kgapo e ngata." 
Psalms119:163 Leshano ke le hloile, ke a le nyonya; Molao wa hao wona ke a o rata." 
Psalms119:164 Ke o rorisa hasupa ka letsatsi, ka baka la kahlolo tsa hao, kahlolo tse lokileng." 
Psalms119:165 Ba ratang Molao wa hao ba na le kgotso e phethehileng, ha ho na se ka ba kgopang." 
Psalms119:166 Morena, ke lebeletse hore o mpholose, ke tle ke phethe melao ya hao." 
Psalms119:167 Ke latela ditemoso tsa hao, ke di rata haholo." 
Psalms119:168 Ke boloka ditaelo tsa hao, le ditemoso tsa hao ke a di boloka, hobane o bona metsamao ya ka yohle." 
Psalms119:169 Morena, sello sa ka se ke se finyelle ho wena; ako nnee kutlwisiso ho ya ka lentswe la hao." 
Psalms119:170 Thapelo ya ka e ke e fihle ho wena; ako nnamolele ho ya ka tshepiso ya hao. 
Psalms119:171 Molomo wa ka o bolela dithoko tsa hao, hobane o nthuta thato ya hao." 
Psalms119:172 Leleme la ka le ke le bine tsa tshepiso ya hao, hoba melao yohle ya hao e lokile." 
Psalms119:173 Letsoho la hao le ke le nthuse, hoba ke ikgethetse ditaelo tsa hao." 
Psalms119:174 Morena, ke lakatsa ho pholoswa, ho pholoswa ke wena; Molao wa hao ke thabo ya ka." 
Psalms119:175 A nke ke phelele ho o rorisa, dikahlolo tsa hao di ke di nthuse." 
Psalms119:176 Ke lelera jwaloka nku e lahlehileng; ako batle mohlanka wa hao, hobane ha ke lebale melao ya hao." 
Psalms120:1 Sefela sa ho nyolohela Jerusalema. Ke ipiletsa ho Morena, ha ke le matshwenyehong, mme o a nkaraba." 
Psalms120:2 Morena, ako nnamolele molomong wa ya leshano, le lelemeng la ya thetsang." 
Psalms120:3 Wena ya leleme le thetsang, o tla newa eng, o ekeletswe eng?" 
Psalms120:4 O tla newa metsu ya mohale, metsu e ntjhotjho, e tswang mashaleng a hlenneng, mashala a sehalahala." 
Psalms120:5 Ho madimabe nna ka ho jaka Mesheke, ka ho aha hara ditente tsa Kedare." 
Psalms120:6 Ke nako e telele haholo ke ahile hara ba hloileng kgotso. 
Psalms120:7 Nna ke motho wa kgotso, empa ha ke bua ka kgotso, bona ba batla ntwa." 
Psalms121:1 Sefela sa ho nyolohela Jerusalema. Mahlo a ka a tadima dithabeng; ekaba thuso ya ka e tla tswa kae? 
Psalms121:2 Thuso ya ka e tswa ho Morena, ya entseng mahodimo le lefatshe." 
Psalms121:3 A ke ke a tlohela leoto la hao, a le tlohella ho thella, molebedi wa hao a ke ke a otsela." 
Psalms121:4 Ruri molebedi wa Iseraele ha a otsele, ha a kgalehe." 
Psalms121:5 Morena ke molebedi wa hao, Morena ke moriti wa hao ka letsohong la hao le letona." 
Psalms121:6 Tsatsi le ke ke la o ntsha kotsi motsheare, leha e le kgwedi bosiu." 
Psalms121:7 Morena o tla o sireletsa, a o sireletse bobeng bohle, a baballe bophelo ba hao." 
Psalms121:8 Morena o tla o lebela ha o eya le ha o kgutla, ho tloha jwale le kamehla yohle." 
Psalms122:1 Pesalema ya Davida. Sefela sa ho nyolohela Jerusalema. Ke ile ka thaba ha ho thwe ho nna: “A re yeng ka Tlung ya Morena.” 
Psalms122:2 Jwale maoto a rona a eme dikgorong, dikgorong tsa hao, Jerusalema." 
Psalms122:3 Jerusalema e hahilwe e le motse, tsohle tsa wona di teteane hamonate." 
Psalms122:4 Ke moo ho nyolohelang meloko, meloko yohle ya Morena, ka taelo e neilweng Iseraele, hore e yo boka lebitso la Morena." 
Psalms122:5 Ke moo ditulo tsa kahlolo di leng teng, ditulo tsa ntlo ya Davida." 
Psalms122:6 Rapellang Jerusalema e be le kgotso: “Ba o ratang ba ke ba atlehe. 
Psalms122:7 Kgotso e ke e be kahara marako a hao, le katleho ka matlung a hao a bokgosi.”" 
Psalms122:8 Ka baka la baheso le metswalle ya ka, ke tla re: “Kgotso e ke e be le wena.”" 
Psalms122:9 Ka baka la Ntlo ya Morena, Morena Modimo wa rona, ke tla o kopela tse molemo." 
Psalms123:1 Sefela sa ho nyolohela Jerusalema. Mahlo a ka a tadima ho wena, wena ya dutseng teroneng, lehodimong;" 
Psalms123:2 a jwaloka mahlo a bahlanka, a tadimileng letsoho la monga bona. Jwalokaha mahlo a lekgabunyane a tadimile letsoho la mofumahadi wa lona, le mahlo a rona a tadima Morena Modimo wa rona jwalo, ho fihlela a ka re hauhela." 
Psalms123:3 Re hauhele Morena, re hauhele, hobane re nyedisitswe, ra nyediswa ho feta tekanyo." 
Psalms123:4 Re sonngwe ho feta tekanyo, ra songwa ke ba iketlang, re nyedisitswe ke ba ikgantshang." 
Psalms124:1 Pesalema ya Davida. Sefela sa ho nyolohela Jerusalema. Hoja Morena a se ke a ba le rona, Iseraele a ke a rialo," 
Psalms124:2 hoja Morena a se ke a ba le rona, ha batho ba ne ba re tsohela matla," 
Psalms124:3 ba ka be ba re kwentse re ntse re phela, ha kgalefo ya bona e ne e re tloketse;" 
Psalms124:4 dikgohola di ka be di re hohotse, diphororo di ka be di re pupeditse;" 
Psalms124:5 metsi a befileng a ka be a re pupeditse. 
Psalms124:6 Ho bokwe Morena ya sa kang a lesa hore ba re je. 
Psalms124:7 Re phonyohile jwaloka nonyana lerabeng la batshwasi; leraba la kgaoha, mme ra phonyoha." 
Psalms124:8 Thuso ya rona e tswa ho Morena, ya entseng mahodimo le lefatshe." 
Psalms125:1 Sefela sa ho nyolohela Jerusalema. Ba tshepileng Morena ba jwaloka thaba ya Sione, e ke keng ya sisinngwa, e tiileng kamehla." 
Psalms125:2 Jwalokaha dithaba di teetse Jerusalema hare, le setjhaba sa hae, Morena o se teetse hare jwalo, ho tloha jwale le kamehla yohle." 
Psalms125:3 Efela lere la ba kgopo le ke ke la busa lefatshe le abetsweng ba lokileng, esere ba lokileng ba kenya matsoho a bona bokgopong." 
Psalms125:4 Morena, ako etse tse molemo, o di etsetse ba lokileng, le ba pelo di ntle." 
Psalms125:5 Empa ba kgelohetseng ditseleng, ditseleng tse matswedintsweke, Morena a ke a ba leleke, a ba leleke le ba kgopo. Kgotso e ke e be teng Iseraele." 
Psalms126:1 Sefela sa ho nyolohela Jerusalema. Ha Morena a kgutlisa batho ba Sione, a ba kgutlisa bothopuweng, e ne e ka re a lora." 
Psalms126:2 Yaba re keketeha ke ditsheho, maleme a rona a etsa ditlatse. Jwale hara ditjhaba ha thwe: “Morena o ba etseditse tse kgolo.”" 
Psalms126:3 E, Morena o re etseditse tse kgolo, ruri re thabile." 
Psalms126:4 Morena, ako kgutlise ba habo rona, ba habo rona ba bothopuweng, ba kgutle sa melatswana e phallang, e phallelang Lehwatateng la Borwa." 
Psalms126:5 Ba ileng ba jala ka dikgapha, ba tla kotula ka ditlatse." 
Psalms126:6 Ya tsamayang a lla, a nkile peo e tla jalwa, o tla kgutla ka ditlatse, a nkile mangata a hae." 
Psalms127:1 Pesalema ya Solomone. Sefela sa ho nyolohela Jerusalema. Haeba e se Morena ya hahang ntlo, ba e hahang ba sebeletsa lelea. Haeba e se Morena ya lebelang motse, ya o lebelang o fadimehela lefeela." 
Psalms127:2 Ke lefeela ha le tsoha kameso, kapa le dieha ho robala, le itjella bohobe boo le bo fumanang ka thata, athe yena o fa baratuwa ba hae ba ntse ba ithobaletse." 
Psalms127:3 Ruri bana ke lefa le tswang ho Morena, tholwana ya popelo ke moputso." 
Psalms127:4 Jwaloka metsu e letsohong la mohale, bana ba botjha ba motho, le bona ba jwalo." 
Psalms127:5 Ho lehlohonolo monna ya tlatsitseng kgohlopo ya hae, a e tlatsa ka yona. A ke ke a hlajwa ke dihlong, ha a ngangisana le dira tsa hae, a ngangisana le tsona kgorong ya motse." 
Psalms128:1 Sefela sa ho nyolohela Jerusalema. Ho lehlohonolo bohle, bohle ba tshabang Morena, ba tsamayang ditseleng tsa hae." 
Psalms128:2 O tla ja tholwana tsa mosebetsi, tsa mosebetsi wa matsoho a hao, o tla ba lehlononolo, o be le katleho." 
Psalms128:3 Mosadi wa hao o tla ba jwaloka morara, morara o behang ka tlung ya hao; bana ba hao ba be jwaloka mahlomela, mahlomela a mohlwaare ho potapota tafole ya hao." 
Psalms128:4 E, motho ya tshabang Morena o hlohonolofala jwalo." 
Psalms128:5 Morena a ke a o hlohonolofatse, a o hlohonolofatse a le Sione, o tle o bohe katleho ya Jerusalema ka ditshiu tsohle tsa bophelo ba hao." 
Psalms128:6 O ke o bone bana ba bana ba hao. Kgotso e ke e be teng Iseraele. 
Psalms129:1 Sefela sa ho nyolohela Jerusalema. Haesale ba ntshwenya haholo ho tloha botjheng ba ka, Iseraele a ke a rialo," 
Psalms129:2 haesale ba ntshwenya haholo ho tloha botjheng ba ka, empa ha ba a ka ba ntlhola." 
Psalms129:3 Balemi ba lemile mokokotlong wa ka, ba entse diforo tse telele." 
Psalms129:4 Empa Morena o lokile, o kgaotse dikgwele tsa ba kgopo." 
Psalms129:5 Bohle ba hloileng Sione ba ke ba hlajwe ke dihlong, ba tjhetjhiswe kasanthao." 
Psalms129:6 Ba be jwaloka jwang bo marulelong a matlo, bo ponang pele bo ka fotholwa," 
Psalms129:7 boo ho seng ya bo helang, ya ka tlatsang seatla sa hae ka bona, kapa ya tlamang mangata a a nka ka matsoho a hae." 
Psalms129:8 Ba fetang ka tsela ba ke ke ba re ho bona: “Tlhohonolofatso ya Morena e ke e be le lona, re le hlohonolofatsa ka lebitso la Morena.”" 
Psalms130:1 Sefela sa ho nyolohela Jerusalema. Ke ipiletsa ho wena Morena, ke le tlasetlase." 
Psalms130:2 Morena, ako utlwe lentswe la ka! Tsebe tsa hao di ke di mamele ha ke etsa thapedi ya ka." 
Psalms130:3 Morena, ha o tshwaya diphoso, o tshwaya phoso tsa rona, ke mang, Morena, ya ka phelang?" 
Psalms130:4 Empa wena o a re tshwarela, e le hore re tle re o hlomphe." 
Psalms130:5 Ke tshepile Morena, moya wa ka o tshepile lentswe la hae." 
Psalms130:6 Moya wa ka o lebeletse Morena, ho feta balebedi ba lebeletseng meso, e, ho feta balebedi ba lebeletseng meso." 
Psalms130:7 Iseraele a ke a lebelle Morena, hobane Morena o mohau, o na le topollo e kgolo." 
Psalms130:8 Ke yena ya tla lopolla Iseraele bokgopong bohle ba hae. 
Psalms131:1 Pesalema ya Davida. Sefela sa ho nyolohela Jerusalema. Morena, pelo ya ka ha e ikakase, mahlo a ka ha a ikgohomose; ha ke tsotelle dintho tse mphetang, leha e le tse makatsang, tse mphahametseng." 
Psalms131:2 Empa ke bobisitse moya wa ka, ka o kgutsisa, sa ngwana ya kgwesitsweng, ya sikilweng ke mmae; e, moya wa ka o jwaloka ngwana, jwaloka ngwana ya kgwesitsweng." 
Psalms131:3 Iseraele a ke a tshepe Morena, ho tloha jwale le kamehla yohle." 
Psalms132:1 Sefela sa ho nyolohela Jerusalema. Morena, ako hopole Davida, le ho hlopheha hohle ha hae," 
Psalms132:2 kamoo a neng a hlapanye, a hlapanyetsa Morena kateng, a ikana ho Ya Matla, Modimo wa Jakobo," 
Psalms132:3 a re: “Nke ke ka kena ka tlung ya ka, kapa ka paqama diphateng tsa ka;" 
Psalms132:4 mahlo a ka a ke ke a fumana boroko, le dintshi tsa ka di ke ke tsa tutubala," 
Psalms132:5 ho fihlela ke fumanela Morena sebaka, ke fumanela Ya Matla Leaho, Ya Matla, Modimo wa Jakobo.”" 
Psalms132:6 Areka re e utlwetse Eferata, ra e fumana masimong a Jaare." 
Psalms132:7 A re keneng ka Leahong la hae, re itihele kapele ho yena." 
Psalms132:8 Tloo, Morena, o ye sebakeng sa hao sa phomolo, wena le areka e bontshang matla a hao." 
Psalms132:9 Baprista ba hao ba apeswe ho loka, batshepuwa ba hao ba etse ditlatse." 
Psalms132:10 Ka baka la mohlanka wa hao Davida, o se ke wa furalla Motlotsuwa wa hao." 
Psalms132:11 Morena o ile a hlapanyetsa Davida, a ke ke a kwenehela tshepiso, tshepiso ena ya nnete, a re: “E mong wa bana ba theka la hao, ke tla mmea teroneng ya hao." 
Psalms132:12 Ha bara ba hao ba ka boloka selekane sa ka, ba latela ditemoso tseo ke ba neileng tsona, le bara ba bona ba tla dula teroneng, teroneng ya hao kamehla.”" 
Psalms132:13 Morena o ikgethetse Sione, o ratile hore e be leaho la hae;" 
Psalms132:14 a re: “Sena ke sebaka sa ka sa phomolo sa kamehla, ke tla aha mona hobane ke ratile jwalo." 
Psalms132:15 Ke tla hlohonolofatsa Sione ka nala, mafutsana a yona ke a fepe, ke a fepe, a kgore." 
Psalms132:16 Baprista ba yona ke tla ba apesa pholoho, batshepuwa ba yona ba etse ditlatse." 
Psalms132:17 “Teng ke tla bea setloholo sa Davida, ke se bee hore e be kgosi e matla, ke lokisetse Motlotsuwa wa ka lebone." 
Psalms132:18 Dira tsa hae ke tla di apesa dihlong; athe yena hloohong ya hae ho tla kganya mofapahlooho wa hae.” 
Psalms133:1 Pesalema ya Davida. Sefela sa ho nyolohela Jerusalema. Bonang, ho hotle, ho monate hakaakang, ha bana ba motho ba phedisana ka kgotso!" 
Psalms133:2 Ho jwaloka ole ya bohlokwa, ole e tlotsang hlooho, e keleketlelang ditedung, ditedung tsa Arone, e lepellelang molaleng wa seaparo sa hae." 
Psalms133:3 Ho jwaloka phoka ya Heremone, e lalang hodima dithaba tsa Sione; ke moo Morena a faneng ka tlhohonolofatso ya hae teng, e leng bophelo, bophelo ba kamehla le mehla." 
Psalms134:1 Sefela sa ho nyolohela Jerusalema. Tloong, le boke Morena, lona bahlanka bohle ba Morena, ba emang ka Tlung ya Morena, ba emang ka teng ka masiu wohle." 
Psalms134:2 Phahamisang matsoho a lona, le a phahamisetse Sehalalelong, le boke Morena." 
Psalms134:3 Morena a ke a o hlohonolofatse, a o hlohonolofatse a le Sione, yena ya entseng mahodimo le lefatshe." 
Psalms135:1 Haleluja! Rorisang lebitso la Morena, mo roriseng, lona bahlanka ba Morena," 
Psalms135:2 ba emang ka Tlung ya Morena, mabaleng a Ntlo ya Modimo, Ntlo ya Modimo wa rona." 
Psalms135:3 Rorisang Morena, hobane Morena o molemo; rokang lebitso la hae, hobane o a rateha." 
Psalms135:4 Morena o ikgethetse, a ikgethela leloko la Jakobo, e leng Iseraele, hore e be leruo la hae." 
Psalms135:5 Ruri ke a tseba hore Morena o moholo, Morena wa rona o moholo, o moholo ho medimo yohle." 
Psalms135:6 Morena o etsa tsohle tseo a di ratang, mahodimong le lefatsheng, mawatleng le madibeng wohle." 
Psalms135:7 Ke yena ya nyollang maru, a a nyolle dipheletsong tsa lefatshe, ya nesang pula ka mahadima, ya bulelang difefo moo a di kwaletseng teng." 
Psalms135:8 Ke yena ya ileng a bolaya, a bolaya matsibolo a Egepeta, ho qala ka a batho ho isa ho a diphoofolo." 
Psalms135:9 Ho wena Egepeta, o ile a romela dipontsho le dimakatso, ho Faro le ho bahlanka bohle ba hae." 
Psalms135:10 Ke yena ya ileng a timetsa, a timetsa ditjhaba tse ngata, a bolaya dikgosi tse matla:" 
Psalms135:11 Sihone, kgosi ya Baamore, le Oge, kgosi ya Bashane, le mebuso yohle ya Kanana." 
Psalms135:12 A fana ka naha ya bona hore e be lefa, lefa la Iseraele setjhaba sa hae." 
Psalms135:13 Morena, lebitso la hao ke la kamehla yohle; Morena, o tla hopolwa, o hopolwe ke meloko yohle." 
Psalms135:14 Morena o tla ahlola, a ahlolele setjhaba sa hae, mme a qenehele bahlanka ba hae." 
Psalms135:15 Medimo ya bohata ya baditjhaba ke ya silefera le ya kgauta, ke mosebetsi wa matsoho a batho." 
Psalms135:16 E na le melomo, empa ha e bue; e na le mahlo, empa ha e bone." 
Psalms135:17 E na le ditsebe, empa ha e utlwe; le ho phefumoloha, ha e phefumolohe." 
Psalms135:18 Ba e etsang ba ke ba tshwane le yona, ba be jwalo bohle ba e tshepang." 
Psalms135:19 Lona, ba ntlo ya Iseraele, bokang Morena; lona ba ntlo ya Arone, bokang Morena;" 
Psalms135:20 lona ba ntlo ya Levi, bokang Morena; le lona ba tshabang Morena, bokang Morena." 
Psalms135:21 Morena a ke a bokwe ke ba Sione, yena ya ahileng Jerusalema. Haleluja!" 
Psalms136:1 Haleluja! Bokang Morena, hobane o molemo; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle." 
Psalms136:2 Bokang Modimo wa medimo; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle. 
Psalms136:3 Bokang Morena wa marena; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle. 
Psalms136:4 Ke yena a inotshi ya entseng dimakatso tse kgolo; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle. 
Psalms136:5 Ke yena ya entseng mahodimo, a a etsa ka bohlale; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle." 
Psalms136:6 O adile lefatshe hodima metsi; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle. 
Psalms136:7 O entse masedi a maholo; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle; 
Psalms136:8 letsatsi ho busa motsheare; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle; 
Psalms136:9 kgwedi le dinaledi ho busa bosiu; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle. 
Psalms136:10 Ke yena ya ileng a bolaya, a bolaya matsibolo a Egepeta; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle." 
Psalms136:11 A ntsha Iseraele naheng ya Egepeta; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle; 
Psalms136:12 ka letsoho le matla le sephaka se otlolohileng; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle. 
Psalms136:13 O ile a phatlola Lewatle la Sufe koto tse pedi; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle. 
Psalms136:14 A tshedisa Iseraele hara lona; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle. 
Psalms136:15 A dihela Faro le mabotho a hae, a a dihela Lewatleng la Sufe; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle." 
Psalms136:16 Ke yena ya ileng a tsamaisa setjhaba, a tsamaisa tjhaba sa hae lehwatateng; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle." 
Psalms136:17 O ile a timetsa dikgosi tse kgolo; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle. 
Psalms136:18 A bolaya dikgosi tse matla; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle: 
Psalms136:19 Sihone, kgosi ya Baamore; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle;" 
Psalms136:20 le Oge, kgosi ya Bashane; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle." 
Psalms136:21 A fana ka naha ya bona hore e be lefa; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle; 
Psalms136:22 e be lefa la Iseraele, mohlanka wa hae; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle." 
Psalms136:23 Ke yena ya ileng a re hopola ha re ne re kokobeditswe; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle. 
Psalms136:24 A re phamola ho dira tsa rona; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle. 
Psalms136:25 Ke yena ya fepang dibopuwa tsohle; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle. 
Psalms136:26 Bokang Modimo wa mahodimo; mohau wa hae ke wa kamehla yohle. 
Psalms137:1 Mabopong a dinoka tsa Babilona, re ne re dutse re lla, ha re hopola Sione." 
Psalms137:2 Meduwaneng ya tsona re ne re fanyehile diharepa tsa rona. 
Psalms137:3 Ke moo ba neng ba re hapile ba ileng ba re kopa hore re ba binele; batubi ba rona ba re kopa dipina tsa thabo, ba re: “Re bineleng difela tsa Sione!”" 
Psalms137:4 Re ka bina sefela sa Morena jwang, lefatsheng la baditjhaba?" 
Psalms137:5 Haeba nka o lebala, wena Jerusalema, letsoho la ka le letona le ke le shwe." 
Psalms137:6 Leleme la ka le kgomarele mahalapeng a ka, haeba ke sa o hopole, ke sa thabele Jerusalema, ke sa e thabele ho feta tsohle." 
Psalms137:7 Morena, ako hopole, ako hopole bana ba Edomo, mohla letsatsi la Jerusalema, ha ba ne ba re: “E heletseng, e heletseng, ho isa metheong ya yona!”" 
Psalms137:8 Wena motse wa Babilona, o seng o tla ripitlwa, ho lehlohonolo ya tla o buseletsa seo o re entseng sona." 
Psalms137:9 Ho lehlohonolo ya tla nka masea a hao, a a pshatlanye hodima lefika." 
Psalms138:1 Pesalema ya Davida. Morena, ke o boka ka pelo ya ka yohle, ke o roka pontsheng ya mangeloi." 
Psalms138:2 Ke kgumama ke shebile Tempeleng, Tempeleng ya hao e halalelang, ke boka lebitso la hao ka baka la mohau wa hao le botshepehi ba hao; o tumisitse lebitso la hao le tshepiso ya hao ho feta tsohle." 
Psalms138:3 Ha ke ne ke ipiletsa ho wena o ile wa nkaraba, wa matlafatsa moya wa ka."
