Psalms138:4 Morena, dikgosi tsohle tsa lefatshe di tla o boka, ha di utlwa mantswe a tswang molomong wa hao." 
Psalms138:5 Di tla rorisa ditsela tsa Morena, di re: “Tlotla ya Morena e kgolo.”" 
Psalms138:6 Leha Morena a phahame hakaalo, o bona ba eisehang; ba ikgantshang o ba tseba ba sa le hole." 
Psalms138:7 Leha nka phela hara ditsietsi, wena o baballa bophelo ba ka; letsoho la hao le ntshireletsa bohaleng, bohaleng ba dira tsa ka, letsoho la hao le letona le a mpholosa." 
Psalms138:8 Morena o tla phetha seo a ntheretseng sona. Morena, mohau wa hao ke wa kamehla yohle; o se lahle mosebetsi wa diatla tsa hao." 
Psalms139:1 Pesalema ya Davida, e qapetsweng motsamaisi wa dibini. Morena, o ntlhahlobile, o a ntseba." 
Psalms139:2 O tseba ha ke dula le ha ke ema, o hlalohanya mehopolo ya ka, o e hlalohanya ke sa le hole." 
Psalms139:3 O ntisa ha ke tsamaya le ha ke robetse, o tsebisisa metsamao ya ka yohle." 
Psalms139:4 Lentswe le eso be teng lemeng la ka, o se o le tseba hantle, Morena." 
Psalms139:5 O ntlhahile kamahohle, o beile letsoho la hao hodima ka." 
Psalms139:6 Tsebo ena e makatsang e a mpheta; e tebile hoo nke keng ka e fihlela. 
Psalms139:7 Nka ya kae ho ipatela moya wa hao? Nka balehela kae ho ipatela sefahleho sa hao? 
Psalms139:8 Ha nka nyolohela mahodimong, o teng moo; leha nka theohela Nqalong ya Bafu, le teng o teng." 
Psalms139:9 Leha nka adima mapheo a mafube, ka ya aha dipheletsong tsa lewatle," 
Psalms139:10 le hona moo letsoho la hao le tla ntsamaisa, letsoho la hao le letona le tla ntshwara." 
Psalms139:11 Leha nka re: “Ruri lefifi le tla mpata, lesedi le nteetseng hare le tla fetoha bosiu,”" 
Psalms139:12 empa ho wena lefifi hase lefifi, bosiu bo kganya jwaloka letsatsi, lefifi le jwaloka lesedi." 
Psalms139:13 Ke wena ya bopileng bokahare ba ka, ya kopantseng ditho tsa ka ke sa le popelong ya mme." 
Psalms139:14 Ke a o boka, hobane o mpopile ka mokgwa o makatsang; mesebetsi ya hao e a hlolla, hona ke ho tseba hantle." 
Psalms139:15 Masapo a ka a ne a sa pateha ho wena, ha ke ne ke bopjwa sephiring, ke kopanngwa ditho ke le botebong ba lefatshe." 
Psalms139:16 Mahlo a hao a mpone ke eso tswalwe; tsohle tsa ka di ne di se di ngotswe bukeng ya hao, le pele ke eba teng." 
Psalms139:17 Modimo, mehopolo ya hao e thata hakaakang! Palo ya yona e kgolo hakaakang!" 
Psalms139:18 Ha nka e bala, e mengata ho feta lehlabathe; ha nka e qeta, o ntse o ena le nna." 
Psalms139:19 Oho, Modimo, hoja wa timetsa ba kgopo, hoja ba tshollang madi ba suthela hole le nna!" 
Psalms139:20 Ke ba buang hampe ka wena, ba o lwantshetsang lefeela." 
Psalms139:21 Na nke ke ka hloya ba o hloileng, Morena, ka halefela ba o tsohelang matla?" 
Psalms139:22 Ke ba hloile ka lehloyo le phethehileng, le nna ke dira tsa ka." 
Psalms139:23 Ntlhahlobe, Modimo, o tsebe pelo ya ka; o nnonye maikutlo, o tsebe mehopolo ya ka;" 
Psalms139:24 o bone hore na ke tseleng e mpe, o ntsamaise tseleng ya kamehla yohle." 
Psalms140:1 Pesalema ya Davida, e qapetsweng motsamaisi wa dibini." 
Psalms140:2 Morena ako nnamolele ho batho ba kgopo, o ntshireletse ho batho ba sehloho." 
Psalms140:3 Ba loha mano ka dipelong tsa bona, ba qholotsa ntwa kamehla." 
Psalms140:4 Ba leotsa maleme a bona a be jwaloka a dinoha, mahloko a marabe a tswa melomong ya bona." 
Psalms140:5 Morena, ako nnamolele, o nnamolele diatleng tsa ba babe, o ntshireletse ho batho ba sehloho, ba rerang hore ke kgothometsehe." 
Psalms140:6 Baikgohomosi ba ntjhehetse sefi, ba nketseditse leraba ka dikgwele, ba ntjheketse mamena pela tsela." 
Psalms140:7 Ke itse ho Morena: “Ke wena Modimo wa ka.” Oho, Morena, sekeha tsebe, o sekehele sello sa thapedi ya ka tsebe." 
Psalms140:8 Morena, monga ka, mopholosi wa ka ya matla, o sireletsa hlooho ya ka, o e sireletsa ka nako ya ntwa." 
Psalms140:9 Morena, se dumelle ditakatso tsa ya kgopo, se dumelle hore di phethahale, le hore merero ya hae e atlehe." 
Psalms140:10 Ba ntikanetseng ba se tsohe molota, ditshokelo tsa bona di ke di ba wele hodimo." 
Psalms140:11 Morena a ba nesetse mashala a tukang, a ba dihele mohohlong oo ba ke keng ba tswa ho wona." 
Psalms140:12 Moetseletsi a se hlole a eba teng, e eba teng lefatsheng lena, motho ya sehloho a futuhelwe ke bokgopo, bo mo timetsang." 
Psalms140:13 Ke a tseba hore Morena o tla emela a emele nyewe ya mohlophehi, a ahlolele le mofutsana." 
Psalms140:14 Ruri ba lokileng ba tla boka lebitso la hao, ba pelo di ntle ba tla phela pontsheng ya hao." 
Psalms141:1 Pesalema ya Davida. Morena, ke ipiletsa ho wena, ako mpotlakele; sekehela lentswe la ka tsebe, ha ke ipiletsa ho wena." 
Psalms141:2 Thapelo ya ka e nyolohele ho wena, e nyolohe jwaloka mokubetso, ke phahamise matsoho a ka e le nyehelo ya mantsiboya." 
Psalms141:3 Morena, ako bee molebedi, o mmee molomong wa ka, o dise monyako wa molomo wa ka;" 
Psalms141:4 pelo ya ka e se ke ya sekama, ya sekamela dinthong tse mpe. Ke se ke ka etsa mesebetsi ya bokgopo mokgatlong wa batho ba sa lokang; ke se ke ka latswa menate ya bona." 
Psalms141:5 Ho molemo ha ke otlwa ke ya lokileng, ke kgalemelwa ke yena; hoo ke ole eo hlooho ya ka e ke keng ya e hana, ke tla nne ke rapele leha ba kgopo ba ntshwenya." 
Psalms141:6 Mohla baahlodi ba bona ba dihelwang dilomong, ke hona batho ba tla tseba hore mantswe a ka e ne e le a nnete." 
Psalms141:7 Jwalokaha ho kgathwa, ho tabolwa thite, masapo a bona a tla qhalanngwa jwalo, a qhalanngwe kgorong ya Nqalo ya Bafu." 
Psalms141:8 Morena, monga ka, mahlo a ka a tadimile ho wena, ke tshabela ho wena, se ntlohelle hore ke timele." 
Psalms141:9 Nqobise sefi seo ba ntjhehileng ka sona, le mamena a ba etsang tse sa lokang." 
Psalms141:10 Bohle ba kgopo ba ke ba wele marabeng a bona, ha nna ke phonyoha." 
Psalms142:1 Pesalema ya Davida ha a le ka lehaheng. Thothokiso e nang le thuto; thapelo. 
Psalms142:2 Ke lla ho Morena ka lentswe le phahameng, ke etsa thapedi ho Morena ka lentswe le phahameng." 
Psalms142:3 Ke hlahisa sello sa ka, ke se hlahisa kapele ho yena, ke bea tsietsi ya ka kapele ho yena." 
Psalms142:4 Ha moya wa ka o imetswe, wena o tseba tsela ya ka. Tseleng eo ke tsamayang ho yona ba ntjhehetse sefi." 
Psalms142:5 Ke tadima ka tsohong la ka le letona: Ha ho ya ntsotellang; ha ho moo nka tshabelang teng, ha ho motho ya nnatsang." 
Psalms142:6 Morena, ke lla ho wena, ke re: “Ke wena setshabelo sa ka, o kabelo ya ka lefatsheng la ba phelang.”" 
Psalms142:7 Ako mamele sello sa ka, hobane ke kokobeditswe haholo. Nnamolele ho ba ntlhorisang, hobane ba mpheta ka matla." 
Psalms142:8 Ako nntshe tjhankaneng, ke tle ke boke lebitso la hao. Ba lokileng ba tla mpokanela, hoba o tla be o ntswetse molemo." 
Psalms143:1 Pesalema ya Davida. Morena, ako utlwe thapelo ya ka, o sekehele thapedi ya ka tsebe; o nkarabe ka baka la botshepehi ba hao, le ka baka la ho loka ha hao." 
Psalms143:2 O se ke wa qosa mohlanka wa hao, hobane ho wena ha ho ya lokileng." 
Psalms143:3 Sera se a ntelekisa, se nkgatakella fatshe, se mphedisa lefifing jwaloka ba shweleng kgalekgale." 
Psalms143:4 Moya wa ka o imetswe, pelo ya ka e thethefetse, e thethefetse ka sefubeng sa ka." 
Psalms143:5 Ke hopola ditshiu tsa boholoholo, ke lohotha diketso tsa hao tsohle, ke nahana mesebetsi, mesebetsi ya matsoho a hao." 
Psalms143:6 Ke phahamisa matsoho a ka, ke a phahamisetsa ho wena, moya wa ka o o nyoretswe jwaloka lefatshe le omeletseng." 
Psalms143:7 Morena, ako nkarabe kapele; moya wa ka o a tepella. O se ke wa mpatela sefahleho sa hao, ke se ke ka tshwana le ba theohelang lebitleng." 
Psalms143:8 Etsa hore ke tsebe mohau wa hao, ke o tsebe e sa le hoseng, hobane ke o tshepile; mpontshe tsela eo nka tsamayang ka yona, hobane ke o rapela ka moya wa ka wohle." 
Psalms143:9 Morena, ako nnamolele, o nnamolele direng tsa ka, hobane ke tshabetse ho wena." 
Psalms143:10 Nthute ho phetha thato ya hao, hobane ke wena Modimo wa ka. Moya wa hao o motle o ke o ntsamaise, o ntsamaise tseleng e bataletseng." 
Psalms143:11 Morena, o tla nnea bophelo ka baka la lebitso la hao, o ntopolle matshwenyehong ka baka la ho loka ha hao." 
Psalms143:12 Ka baka la mohau wa hao ho nna, o tla timetsa dira tsa ka, o fedise bohle ba ntwantshang, hobane nna ke mohlanka wa hao." 
Psalms144:1 Pesalema ya Davida. Ho bokwe Morena, lefika la ka, yena ya nthutang ho lwana, yena ya nkwetlisetsang ntwa." 
Psalms144:2 Ke setshabelo sa ka le qhobosheane ya ka, seqhobo sa ka le monamoledi wa ka; ke thebe ya ka, eo ke itshireletsang ka yona, ke yena ya beang ditjhaba katlasa puso ya ka." 
Psalms144:3 Morena, ebe motho e ne e le eng, hoo o ka mo nkelang hloohong? Ngwana motho e ne e le eng, hoo o ka mo hopolang?" 
Psalms144:4 Motho o tshwana le lefeela, ditshiu tsa hae di jwaloka moriti o fetang." 
Psalms144:5 Morena, phetla mahodimo a hao, o theohe, o ame dithaba di tle di foqohe mosi." 
Psalms144:6 Betsa mahadima, dira di tle di qhalane, o fule ka metsu ya hao, di tle di phasaphase." 
Psalms144:7 Nnanabele o le hodimo, o mpholose, o nkinole metsing a lewatle, le matsohong a baditjhaba;" 
Psalms144:8 ba buang mashano ka melomo ya bona, ba phahamisang matsoho ho hlapanyetsa bohata." 
Psalms144:9 Modimo, ke tla o binela, ke o binele sefela se setjha, ke o roke ka harepa e kgwele di leshome," 
Psalms144:10 wena ya neang dikgosi tlholo, wena ya pholosang Davida, mohlanka wa hao." 
Psalms144:11 Mpholose saboleng e sehloho, namolele matsohong a baditjhaba ba buang mashano ka melomo ya bona, ba phahamisang matsoho ho hlapanyetsa bohata." 
Psalms144:12 Bara ba rona, botjheng ba bona, ba ke ba be jwaloka ditlama, tlama tse holang hantle; baradi ba rona ba be jwaloka ditshiya, tshiya tsa dihuku tse betletsweng ntlo ya bokgosi." 
Psalms144:13 Mediko ya rona e ke e tlale, e tsholohe dijo tsa mefutafuta. Manku a rona a ke a ate ka dikete, e be diketekete makgulong a rona;" 
Psalms144:14 makgomo a rona a ke a emare, a se folotse kapa a shwelwa ke manamane, ho se be diboko mabaleng a motse." 
Psalms144:15 Ho lehlohonolo setjhaba se tlelwang ke tse jwalo, ho lehlohonolo setjhaba seo Morena e leng Modimo wa sona." 
Psalms145:1 Pesalema ya Davida. Thoko. Ke tla o tumisa, wena Modimo wa ka o leng Kgosi ya ka, ke boke lebitso la hao kamehla le mehla." 
Psalms145:2 Ke tla o boka ka letsatsi le leng le le leng, ke rorise lebitso la hao kamehla le mehla." 
Psalms145:3 Morena o moholo, o lokelwa ke thoriso e kgolo, boholo ba hae ha bo fihlelwe." 
Psalms145:4 Moloko ho isa molokong o mong o tlotlisa mesebetsi ya hao, o bonahatsa ketso tsa bonatla ba hao." 
Psalms145:5 Batho ba tla bolela kganya ya tlotla ya hao, nna ke nahane dimakatso tsa hao." 
Psalms145:6 Ba tla bolela matla a ketso tsa hao tse tshabehang, nna ke phete tsa boholo ba hao." 
Psalms145:7 Ba tla etsa kgopotso ya molemo wa hao o moholo, ba etsetse ho loka ha hao ditlatse." 
Psalms145:8 Morena o mosa, o na le kutlwelobohloko, o dieha ho halefa, o tletse mohau." 
Psalms145:9 Morena o molemo ho bohle, lerato la hae le aparela mesebetsi yohle ya hae." 
Psalms145:10 Morena, mesebetsi yohle ya hao e a o leboha, le batshepuwa ba hao ba a o boka;" 
Psalms145:11 ba bolela tlotla ya mmuso wa hao, ba bua ka diketso tsa bonatla ba hao." 
Psalms145:12 Ba tsebisa batho bohle diketso tsa bonatla ba hao, le tlotla e kganyang ya mmuso wa hao." 
Psalms145:13 Mmuso wa hao ke mmuso wa kamehla yohle, le puso ya hao ke ya meloko yohle. Morena o tshepahala dipolelong tsohle tsa hae, o mohau mesebetsing yohle ya hae." 
Psalms145:14 Morena o tshehetsa bohle ba wang, o phahamisa bohle ba kgokgopaneng." 
Psalms145:15 Mahlo a bohle a lebeletse wena, hore o ba fepe ka nako e lokelang." 
Psalms145:16 Ha o fuparolla seatla, o kgorisa tsohle tse phelang ka tseo di di lakatsang." 
Psalms145:17 Morena o lokile ho tsohle tseo a di etsang, mesebetsing yohle ya hae o mohau." 
Psalms145:18 Morena o haufi le bohle ba mo rapelang, ba mo rapelang kannete." 
Psalms145:19 O phetha ditakatso tsa ba mo tshabang, o utlwa sello sa bona, mme o a ba pholosa." 
Psalms145:20 Morena o baballa bohle ba mo ratang, empa bohle ba kgopo o a ba timetsa." 
Psalms145:21 Molomo wa ka o ke o rorise Morena; batho bohle ba boke lebitso la hae le halalelang, ba le boke kamehla le mehla." 
Psalms146:1 Haleluja! Boka Morena, wena moya wa ka!" 
Psalms146:2 Ke tla rorisa Morena ha ke ntse ke phela; ke tla roka Modimo wa ka bophelong ba ka bohle. 
Psalms146:3 Le se ke la tshepa mahosana, leha e le motho ya se nang matla, matla a ho pholosa." 
Psalms146:4 Hoba a neele moya, motho o kgutlela mobung; ka lona tsatsi leo merero ya hae e a fela." 
Psalms146:5 Ho lehlohonolo eo Modimo wa Jakobo e leng thuso ya hae; eo Morena Modimo wa hae, e leng tshepo ya hae." 
Psalms146:6 Ke yena ya entseng mahodimo le lefatshe, lewatle le tsohle tse ho lona. O tshepahala kamehla," 
Psalms146:7 o ahlolela ba hateletsweng, o fepa ba lapileng; Morena o lokolla batlamuwa," 
Psalms146:8 Morena o tutubolla mahlo a difofu. Morena o phahamisa ba kgokgopaneng; Morena o rata ba lokileng. 
Psalms146:9 Morena o sireletsa bajaki, o thusa kgutsana le mohlolohadi, athe merero ya ba kgopo o a e nyopisa." 
Psalms146:10 Morena o busa kamehla yohle; Modimo wa hao, Sione, ke wa meloko yohle. Haleluja!" 
Psalms147:1 Haleluja! Ke hantle ho boka Morena, ho monate ho roka Modimo wa rona, o lokelwa ke thoriso." 
Psalms147:2 Morena o tsosa marako a Jerusalema, o phutha Baiseraele ba neng ba lelekilwe." 
Psalms147:3 O fodisa ba pelo di hlabehileng, o tlamella maqeba a bona." 
Psalms147:4 O tseba palo ya dinaledi, kaofela ha tsona o di bitsa ka mabitso." 
Psalms147:5 Morena wa rona o moholo, o matla haholo, kelello ya hae e ke ke ya lekanngwa." 
Psalms147:6 Morena o phahamisa ba eisehang, ba kgopo o ba dihela fatshe." 
Psalms147:7 Binelang Morena sefela sa teboho, le roke Modimo wa rona ka harepa." 
Psalms147:8 Ke yena ya kwahelang mahodimo, ya a kwahelang ka maru, ya nesetsang lefatshe pula, ya medisang jwang dithabeng." 
Psalms147:9 O fepa diphoofolo ka dijo tsa tsona, le madinyane a makgwaba ka tseo a di llelang." 
Psalms147:10 Morena ha a thabele matla a dipere, ha a kgahlwe ke lebelo la motho;" 
Psalms147:11 o kgahlwa ke ba mo tshabang, le ba tshepileng mohau wa hae." 
Psalms147:12 Tlotlisa Morena, wena Jerusalema, wena Sione, rorisa Modimo wa hao." 
Psalms147:13 O tiisitse mekwallo, mekwallo ya dikgoro tsa hao, a hlohonolofatsa bana ba hao ba phelang ho wena." 
Psalms147:14 O entse hore kgotso e be teng meeding ya hao, a o kgorisa ka koro e atlehileng." 
Psalms147:15 Ke yena ya ntshang taelo ya hae e yang lefatsheng, molaetsa wa hae o a potlaka." 
Psalms147:16 O kgethehisa lehlwa le kang boya, o etsa hore serame se lale, se ke molora." 
Psalms147:17 O hasanya sefako sa hae se kang makumane; ke mang ya ka phelang hara mohatsela wa hae? 
Psalms147:18 Hang ha a ntsha taelo, di se di qhibidiha. O fokisa moya, metsi a boele a phalle." 
Psalms147:19 O tsebisa ba leloko la Jakobo, o ba tsebisa lentswe la hae, le thato le kahlolo tsa hae ho Iseraele." 
Psalms147:20 Ha ho setjhaba seo a kileng a se etsetsa jwalo, ha ho setjhaba seo a kileng a se tsebisa kahlolo tsa hae. Haleluja!" 
Psalms148:1 Haleluja! Rorisang Morena, lona ba mahodimong, mo roriseng, lona ba hodimodimo." 
Psalms148:2 Mo roriseng, lona mangeloi a hae kaofela, mo roriseng, lona mabotho a hae wohle." 
Psalms148:3 Mo roriseng, lona letsatsi le kgwedi, mo roriseng, lona dinaledi tsohle tse phatsimang." 
Psalms148:4 Mo roriseng, lona mahodimo a hodimodimo, le lona metsi a kahodimo ho mahodimo." 
Psalms148:5 Tsohle di ke di rorise lebitso la Morena, hobane o ile a laela, mme tsa hloleha." 
Psalms148:6 O entse hore di be teng kamehla le mehla, a di beela taelo eo di ke keng tsa e tlola." 
Psalms148:7 Rorisang Morena, lona ba lefatsheng, lona dikganyapa tsa mawatle le tsa madiba wohle;" 
Psalms148:8 lona mollo le sefako, lehlwa le mohodi, moya wa sefefo o phethang taelo ya hae;" 
Psalms148:9 lona dithaba le maralla wohle, difate tsa ditholwana le tsa dikedare tsohle;" 
Psalms148:10 lona diphoofolo tsa naha le tsa hae tsohle, dihahabi le dinonyana tse fofang;" 
Psalms148:11 lona dikgosi tsa lefatshe le lona merabe yohle, mahosana le baahlodi bohle ba lefatshe;" 
Psalms148:12 lona bahlankana le lona barwetsana, maqheku le lona ba batjha." 
Psalms148:13 Tsohle di rorise lebitso la Morena; ke lona feela le lokelang ho tlotliswa, botlotlehi ba hae bo phahame, bo phahametse lefatshe, bo phahametse le mahodimo." 
Psalms148:14 O tsositse setjhaba sa hae molota, ke seo batshepuwa ba hae ba ithorisang ka sona, bana ba Iseraele, setjhaba se leng haufi le yena. Haleluja!" 
Psalms149:1 Haleluja! Binelang Morena sefela se setjha, le mo rorise phuthehong ya batshepuwa ba hae." 
Psalms149:2 Iseraele a ke a thabe, a thabele Mmopi wa hae, bana ba Sione ba nyakallele Kgosi ya bona." 
Psalms149:3 Ba ke ba rorise lebitso la hae, ba le rorise ka mehobelo, ba mo roke ka moropa le ka harepa." 
Psalms149:4 Morena o kgahlwa ke setjhaba sa hae, o tlotlisa bahlophehi ka ho ba pholosa." 
Psalms149:5 Batshepuwa ba hae ba thabe, ba be motlotlo, ba mo etsetse ditlatse leha ba robetse." 
Psalms149:6 Ba tumise Modimo ka melomo ya bona, ba ntse ba tshwere sabole, sabole e sehang kamahohle;" 
Psalms149:7 ba tle ba iphetetse ho baditjhaba, ba dihele kotlo hodima merabe;" 
Psalms149:8 ba tlame kgosi tsa yona ka mahlaahlela, le bahlomphehi ba yona ka diketane;" 
Psalms149:9 ba ba dihele kahlolo e seng e ngotswe. Ke bona he, boitumelo ba batshepuwa ba hae. Haleluja!" 
Psalms150:1 Haleluja! Rorisang Morena a le sehalalelong sa hae, mo roriseng a le sebakeng sa hae se matla, baka sa hae sa lehodimo." 
Psalms150:2 Mo roriseng ka baka la diketso tsa bonatla ba hae, mo roriseng ka baka la boholo ba hae, boholo ba hae bo fetisisang." 
Psalms150:3 Mo roriseng ka modumo wa lenaka, mo roriseng ka thomo le ka harepa." 
Psalms150:4 Mo roriseng ka moropa le ka mohobelo, mo roriseng ka seletsa se dikgwele, le ka makodilo;" 
Psalms150:5 mo roriseng ka mangenengene a ketemanang, mo roriseng ka mangenengene a llang haholo." 
Psalms150:6 Tsohle tse phelang di ke di rorise Morena. Haleluja! 
Proverbs1:1 Ana ke maele a Solomone, mora wa Davida, kgosi ya Iseraele," 
Proverbs1:2 a rutang motho bohlale le kgalemo, le ho utlwisisa polelo tse tebileng;" 
Proverbs1:3 a rutang bohlale, ho loka, kutlwisiso, le ho nepahetseng." 
Proverbs1:4 Ya se nang tsebo o tla hlalefiswa ke wona, mohlankana a rue tsebo le kelello." 
Proverbs1:5 Ya bohlale a a mamele, a eketse tsebo le kutlwisiso, ya nang le kutlwisiso a fumane tataiso," 
Proverbs1:6 a utlwisise maele le dipapiso, polelo le dilotho tsa ba bohlale." 
Proverbs1:7 Ho tshaba Modimo ke qaleho ya tsebo, empa dithoto di nyedisa bohlale, di nyedisa le tayo" 
Proverbs1:8 Mora ka, mamela tayo ya ntatao, o se furalle thuto ya mmao." 
Proverbs1:9 Tsena ke moqhaka wa bokgabane hloohong, le lepetu le bohehang molaleng wa hao." 
Proverbs1:10 Mora wa ka, ha baetsadibe ba o hohela, o se ke wa ineela ho bona." 
Proverbs1:11 Ha ba re: “Tloo le rona, re yo lalla motho re mmolaye, re tsholle madi a ba se nang molato;" 
Proverbs1:12 re ba metse ba phela sa Nqalo ya Bafu, re ba metse bokwiditane sa ba welang ka mohohlong;" 
Proverbs1:13 matlotlo a bohlokwa re tla a hapa, matlo a rona a tlale kgapo ya rona;" 
Proverbs1:14 rona le wena a re ikopanye, mokotla o be mong, re arolelane.”" 
Proverbs1:15 Mora wa ka, se tsamaisane tsela le bona, mohlaleng wa bona o se ke be wa hata." 
Proverbs1:16 Maoto a bona a titimela bobeng, a potlakela ho ya tsholla madi." 
Proverbs1:17 Ke bothoto ho tjheha leraba moo nonyana e ntseng e le bona. 
Proverbs1:18 Banna bana ba emetse lefu la bona, ba itjhehetse leraba ka bobona." 
Proverbs1:19 Ba fella jwalo ba ithuisang ka bolotsana, bophelo ba bona bo fediswa ke matsoho a bona." 
Proverbs1:20 Tseleng tsohle bohlale bo a meketsa, mabaleng a motse bo a tlerola." 
Proverbs1:21 Hara mmidimidi bohlale bo a howa, bo phatlalatsa puo tsa bona kgorong tsa motse, bo re:" 
Proverbs1:22 “Lona ba se nang tsebo, le tla rata ho se be le tsebo ho fihlela neng? Basomi ba thabele ho soma ho fihlela neng? Thoto di hloye tsebo ho fihlela neng?" 
Proverbs1:23 Hoja le ka mamela kgalemo ya ka, pelo ya ka nkabe ke le bulela yona, mehopolo ya ka ke le tsebisa yona." 
Proverbs1:24 Kaha le hanne ha ke le bitsa, ha ke otlolla tsoho la ka la se ke la ela hloko;" 
Proverbs1:25 kaha keletso ya ka le sa ka la e natsa, le kgalemo ya ka le sa e mamela;" 
Proverbs1:26 koduweng ya lona ke tla le ja tlepane, ke le je ditsheho ha tlokotsi e le wela hodimo." 
Proverbs1:27 Ha tlokotsi e le wela hodimo, e le wela hodimo sa sefefo, koduwa e le fefola, e le fefola sa setsokotsane, mahlomola le mapalesapelo a le sithabeditse," 
Proverbs1:28 ba tla ipiletsa ho nna ke se ke ka ba araba, ba mpatle ba se ke ba mphumana." 
Proverbs1:29 Kaha ba hloile tsebo, ba ikgethetse ho se tshabe Modimo;" 
Proverbs1:30 kaha keletso ya ka ba sa e amohela, ba nyedisitse kgalemo ya ka yohle," 
Proverbs1:31 kahoo ba tla kotula seo ba se jetseng, ba kgore ditholwana tsa ditakatso tsa bona." 
Proverbs1:32 Ba se nang tsebo ba a bolawa ke ho kgeloha ha bona, dithoto tsona di a timela, di timetswe ke ho se tsotelle ha tsona." 
Proverbs1:33 Ya mmamelang o tla phela a sireletsehile, a phele ka boiketlo a sa tshabe bobe.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Mora wa ka, ha o ka mamela polelo tsa ka, wa boloka ditaelo tsa ka;" 
Proverbs2:2 wa sekehela bohlale tsebe, pelo ya hao ya labalabela ho ba le kutlwisiso;" 
Proverbs2:3 ha o ka ipiletsa hore o be sedi, wa kopa hore o be le kutlwisiso;" 
Proverbs2:4 ha o ka e batla sa hoja o batla silefera, wa e batla sa tlotlo e le patuwe;" 
Proverbs2:5 kutlwisiso ya ho tshaba Morena o tla e fihlela, ho tseba Modimo le hona o ho fumane." 
Proverbs2:6 Ke Morena ya fanang ka bohlale, tsebo le kutlwisiso di tswa ho yena." 
Proverbs2:7 O hlokomela metsamao ya ba lokileng, ke thebe ho ba hlokang kodi." 
Proverbs2:8 O baballa ba lokileng tseleng tsa bona, batshepuwa ba hae a ba sireletse." 
Proverbs2:9 O tla utlwisisa ho loka, ho tshepeha, le ho nepahetseng, o utlwisise le ditsela tsohle, tsela tsohle, tse lokileng;" 
Proverbs2:10 hobane bohlale bo tla kena pelong ya hao, tsebo e be boithabiso, boithabiso ba pelo ya hao." 
Proverbs2:11 O tla baballwa ke ho ba le kelello, kutlwisiso e o sireletse," 
Proverbs2:12 e o pholose tseleng tse kgopo, e o phemise ba buang tse mpe," 
Proverbs2:13 ba lahlang tsela tse lokileng, ba tsamayang tseleng tse lefifi." 
Proverbs2:14 Bona ba thabela ho etsa bobe, ba thabela bokgopo ba ba kgopo," 
Proverbs2:15 bao tsela tsa bona di kgopameng, metsamao ya bona e kgelohileng." 
Proverbs2:16 O tla phemiswa mosadi wa sehlola, mosadi ya ekang ka dipolelo," 
Proverbs2:17 ya sa tshepahaleng ho monna wa hae, ya lebalang selekane sa Modimo wa hae." 
Proverbs2:18 Lapa la hae le kgannela lefung, tsela tsa hae di isa ho ba shweleng." 
Proverbs2:19 Ba kenang lapeng leo ha ba ke ba kgutla, le tsela ya bophelo ha ba e fumane." 
Proverbs2:20 Kahoo o tla tsamaya tseleng ya ba lokileng, o tsamaye tseleng ya ba hlokang kodi." 
Proverbs2:21 Ba lokileng ba tla phela lefatsheng, ba hlokang kodi ba ahe ho lona." 
Proverbs2:22 Ba kgopo ba tla fediswa lefatsheng, mahlabaphiyo a timetswe ho lona." 
Proverbs3:1 Mora wa ka, se lebale thuto ya ka, pelong ya hao melao ya ka o e boloke," 
Proverbs3:2 o tlo lelefaletswe matsatsi a hao, lemo tsa kgotso di tle di o atele." 
Proverbs3:3 Eba le lerato, o be le botshepehi, molaleng wa hao o itlame ka tsona; o di ngole tlapeng la pelo ya hao." 
Proverbs3:4 O tla ratwa ke Modimo le batho, o iketsetse lebitso mahlong a bona." 
Proverbs3:5 Tshepa Morena ka pelo ya hao yohle, o se ke wa tshepa bohlale ba hao." 
Proverbs3:6 Kenya Morena mererong ya hao, mo kenye ho yona yohle, tsela tsa hao a tla di otlolle." 
Proverbs3:7 O se ipone o le bohlale, tshaba Morena, o sesefe bobe." 
Proverbs3:8 O tla phela hantle mmeleng, masapo a hao a tiye." 
Proverbs3:9 Tlotla Morena ka maruo a hao, le ka lopotsiya tsohle tsa dijalo tsa hao." 
Proverbs3:10 Disiu tsa hao di tla sasamatswa ke tjhai, merifi ya hao e kgaphatsehe veine." 
Proverbs3:11 Mora wa ka, se nyedise kgalemelo ya Morena, se kgathale ha a o laya," 
Proverbs3:12 hoba Morena o kgalema eo a mo ratang, sa ntata, ngwaneng eo a mo ratang." 
Proverbs3:13 Ho lehlohonolo ya iphumanetseng bohlale, ya bileng a fihletseng kutlwisiso," 
Proverbs3:14 hoba bo feta silefera ka bohlokwa, ho bo fihlela ke tlotlo le fetang kgauta;" 
Proverbs3:15 bo kgahleha ho feta le mabenyane a bohlokwa, ha ho letho le ka bapiswang le bona;" 
Proverbs3:16 ka ho le letona bo kakatletse bolelele ba bophelo, ka ho le letshehadi bo kakatletse maruo le tlotla." 
Proverbs3:17 Tsela tsa bona di a kgahleha, moo bo tsamayang teng ho rena kgotso." 
Proverbs3:18 Ho ba bo kgomarelang ke fate sa bophelo, ho lehlohonolo ba itshwarellang ka bona." 
Proverbs3:19 Ka bohlale Morena o radile metheo ya lefatshe, ka kelello Morena a ala le mahodimo;" 
Proverbs3:20 ka tsebo ya hae a arohanya madiba, maru a latsa phoka, a e latsa hodima lefatshe." 
Proverbs3:21 Mora wa ka, boloka bohlale le tlhalohanyo, di se tlohe mahlong a hao." 
Proverbs3:22 Tsena ho wena e tla ba bophelo, di qhake molala wa hao, di o kgabise." 
Proverbs3:23 O tla tsamaya o sireletsehile, leoto la hao le ke ke la kgoptjwa." 
Proverbs3:24 Ha o robala o ke ke wa tshaba letho, ha o robala o tla kgaleha thuwe!" 
Proverbs3:25 Se tshabe tlokotsi e o tlelang ka tsometso, kapa timetso e welang ba kgopo hodimo;" 
Proverbs3:26 hobane Morena ke yena letshepa la hao, leoto la hao le ke ke la wela lerabeng." 
Proverbs3:27 Fana ka tse molemo ho ba di hlokang, ha o ena le matla a ho etsa jwalo." 
Proverbs3:28 O se ke wa re ho wa heno: “Tsamaya o boele o kgutle, ke tla o nea yona hosasa,” empa o ntso ena le yona." 
Proverbs3:29 O se ke wa rerela wa heno bokgopo, empa yena a phela le wena a o tshepile." 
Proverbs3:30 Se qose motho ho se na lebaka, ha yena a sa o senyetsa letho." 
Proverbs3:31 Se kgahlwe ke motho ya kgantshang bohanka, se latele le e nngwe ya tsela tsa hae." 
Proverbs3:32 Morena o hloile ya sothang nnete, empa ya lokileng yena o a mo tshepa." 
Proverbs3:33 Morena o rohaka malapa a ba kgopo; o hlohonolofatsa a ba lokileng. 
Proverbs3:34 Morena o soma baikakasi, athe baikokobetsi o a ba hauhela." 
Proverbs3:35 Ba bohlale bona o a ba tlotla, athe lefa la dithoto ke ho tlontloloha." 
Proverbs4:1 Bana, mamelang thuto, thuto ya ntata lona, le e ele hloko, e tle le ruise kutlwisiso." 
Proverbs4:2 Ke le nea thuto ya sebele, se e furalleng ke hona." 
Proverbs4:3 Ha ke ne ke le ngwana ya ratwang ke ntatae, ngwana ya mong feela, sebokotswa-ke-mmae," 
Proverbs4:4 ntate a na nthuta, a re: “Polelo tsa ka di se tlohe pelong ya hao, boloka taelo tsa ka o tle o phele." 
Proverbs4:5 Iphumanele bohlale, iphumanele kutlwisiso, se lebale polelo tsa ka, o se di kgelohe;" 
Proverbs4:6 se furalle bohlale, bo tla o sireletsa; bo rate, bo tle bo o lebele." 
Proverbs4:7 Bo kahodimo ho tsohle, iphumanele bona, ka tsohle tseo o nang le tsona, o bo reke, o iphumanele kutlwisiso." 
Proverbs4:8 Bo thoholetse, bo tla o phahamisa; ha o bo kgomarela bo tla o tlotla." 
Proverbs4:9 Bo tla kgabisa hlooho ya hao, bo e kgabise ka moqhaka o bohehang, bo o rwese mofapahlooho wa tlotla.”" 
Proverbs4:10 Mora wa ka, mamela, o amohele polelo tsa ka, lemo tsa bophelo ba hao di tle di ate." 
Proverbs4:11 Ke o rutile tsela tsa bohlale, ka o tsamaisa tseleng tse otlolohileng." 
Proverbs4:12 Ha o tsamaya o ke ke wa sitiswa ke letho, ha o matha o ke ke wa kgoptjwa." 
Proverbs4:13 Tshwara thuto ena, o e mamarele, o e dise ka thata, ke yona bophelo ba hao." 
Proverbs4:14 Se tsamaye tseleng tsa ba kgopo, se tsamaye tseleng ya baetsadibe." 
Proverbs4:15 E kgese, o be o e kwekwetle; e kgelohe, o ikele ka tsela ya hao." 
Proverbs4:16 Ha ba sa etse bokgopo ha ba robale, ba fadimehiswa ke takatso ya ho bolaya." 
Proverbs4:17 Ba ja bohobe ba bokgopo, ba nwe veine ya meferefere." 
Proverbs4:18 Tsela ya ba lokileng e ka mafube a meso, kganya ya yona e eketseha, ho fihlela hara mpa motsheare." 
Proverbs4:19 Tsela ya ba kgopo e ka fifi le letsho, ha ba tsebe se ba kgothometsang." 
Proverbs4:20 Mora wa ka, mamela mantswe ana a ka, o sekehele polelo tsa ka tsebe." 
Proverbs4:21 Polelo tsa ka o se di lebale, o di boloke ka pelong ya hao;" 
Proverbs4:22 ke bophelo ho ba di amohelang, di phedisa mmele ya bona hamonate." 
Proverbs4:23 Baballa pelo ya hao, e baballe ho feta tsohle, hobane ke yona diba sa bophelo." 
Proverbs4:24 Se bue leshano ka molomo wa hao, puo tse thetsang di se tswe ka hanong la hao." 
Proverbs4:25 Mahlo a hao a tadime kapele ho wena, dintshi tsa hao di se ke tsa panya." 
Proverbs4:26 Qamaka ka hloko moo o hatang teng, tsela tsohle tsa hao di tle di tsitse." 
Proverbs4:27 Se kgelohele ka ho le letona kapa ka ho le letshehadi, mehato ya hao e o phemise bokgopo." 
Proverbs5:1 Mora wa ka, ela bohlale ba ka hloko, thuto ya ka o e sekehele tsebe," 
Proverbs5:2 o tle o be le tlhalohanyo, molomo wa hao o rue tsebo." 
Proverbs5:3 Molomo wa mosadi wa sehlola o qhitsa dinotshi, leme la hae le borethe ho feta leokwana;" 
Proverbs5:4 qetellong le baba sa leshokgwa, le bohale sa sabole, sabole e mahalemabedi." 
Proverbs5:5 Maoto a hae a theohela lefung, mehato ya hae e lebisa lebitleng;" 
Proverbs5:6 tsela ya bophelo ha a re letho ka yona, metsamao ya hae e kgopametse moo a sa tsebeng." 
Proverbs5:7 Kahoo bana ba ka, mmameleng ke hona: Polelo tsa ka le se ke la di kgeloha;" 
Proverbs5:8 le tsamayeng tseleng tse hole, tse hole le sehlola, monyako wa ntlo ya sona le se o atamele," 
Proverbs5:9 esere matla a lona a itjellwa ke ba bang, dilemo tsa lona tsa fella ho ya sehloho," 
Proverbs5:10 ba bang ba ithabisa ka maruo a lona, mofufutso wa lona wa ruisa lapa lesele." 
Proverbs5:11 Qetello ya bophelo ba hao e tla ba mefehelo, ha mmele wa hao o motetse, o so le masatswane." 
Proverbs5:12 O tla re: “Ke ne ke hloile ho kgalengwa, ho ntshwa diphoso le hona ke ho hloile!" 
Proverbs5:13 Thuto tsa baruti ba ka ke ne ke sa di natse, balai ba ka le bona ke sa ba mamele." 
Proverbs5:14 Jwale ke fihlile dintshing tsa timelo, ke eme kahara phutheho yohle.”" 
Proverbs5:15 Jwale nwa metsi a diba sa ho tjhekwa ke wena, metsi a phallang a mohlodi wa hao." 
Proverbs5:16 O re bonna ba hao bo tsholohele ditseleng, matla a bona a hafakwe mabaleng?" 
Proverbs5:17 Eka kgona e be ba hao o le inotshi, o se ka bo abelana le ba bang." 
Proverbs5:18 Bonna ba hao bo ke bo hlohonolofale, o ithabise ka mosadi wa hao wa matswathaka," 
Proverbs5:19 ya ratehang sa tshepe, ya natlailang sa kgama; kamehla matswele a hae a o thabise, kamehla rato la hae le ke le o hohele." 
Proverbs5:20 Mora wa ka, ho ya kang ha sehlola se o hohela? O manamelang fubeng sa mosadi wa motho?" 
Proverbs5:21 Tsela tsohle tsa motho Morena o a di bona, metsamao yohle ya hae le yona o a e lekola." 
Proverbs5:22 Motho ya kgopo o tshwaswa ke makgopo a hae, dikgwele tsa dibe tsa hae di mo kgatele ruri." 
Proverbs5:23 O tla bolawa ke ho hloka kgalemo, tsela a e kgeloswe ke bothotohadi ba hae." 
Proverbs6:1 Mora wa ka, ha o itlamme ho lefa molato wa wa heno, wa hlapanyetsa e mong ho mo lefella," 
Proverbs6:2 polelo tsa hao di tla o tshwasa, mantswe a hao a o etsetse leraba." 
Proverbs6:3 Ha o rata ho itokolla, mora ka, kahobane o tla be o le matsohong, matsohong a mohaeno, etsa tjena: Eya, o ikokobetse ho yena, o mo rapele ho fihlela a o mamela." 
Proverbs6:4 O se ke wa robala, leha e le hona ho otsela." 
Proverbs6:5 Ipholose sa tshepe matsohong a setsomi, ipholose sa nonyana rabeng la motshwasi wa yona." 
Proverbs6:6 Hela! wena sekgoba, tsamaya o ye ho bohlwa! Hlahloba mekgwa ya bona, o tlo hlalefe!" 
Proverbs6:7 Leha bo se na motsamaisi, bo se na mmusi le mohlahlobi," 
Proverbs6:8 hlabula bo ipatlela dijo tsa bona, bo ipokellele tsona ha ho kotulwa." 
Proverbs6:9 Wena sekgoba, o tla robala ho fihlela neng? O tla tsoha neng borokong ba hao?" 
Proverbs6:10 O re: “A nke ke re shwa! ke boele ke re shwa! ke phuthaphuthe matsoho, ke iphomolele.”" 
Proverbs6:11 Fuma ba hao bo tla o nanarela, bo o nanarele jwaloka senokwane, tlala e o wele hodimo sa motho a nkile dihlomo." 
Proverbs6:12 Motho e mobe, ya kgopo, o tsamaya a fefetha leshano;" 
Proverbs6:13 o roba leihlo la hae, a ngolangole fatshe ka leoto, a qhwayaqhwaye ka monwana;" 
Proverbs6:14 o rera thetso ka pelong ya hae, kamehla o jala moferefere." 
Proverbs6:15 Koduwa e tla mo wela hodimo, e mo wele hodimo ka tsometso, a timetswe hanghang ho se na pheko." 
Proverbs6:16 Ntho di tsheletse, tseo Morena a di hloileng, e, di supile tseo e leng manyala ho yena:" 
Proverbs6:17 Ke mahlo a ikgohomosang, leleme le tletseng thetso, matsoho a tshollang madi, madi a se nang molato;" 
Proverbs6:18 pelo e rerang bokgopo, maoto a potlakelang bobeng;" 
Proverbs6:19 paki ya bohata, e bolelang leshano, le ya jalang diqabang hara bana ba motho." 
Proverbs6:20 Mora wa ka, boloka taelo tsa ntatao, o se furalle thuto ya mmao;" 
Proverbs6:21 di boloke ka pelong ya hao, di rwale molaleng wa hao." 
Proverbs6:22 Ha o tsamaya di tla o etella pele, ha o robala ebe di a o lebela, ha o tsoha ebe di bua le wena." 
Proverbs6:23 Taelo ke lona lebone, thuto ke lona lesedi, kgalemo ke bona bophelo," 
Proverbs6:24 ho o phemisa mosadi wa sehlola, le molomomonate wa seraburabu." 
Proverbs6:25 Pelo ya hao e se lakatse botle ba sona, mahlo a sona a se ka o hohela," 
Proverbs6:26 hoba seotswa, le ka sengwatho o ka se reka, athe sehlola sona se tsoma bophelo ba hao." 
Proverbs6:27 Na motho a ka okga mollo, a o okgela fubeng sa hae, ebe aparo tsa hae tsona ha di tuke malakabe?" 
Proverbs6:28 Na motho a ka tsamaya hodima mashala, ebe maoto a hae wona ha a tjhe?" 
Proverbs6:29 O jwalo ya kenang kobong tsa mosadi wa motho, ya amang mosadi, eo a ke ke a phema kahlolo!" 
Proverbs6:30 Shodu ha le utswa hoba le lapile, batho ha ba ke ba le nyedisa." 
Proverbs6:31 Ha le ka tshwarwa le tla lefa hasupa, le lefe ka tsohle tsa lapa la lona." 
Proverbs6:32 Motho ya febang o hloka kelello, ya etsang jwalo o timetsa bophelo ba hae;" 
Proverbs6:33 o tla batwa leoma a tlontlolohe, dihlong tsa hae di se ke tsa hlola di fela." 
Proverbs6:34 Poulelo e halefisa monga mosadi, ha a iphetetsa ha a qenehele letho;" 
Proverbs6:35 a ke ke a amohela tefo ya mofuta ofe le ofe, a ke ke a kgotsofatswa ke dimpho, leha mpho tseo di ka ba ngata." 
Proverbs7:1 Mora wa ka, boloka polelo tsa ka, o boloke taelo tsa ka, di boloke ka pelong ya hao." 
Proverbs7:2 Boloka taelo tsa ka o tle o phele, thuro tsa ka le tsona di hlokomele; di hlokomele seka thaka ya ihlo la hao." 
Proverbs7:3 Di tlamelle menwaneng ya hao, o di ngole tlapeng la pelo ya hao." 
Proverbs7:4 Ere ho bohlale: “Wena kgaitsedi,” kutlwisiso yona e bitse motswalle wa hao." 
Proverbs7:5 Di tla o phemisa mosadi, mosadi wa sehlola, mosadi ya ekang ka dipolelo." 
Proverbs7:6 Fesetereng ya ntlo ya ka ka tadima ka mamatjana a yona. 
Proverbs7:7 Ka tadima hara ba se nang tsebo, ka bona mohlankana ya hlokang kutlwisiso," 
Proverbs7:8 a feta pela huku ya seterata, a tsamaya ka tsela e yang ha sehlola;" 
Proverbs7:9 e le ka shwalane, tsatsi le se le diketse, fifi la bosiu le qala ho aparela." 
Proverbs7:10 Mosadi a betseha ho mo kgahlanyetsa, a apere jwaloka seotswa, ka maqheka a sona." 
Proverbs7:11 O manganga, ke mmadiberwane, ke pheka-ke-leoto, ha a dule hae;" 
Proverbs7:12 ere a le seterateng, a be a se a le mabaleng, a qatjhama jwalo hukung tsa diterata." 
Proverbs7:13 A mamarela mohlankana enwa, a mo aka, ka fahleho se hlokang tlhong a re ho yena:" 
Proverbs7:14 “Kajeno ke entse nyehelo ya ka, kano tsa ka kajeno ke di phethile, ke na le dijo tsa nyehelo eo, ke na le tsona ha ka;" 
Proverbs7:15 ke tlile tjena ho o kgahlanyetsa, kgale ke o batla, jwale ke o fumane!" 
Proverbs7:16 Hodima moalo wa ka ke adile masela a lene, lene e mebalabala e tswang Egepeta." 
Proverbs7:17 Ke nonoditse moalo wa ka ka mmira, ka o nonotsa ka lekgala le sinamone." 
Proverbs7:18 Tloo, re kgotsofatse rato la rona ho fihlela bo esa, re ithabise ka ho mamarelana." 
Proverbs7:19 Hae mona monna wa ka ha a yo, o nkile leeto, o ile hole." 
Proverbs7:20 O nkile mokotlana o tletse tjhelete, o tla kgutlela hae kgwedi e tolokile.”" 
Proverbs7:21 Ka puo tsa lehelehele lena mohlankana a ineela, ka molomo wa lona o ekang, mohlankana a hapeha." 
Proverbs7:22 Ka ho panya ha ntshi mohlankana a le sala morao, a le latela sa pholo e iswa tlhabong, sa kgama e tlolela ka lemeneng;" 
Proverbs7:23 sa nonyana e tshwaswa ke raba le tjhehilwe, e sa tsebe hore jwale e ya lefung, ho fihlela ha motsu o e phunya sebete." 
Proverbs7:24 Jwale bana ba ka mmameleng, sekehelang polelo tsa ka tsebe." 
Proverbs7:25 Pelo tsa lona di se latele mekgwa ya seotswa, le se tsamaye mehlaleng ya sona." 
Proverbs7:26 Mahlatsipa a mangata se a entse mofela, tshwele la ba bolailweng ke sona ha le na palo." 
Proverbs7:27 Ntlo ya sona ke tsela e isang lebitleng, ke mmila o isang Nqalong ya Bafu." 
Proverbs8:1 Na ebe bohlale ha bo howe? Kutlwisiso yona ha e phahamise ntswe la yona? 
Proverbs8:2 Bo eme tseleng tse phahameng, bo eme mateanong a ditsela." 
Proverbs8:3 Bo howeletsa bo le kgorong tsa motse, bo howeletsa bo le monyako wa motse:" 
Proverbs8:4 “Banna, mamelang, ke bitsa lona, ke ipiletsa ho batho bohle." 
Proverbs8:5 Lona ba se nang tsebo ithuteng bohlale! Lona dithoto batlang kutlwisiso! 
Proverbs8:6 Theang tsebe ke le bolelle tsa bohlokwa, ke le phatlalletse tse lokileng." 
Proverbs8:7 Ke tla bua nnete feela, hobane bokgopo ke bo hloile." 
Proverbs8:8 Polelo tsohle tsa ka ke tsa nnete, thetso le bomenemene ha di yo ho tsona," 
Proverbs8:9 di utlwahala tsohle ho ya nang le kelello, di nepahetse tsohle ho ba nang le tsebo." 
Proverbs8:10 Inkeleng thuto ya ka ho ena le silefera, ikgetheleng tsebo ho ena le kgauta." 
Proverbs8:11 “Bohlale bo molemo ho feta mabenyane a bohlokwa, ha ho letho le ka bapiswang le bona." 
Proverbs8:12 Nna, Bohlale, ke fana le ka masene, tsebo le tlhalohanyo le tsona ke di ruile." 
Proverbs8:13 Ho tshaba Morena ke ho hloya bobe, ke hloile boikgohomoso, ke hloile le boikakaso, boitshwaro bo bobe le leshano le tsona ke di hloile." 
Proverbs8:14 Boeletsi le ho ba sedi le tsona ke tsa ka, kutlwisiso le matla le tsona ke tsa ka." 
Proverbs8:15 Ke ka nna kgosi di tsebang ho rena, le babusi ba etsang melao e lokileng." 
Proverbs8:16 Ke ka nna mahosi le mahosana a tsebang ho busa, le baahlodi bohle ba tsebang ho ahlola." 
Proverbs8:17 Ba nthatang le nna ke a ba rata, ba mpatlang bona ba tla mphumana." 
Proverbs8:18 Ho nna maruo le tlotla di teng, maruo a sa feleng le hona ho loka." 
Proverbs8:19 Tholwana ya ka e kgahleha ho feta kgauta, e feta kgauta e hlwekisitsweng, tse fumanwang ho nna di feta silefera e hlwekisitsweng." 
Proverbs8:20 Ke tsamaya tseleng ya toka, tsela ya ka ke tsela ya molao." 
Proverbs8:21 Ba nthatang ke ba abela lefa, matlole a bona ke a tlatse, a be mohlohlo." 
Proverbs8:22 “Morena o mpopile qalehong ya mesebetsi ya hae, pele ho mesebetsi ya hae, mesebetsi ya kgalekgale;" 
Proverbs8:23 ke hlodilwe kgale, pele ho mehla yohle, ke hlodilwe tshimolohong, fatshe le eso be teng." 
Proverbs8:24 Ka tswalwa pele mawatle a eba teng, didiba tse kollang di eso ka di runya;" 
Proverbs8:25 ka tswalwa thaba di eso ka di thewa, ka tswalwa le maralla a eso be teng," 
Proverbs8:26 pele fatshe le eba teng le masimo a lona, pele role la lefatshe le lona le eba teng." 
Proverbs8:27 Ke ne ke le teng ha a bea mahodimo bakeng sa wona, a seha moedi wa loapi, a o seha hodima mawatle;" 
Proverbs8:28 ha a etsa lenamola la maru, a le etsa sepakapakeng, a phunya mehlodi ya madiba a e tsitsisa;" 
Proverbs8:29 ha a sehela lewatle moedi wa lona, metsi a se ke a tlola taelo ya hae; le ha a rala metheo ya lefatshe." 
Proverbs8:30 Ke ne ke le tsoho la hae le letona, ka matsatsi wohle ke mo thabisa, ke nyakaletse ke le kapele ho yena;" 
Proverbs8:31 ke thabetse lefatshe e le la hae, ke thabetse le batho a ba bopile." 
Proverbs8:32 “Jwale, bana ba ka, mmameleng! Ho lehlohonolo ba tsamayang tseleng tsa ka." 
Proverbs8:33 Mamelang thuto ya ka le tle le hlalefe, le se ke la hana ho e mamela." 
Proverbs8:34 Ho lehlohonolo motho ya mmamelang. ya lebelang kamehla menyakong ya ka, ya kokomalang thuleng la ntlo ya ka." 
Proverbs8:35 Ya mphumanang o fumana bophelo, Morena o tla mo rekolohela." 
Proverbs8:36 Ya sa mphumaneng o ipea kotsing, bohle ba ntlhoileng bona ba rata lefu.”" 
Proverbs9:1 Bohlale bo hahile ntlo ya bona, ba hloma ditshiya tsa yona, ba di hloma di supile;" 
Proverbs9:2 ba hlaba dikgomo, ba ritela veine, tafoleng ya bona ba bea mapetle." 
Proverbs9:3 Bo romme makgabunyane a bona ho ya howa a le qhoweng ya motse: 
Proverbs9:4 “Bohle ba se nang tsebo ba ke ba tle kwano!” Le ho ba hlokang kelello bo re: 
Proverbs9:5 “Tloong le tlo ja, le itjelle dijo tsa ka, le inwelle veine eo ke e ritetseng." 
Proverbs9:6 Furallang ba se nang tsebo le tle le phele, le tsamaye tseleng ya kutlwisiso." 
Proverbs9:7 “Ya layang mosomi o ipiletsa mahlapa, ya kgalemang ya kgopo o ipiletsa ho tlontloloha." 
Proverbs9:8 Se kgaleme mosomi, esere a o hloya, kgalema ya bohlale, yena o tla o rata." 
Proverbs9:9 Rupela mohlalefi a tla hlalefe haholo, o rute ya lokileng a eketse thuto ya hae." 
Proverbs9:10 “Ho tshaba Morena ke qaleho ya bohlale, ho tseba Ya Halalelang ke yona kutlwisiso." 
Proverbs9:11 Ke ka nna bohlale tshiu tsa hao di tla anafala, lemo tsa bophelo ba hao di lelefatswe." 
Proverbs9:12 Haeba o le bohlale, bohlale ba hao bo tla o putsa, haeba o le mosomi, molato e tla ba wa hao.”" 
Proverbs9:13 Bothoto bo ka mosadi, mosadi ya lerata haholo: Ha a tsebe letho, ke tseketseke." 
Proverbs9:14 O kokomala monyako wa ntlo ya hae, tulong se beilweng qhoweng, sa bewa qhoweng ya motse." 
Proverbs9:15 O emeletse ho bitsa, ho bitsa bo-mofeta-ka-tsela, ba ikelang ka tsela tsa bona." 
Proverbs9:16 O re: “Kenang le mona lona ba se nang tsebo!” O rialo ho ba hlokang kelello. 
Proverbs9:17 “Metsi a utsuwang a monate haholo, qhoqha e jelwang sephiring e a hlabosa!”" 
Proverbs9:18 Ya se nang tsebo ha a tsebe hore lefu le laletse moo, baeti ba mosadi eo ba feletse lebitleng." 
Proverbs10:1 Ana ke maele a Solomone: Ngwana ya bohlale o thabisa ntatae, ngwana ya sethoto ke masisapelo ho mmae." 
Proverbs10:2 Maruo a fumanweng ka bokgopo ha a na thuso, empa toka e lokolla motho lefung." 
Proverbs10:3 Ba lokileng Morena ha a ba bolaise tlala, takatso tsa ya kgopo o a di nyopisa." 
Proverbs10:4 Ya phuthileng matsoho o tla futsaneha, athe matsoho a kgothetseng a ruisa monga wona." 
Proverbs10:5 Ya bokellang dijo hlabula ke ngwana ya bohlale, ya robalang ha ho kotulwa o hlabisa dihlong." 
Proverbs10:6 Mahlohonolo a aparela ba lokileng, polelo tsa ya kgopo di kwetlile bosoro." 
Proverbs10:7 Ho hopolwa ha mofu ya lokileng ho lehlohonolo, empa bitso la ya kgopo le ke ke la hopolwa." 
Proverbs10:8 Ya bohlale o tla mamela molao pelong ya hae, sethoto se beberang sona se tla timela." 
Proverbs10:9 Motho wa nnete o tsamaya a sireletsehile, ya se nang nnete, yena o tla senolwa." 
Proverbs10:10 Ya iphapanyetsang phoso o baka moferefere, sethoto se beberang sona se tla timela." 
Proverbs10:11 Polelo tsa ya lokileng ke diba sa bophelo, athe tsa ya kgopo tsona di kwetlile bosoro." 
Proverbs10:12 Lehloyo le fehla moferefere, athe lerato lona le iphapanyetsa diphoso tsohle." 
Proverbs10:13 Bohlale bo fumanwa dipolelong tsa ya nang le kutlwisiso, empa thupa e kgalema ya se nang kutlwisiso." 
Proverbs10:14 Ba bohlale ba ipokellela tsebo, empa polelo tsa sethoto di isa timelong." 
Proverbs10:15 Morui o tshepile maruo a hae, mofutsana o timetswa ke bofuma ba hae." 
Proverbs10:16 Mesebetsi ya ba lokileng e ba tlisetsa bophelo, empa ya ba kgopo e ba hulela sebeng." 
Proverbs10:17 Ya mamelang ha a kgalengwa o tseleng ya bophelo, empa ya sa mameleng, yena o a kgeloha." 
Proverbs10:18 Ya patang lehloyo ke mothetsi, ya sebang ba bang, yena ke sethoto." 
Proverbs10:19 Ya buang haholo sebe se teng polelong tsa hae, ya sa buabueng yena ke motho ya bohlale." 
Proverbs10:20 Polelo tsa ya lokileng ke silefera e hlwekisitsweng, pelo ya ya kgopo ha e na thuso." 
Proverbs10:21 Polelo tsa ba lokileng di ruta ba bangata, thoto tsona di shwa ke ho hloka kutlwisiso." 
Proverbs10:22 Hlohonolo la Morena le entsha motho, ha ho maswabi ao le a tlisang." 
Proverbs10:23 Sethoto se thabela ho etsa bobe, ya nang le kutlwisiso o thabela bohlale." 
Proverbs10:24 Se tshajwang ke ya kgopo se tla mo wela hodimo, empa takatso ya ya lokileng e tla phethahatswa." 
Proverbs10:25 Sefefo se sheshena ya kgopo se ye le yena, motheo wa ya lokileng o hlola kamehla yohle." 
Proverbs10:26 Jwalokaha asene e thellisa meno a motho, mosi le wona o llisa mahlo a motho, sekgoba se jwalo ho ba se romang." 
Proverbs10:27 Ho tshaba Morena ho lelefatsa phelo ba motho, empa lemo tsa ba kgopo di tla kgutsufatswa." 
Proverbs10:28 Letshepa la ba lokileng le hlahisa thabo, athe la ba kgopo lona le a nyamela." 
Proverbs10:29 Tsela ya Morena ke tshabelo sa ba lokileng, empa ba kgopo bona e a ba timetsa." 
Proverbs10:30 Ya lokileng a ke ke a sisinyeha, empa ba kgopo ba tla fela lefatsheng." 
Proverbs10:31 Molomong wa ya lokileng ho tswa bohlale, leme le kgopameng le tla pongwa." 
Proverbs10:32 Ya lokileng o bua puo tse thabisang, athe ya kgopo o tseba ho sokamisa ditaba." 
Proverbs11:1 Morena o hloile sekala se qhekanyetsang, empa boima bo nepahetseng bona bo a mo thabisa." 
Proverbs11:2 Boikakaso bo etella dihlong pele, boikokobetso bona bo tsamaya le bohlale." 
Proverbs11:3 Ba tshepahalang ba tataiswa ke botshepehi ba bona, ba sa tshepahaleng bona ba timela, ba timetswa ke ho se tshepahale ha bona." 
Proverbs11:4 Kgalefo ya Modimo e ke ke ya fediswa, ya fediswa ke maruo a motho, empa ho loka ho lopolla motho lefung." 
Proverbs11:5 Ho loka ha ba se nang molato ho lokisa tsela tsa bona, ba kgopo ba timetswa ke bokgopo ba bona." 
Proverbs11:6 Ho loka ha ba lokileng ho a ba lopolla, ba hlokang botshepehi ba tshwaswa ke ditakatso, takatso tsa bona tse mpe." 
Proverbs11:7 Ha ya kgopo a eshwa, tshepo ya hae e a fela, maruo ao a neng a a tshepile le wona a a fela." 
Proverbs11:8 Ya lokileng o pholoswa tsietseng ya hae, ebe ya kgopo yena o wela ho yona." 
Proverbs11:9 Polelo tsa ya kgopo di timetsa mohahabo, empa ya lokileng yena o pholoswa ke tsebo." 
Proverbs11:10 Ha ba lokileng ba atleha motse o a nyakalla, ha ba kgopo ba timela, hara motse ke medidietsane." 
Proverbs11:11 Ho hlohonolofatswa ha ba lokileng ho haha motse, athe leme la ya kgopo lona le a o timetsa." 
Proverbs11:12 Sethoto se nyedisa mohahabo sona, empa ya nang le kutlwisiso yena ke lethola." 
Proverbs11:13 Ya ratang ditshebo o hlahatsa makunutu, ya tshepahalang yena o na le sefuba." 
Proverbs11:14 Tjhaba se hlokang botsamaisi se a lahleha, se nang le baeletsi ba bangata se a bolokeha." 
Proverbs11:15 Ya itlamang ka molato wa motho o a itsietsa, ya hanang ho itlama o iphemisa kotsi." 
Proverbs11:16 Mosadi ya mosa o kgaba ka hlompho, banna ba dikgoka ba ikgapela maruo." 
Proverbs11:17 Monna ya mohau o iketsetsa tse molemo, athe ya sehloho yena o a itshitelwa." 
Proverbs11:18 Motho ya kgopo o amohela moputso wa bolotsana, ya jalang ho loka o kotula moputso wa nnete." 
Proverbs11:19 Motho ya lokileng o tla rua bophelo, ya pheeletseng bobe yena o tla timela." 
Proverbs11:20 Morena o hloile ba pelo di kgopo, empa o thabela ba metsamao e lokileng." 
Proverbs11:21 Ruri ba kgopo ba tla ahlolwa, ba lokileng bona ba pheme kahlolo." 
Proverbs11:22 Mosadi ya hlokang boitshwaro leha a le motle, o jwaloka sale la kgauta nkong ya kolobe." 
Proverbs11:23 Ya lokileng o lakatsa tse molemo, ya kgopo yena o emetswe ke kgalefo." 
Proverbs11:24 E mong o fana haholo, leruo le mo atele, e mong e be lekgonatha, bofuma bo mo aparele." 
Proverbs11:25 Ya fanang haholo o tla fumana katleho, ya fanang ka metsi le yena o tla a fuwa." 
Proverbs11:26 Ya hanang ho rekisa koro batho ba a mo rohaka, empa ya ba rekisetsang yena o a hlohonolofala." 
Proverbs11:27 Ya pheellang tse molemo o tla hauhelwa, ya pheellang bobe bo tla mo wela hodimo." 
Proverbs11:28 Ya tshepang maruo a hae o tla timela, ya lokileng o atleha jwaloka hlaku le letalana." 
Proverbs11:29 Ya hlorisang lapa la hae a ke ke a rua letho, sethoto se tla fetoha kgoba la ya bohlale." 
Proverbs11:30 Tholwana ya ho loka ke sefate sa bophelo, ya bohlale yena o hapa meya ya batho." 
Proverbs11:31 Ya lokileng o tla fumana moputso a sa phela, ya kgopo le moetsadibe le bona ba tla putswa." 
Proverbs12:1 Ya ratang ho lauwa o rata tsebo, ya hloileng ho kgalengwa ke phoofolo ya naha;" 
Proverbs12:2 ya lokileng Morena o a mo hauhela, ya merero e mebe yena o a mo ahlola." 
Proverbs12:3 Bokgopo ha bo ke be bo bope motho, ba lokileng bona ba ke ke ba sisinngwa." 
Proverbs12:4 Mosadi ya lokileng ke moqhaka ho monna wa hae, ya hlabisang dihlong yena ke mofetshe, ke mofetshe o jang monna hae masapo." 
Proverbs12:5 Merero ya ya lokileng e nepahetse, keletso tsa ya kgopo di tletse thetso." 
Proverbs12:6 Polelo tsa ya kgopo ke maraba a ho bolaya, empa tsa ya lokileng tsona di a pholosa." 
Proverbs12:7 Ho hlolwa ha ba kgopo ke ho fela ha bona, athe lapa la ya lokileng lona le tiya kamehla." 
Proverbs12:8 Motho o babatswa ka baka la bohlale ba hae, empa ya pelo e kgopo yena o a nyediswa." 
Proverbs12:9 Ho molemo ho nyatswa o ena le kgoba le le leng, ho ena le ho hlomphuwa o bolawa ke tlala." 
Proverbs12:10 Ya lokileng o baballa phoofolo ya hae, mohau wa ya kgopo o kwetlile sehloho." 
Proverbs12:11 Ya lemang masimo a hae o tla tjhaya haholo, ya pheellang mafeela yena o hloka kelello." 
Proverbs12:12 Ya kgopo o labalabela qhoqha ya mahahapa, empa ya lokileng yena o a atleha." 
Proverbs12:13 Motho ya kgopo puo tse mpe tsa hae di a mo kgata, empa ya lokileng yena o phema tsietsi." 
Proverbs12:14 Motho e mong o atlehiswa ke dipuo tsa hae, athe e mong o putswa ho ya ka mesebetsi ya hae." 
Proverbs12:15 Tsela ya sethoto e bonahala e lokile ho sona, empa ya bohlale o amohela keletso." 
Proverbs12:16 Sethoto se sitwa ho itshwara ha se halefa, empa ya bohlale o iphapanyetsa dikgopiso." 
Proverbs12:17 Paki ya sebele e bua nnete eo e e tsebang, empa ya bohata yona e bua leshano." 
Proverbs12:18 Polelo tsa ya phasolohang di hlaba jwaloka sabole, leleme la ya bohlale lona le a fodisa." 
Proverbs12:19 Polelo tsa nnete di hlola kamehla, athe leshano ha le na mokoka." 
Proverbs12:20 Pelong tsa ba rerang bobe ho tletse thetso, empa tsa ba rerang kgotso tsona di tletse thabo." 
Proverbs12:21 Ba lokileng ba ke ke ba hlahelwa ke ditsietsi, empa ba kgopo ba tla aparelwa ke bobe." 
Proverbs12:22 Morena o hloile motho ya buang leshano, empa ya buang nnete yena o a mo thabisa." 
Proverbs12:23 Mohlalefi ha a boledisake tsebo ya hae, sethoto sona se pepesa bothoto ba sona." 
Proverbs12:24 Ya sebetsang ka thata ke yena ya tla busa, empa sekgoba sona se tla fetoha lekgoba." 
Proverbs12:25 Ho feha matshwafo ho nyahamisa pelo ya motho, polelo e monate yona e a e thoba." 
Proverbs12:26 Ya lokileng ke mohlala ho ba ahisaneng le yena, ba kgopo ba tsamaya tseleng e kgelosang." 
Proverbs12:27 Sekgoba se kgutla tsholong se itlhophere, athe tjhai ya sehwai e sasamatsa disiu." 
Proverbs12:28 Tsela tse lokileng di isa bophelong, di kutlehile hantle, ha di ise timelong." 
Proverbs13:1 Mora ya bohlale o mamela thuto ya ntatae, empa moikakasi ha a natse kgalemo." 
Proverbs13:2 Motho o kgola tholwana tse monate, tholwana tsa dipuo tsa hae, ya sa tshepahaleng yena o lapetse mahahapa." 
Proverbs13:3 Ya tshwarang leme la hae o baballa bophelo ba hae, ya phasolohang feela yena o tla timela," 
Proverbs13:4 Sekgoba se a lakatsa, empa ha se fumane letho, sekgothadi se a atleha, se kgotsofatswa ke tsohle." 
Proverbs13:5 Motho ya lokileng o hloile leshano, ya kgopo ha a na dihlong, o a swabisa." 
Proverbs13:6 Toka e sireletsa ya lokileng, bokgopo bona bo kudupanya baetsadibe." 
Proverbs13:7 E mong o iketsa morui, a se na letho, e mong a iketse mofutsana, a hafa ka nkatana." 
Proverbs13:8 Bophelo ba motho bo ka lopollwa ka maruo a hae, mofumanehi yena ha a ke a sokelwa ke motho." 
Proverbs13:9 Lebone la ya lokileng le tuka haholo, empa bone la ya kgopo lona le tla tingwa." 
Proverbs13:10 Dikgang di hlahiswa ke boikakaso, bohlale bo fumanwa ho ba mamelang dikeletso." 
Proverbs13:11 Maruo a bolotsana a tla fela hang, a kolletswang kahanyane wona a a eketseha." 
Proverbs13:12 Tshepo e sa phethahaleng e nyahamisa pelo, takatso tse phethahatswang di ka fate sa bophelo." 
Proverbs13:13 Ya nyefolang dikeletso o tla timela, ya bolokang molao o tla amohela moputso." 
Proverbs13:14 Thuto ya ya bohlale ke sediba sa bophelo, e phemisa motho maraba a lefu." 
Proverbs13:15 Kelello e tjhatsi ho bohle e a kgahleha, tsela ya ba sa tshepahaleng e isa timelong." 
Proverbs13:16 Motho ya bohlale o sebetsa ka kelello, sethoto sona se pepesa bothoto ba sona." 
Proverbs13:17 Leqosa le kgopo le welwa ke ditsietsi, moromuwa ya tshepahalang o tlisa tse molemo." 
Proverbs13:18 Bofuma le dihlong di wela ya hanang kgalemo, tlotla e aparela ya sa haneng ho nyatsuwa." 
Proverbs13:19 Se labalabelwang ha se fihletswe se a thabisa, dithoto tsona ha di rate ho tela bobe." 
Proverbs13:20 Ya tsamayang le bahlalefi o a hlalefa, molekane wa dithoto yena o a thotofala." 
Proverbs13:21 Bobe bo salama baetsadibe, ba lokileng bona ba putswa ka tse molemo." 
Proverbs13:22 Monna ya lokileng o siela tloholo tsa hae lefa, leruo la moetsadibe ke lefa la ba lokileng." 
Proverbs13:23 Masimong a mofutsana tjhai e ba ngata, ba hlokang toka bona ba a e fedisa." 
Proverbs13:24 Motho ya sa shapeng mora hae o mo hloile, athe ya ratang mora hae yena o a mo kgalema." 
Proverbs13:25 Ya lokileng o a ja, a ikgotsofatse, empa ya kgopo yena o ngongorehela dijo." 
Proverbs14:1 Mosadi ya bohlale o haha lapa la hae, empa ya sethoto o le qhala ka matsoho a hae." 
Proverbs14:2 Motho ya lokileng o tshaba Morena, empa ya kgopo yena o nyedisa Morena." 
Proverbs14:3 Polelo tsa sethoto di se otlela boikgantsho, empa tsa ba bohlale tsona di a ba sireletsa." 
Proverbs14:4 Moo kgomo di leng siyo sejelo ha se na letho, tjhai e ba ngata ka matla a dipholo." 
Proverbs14:5 Paki e tshepahalang ha e ke e thetsa, empa ya bohata yona e bua leshano." 
Proverbs14:6 Mosomi o batla bohlale, empa ha a bo fumane, ya nang le kutlwisiso tsebo o e fumana habonolo." 
Proverbs14:7 Sutha pela sethoto, hobane ho sona tsebo ha e yo." 
Proverbs14:8 Ya bohlale o tseba ho kgetha tsela ya hae, sethoto se ithetsa ka bothoto ba sona." 
Proverbs14:9 Dithoto di tadima sebe e le papadi, ba lokileng ba tseba molemo wa poelano." 
Proverbs14:10 Motho o tseba bohloko ba pelo ya hae, ha ho e mong ya ka utlwang thabo ya yona." 
Proverbs14:11 Ntlo ya ya kgopo e tla heletswa, leaho la ya lokileng lona le tla atleha." 
Proverbs14:12 Tsela e teng e bonahalang e lokile ho monga yona, empa e qetella ka ho isa lefung." 
Proverbs14:13 E mong o tsheha a ntsa hlomohile, tsheho la hae le qetelle ka maswabi." 
Proverbs14:14 Motho ya kgopo o ahlolelwa melato ya hae, ya lokileng yena o putsetswa diketso tsa hae." 
Proverbs14:15 Kamehla ya se nang tsebo ke tumelakgweela, empa ya bohlale eka kgona a ikgodise." 
Proverbs14:16 Motho ya bohlale o tshaba bobe, o a bo ila, empa sethoto se a tlatselela, se a itshepa." 
Proverbs14:17 Motho ya halefang kapele o etsa bothoto, ya nang le mehopolo e mebe batho ba a mo hloya." 
Proverbs14:18 Lefa la ba se nang tsebo ke bothoto, athe moqhaka wa ba bohlale ke tsebo." 
Proverbs14:19 Ba kgopo ba kgumama kapela ba lokileng, baetsadibe bona kapela kgoro tsa ba lokileng." 
Proverbs14:20 Mafutsana a hloilwe le ke ba ahisaneng le wona, empa barui ba na le metswalle e mengata." 
Proverbs14:21 Ya nyedisang ya ahisaneng le yena o etsa sebe, empa ho lehlohonolo ya hauhelang mofutsana." 
Proverbs14:22 Ba rerang bobe ba a lahleha, empa ba rerang botle ba fumana mohau le nnete." 
Proverbs14:23 Mesebetsi yohle e na le moputso wa yona, empa ho berabera hona ho a futsanehisa." 
Proverbs14:24 Meqhaka ya ba bohlale ke maruo a bona, bothoto ba dithoto bona bo tswala bothoto." 
Proverbs14:25 Paki ya nnete e pholosa batho, athe ya bohata yona e bua leshano." 
Proverbs14:26 Ya tshabang Morena o na le qhobosheane, bana ba hae ba fumana setshabelo." 
Proverbs14:27 Ho tshaba Morena ke sediba sa bophelo. ya mo tshabang o phema maraba a lefu. 
Proverbs14:28 Tlotla ya kgosi ke ho busa tjhaba se le sengata, athe kgosana e timela ke ho hloka setjhaba." 
Proverbs14:29 Ya diehang ho halefa o na le kutlwisiso, athe sefelapelwana se bontsha bothoto." 
Proverbs14:30 Pelo e nang le kgotso e phedisa motho hantle, empa mona o bodisa masapo a motho." 
Proverbs14:31 Ya hatellang mofutsana o nyedisa Mmopi wa hae, empa ya mo hauhelang yena o tlotla Modimo." 
Proverbs14:32 Ya kgopo o fediswa ke bokgopo ba hae, ya lokileng o na le letshepa, esita le lefung la hae." 
Proverbs14:33 Ya nang le kutlwisiso o ruile bohlale, le hara dithoto bo a itotobatsa." 
Proverbs14:34 Ho loka ho atlehisa setjhaba, empa sebe ke sekgobo ho sona." 
Proverbs14:35 Kgosi e kgahlwa ke mohlanka ya bohlale, athe ya hlabisang dihlong yena e a mo halefela." 
Proverbs15:1 Ya arabang ka boikokobetso o tima kgalefo, empa polelo e kgahlapetsang e baka bohale." 
Proverbs15:2 Leme la ya bohlale le ratisa batho tsebo, empa molomo wa sethoto o kopotsa bothoto." 
Proverbs15:3 Mahlo a Modimo a bona kahohle, a disa ba kgopo le ba lokileng." 
Proverbs15:4 Leme le thabisang ke fate sa bophelo, empa le thetsang le senya pelo ya motho." 
Proverbs15:5 Sethoto se nyedisa thuto ya ntata sona, athe ya ratang kgalemo yena o a hlalefa." 
Proverbs15:6 Ka tlung ya ya lokileng leruo le teng, empa ya kgopo leruo le mmakela ditsietsi." 
Proverbs15:7 Molomo wa ya bohlale o jala tsebo, pelo ya ya sethoto yona e mpe." 
Proverbs15:8 Mahlabelo a ya kgopo ke manyala ho Morena, empa thapelo ya ya lokileng e a mo kgahla." 
Proverbs15:9 Ditsela tsa ya kgopo ke manyala ho Morena, ya labalabelang ho loka yena o a mo rata." 
Proverbs15:10 Ya kgelohang tsela o tla otlwa haholo, ya hloileng kgalemo yena o tla timela." 
Proverbs15:11 Morena o tseba tse ka Nqalong ya Bafu, le tse ka ho ya Timelo o a di tseba, a ka sitwa keng ho tseba makunutu a batho?" 
Proverbs15:12 Mosomi yena o hloile kgalemo, le ho ba bohlale a ke ke a batla keletso." 
Proverbs15:13 Pelo ha e thabile sefahleho se kganya kgotso, empa ha e hlomohile motho o utlwa bohloko." 
Proverbs15:14 Ya nang le kutlwisiso o labalabela tsebo, athe dithoto tsona di labalabela bothoto." 
Proverbs15:15 Ya tshwenngwang o phela habohloko ka nako tsohle, ya thabileng yena o keteka kamehla." 
Proverbs15:16 Sejosenyane se molemo ha o tshaba Morena, ho ena le maruo a o bakelang ditsietsi." 
Proverbs15:17 Ho molemo ho ja moroho o fanwang ka lerato, ho ena le matshufu a fanwang ka lehloyo." 
Proverbs15:18 Motho ya bohale o baka diqabang, ya nang le mamello yena o a di fedisa." 
Proverbs15:19 Tsela ya sekgoba e ririellane meutlwa, athe ya ya lokileng yona e bataletse hantle." 
Proverbs15:20 Ngwana ya bohlale o thabisa ntatae, empa sethoto sona se nyedisa le mma sona." 
Proverbs15:21 Ya hlokang bohlale o thabiswa ke bothoto, ya nang le kutlwisiso yena o etsa ho lokileng." 
Proverbs15:22 Ya sa rateng dikeletso merero ya hae e a nyopa, ya eletswang ke ba bangata yena o a atleha." 
Proverbs15:23 Karabo e nepahetseng e thabisa monga yona, e tlang ka nako ya yona e molemo hakaakang!" 
Proverbs15:24 Ho ya bohlale tsela ya bophelo ke e yang hodimo, ho mo phemisa ho theohela lebitleng." 
Proverbs15:25 Morena o timetsa lapa la moikgantshi, empa o sireletsa moedi wa lapa la mohlolohadi." 
Proverbs15:26 Mehopolo ya ya kgopo ke manyala ho Morena, polelo tsa ya lokileng tsona di kgahlisa Morena." 
Proverbs15:27 Ya meharo o tlisetsa lapa la hae tsietsi, Ya hloileng tjotjo yena o tla phela." 
Proverbs15:28 Ya lokileng o inahana a eso arabe, molomong wa ya kgopo bokgopo bo a kopotsa." 
Proverbs15:29 Morena o emeletse thoko, thoko le ba kgopo, thapelo ya ba lokileng o e sekehela tsebe." 
Proverbs15:30 Ho tadima motho hantle ho thabisa pelo ya hae, taba tse molemo di mo tsosa molota." 
Proverbs15:31 Ya mamelang kgalemo e isang bophelong, o tla dula hamonate hara ba bohlale." 
Proverbs15:32 Ya sa natseng thuto o a inyedisa, empa ya mamelang kgalemo o ekeletswa kutlwisiso." 
Proverbs15:33 Ho tshaba Morena ho ruta motho bohlale; ikokobetse pele, mme o tla tlotlwa." 
Proverbs16:1 Pelo ya motho e rera merero, tseo a di buang di laolwa ke Morena." 
Proverbs16:2 Ketso tsa motho di tadimeha di lokile ho yena, empa Morena o lekola sepheo sa hae." 
Proverbs16:3 Bea mesebetsi ya hao atleng tsa Morena, mme merero ya hao e tla phethahala." 
Proverbs16:4 Tsohle Morena o di entse ka morero wa hae, le ya kgopo tsatsi la ditlokotsi le mo emetse." 
Proverbs16:5 Motho ya ikgantshang, Morena o a mo nyonya, ya jwalo Morena o tla mo ahlola." 
Proverbs16:6 Sebe se hlakolwa ke lerato le botshepehi; ya tshabang Morena bobe o tla bo phema. 
Proverbs16:7 Eo metsamao ya hae e kgahlang Morena, Morena o mo phedisa ka kgotso le dira tsa hae." 
Proverbs16:8 Sejosenyane se molemo ha se fumanwe ka toka, ho ena le maruo a fumanwang ka bolotsana." 
Proverbs16:9 Motho o itherela tsela ya hae, empa ke Morena ya mo tataisang." 
Proverbs16:10 Diqeto tsa kgosi di tswa ho Modimo, ha e ahlola e ahlola ka toka." 
Proverbs16:11 Tekanyo tse nepahetseng ke tsa Morena, majwe a supang boima a entswe ke yena." 
Proverbs16:12 Kgosi di nyatsa ketso tse manyala ho loka hona ho tsitsisa mmuso. 
Proverbs16:13 Molomo o buang tse lokileng o thabisa dikgosi, dikgosi di rata motho ya buang nnete." 
Proverbs16:14 Kgalefo ya kgosi e tshwana le ya tlisang pehi, empa ya bohlale o kokobetsa kgalefo." 
Proverbs16:15 Ho thaba ha kgosi ho a phedisa, mohau wa yona o ka leru la pula selemo." 
Proverbs16:16 Ho fumana bohlale ho molemo ho feta kgauta, ho fumana kutlwisiso ho molemo ho feta silefera." 
Proverbs16:17 Tsela ya ba lokileng e kgeloha bobe, ya e hlokomelang o baballa bophelo ba hae." 
Proverbs16:18 Boikakaso bo etella timelo pele, boikgohomoso bo etelle ho wa, pele." 
Proverbs16:19 Ho molemo ho ikokobetsa o le hara mafutsana, ho ena le ho arolelana kgapo le baikgohomosi." 
Proverbs16:20 Ya elang ditaelo hloko o a atleha, ya tshepang Morena o a hlohonolofala." 
Proverbs16:21 Ya bohlale ho thwe o na le kutlwisiso, polelo tse monate tsona di a kgodisa," 
Proverbs16:22 Bohlale ke diba sa bophelo ho ya nang le bona, ho ruta dithoto ke ho itshenyetsa nako." 
Proverbs16:23 Ya bohlale o hlalefiswa ke pelo ya hae, le seo a tla se bua o se rutwa ke yona." 
Proverbs16:24 Polelo tse monate di ka mahe a dinotshi, moyeng di a hlabosa, di matlafatse mmele." 
Proverbs16:25 Tsela e teng e bonahalang e lokile ho monga yona, empa e qetella ka ho isa lefung." 
Proverbs16:26 Sekgothadi se a itshebeletsa, se itshebeletsa ka thata, hobane se lakatsa ho ikgotsofatsa." 
Proverbs16:27 Senokwane se rera bobe, molomong wa sona ho tswa tse tjhesang sa malakabe." 
Proverbs16:28 Motho ya kgopo o duka kgotso, mosebi yena o qabanya metswalle, metswalle ya hlooho ya kgomo." 
Proverbs16:29 Motho ya dikgoka o hohela ya ahisaneng le yena, a mo tsamaise tseleng tse sa lokang," 
Proverbs16:30 Ya robang leihlo o rera bokgopo, ya petlang melomo bobe o sa bo entse." 
Proverbs16:31 Moriri o moputswa ke mofapahlooho o kgabane, o fumanwa ke ya phelang ka ho loka." 
Proverbs16:32 Ya nang le mamello o molemo ho feta ya dikgoka, ya itshwarang ha a halefile o feta ya hapang motse." 
Proverbs16:33 Batho ba laola ditaba ka lotho, empa diqeto tsona ke tsa Morena." 
Proverbs17:1 Ho molemo ho itjella dikokotwana, ho itjella tsona ka kgotso, ho ena le ho phela tlung e nang le kgora le diqabang." 
Proverbs17:2 Mohlanka ya masene a ka busa mora, a busa mora ya sethoto wa monga hae, a arolelwa lefa jwaloka bana ba monga hae." 
Proverbs17:3 Silefera e hlwekiswa ka ho qhibidiswa pitseng, kgauta yona e hlwekiswa ka sebopi sa yona; athe dipelo tsona di hlahlojwa ke Morena." 
Proverbs17:4 Ya etsang bokgopo o mamela polelo tsa leshano, ya leshano yena o mamela tsa bokgopo." 
Proverbs17:5 Ya somang mafutsana o soma Mmopi wa hae, ya thabelang tsietsi tsa e mong yena o tla otlwa." 
Proverbs17:6 Ditloholwana ke mofapahlooho, mofapahlooho a boraputswe, bana ba ithaba ka batswadi ba bona." 
Proverbs17:7 Sethoto ha se lokelwe ke puo tsa bokgeleke, puo ya leshano ha e lokele kgosana." 
Proverbs17:8 Tjotjo ke hakwe la bohlokwa, ke la bohlokwa ho mo-e-fani, e mo atlehisa ho tsohle tseo a di etsang." 
Proverbs17:9 Ya lalang diphoso ka mmele o qeka ho ratwa, athe ya di pepesang yena o senya setswalle." 
Proverbs17:10 Ya bohlale o phakisa ho amohela kgalemo, thoto ha se shapuwa halekgolo ha se mamele." 
Proverbs17:11 Motho ya kgopo o thabela meferefere, ya jwalo o romellwa leqosa, leqosa le sehloho." 
Proverbs17:12 Ho molemo ho kopana le bere e tshehadi, bere e nketsweng madinyane a yona, ho ena le ho kopana le sethoto se poqang bothotong ba sona." 
Proverbs17:13 Ya buseletsang botle ka bokgopo, bokgopo bo ke ke ba tloha lapeng la hae." 
Proverbs17:14 Qabang e qala jwaloka metsi a faposwa mosele, wena e kwekwetle e eso ka e kekela." 
Proverbs17:15 Ya lokollang ya kgopo le ya ahlolang ya lokileng, bobedi ba bona ke manyala ho Morena." 
Proverbs17:16 Thuso ke efe, ya ho nea sethoto tjhelete athe ha se na kutlwisiso ya ho reka bohlale?" 
Proverbs17:17 Motswalle o na le lerato kamehla, ngwanabo motho o tswaletswe ho thusa, ho thusa mohla tsatsi la ditsietsi." 
Proverbs17:18 Ya hlokang kelello o itlama ka ditshepiso, o itlama ho lefa melato ya ba bang." 
Proverbs17:19 Ya ratang diphapang o rata sebe, ya ikgohomosang o ipitsetsa timelo." 
Proverbs17:20 Motho ya pelo e kgopo ha a atlehe; ya leme le tletseng thetso o tla timela. 
Proverbs17:21 Ya tswalang sethoto o itswalla ditsietsi, ntata sethoto o hloka thabo." 
Proverbs17:22 Pelo e thabileng e tseba ho fodisa, empa moya o hlorileng o tepeletsa mmele." 
Proverbs17:23 Motho ya kgopo o amohela tjotjo sephiring, ka yona o kgopamisa ditsela tsa toka." 
Proverbs17:24 Bohlale bo mahlong a ya masene, mahlo a sethoto wona a thalatsa kahohle." 
Proverbs17:25 Mora ya sethoto o tlisa masisapelo ho ntatae, bohloko ba pelo ya mmae bo baba seka leshokgwa." 
Proverbs17:26 Ke phoso ho ahlola motho a se na molato, kapa ho otlela mahosana ho loka ha wona." 
Proverbs17:27 Ya nang le tsebo o tswara leme la hae, ya nang le kutlwisiso ha a ke a halefa." 
Proverbs17:28 Sethoto ha se kgutsitse ho thwe se hlalefile, se na le kutlwisiso ha se tshwara leme la sona." 
Proverbs18:1 Ya iketsang mokgelo o ithata boyena, tsohle tsa bohlale o hanyetsana le tsona." 
Proverbs18:2 Sethoto ha se thabele ho ba le kutlwisiso, se thabela ho pepesa mehopolo ya sona." 
Proverbs18:3 Bokgopo bo tsamaya le ho tella, dihlong di tsamaya le ho nyatseha." 
Proverbs18:4 Dipolelo tsa motho di ka bodiba, mohlodi wa bohlale e ka diba se runyarunyang." 
Proverbs18:5 Ha ho molemo ho bontsha leeme ho ba kgopo, ebe o sitisa ya lokileng ho ahlolelwa ka toka." 
Proverbs18:6 Leleme la sethoto le baka diqabang, polelo tsa sona di se memela ho shapuwa." 
Proverbs18:7 Sethoto se timetswa ke dipuo tsa sona, se tshwaswa ke leraba la polelo tsa sona." 
Proverbs18:8 Polelo tsa heletwane di a hlabosa, di theohela hamonate ka pelong ya motho." 
Proverbs18:9 Ya monyebe mosebetsing wa hae, yena ke ngwanabo sesenyi." 
Proverbs18:10 Lebitso la Morena ke qhobosheane, ya lokileng o tshabela teng, a sireletsehe." 
Proverbs18:11 Matlotlo a barui ke qhobosheane ya bona, ba hloma e ka ke marako a phahameng, a ba sireletsang." 
Proverbs18:12 Boikakaso bo etella timelo pele, boikokobetso bona bo tla pele ho tlotla." 
Proverbs18:13 Ya arabang a sa imamela hantle ke sethoto, o hlabisa dihlong." 
Proverbs18:14 Ya kulang o matlafatswa ke moya wa hae, moya o hlomohileng o ka phekolwa ke mang?" 
Proverbs18:15 Ya nang le kutlwisiso o fumana tsebo, tsebe ya ya bohlale e lethwethwe ho mo mamela." 
Proverbs18:16 Mpho e betlela mofani tsela, e mmee kapele ho mahosi a hae." 
Proverbs18:17 Moqosi ha a bua ka kgotla e ye e ke o bua nnete, ho fihlela ha moqosuwa a mo hloma dipotso." 
Proverbs18:18 Ha laola ka lotho ho fedisa diqabang, ho namole ba matla, ba lwantshanang." 
Proverbs18:19 Ngwanabo motho ha a kgenne o thata ho feta qhobosheane, qhobosheane e matla, diphapang tsona e ka mekwallo ya qhobosheane." 
Proverbs18:20 Motho o kotula seo a se jalang ka leme la hae, o kgotsofatswa ke polelo tsa molomo wa hae." 
Proverbs18:21 Leleme le ka phedisa, hape le ka bolaya, ba ratang ho hehla ba tla kotula tholwana tsa hona." 
Proverbs18:22 Ya inyaletseng mosadi wa sebele o lehlohonolo, ya jwalo Morena o mo hauhetse." 
Proverbs18:23 Mofumanehi o kopa mohau ka boikokobetso, morui ha a araba o moshashabetsa ka bohale." 
Proverbs18:24 Metswalle mmotwana e isa motho timelong, wa sebele yena o tshepahala ho feta ngwanabo motho." 
Proverbs19:1 Ho molemo ho ba mofutsana ya hlokang kodi, ho ena le ho ba sethoto se buang leshano." 
Proverbs19:2 Ho tjheseha motho a hloka tsebo ha ho na thuso, ho ba mahlahahlaha ho lahlisa motho tsela." 
Proverbs19:3 Bothoto ba motho bo timetsa bophelo ba hae, ka pelong ya hae a korotlele Morena." 
Proverbs19:4 Leruo le atisetsa motho metswalle, athe mofutsana o furallwa le ke metswalle." 
Proverbs19:5 Paki ya bohata e tla ahlolwa, ya buang leshano a ke ke a phonyoha." 
Proverbs19:6 Ba bangata ba qekisa ho ratwa ke kgosi, bohle ke metswalle ya ya fanang dimpho." 
Proverbs19:7 Mofutsana o hlouwa le ke ba habo, metswalle ya hae yona e mo kgesa hakaakang! Leha a re o ipiletsa ho bona, ha ho moo a ba bonang teng." 
Proverbs19:8 Ya ipatlelang bohlale o rata bophelo ba hae, ya nang le kelello, katleho ke ya hae." 
Proverbs19:9 Paki ya bohata e tla ahlolwa, ya buang leshano o tla timela." 
Proverbs19:10 Sethoto ha se lokele ho hafa ka nkatana, jwalokaha lekgoba le sa lokele ho busa mahosi." 
Proverbs19:11 Bohlale ba motho bo tswala mamello, ho iphapanyetsa diphoso ke yona tlotla ya hae." 
Proverbs19:12 Kgalefo ya kgosi e jwaloka tau ha e puruma, mohau wa yona o jwaloka phoka hodima jwang." 
Proverbs19:13 Mora ya sethoto o tlisetsa ntatae koduwa, komang tsa mosadi di ka metsi a rothang, ho ya ho ile ha pula e na." 
Proverbs19:14 Ntlo le maruo ke lefa le fumanwang ho bo-ntata, mosadi ya bohlale ke mpho ya Morena." 
Proverbs19:15 Botswa bo isa motho le sephume sa boroko, sekgoba sona se bolawa ke tlala." 
Proverbs19:16 Ya bolokang ditaelo o baballa bophelo ba hae, ya sa hlokomeleng metsamao ya hae o tla shwa." 
Proverbs19:17 Ya hauhelang bafumanehi o adima Morena, seo a faneng ka sona Morena o tla mmuseletsa sona." 
Proverbs19:18 Laya ngwana wa hao o sa na le tshepo, o se thohothellwe ho mmolaya." 
Proverbs19:19 Motho ya halefang haholo o tla otlwa, ha o mo pholosa o tla boela o pheta hape." 
Proverbs19:20 Sekehela keletso tsebe, o mamele ditaelo, e le hore qetellong o tle o hlalefe." 
Proverbs19:21 Merero e mengata ka pelong ya motho, empa wa Morena wona o hlola kamehla." 
Proverbs19:22 Meharo e hlabisa motho dihlong; ho molemo ho futsaneha ho ena le ho bua leshano. 
Proverbs19:23 Ho tshaba Morena ho a phedisa, ya nang le tshabo eo o tla phela ka boiketlo, bobe bo ke ke ba mo wela hodimo." 
Proverbs19:24 Tsoho la ya botswa le hanella ka sejaneng, o tswafa le ho le isa ka hanong la hae." 
Proverbs19:25 Shapa mosomi, ya se nang tsebo a tle a hlalefe; kgalema ya hlalefileng, yena o tla fumana tsebo." 
Proverbs19:26 Ya shapang ntatae, a phaladise mmae, ke ngwana ya hlabisang dihlong, ya tlontlollang." 
Proverbs19:27 Mora wa ka, ha o ka kgaotsa ho mamela ditaelo o tla kgeloha dithuto tsa bohlale." 
Proverbs19:28 Paki e kgopo e bapala ka toka, ya kgopo bokgopo bo a mo natefela." 
Proverbs19:29 Basomi ba emetswe ke kahlolo, mekokotlo ya dithoto yona e emetswe ke phafa." 
Proverbs20:1 Veine ke moikakasi, jwala bo baka lerata, ya kgeloswang ke tsona o hloka bohlale." 
Proverbs20:2 Kgalefo ya kgosi e jwaloka tau ha e puruma, ya halefisang kgosi o ipea tsietsing." 
Proverbs20:3 Ke tlotla ho kgaohana le diqabang, sethoto sona ke maratahelele!" 
Proverbs20:4 Sekgoba ha se ke se lema ka nako ya teng, ha ho kotulwa se a kopa, ha se fumane letho." 
Proverbs20:5 Pelong ya motho merero e ka metsi a bodiba, ya nang le kutlwisiso yena o a e fihlela." 
Proverbs20:6 Motho ka mong o ithorisa ka molemo wa hae, ya tshepahalang yena a ka fumanwa ke mang?" 
Proverbs20:7 Metsamao ya ya lokileng ha e na kodi, bana ba hae ba tla hlohonolofala." 
Proverbs20:8 Kgosi ha e dutse tulong sa yona sa kahlolo, ka mahlo a yona e tsheka bobe bohle." 
Proverbs20:9 Ke mang ya ka reng: “Ke hlwekisitse pelo ya ka, nna ke hlwekile ha ke na sebe?”" 
Proverbs20:10 Tekanyo tse pedi tse sa lekaneng, esita le boima bo sa lekaneng, bobedi ke manyala, ke manyala mahlong a Morena." 
Proverbs20:11 Ngwana o tsejwa ka ketso tsa hae, e ka ba tse ntle, e ka ba tse lokileng." 
Proverbs20:12 Tsebe e mamelang le leihlo le bonang, bobedi ba tsona di entswe ke Morena." 
Proverbs20:13 Se rate boroko, esere wa futsaneha; se robale, o tlo atelwe ke tjhai." 
Proverbs20:14 “Ha e a loka! Ha e a loka!” ho rialo moreki. Ha a furalla a tsamaye a ithorisa. 
Proverbs20:15 Kgauta e teng le mabenyane a bohlokwa a teng, empa molomo o bolelang tsebo ke lehakwe la bohlokwa." 
Proverbs20:16 Ya itlamang ka molato wa e mong, o mo nkele kobo ya hae, o e bee paneng ha a itlamme ka molato wa motho eo." 
Proverbs20:17 Dijo tse fumanweng ka bolotsana di monate ho motho, empa hamorao molomo wa hae o tlala lehlohlojane." 
Proverbs20:18 Rala merero ya hao ka ho batla keletso, ntwa o e lwane o se o fumane keletso." 
Proverbs20:19 Ya ratang ditshebo o hlahatsa makunutu, motho wa lehehle eka kgona o mo kwekwetle." 
Proverbs20:20 Haeba motho a rohaka ntatae kapa mmae, bone la hae le tla tingwa hoja ho le lefifi." 
Proverbs20:21 Leruo le bokellwang ka potlako sethathong, qetellong le ke ke la hlohonolofatswa." 
Proverbs20:22 Se ke wa re: “Bobe ke tla bo phetetsa ka bobe!” Lebella Morena, o tla o namolela." 
Proverbs20:23 Tekanyo tse pedi tse sa lekaneng ke manyala mahlong a Morena; dikala tsa bolotsana le tsona ha di mo thabise. 
Proverbs20:24 Mehato ya motho e laolwa ke Morena, ebe jwale motho tsela a ka e tseba jwang?" 
Proverbs20:25 Ho abela Morena mpho ka potlako ke leraba ho motho, ebe hamorao o ipelaetsa ka boitlamo ba hae." 
Proverbs20:26 Kgosi e bohlale e hlokola ba kgopo, e ba ahlole e se na kutlwelobohloko." 
Proverbs20:27 Bone la Morena ke wona moya wa motho, le bonesa bokahare ba pelo ya motho." 
Proverbs20:28 Kgosi e sireletswa ke lerato le botshepehi terone ya yona e tsitsiswa ke lerato. 
Proverbs20:29 Tlotla ya batjha ke matla a bona, moriri o moputswa ke bokgabane ba maqheku." 
Proverbs20:30 Mehwabadi ke yona pheko ya bokgopo, meupa e hlwekisa bokahare ba pelo." 
Proverbs21:1 Pelo ya kgosi e ka atleng tsa Morena, o e isa moo a ratang sa metsi a molatswana." 
Proverbs21:2 Motho o bona tsela tsohle tsa hae, o di bona di nepahetse, empa Morena ke yena ya lekolang pelo." 
Proverbs21:3 Ho etsa ho lokileng le ho phetha toka ho amoheleha ho Morena ho feta sehlabelo. 
Proverbs21:4 Fahleho se hwapileng le pelo e ikgohomosang, e leng lebone la ba kgopo, ke sebe!" 
Proverbs21:5 Merero ya ya mafolofolo e mo tlisetsa nala, lepotlapotla lona le ikisa bofumeng." 
Proverbs21:6 Tlotlo le fumanwang ka ho bua leshano ke mouwane o fetang, le leraba la lefu," 
Proverbs21:7 Dikgoka tsa ba kgopo di tla ba timetsa, hoba ba hana ho etsa ho lokileng." 
Proverbs21:8 Tsela ya ba molato e matswedintsweke, boitshwaro ba ba hlokang kodi bo otlolohile." 
Proverbs21:9 Ho molemo ho iphelela sekgutlwaneng, kahodima marulelo a ntlo, ho ena le ho phela le mmadikomang, ho phela le yena ka tlung e le nngwe." 
Proverbs21:10 Motho ya kgopo o labalabela bobe, ha a qenehele ya ahisaneng le yena." 
Proverbs21:11 Ha mosomi a otlwa, ya se nang tsebo o a hlalefa; ha ya bohlale a rutwa, yena o fumana tsebo." 
Proverbs21:12 Modimo ya lokileng o hlahloba lapa la ya kgopo, o timetsa ya kgopo ka baka la bokgopo ba hae." 
Proverbs21:13 Ya ithibang ditsebe ha mofutsana a lla, le yena o tla lla, empa a ke ke a mamelwa." 
Proverbs21:14 Mpho ya lekunutu e thethefatsa bohale, tjotjo e kgwaetsweng ka kobong, e kokobetsa kgalefo e tlokomang." 
Proverbs21:15 Ha ho sebetswa ka toka ba lokileng ba a thaba, athe ba kgopo bona ba tlalwa ke tshabo." 
Proverbs21:16 Ya kgelohang tsela ya kutlwisiso pheletso ya hae ke ho phomola hara bafu. 
Proverbs21:17 Ya hlanyetsang menyaka o tla fumaneha, ya ratang veine le dimenyemenye ha a ka ke a rua." 
Proverbs21:18 Ya kgopo o rekiswa bakeng sa ya lokileng, ya sa tshepahaleng yena bakeng sa ya kgabane." 
Proverbs21:19 Ho molemo ho iphelela hara lehwatata, ho ena le ho phela le nkwapo, mmadikomang." 
Proverbs21:20 Lapeng la ya bohlale ho tletse menono, le maruo, athe sethoto sona se hafaka se sa qenehele." 
Proverbs21:21 Ya thahasellang ho loka le lerato o tla fumana bophelo le toka le tlotla. 
Proverbs21:22 Ya bohlale o hlasela qhobosheane ya bahale, a heletse marako ao ba a tshepileng." 
Proverbs21:23 Ya kwalang molomo, a tshwara leme la hae, o iphemisa hore a se kene ditsietsing." 
Proverbs21:24 Moikgohomosi ya mabefi o bitswa “mosomi”, boikakaso ba hae ha bo na tekanyo." 
Proverbs21:25 Takatso ya sekgoba ke lefu ho sona, se leqe ho sebetsa, ho sebetsa ka matsoho a sona;" 
Proverbs21:26 se qeta letsatsi se lakatsa, se sa fumane, empa ya lokileng o fana a sa kganane." 
Proverbs21:27 Sehlabelo sa ya kgopo se a nyonyeha, haholo ha a se etsa ka morero o mobe." 
Proverbs21:28 Paki ya leshano e tla timela, polelo tsa ya qalang ka ho mamela di a amoheleha." 
Proverbs21:29 Ya kgopo o sosobanya sefahleho, ya lokileng o hlokomela metsamao ya hae." 
Proverbs21:30 Ha ho bohlale, kelello, kapa morero o ka atlehang ha Morena a sa o rate." 
Proverbs21:31 Pere e kwetlisetswa tsatsi la ntwa, empa tlholo yona ke ya Morena." 
Proverbs22:1 Bitso le letle le molemo ho feta maruo a mangata, ho hlompheha ho molemo ho feta silefera kapa kgauta." 
Proverbs22:2 Morui le mofutsana ba tshwana ka sena: Bobedi ba bona ba bopilwe ke Morena. 
Proverbs22:3 Motho ya sedi o bona kotsi, a e balehe; ya se nang tsebo o hahamalla pele, a be a yo wela." 
Proverbs22:4 Boikokobetso le ho tshaba Morena di tlisa leruo le tlotla le bophelo. 
Proverbs22:5 Meutlwa le maraba di tseleng ya ya kgopo, empa ya ipaballang yena o tla di qoba." 
Proverbs22:6 Ruta ngwana tsela ya ho phela, ha a hodile a ke ke be a fapoha." 
Proverbs22:7 Barui ba laola mafutsana; moadimuwa o fetoha kgoba la moadimi. 
Proverbs22:8 Ya jalang bokgopo o kotula ditsietsi, kgalefo ya hae e ke ke ya mo thusa ka letho." 
Proverbs22:9 Motho ya fanang a thabile o tla hlohonolofatswa, hobane yena o fepa mafutsana." 
Proverbs22:10 Leleka mosomi mme qabang di tla fela, diphapang le mahlapa le tsona di kgaotse." 
Proverbs22:11 Ya ratang pelo e hlwekileng, eo polelo tsa hae di tletseng mohau, kgosi e tla ba motswalle wa hae." 
Proverbs22:12 Mahlo a Morena a fadimehela tsebo, empa o nyopisa polelo tsa ya sa tshepahaleng." 
Proverbs22:13 Sekgoba se re: “Tau ke ena kantle!” kapa se re: “Ke tla bolaelwa diterateng!” 
Proverbs22:14 Molomo wa sehlola ke lemena le tebileng; ya halefetsweng ke Morena o tla wela ka ho lona. 
Proverbs22:15 Bothoto bo tlameletswe ka pelong ya ngwana, empa thupa ya tayo e tla bo falatsa ka ho yena." 
Proverbs22:16 Ya tlatlapang mofutsana ho ikekeletsa leruo, a bile a etsetsa barui dimpho, o tla futsaneha." 
Proverbs22:17 Thea tsebe o mamele polelo tsa ba bohlale, o ele hloko ho ithuta tseo ke di tsebang," 
Proverbs22:18 hobane ho monate ha o di boloka ka pelong ya hao, kaofela ha tsona di dutse molomong wa hao." 
Proverbs22:19 Kajeno ke hlile ke ruta wena, Wena ka seqo, e le hore o tlo tsebe ho tshepa Morena." 
Proverbs22:20 Ke o ngoletse polelo tse mashome a mararo, tse nang le keletso le tsebo," 
Proverbs22:21 tse o rutang botshepehi le ho bua nnete, ya o rommeng o tlo mmolelle nnete." 
Proverbs22:22 O se tlatlape mofutsana hobane e le mofutsana, o se sotle bahloki ka kgotla," 
Proverbs22:23 hobane Morena o tla emela nyewe ya bona; ba ba jeleng le bona Morena o tla ba fedisa. 
Proverbs22:24 O se ke wa etsa setswalle le motho ya bohale, o se tlwaelane le sefelapelwana," 
Proverbs22:25 esere wa ithuta mekgwa ya sona, yaba le wena o a tshwaswa."
